title: From Cradle to Cloud: A Life Cycle Review of AI's Environmental Footprint
summary: The rapid growth in the deployment and scale of modern artificial intelligence (AI) systems has intensified concerns regarding their environmental impacts, yet we still lack a comprehensive view of where and how these impacts arise across the AI life cycle. In order to shed more light on this question, we conduct a structured, comprehensive literature review of scientific papers and technical reports that examine different aspects of AI's environmental footprint. Using an eight-stage life cycle framework, spanning hardware manufacturing, infrastructure construction, data gathering and preprocessing, model experimentation, training, post-training adaptation, deployment, inference, and end-of-life, we systematically map which stages are covered, the metrics reported at each stage, and the methodological choices made. We then draw conclusions about the information we gathered, finding that although life cycle language is increasingly common in discussions of "green" or "sustainable" AI, its definition remains unclear -- while some studies focus solely on model training and inference, others encompass broader measurements such as data collection, infrastructure, and embodied emissions. We also find that reporting practices rely predominantly on CO2e estimates derived from coarse proxies, with limited attention dedicated to water usage, materials manufacturing, and multi-impact life cycle assessment, making it difficult to compare and aggregate true results. Building on these findings, we propose measurement and reporting approaches to support more comprehensive, comparable and policy-relevant assessments of AI's environmental impacts.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对AI全生命周期（硬件制造、基础设施、数据处理、模型实验、训练、后训练适应、部署推理、报废）的系统文献综述，发现虽然"绿色AI"术语日益流行，但定义模糊、报告实践主要依赖CO2e粗粒度代理指标，缺乏对水耗、材料制造和多影响生命周期评估的关注，并提出了更全面、可比较的测量与报告方法。
AI.motivation: 现代AI系统规模快速增长，对其环境影响的担忧加剧，但缺乏对AI全生命周期中环境影响来源和方式的全面视角。
AI.method: 采用八阶段生命周期框架（硬件制造、基础设施建设、数据收集与预处理、模型实验、训练、后训练适应、部署推理、报废阶段），对相关科学论文和技术报告进行结构化、全面的文献综述，系统映射各阶段的覆盖情况、报告指标和方法选择。
AI.result: 1）"绿色AI"或"可持续AI"的生命周期语言日益常见，但定义模糊——有的仅关注训练和推理，有的涵盖数据收集、基础设施和隐含排放等更广泛测量；2）报告实践主要依赖基于粗略代理变量的CO2e估算，水耗、材料制造和多影响生命周期评估关注不足，导致难以比较和汇总真实结果。
AI.conclusion: 基于研究结果，提出测量和报告方法，以支持更全面、可比较且对政策相关的AI环境影响评估。

title: Numerical methods for lambda quantiles: robust evaluation and portfolio optimisation
comment: Accepted for publication in SIAM Journal on Financial Mathematics
summary: Lambda quantiles, originally introduced as lambda value at risk, generalise the classical value at risk by allowing for a variable confidence level. This work presents efficient algorithms for computing lambda quantiles and demonstrates their application in portfolio optimisation. We first develop a robust algorithm, Λ-Newton-Bis, that combines Newton's method with a bisection strategy to ensure global convergence. The algorithm handles potential discontinuities and achieves local quadratic convergence under standard regularity assumptions. To address cases with multiple roots, we also propose an interval analysis approach. We then demonstrate the algorithm's computational efficiency and practical relevance within a portfolio optimization framework. To this end, we develop two alternative solution methods that incorporate the Λ-Newton-Bis procedure. Numerical experiments confirm the algorithm's convergence properties and highlight its computational advantages in optimization tasks based on lambda quantiles.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合牛顿法与二分策略的Λ-Newton-Bis算法，用于高效计算Lambda分位数（一种变置信水平的风险度量），并将其应用于投资组合优化问题，数值实验验证了算法的全局收敛性、局部二次收敛性及计算优势。
AI.motivation: Lambda分位数推广了经典的风险价值（VaR），允许置信水平可变，但现有计算方法效率不高，需要开发更稳健高效的算法以支持其在投资组合优化等实际场景中的应用。
AI.method: 提出Λ-Newton-Bis算法，融合牛顿法的局部快速收敛与二分法的全局收敛保证；针对多根情况引入区间分析方法；并将该算法嵌入两种投资组合优化求解方法中。
AI.result: 数值实验确认了算法在标准正则性假设下的局部二次收敛性，证明了其处理潜在不连续性的能力，并在基于Lambda分位数的投资组合优化任务中展示了明显的计算优势。
AI.conclusion: Λ-Newton-Bis算法是一种高效、稳健的Lambda分位数计算方法，可成功应用于投资组合优化，为变置信水平风险度量下的优化问题提供了实用的求解工具。

title: LLMorphism: When humans come to see themselves as language models
summary: LLMorphism is the biased belief that human cognition works like a large language model. I argue that the rise of conversational LLMs may make this bias increasingly psychologically available. When artificial systems produce human-like language, people may draw a reverse inference: if LLMs can speak like humans, perhaps humans think like LLMs. This inference is biased because similarity at the level of linguistic output does not imply similarity in cognitive architecture. Yet, LLMorphism may spread through two mechanisms: analogical transfer, whereby features of LLMs are projected onto humans, and metaphorical availability, whereby LLM vocabulary becomes a culturally salient vocabulary for describing thought. I distinguish LLMorphism from mechanomorphism, anthropomorphism, computationalism, dehumanization, objectification, and predictive-processing theories of mind. I outline its implications for work, education, responsibility, healthcare, communication, creativity, and human dignity, while also discussing boundary conditions and forms of resistance. I conclude that the public debate may be missing half of the problem: the issue is not only whether we are attributing too much mind to machines, but also whether we are beginning to attribute too little mind to humans.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"LLMorphism"概念，指人们可能因LLM能像人类一样说话，而错误地认为人类认知也像LLM一样工作。这种偏见可能通过类比迁移和隐喻可及性两种机制传播，导致对人类的"去心智化"——不仅高估机器的心智，也低估人类的心智。
AI.motivation: 作者认为随着对话式LLM的兴起，公众可能产生一种新的认知偏见：因为LLM能生成类人语言，人们反向推论人类思维也像LLM一样运作。这种偏见尚未被充分识别和讨论，但其影响可能深远。
AI.method: 概念分析与理论论证。作者定义了LLMorphism这一新概念，从类比迁移和隐喻可及性两个机制解释其传播，并将其与既有概念（机械形态论、拟人论、计算主义等）进行区分。
AI.result: 识别出一种新的认知偏见形式，指出其传播的两个核心机制，并勾勒了该偏见在工作、教育、责任归属、医疗、沟通、创造力和人类尊严等领域的广泛影响。
AI.conclusion: 公众讨论可能忽略了问题的一半：不仅是人类过度赋予机器心智（拟人化），也包括人类开始淡化自身的心智（去心智化）。我们需要警惕LLMorphism对人性理解的侵蚀。

title: A Geometry-Aware Residual Correction of Hagan's SABR Implied Volatility Formula
summary: This paper proposes a hybrid methodology to improve the approximation of SABR (Stochastic Alpha Beta Rho) implied volatility by combining analytical structure with machine learning. The approach augments the neural-network input representation with geometric features derived from the stochastic differential equations of the SABR model. Unlike approaches that fully replace analytical formulas with black-box models, the proposed framework preserves the analytical backbone of the model. The hybridization operates along two complementary dimensions. First, geometry-aware variables reflecting intrinsic properties of the SABR dynamics are used as structured inputs to the network. Second, the neural network is trained to learn the residual error relative to Hagan's closed-form approximation rather than implied volatility directly. The resulting model acts as a structured residual correction to the analytical formula, retaining interpretability while capturing higher-order effects that are not included in the asymptotic expansion. Numerical experiments conducted over realistic parameter domains, as well as stressed environments, show that the method improves accuracy and robustness compared with both analytical approximations and standard neural-network approaches. Because the correction remains lightweight and structurally consistent with the underlying model, the framework is well suited for real-time pricing and calibration in practical trading environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合方法，通过将几何特征作为结构化输入、让神经网络学习Hagan解析近似的残差误差，提升SABR隐含波动率的近似精度，兼顾可解释性与准确性，适用于实时定价与校准。
AI.motivation: 现有SABR模型的解析近似（如Hagan公式）难以捕捉高阶效应，而纯黑盒机器学习方法虽精度高但缺乏可解释性且与模型结构脱节。本文旨在结合两者优势，保留解析框架的同时利用机器学习提升精度。
AI.method: 提出混合框架：1）从SABR随机微分方程中提取几何特征作为神经网络的结构化输入；2）神经网络学习Hagan解析近似的残差误差（而非直接预测隐含波动率），作为结构化残差修正项，保留解析主干。
AI.result: 在真实参数域和应力环境下，该方法在精度和鲁棒性上均优于纯解析近似和标准神经网络方法。
AI.conclusion: 该混合方法轻量且与底层模型结构一致，适用于实际交易环境中的实时定价与校准。

title: The Pedagogy of AI Mistakes: Fostering Higher-Order Thinking
comment: Accepted to AIED-2026; includes supplementary material
summary: As generative AI becomes increasingly integrated into higher education, its frequent errors and hallucinations, often seen as limitations, offer a unique pedagogical opportunity. By framing AI as a ``learning companion'' whose imperfect outputs prompt analysis, evaluation, and reflection, we argue that instructors can engage students in the fundamental processes of higher-order thinking. This paper presents a design-oriented study in which an AI-integrated syllabus in a \textit{database design} course deliberately leverages AI's limitations to foster critical thinking and higher-order cognitive skills aligned with Bloom's taxonomy of learning. Using a mixed-methods approach, we examine how structured interaction with AI-generated errors supports metacognitive engagement, reinforces disciplinary rigor, and relates to students' perceived AI literacy and subject-matter competency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将生成式AI的错误和幻觉视为教学机会，通过在数据库设计课程中有意利用AI的局限性，促进学生高阶思维发展。混合方法研究表明，这种结构与AI错误互动的方式支持元认知参与、强化学科严谨性，并提升学生感知的AI素养和学科能力。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI在高等教育中频繁出现错误和幻觉，通常被视为局限。作者认为这些不完美输出反而可作为"学习伙伴"，促使学生进行分析、评估和反思，从而激发高阶思维。
AI.method: 在数据库设计课程中设计AI集成教学大纲，故意利用AI的局限性；采用混合方法研究，考察结构化AI错误互动如何支持元认知参与和学科严谨性。
AI.result: 结构化地与AI错误互动能够促进元认知参与、强化学科严谨性，并与学生感知的AI素养和学科能力正相关。
AI.conclusion: AI的错误和幻觉可被有意设计为教学工具，通过引导学生批判性分析AI输出，有效促进高阶认知能力发展。

title: Multi-Dimensional Behavioral Evaluation of Agentic Stock Prediction Systems Using LLM Judges with Closed-Loop Reinforcement Learning Feedback
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, 8 tables. Short Communication submitted to Knowledge-Based Systems (Elsevier)
summary: Agentic stock prediction systems make sequences of interdependent decisions (regime detection, pathway routing, reinforcement learning control) whose individual quality is hidden by aggregate metrics such as mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) or directional accuracy. We present a behavioral evaluation framework that addresses this gap. Behavioral traces logged at every autonomous decision point are grouped into five-day episodes and scored along six domain-specific dimensions (regime detection, routing, adaptation, risk calibration, strategy coherence, error recovery) by an ensemble of three large language model (LLM) judges (GPT 5.4, Claude 4.6 Opus, Gemini 3.1 Pro). Perturbation-based validation on 420 episodes yields targeted score drops of $-1.6$ to $-2.4$ on intended dimensions versus an average of $-0.32$ on the remaining five, with cross-model agreement up to Krippendorff's $α= 0.85$. The composite behavioral score, used here only for cross-episode reporting, correlates at $ρ= 0.72$ with realized 20-day Sharpe ratio from offline backtesting. Closing the loop, the framework converts deficient per-dimension scores into a credit-assigned penalty term added to the Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) reward. Three short fine-tuning cycles, all confined to the validation period, produce on the held-out 2017-2025 test period a one-day MAPE reduction from 0.61% to 0.54% (an 11.5% relative reduction; $p<0.001$, Cohen's $d=0.31$), a directional accuracy increase from 71% to 74%, and an 18% Sharpe ratio improvement (95% bootstrap CI [8.2%, 27.4%]), with gains concentrated in high-volatility episodes where the original system was most behaviorally deficient. Results are from offline backtesting and do not address effects specific to live deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个针对智能体股票预测系统的行为评估框架，通过LLM裁判对六维行为指标评分，并将缺陷转化为SAC奖励的惩罚项，经三轮微调使MAPE降低11.5%、方向准确率提升至74%、Sharpe比率提升18%。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体股票预测系统的评估依赖MAPE、方向准确率等聚合指标，无法揭示各决策模块（如状态检测、路径路由、强化学习控制）的独立质量，亟需细粒度的行为级评估方法。
AI.method: 1) 将每个自主决策点的行为轨迹按五天为一个episode分组；2) 沿六个维度（状态检测、路由、自适应、风险校准、策略一致性、错误恢复）由三个LLM裁判（GPT 5.4、Claude 4.6 Opus、Gemini 3.1 Pro）评分；3) 基于扰动的验证（420 episodes）；4) 将低分维度的信用分配惩罚项加入SAC奖励，进行三轮微调。
AI.result: 扰动验证显示目标维度得分下降-1.6至-2.4，其他维度仅下降-0.32；跨模型一致性Krippendorff's α达0.85；行为综合分与20天Sharpe比率相关ρ=0.72；微调后MAPE从0.61%降至0.54%（降幅11.5%），方向准确率从71%升至74%，Sharpe比率提升18%（95% CI [8.2%, 27.4%]），改进集中于高波动episode。
AI.conclusion: 行为评估框架能有效识别并改善智能体股票预测系统的行为缺陷，尤其在高波动场景下表现显著；但结果仅基于离线回测，未考虑实盘部署中的效果。

title: Rigorous Interpretation Is a Form of Evaluation
summary: Current machine learning models are evaluated through behavioral snapshots, with benchmark accuracies, win rates and outcome-based metrics. Model explanations and evaluations, however, are fundamentally intertwined: understanding why a model produces a behavior can be as important as measuring what it produces. If we trusted interpretability, we argue that it can serve not merely as diagnostics but as a richer and more principled form of model evaluation beyond surface-level performance metrics. We explore three ways interpretability can function evaluatively: (1) fixing problems by identifying the root causes of unwanted behavior, (2) detecting subtly faulty mechanisms that invalidate model outputs, and (3) predicting potential issues before they arise by fully understanding the model's weaknesses. To fulfill its evaluative potential, we argue that interpretability methods must generate claims that are falsifiable, reproducible, and predictive -- that is, interpretability must meet scientific standards.

AI.tldr: 本文提出可解释性不仅可作为诊断工具，更可作为一种比表面性能指标更丰富、更规范化的模型评估方式，并探讨了三种评估功能：修复问题根源、检测微妙故障机制、预测潜在问题。强调可解释性方法必须满足可证伪、可复现、可预测的科学标准。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习模型评估依赖行为快照（基准准确率、胜率等结果指标），但模型解释与评估本质上是相互交织的——理解模型为何产生某种行为与衡量其产生什么同等重要。
AI.method: 通过论述三个维度探讨可解释性的评估价值：(1)定位根因修复问题；(2)检测隐藏的错误机制；(3)预测未来潜在问题。并提出可解释性方法需满足科学标准（可证伪、可复现、可预测）。
AI.result: 提出了可解释性可作为超越表面性能指标的、更原则性的评估框架，并明确了其科学化的必要条件。
AI.conclusion: 可解释性有潜力成为更丰富的评估方式，但前提是其方法必须达到科学标准。

title: INEUS: Iterative Neural Solver for High-Dimensional PIDEs
summary: In this paper, we introduce INEUS, a meshfree iterative neural solver for partial integro-differential equations (PIDEs). The method replaces the explicit evaluation of nonlocal jump integrals with single-jump sampling and reformulates PIDE solving as a sequence of recursive regression problems. Like Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), INEUS learns global solutions over the entire space-time domain, yet it offers a more efficient treatment of nonlocal terms and avoids the computationally expensive differentiation of full PIDE residuals. These features make INEUS particularly well suited for high-dimensional PDEs and PIDEs. Supported by a contraction-based convergence proof for linear PIDEs, our numerical experiments show that INEUS delivers accurate and scalable solutions for various high-dimensional linear and nonlinear examples.

AI.tldr: INEUS是一种无网格迭代神经求解器，通过单跳采样替代非局部跳跃积分，将偏积分微分方程求解转化为递归回归问题，在保持全局学习能力的同时高效处理高维问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法（如PINNs）在处理非局部项和全PIDE残差微分时计算代价高昂，尤其在高维场景下效率低下，亟需更高效的求解方案。
AI.method: 采用无网格迭代方式，用单跳采样替代显式计算非局部跳跃积分，将PIDE求解重构为递归回归问题序列。
AI.result: 基于线性PIDE的压缩映射收敛证明，数值实验表明INEUS在多种高维线性和非线性示例中实现了准确且可扩展的解。
AI.conclusion: INEUS特别适合高维PDE和PIDE求解，在效率和处理非局部项方面优于PINNs。

title: Meta-learning for sample-efficient Bayesian optimisation of fed-batch processes
summary: The optimisation of fed-batch (bio)chemical process recipes is subject to inherent, underlying, and unmeasurable fluctuations across batches, whose trajectories are difficult to model and costly to measure. Bayesian Optimisation (BayesOpt) is a powerful tool for sampling and optimisation of expensive-to-measure functions. Gaussian Processes (GPs), the surrogate models used in BayesOpt, are static, forecast poorly, and lack generalisation across experiments, limiting their applicability to time-varying batch processes with stochastic parameters, i.e., process fluctuations. This work investigates System-Aware Neural ODE Processes (SANODEP) as a meta-learning model to overcome the limitations of GPs and increase few-shot optimisation performance in BayesOpt. Using a penicillin batch production case study, we find that SANODEP outperforms GP-based BayesOpt in the low-data regime, resulting in improved objectives when few experimental runs are performed. These improvements are observed in both on- and off-distribution batches, highlighting the generalisation capabilities of SANODEP. Using this approach, batch process operators can accelerate the initial optimisation steps in BayesOpt by deploying meta-learning or optimise the process with fewer experiments when the experimental cost is high.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将系统感知神经ODE过程（SANODEP）作为元学习模型，替代高斯过程（GP）用于贝叶斯优化，以解决分批（生物）化学反应过程中难以建模和测量的批次波动问题。在青霉素分批生产的案例研究中，SANODEP在低数据 regime 下优于基于GP的贝叶斯优化，在分布内和分布外批次中均表现出更好的泛化能力和优化目标。
AI.motivation: 分批（生物）化学反应过程的优化受到固有的、潜在的、不可测量的批次间波动影响，这些轨迹难以建模且测量成本高。传统贝叶斯优化中使用的高斯过程模型是静态的、预测能力差且缺乏跨实验的泛化能力，限制了其在具有随机参数（即过程波动）的时变批次过程中的适用性。
AI.method: 提出系统感知神经ODE过程（SANODEP）作为元学习模型，替代高斯过程作为贝叶斯优化的代理模型，以克服GP的局限性并提升少样本优化性能。
AI.result: 在青霉素分批生产案例中，SANODEP在低数据 regime 下优于基于GP的贝叶斯优化，在分布内和分布外批次中均获得改进的优化目标，展现了更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 分批过程操作者可以通过部署元学习加速贝叶斯优化的初始优化步骤，或在实验成本高昂时用更少的实验完成过程优化。

title: A Review of Large Language Models for Stock Price Forecasting from a Hedge-Fund Perspective
comment: Accepted at the IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Spain, May 8--10, 2026
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in quantitative finance for stock price forecasting. This review synthesizes recent applications of LLMs in this domain, including extracting sentiment from financial news and social media, analyzing financial reports and earnings-call transcripts, tokenizing or symbolizing stock price series, and constructing multi-agent trading systems. Particular attention is paid to practical pitfalls that are often understated in the literature, such as fragility in sentiment analysis, dataset and horizon design, performance evaluation metrics, data leakage, illiquidity premia, and limits of stock price predictability. Organized from a hedge-fund perspective, the review is intended to guide both academic researchers and hedge fund managers in integrating LLMs into real-world trading pipelines and in stress-testing their robustness under realistic market frictions.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了大语言模型（LLMs）在量化金融中用于股票价格预测的应用，涵盖情感提取、财报分析、价格序列符号化及多智能体交易系统等方向，并从对冲基金视角重点指出了实际部署中的关键陷阱（如数据泄露、流动性溢价、可预测性限制等）。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLMs在金融预测中的应用日益广泛，但现有文献往往低估或回避了实际部署中的关键风险与局限性。作者希望通过从对冲基金实战视角进行系统性梳理，帮助学术界和业界更清醒地认识LLMs在股票预测中的真实能力与边界。
AI.method: 采用文献综述方法，系统收集并归类LLMs在金融预测中的主要应用方向（情感分析、财报分析、价格序列符号化、多智能体系统），并对每类方法在实际落地中存在的陷阱（如情感分析的脆弱性、数据集与时间窗口设计、评估指标偏差、数据泄漏、非流动性溢价、可预测性上限）进行批判性分析。
AI.result: 识别出多个常被忽略但至关重要的实践陷阱：①情感分析对外部噪声敏感，鲁棒性差；②数据集构建和预测时间窗口设计不当会导致评估结果虚高；③常用评估指标（如MSE、MAE）无法反映交易现实；④数据泄漏普遍存在且难以根除；⑤非流动性资产的价格信号具有欺骗性；⑥股票价格可预测性存在理论上的上限。
AI.conclusion: 该综述从对冲基金实战出发，强调在将LLMs整合到真实交易管线时，必须对上述陷阱进行压力测试。研究为学术界和基金经理提供了将LLMs用于量化投资的务实指导，呼吁在评估模型时采用更贴近市场现实的稳健性检验。

title: Maximizing Rollout Informativeness under a Fixed Budget: A Submodular View of Tree Search for Tool-Use Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary:
We formalize Rollout Informativeness under a Fixed Budget (RIFB) as the expected non-vanishing policy-gradient mass that a tool-use rollout set injects into Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). We prove that any budget-agnostic independent sampler suffers a collapse rate bounded away from zero for hard prompts regardless of the budget. Motivated by this, we recast intermediate state selection as a monotone submodular maximization problem, where a greedy one-step selector enjoys a 1 minus 1/e approximation guarantee.
  Our Uncertainty-aware Upper Confidence Bound (UUCB) terms arise as closed-form marginal gains of this objective. This turns the token-level entropy bonus from an empirical trick into an analytic consequence of the formulation. We present InfoTree, a training-time tree-search framework coupling UUCB with a learned Adaptive Budget Allocator (ABA) and an asynchronous Speculative Expansion scheme.
  ABA rescues prompts whose initial tree is wasted on uniform outcomes, lifting the mixed-outcome ratio from 58.1 percent to 76.3 percent with less than 5 percent budget overhead. Speculative Expansion reduces wall-clock overhead from 14.3 percent to 4.8 percent by tolerating bounded staleness in UUCB scores.
  Across nine benchmarks spanning math reasoning (AIME 2024 and 2025, MATH-500, OlympiadBench, USAMO), web-search agents (GAIA, HLE-100, BrowseComp-lite), and tool-rich coding and OS agents (APPS-verified, AgentBench-OS), InfoTree outperforms flat GRPO, DeepSearch, Tree-GRPO, AT2PO, CW-GRPO, and RC-GRPO. Head-to-head compositions with Tree-GRPO prefix sharing and CW-GRPO contribution weights deliver further gains, confirming that our selector operates orthogonally to rollout reuse and trajectory re-weighting. A 5 by 5 by 5 robustness grid reveals that over three quarters of the hyperparameter space lies on a performance plateau, confirming UUCB robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InfoTree框架，通过形式化固定预算下的展开信息量（RIFB），将中间状态选择建模为单调子模最大化问题，推导出不确定性感知上置信界（UUCB）项，并引入自适应预算分配器（ABA）和异步推测扩展（Speculative Expansion）机制。在9个基准测试中，InfoTree显著优于多种基线方法，且UUCB具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有GRPO方法在工具使用场景下，预算分配是固定的且与提示难度解耦，导致"硬提示"的策略梯度随预算增加而消失（collapse rate bounded away from zero）。作者希望形式化这一问题并提出理论驱动的解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 形式化RIFB目标函数；2) 将中间状态选择转化为单调子模最大化问题，贪心选择器提供1-1/e近似保证；3) 推导UUCB作为边际增益的闭式解，将token级熵奖励从经验技巧变为解析结论；4) 提出InfoTree框架，包含UUCB、自适应预算分配器（ABA）和异步推测扩展（Speculative Expansion）。
AI.result: ABA将混合结果比率从58.1%提升至76.3%，预算开销低于5%；Speculative Expansion将墙钟开销从14.3%降至4.8%。在9个基准上InfoTree优于flat GRPO、DeepSearch等基线。5×5×5鲁棒性网格显示超过3/4的超参数空间位于性能稳定平台。
AI.conclusion: 本文从理论上统一了预算感知的展开选择和熵正则化，验证了UUCB的鲁棒性，且证明选择器与rollout重用和轨迹重加权是正交的，可组合使用以进一步提升性能。

title: Maximal Controlled Invariant-MPC: Enhancing Feasibility and Reducing Conservatism through Terminal CBF Constraint in Safety-Critical Control
summary: Optimal control for safety-critical systems is often dependent on the conservativeness of constraints. Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) serve as a medium to represent such constraints, but constructing a minimally conservative CBF is a computationally intractable problem. Therefore, approaches that can guarantee safety while reducing conservatism will help improve the optimality of the system under consideration. Here, we present a Model Predictive Control (MPC) formulation using CBF as a terminal constraint, which is proven to improve feasibility and reachable sets with increasing prediction horizon. The constructive nature of the proofs allows for warm-starting the nonlinear optimization problem, thereby reducing the computational time substantially. Simulations are set up for a simple nonholonomic system to numerically validate the results, and it is observed that the number of infeasible points decreased by a factor of 1.7 to 2.7. The increase in reachable state space was demonstrated by the ability of the system to track trajectories that are entirely inside the unsafe region of the control barrier function.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将控制屏障函数（CBF）作为终端约束的模型预测控制（MPC）方法，通过增加预测时域来提高可行性和可达集，并利用温启动技术降低计算时间。仿真验证表明，该方法将不可行点减少了1.7到2.7倍，并扩展了可达状态空间。
AI.motivation: 安全关键系统的最优控制常受限于约束的保守性。CBF虽能表示安全约束，但构造最小保守的CBF在计算上难以处理。因此，需要在保证安全的同时减少保守性，以提升系统最优性。
AI.method: 提出一种将CBF作为终端约束的MPC框架。通过理论证明：增加预测时域可改善可行性和可达集；利用构造性证明的特性实现温启动，以加速非线性优化问题的求解。
AI.result: 在非完整约束系统的仿真中，不可行点数量减少了1.7到2.7倍；系统能够追踪完全位于CBF不安全区域内的轨迹，证明了可达状态空间的扩展。
AI.conclusion: 将CBF作为终端约束集成到MPC中，可有效降低约束保守性、扩大可达集，同时通过温启动机制提升计算效率，为安全关键系统的实时最优控制提供了可行方案。

title: Does social media information affect individual investor disposition effect? Evidence from Xueqiu
summary: The irrational behavior of investors selling profitable assets too early while holding onto losing assets for too long is known as the disposition effect. Due to the development of the Internet, the information environment for individual investors has been greatly improved. As an important source of information for individual investors, whether social media can improve investors' behavioral biases and return to rational expectations is a question worth studying. Based on the post data and actual trading data of the social investment platform Xueqiu.com, this paper studies the impact of social media information on the disposition effect of individual investors. The research results show that social media information can significantly reduce the disposition effect. Furthermore, it is through negative information that social media information reduces the disposition effect. When presented with negative information, individual investors will gradually become more rational in adjusting their positions. At the individual level, factors such as investment experience, users followed, region, and gender can all influence the effectiveness of the information acquired by individual investors in reducing the disposition effect.

AI.tldr: 本文利用雪球平台数据，研究社交媒体信息对个人投资者处置效应的影响。发现社交媒体信息（尤其是负面信息）能显著减少投资者过早卖出盈利资产、过晚卖出亏损资产的非理性行为。
AI.motivation: 探究互联网时代下，社交媒体作为个人投资者重要信息来源，是否能够改善投资者行为偏差，使其回归理性预期。
AI.method: 基于雪球网的帖子数据和实际交易数据，进行实证分析，研究社交媒体信息对个人投资者处置效应的影响。
AI.result: 社交媒体信息显著降低了处置效应；这种降低效应主要通过负面信息实现；投资经验、关注用户、地区和性别等因素会影响信息降低处置效应的效果。
AI.conclusion: 社交媒体信息能够帮助个人投资者减少处置效应这一行为偏差，负面信息在其中起关键作用，且该效果受投资者个体特征调节。

title: AdaGATE: Adaptive Gap-Aware Token-Efficient Evidence Assembly for Multi-Hop Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) remains brittle on multi-hop questions in realistic deployment settings, where retrieved evidence may be noisy or redundant and only limited context can be passed to the generator. Existing controllers address parts of this problem, but typically either expand context additively, select from a fixed top-k set, or optimize relevance without explicitly repairing missing bridge facts. We propose AdaGATE, a training-free evidence controller for multi-hop RAG that frames evidence selection as a token-constrained repair problem. AdaGATE combines entity centric gap tracking, targeted micro-query generation, and a utility based selection mechanism that balances gap coverage, corroboration, novelty, redundancy, and direct question relevance. We evaluate AdaGATE on HotpotQA under clean, redundancy, and noise injected retrieval conditions. Across all three settings, AdaGATE achieves the best evidence F1 among the compared controllers, reaching 62.3% on clean data and 71.2% under redundancy injection, while using 2.6x fewer input tokens than Adaptive-k. These results suggest that explicit gap-aware repair, combined with token-efficient evidence selection, improves robustness in multi-hop RAG under imperfect retrieval. Our code and evaluation pipeline are available at https://github.com/eliguo/AdaGATE.

AI.tldr: AdaGATE是一个无需训练的检索增强生成（RAG）证据控制器，通过实体中心缺口追踪、微查询生成和基于效用的选择机制，在token约束下修复多跳问题中的缺失桥接信息，在HotpotQA上取得优于现有方法的证据F1值，同时大幅减少输入token数量。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统在处理多跳问题时脆弱，检索到的证据常含噪声或冗余，且生成器只能接收有限上下文。现有控制器要么扩展上下文，要么从固定top-k中选择，或优化相关性而没有明确修复缺失的桥接事实。
AI.method: AdaGATE将证据选择建模为带token约束的修复问题，结合三种机制：(1) 实体中心的缺口追踪，(2) 定向微查询生成，以及 (3) 基于效用的选择机制，平衡缺口覆盖、佐证、新颖性、冗余度和直接问题相关性。
AI.result: 在HotpotQA的干净数据、冗余注入和噪声注入三种设置下，AdaGATE均取得最佳证据F1值：干净数据62.3%，冗余注入下71.2%，比Adaptive-k节省2.6倍输入token。
AI.conclusion: 显式的缺口感知修复结合token高效的证据选择，能够在不完美检索条件下提升多跳RAG的鲁棒性。

title: Understanding Annotator Safety Policy with Interpretability
summary:
Safety policies define what constitutes safe and unsafe AI outputs, guiding data annotation and model development. However, annotation disagreement is pervasive and can stem from multiple sources such as operational failures (annotators misunderstand or misexecute the task), policy ambiguity (policy wording leaves room for interpretation), or value pluralism (different annotators hold different perspectives on safety). Distinguishing these sources matters. For example, operational failures call for quality control, ambiguity calls for policy clarification, and pluralism calls for deliberation about incorporating diverse perspectives. Yet understanding why annotators disagree is difficult. Directly asking annotators for their reasoning is costly, substantially increasing annotation burden, and can be unreliable for both human and LLM annotators as self-reported reasoning often fails to reflect actual decision processes.
  We introduce Annotator Policy Models (APMs), interpretable models that learn annotators' internal safety policies from labeling behavior alone, making annotator reasoning visible and comparable without additional annotation effort. We validate that APMs accurately model annotator safety policy (>80% accuracy), faithfully predict responses to counterfactual edits, and recover known policy differences in controlled settings. Applying APMs to LLM and human annotations, we demonstrate two core applications: (1) surfacing policy ambiguity by revealing how annotators interpret safety instructions differently, and (2) surfacing value pluralism by uncovering systematic differences in safety priorities across demographic groups. Together, these capabilities support more targeted, transparent, and inclusive safety policy design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出注释者策略模型（APMs），通过分析标注行为来推断注释者内部安全策略，以此区分标注分歧来源（操作失误、政策模糊、价值多元），无需额外标注成本。实验验证模型准确率>80%，能可靠预测反事实编辑响应，并在LLM和人类标注中成功识别政策模糊和价值多元问题。
AI.motivation: 安全政策的标注分歧来源多样（操作失误、政策模糊、价值多元），但现有方法难以区分这些来源。直接询问注释者理由成本高且不可靠，因此需要一种能从标注行为本身推断注释者推理过程的方法。
AI.method: 提出注释者策略模型（APMs），从标注行为中学习注释者的内部安全策略，生成可解释的模型来呈现和比较注释者的推理逻辑。
AI.result: APMs准确建模注释者安全策略（准确率>80%），能可靠预测反事实编辑响应，并在受控实验中恢复已知的政策差异。在LLM和人类标注中成功识别政策模糊和价值多元现象。
AI.conclusion: APMs能够在不增加标注负担的情况下揭示标注分歧的深层原因，支持更具针对性、透明性和包容性的安全政策设计。

title: Causal State-Dependent Local Projections
summary: State-dependent local projections (LPs) are widely used to estimate how responses to exogenous aggregate shocks vary as a function of observable state variables, yet their causal interpretation remains unclear. We show that this interpretation obtains under the sufficient condition that the conditional mean is linear in the aggregate shock at each horizon, and that this condition holds in a broad class of canonical micro-macro environments, including first-order perturbation solutions of heterogeneous-agent models and macro-finance models. Under this condition, LPs recover causal impulse responses without requiring specification of the full data-generating process. We further show that the causal interpretation of state-dependent LPs is robust to the choice of state variable. By contrast, commonly used linear interaction LPs generally fail to recover causal objects. We therefore develop a sieve-based nonparametric LP estimator that restores causal interpretation and delivers valid pointwise and uniform inference in micro-macro panels. Empirically, allowing for nonparametric state dependence materially changes both the pattern of heterogeneous firm investment responses and their aggregate implications for the transmission of monetary policy shocks.

AI.tldr: 本文阐明状态依赖局部投影法（LP）在微观-宏观环境中的因果解释条件：只要条件均值对 Aggregate Shock 线性，LP 即可恢复因果脉冲响应，且对状态变量选择稳健；同时提出非参数筛 LP 估计量，改进传统线性交互 LP 的偏误。
AI.motivation: 状态依赖局部投影法被广泛用于估计宏观经济冲击的异质性响应，但其因果解释基础尚未明确，容易导致错误推断。
AI.method: 1) 证明条件均值对 aggregate shock 线性是 LP 因果解释的充分条件；2) 指出该条件在异质性主体模型的一阶扰动解等环境中成立；3) 开发非参数筛 LP 估计量解决传统线性交互 LP 的因果失效问题。
AI.result: 非参数状态依赖显著改变了企业投资异质性响应的模式及其对货币政策传导的加总含义。
AI.conclusion: 状态依赖 LP 在正确条件下具有因果解释力，但需避免线性交互形式的误用，应转向非参数估计以保证推断有效性。

title: Funding-Aware Optimal Market Making for Perpetual DEXs
summary: This paper studies optimal liquidity provision for perpetual contracts when the funding rate is a stochastic state variable. The core extension to classical market making is the coupling between inventory and funding payments: inventory creates both mark-to-market exposure and a state-dependent funding cash flow. A reduced inventory-funding control problem is formulated, solved with a monotone finite-difference Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman scheme, and bid and ask quote offsets are recovered from discrete inventory value differences. Funding is calibrated on Hyperliquid ETH, BTC, and SOL perpetual data. Gaussian OU funding is retained as a tractable diffusion baseline, while OU-plus-jump diagnostics document the heavy-tailed funding innovations that should enter a future extension. In 100-seed holdout simulations under two official-fill proxy calibrations, the funding-aware HJB improves mean ETH/BTC performance while lowering inventory RMS relative to classical Avellaneda-Stoikov. SOL gains are positive versus unscaled AS but are not a Pareto improvement once a risk-scaled AS diagnostic is included.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了永续合约中随机资金费率下的最优流动性提供问题，将库存与资金支付的耦合引入做市模型，通过HJB方法求解，并在Hyperliquid数据上验证了相对于经典Avellaneda-Stoikov方法的改进。
AI.motivation: 经典做市模型未考虑永续合约中库存与资金费率支付的耦合关系，而实际中库存不仅带来盯市风险，还产生状态依赖的资金现金流，因此需要新的理论框架来优化流动性提供策略。
AI.method: 建立了库存-资金缩减控制问题，采用单调有限差分Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman（HJB）方案求解，从离散库存价值差异中恢复买卖报价偏移。对Hyperliquid的ETH、BTC、SOL永续数据校准资金费率模型，采用高斯OU扩散作为基线，同时引入OU-跳跃诊断处理重尾资金创新。
AI.result: 在100次留出模拟中，资金费率感知的HJB策略在两种官方成交代理校准下，对ETH和BTC的平均性能优于经典Avellaneda-Stoikov方法，同时降低了库存均方根。SOL结果优于未缩放AS，但相对于风险缩放AS诊断并非帕累托改进。
AI.conclusion: 将资金费率建模为随机状态变量并纳入做市决策可以提升永续合约的流动性提供绩效，但不同资产的表现存在差异，未来扩展需要考虑重尾资金创新带来的跳跃风险。

title: Are Flat Minima an Illusion?
summary: Neural networks that land in flat regions of the loss landscape tend to generalise better than those in sharp regions. Sharpness-Aware Minimisation exploits this to improve generalisation. But function-preserving reparameterisation can inflate the Hessian of any minimum by two orders of magnitude without changing a single prediction. If the geometry of weight space can be manufactured from nothing, it cannot be the cause of anything. In other words, flat is simple and simplicity depends on encoding. Here I show that the actual driver is weakness, the volume of completions compatible with the learned function in the learner's embodied language. Weakness is reparameterisation-invariant because it is defined over what the network \emph{does}, not how it is parameterised. I prove weakness is minimax-optimal under exchangeable demands, and that PAC-Bayes bounds work because they correlate with it. On MNIST, the large-batch generalisation advantage \emph{vanishes} as training data grows, from $+1.6\%$ at $n = 2{,}000$ to $+0.02\%$ at $n = 60{,}000$. A quantity whose predictive power depends on how much data you have is not a cause but a confounder. I run head-to-heads on 100 networks with identical architecture and training. For MNIST weakness predicts generalisation ($ρ= +0.374$, $p = 0.00012$), sharpness anticorrelates ($ρ= -0.226$) and simplicity predicts nothing ($p = 0.848$). For Fashion-MNIST ($ρ= +0.384$, $p = 8.15 \times 10^{-5}$), though simplicity is at least somewhat predictive there. Simplicity is dataset dependent, whereas weakness is invariant. Flat minima were never the answer.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，锐度感知最小化（SAM）依赖的“平坦极小值”概念存在根本缺陷——权重空间的几何形状可通过保函数重参数化任意改变。作者提出“弱度”（weakness）作为真正驱动泛化的量，它衡量与学习函数兼容的完成方式体积，具有重参数化不变性。实验表明弱度优于平坦度和简单性，且大批次泛化优势随数据增加消失，证明平坦极小值并非泛化的真正原因。
AI.motivation: 挑战“平坦极小值导致更好泛化”的主流观点，指出其重参数化依赖的根本缺陷，并寻找真正具有不变性的泛化驱动力。
AI.method: 提出“弱度”（weakness）概念，定义为与学习函数兼容的完成体积（在智能体具身语言中）。理论上证明弱度在可交换需求下是极小极大最优的，且PAC-Bayes界因与之相关而有效。实验上，在MNIST和Fashion-MNIST上对100个同构网络进行头对头比较，测试弱度、锐度和简单性对泛化的预测能力。
AI.result: MNIST上弱度与泛化正相关（ρ=+0.374，p=0.00012），锐度反相关（ρ=-0.226），简单性不显著（p=0.848）。Fashion-MNIST上弱度同样有效（ρ=+0.384），简单性部分有效。大批次泛化优势从n=2000时的+1.6%降至n=60000时的+0.02%。
AI.conclusion: 平坦极小值并非泛化的真正原因；弱度才是具有不变性的核心驱动力。简单性的预测能力依赖数据集，而弱度具有不变性。

title: The Missing Evaluation Axis: What 10,000 Student Submissions Reveal About AI Tutor Effectiveness
comment: Accepted to the 27th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education (AIED 2026), Main Conference Track
summary: Current Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based tutoring systems (AI tutors) are primarily evaluated based on the pedagogical quality of their feedback messages. While important, pedagogy alone is insufficient because it ignores a critical question: what do students actually do with the feedback they receive? We argue that AI tutor evaluation should be extended with a behavioral dimension grounded in student interaction data, which complements pedagogical assessment. We propose an evaluation framework and apply it to 10,235 code submissions with corresponding AI tutor feedback from an introductory undergraduate programming course to measure whether students act on tutor feedback and whether those actions are applied correctly. Using this framework to compare two deployed AI tutors across different semesters in a large-scale introductory computer science course reveals substantial differences in student engagement patterns that are not captured by pedagogy-only evaluation. Moreover, these engagement-based behavioral signals are more strongly associated with student perception of helpful feedback than pedagogical quality alone, providing a more complete and actionable picture of AI tutor performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在AI导师评估中引入基于学生互动数据的行为维度，通过分析10,235份代码提交记录，发现行为信号比单纯的教学质量更能反映学生感知的反馈有用性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI导师评估仅关注反馈的教学质量，忽略了学生实际如何对待反馈这一关键问题，导致评估不完整。
AI.method: 提出一个包含行为维度的评估框架，分析学生对AI导师反馈的采纳行为及正确性，应用于两学期10,235份编程作业数据，对比两个AI导师系统。
AI.result: 行为维度揭示了传统教学评估无法捕捉的学生参与模式差异，且行为信号比教学质量更强烈地关联学生感知的反馈有用性。
AI.conclusion: AI导师评估应扩展行为维度，以提供更完整、可操作的性能画像。

title: SNAPO: Smooth Neural Adjoint Policy Optimization for Optimal Control via Differentiable Simulation
comment: 27 pages, 8 tables. Three domains: natural gas storage, pension fund ALM, pharmaceutical manufacturing. Benchmark code and trained policies available on request
summary: Many real-world problems require sequential decisions under uncertainty: when to inject or withdraw gas from storage, how to rebalance a pension portfolio each month, what temperature profile to run through a pharmaceutical reactor chain. Dynamic programming solves small instances exactly but scales exponentially in state dimensions. Black-box reinforcement learning handles high-dimensional states but trains slowly and produces no sensitivities. We introduce SNAPO (Smooth Neural Adjoint Policy Optimization), a framework that embeds a neural policy inside a known, differentiable simulator, replaces hard constraints with smooth approximations, and computes exact gradients of the objective with respect to all policy parameters and all inputs in a single adjoint pass. We demonstrate SNAPO on three domains: natural gas storage (training in under a minute, 365 forward curve sensitivities at no additional cost per sensitivity), pension fund asset-liability management (6.5x-200x sensitivity speedup over bump-and-revalue, scaling with the number of risk factors), and pharmaceutical manufacturing (cross-unit sensitivities through a 4-unit process chain, with 20 ICH Q8 regulatory sensitivities from 5 adjoint passes in 74.5 milliseconds). All sensitivities are produced by the same backward pass that trains the policy, at a cost proportional to one reverse pass regardless of how many sensitivities are computed.

AI.tldr: 提出SNAPO框架，将神经策略嵌入可微分模拟器，通过伴随方法一次反向传播同时完成策略训练和任意数量的灵敏度计算，在天然气存储、养老金管理和制药三个领域展示了效率优势。
AI.motivation: 动态规划维度灾难，黑盒强化学习训练慢且无法产生灵敏度，现有方法无法高效同时获得最优策略和输入灵敏度。
AI.method: 将神经策略嵌入可微分模拟器，用平滑近似替换硬约束，通过单次伴随反向传播计算目标函数对所有策略参数和所有输入的精确梯度。
AI.result: 天然气存储：1分钟内训练完成，365条远期曲线灵敏度零额外成本；养老金管理：灵敏度计算速度提升6.5-200倍；制药制造：4单元工艺链的跨单元灵敏度，5次伴随计算74.5毫秒得到20个监管灵敏度。
AI.conclusion: SNAPO框架能用一次反向传播同时完成策略训练和任意数量的灵敏度计算，灵敏度成本与反向传播次数成比例而非灵敏度数量，显著优于传统bump-and-revalue方法。

title: Policies for the Operation of an Ambulance Fleet under Uncertainty based on a New Preparedness Metric
summary: Two important decisions in the management of an ambulance fleet are ambulance selection decisions and ambulance reassignment decisions. Ambulance selection decisions determine what to do when an emergency call arrives (such as choosing what ambulance to dispatch to the emergency or putting the emergency in a queue of emergencies waiting for an ambulance to be dispatched). Ambulance reassignment decisions determine where to send an ambulance next when it has finished service for an emergency. Making good ambulance selection decisions and ambulance reassignment decisions is challenging because a decision made at a point in time affects the ability of the emergency medical service to respond to future emergencies (that are typically not known when the decision is made). We propose a new preparedness metric that quantifies the ability of the emergency medical service to respond to future emergencies. The preparedness metric can be used to make ambulance selection decisions and ambulance reassignment decisions by solving a tractable optimization problem each time that a decision has to be made. We compare the performance of the resulting method with 9 methods that have been proposed in the literature, based on data from a real emergency medical service for a large city.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的 preparedness metric（准备度指标），通过优化问题来指导救护车的调度和重新分配决策，并在真实数据上优于9种已有方法。
AI.motivation: 救护车管理中的调度决策和重新分配决策会直接影响对未来紧急事件的响应能力，但未来事件在决策时未知，导致决策困难。现有方法缺乏一个有效的量化指标来评估当前决策对未来响应能力的影响。
AI.method: 提出一种新的 preparedness metric（准备度指标），量化EMS对未来紧急事件的响应能力；在每次需要决策时，通过求解一个可处理的优化问题，利用该指标来指导救护车的选择和重新分配。
AI.result: 基于真实大城市EMS数据，与文献中9种方法进行对比，所提方法在性能上优于这些方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的准备度指标结合优化问题求解的方法，能有效提升救护车调度与重新分配决策的质量，优于现有主流方法。

title: Forecasting Oncology Demand Trends with Boosting-Based Bayesian Conjugate Models
summary: Accurate trend forecasting in healthcare time series is essential for planning and resource allocation. This paper proposes a Bayesian framework for predicting oncology demand trends, modeling weekly appointments as a Poisson process with a Gamma prior to the demand rate. To enhance adaptability and capture persistent directional patterns, we incorporate a residual-based boosting mechanism grounded in a Gamma-Log-Normal conjugate structure. This boosting approach allows the model to track both short- and long-term trend shifts while maintaining the analytical tractability of conjugate Bayesian updating. The methodology was evaluated on real oncology service data from Cariri, Ceara, Brazil, and compared against established baselines, including linear regression, ARIMA, naive forecasting, LSTM neural networks, and XGBoost. Results showed that the proposed model outperforms competing methods in trend detection accuracy, with gains in terms of percentage of correct direction of 38.25% in relation to the second best approach in some cases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯框架的肿瘤学需求趋势预测方法，将每周预约建模为泊松过程，结合Gamma先验，并通过残差增强机制（Gamma-Log-Normal共轭结构）捕捉趋势方向变化。在巴西真实肿瘤学数据上，该方法在趋势方向预测准确率上最高超过第二好方法38.25%。
AI.motivation: 医疗时间序列的准确趋势预测对规划与资源分配至关重要，现有方法（如线性回归、ARIMA、LSTM等）在捕捉持续性方向模式方面存在不足。
AI.method: 将每周预约次数建模为泊松过程，需求率采用Gamma先验；引入基于残差的增强机制，利用Gamma-Log-Normal共轭结构同时捕捉短期和长期趋势变化，并保持共轭贝叶斯更新的解析可处理性。
AI.result: 在巴西Cariri地区的真实肿瘤学数据上，该模型在趋势方向检测准确率上优于线性回归、ARIMA、朴素预测、LSTM和XGBoost，部分场景下方向准确率比第二名高出38.25%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的贝叶斯增强框架能有效提升医疗时间序列的趋势预测能力，兼具解析可处理性与适应性。

title: Space-Time Diversity in Observability and Estimation on Product Lie Groups
comment: 6 Pages (two columns), 1 figure 2 tables and an alogorithm. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Robust state estimation in coupled dynamical systems depends critically not only on sensor quality but on the structural alignment between observation channels and the system's intrinsic dynamics. This paper develops a rigorous framework for analyzing spatial and temporal diversity in dynamical state estimation on product Lie groups, drawing structural parallels to diversity gains in space-time coding. Three main results are established: (i) coupling-based necessary and sufficient conditions for cross-factor observability, showing that a sensor local to one group factor renders another factor observable if and only if the dynamics propagate error directions across the corresponding Lie algebra components; (ii) a spatial diversity saturation theorem identifying precisely when additional observation channels fail to expand the propagated observation subspace and thus provide no structural benefit; and (iii) a time-space diversity decomposition that exactly separates instantaneous spatial information from accumulated temporal information in the estimation error covariance. The framework is applied to planar SE(2) and spatial SE(3) navigation, yielding exact observability guarantees for redundant and non redundant sensor architectures in modern robotics and autonomous vehicles. These results extend classical observability theory beyond Euclidean state spaces, exposing structural constraints invisible to standard rank-based analysis that fundamentally govern robust inference in coupled dynamical systems.

AI.tldr: 本文在乘积李群上建立了耦合动力系统状态估计的时空多样性理论框架，揭示了传感器结构与系统动力学之间的对齐关系，推导了交叉因子可观测性条件、空间多样性饱和定理以及时-空多样性分解，并在SE(2)和SE(3)导航中验证了理论结果。
AI.motivation: 传统可观测性分析（如秩条件）无法捕捉耦合动力系统中传感器观测通道与系统内在动力学之间结构对齐的约束，尤其在非欧几里得状态空间（如李群）中，需要更精细的理论来理解空间和时间多样性如何影响状态估计的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 借鉴空时编码中分集增益的思想，在乘积李群上建立形式化框架：(i) 耦合可观测性条件——通过李代数分量间的误差传播方向来分析交叉因子可观测性；(ii) 空间多样性饱和定理——确定观测通道何时不再扩展传播观测子空间；(iii) 时-空多样性分解——将估计误差协方差精确分解为瞬时空间信息和累积时间信息。
AI.result: 建立了耦合可观测性的充要条件，证明了空间多样性饱和定理，给出了时-空多样性分解公式，并在平面SE(2)和空间SE(3)导航系统中推导了冗余与非冗余传感器架构下的精确可观测性保证。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将经典可观测性理论扩展到非欧几里得状态空间，揭示了传统秩分析无法发现的深层结构约束，为现代机器人和自动驾驶中耦合动力系统的鲁棒状态估计提供了理论基础。

title: Counterargument for Critical Thinking as Judged by AI and Humans
summary: This intervention study investigates the use of counterarguments in writing for critical thinking by students in the context of Generative AI (GenAI). This is especially as risks of cheating and cognitive offloading exist with the use of GenAI. We presented 36 students in a particular university course with 4 carefully selected thesis statements (from a set of popular debates) to write about anyone of them. We used six established rubrics (focus, logic, content, style, correctness and reference) to conduct three human assessments (two student peer-reviews and one experienced teacher) per writeup on a 5-point Likert scale for all the qualified samples (n) of 35 submissions (after disqualifying one for irregularity). Using the same rubrics and guidelines, we also assessed the submissions using six frontier LLMs as judges. Our mixed-method design included qualitative open-ended feedback per assessment and quantitative methods. The results reveal that (1) the students' self-written counterarguments to AI-generated content contains logic, among other things, which is a key component of critical thinking, and (2) GenAI can be successfully used at scale to assess students' written work, based on clear rubrics, and these assessments generally align with human assessments as shown with Gwets AC2 inter-rater reliability values of 0.33 for all the models except one.

AI.tldr: 本研究在生成式AI（GenAI）背景下，调查了36名学生的议论文写作中的反驳论证能力。通过6个标准量规（焦点、逻辑、内容、风格、正确性和参考文献），进行人工评估（同伴互评+教师评估）和6个前沿大语言模型评估。结果显示：学生针对AI生成内容的反驳论证包含逻辑等批判性思维关键要素；GenAI可大规模评估学生写作，且除一个模型外，其余评估与人工评估基本一致（Gwet AC2=0.33）。
AI.motivation: GenAI存在作弊和认知卸载风险，需要探究学生如何在使用GenAI时仍能保持批判性思维，以及GenAI能否可靠地辅助评估学生写作。
AI.method: 选取36名学生、4个热门论题，收集35份合格作文。使用6个标准量规进行三种人工评估（2次同伴互评+1次教师评估）和6种大语言模型评估，采用混合研究方法（定性开放式反馈+定量分析）。
AI.result: 学生自写的反驳论证包含逻辑等批判性思维要素；GenAI评估与人工评估基本一致（Gwet AC2=0.33），仅一个模型例外。
AI.conclusion: GenAI环境下学生仍能展现批判性思维（通过反驳论证），且GenAI基于清晰量规可有效辅助大规模写作评估。

title: ZAYA1-8B Technical Report
summary: We present ZAYA1-8B, a reasoning-focused mixture-of-experts (MoE) model with 700M active and 8B total parameters, built on Zyphra's MoE++ architecture. ZAYA1-8B's core pretraining, midtraining, and supervised fine-tuning (SFT) were performed on a full-stack AMD compute, networking, and software platform. With under 1B active parameters, ZAYA1-8B matches or exceeds DeepSeek-R1-0528 on several challenging mathematics and coding benchmarks, and remains competitive with substantially larger open-weight reasoning models. ZAYA1-8B was trained from scratch for reasoning, with reasoning data included from pretraining onward using an answer-preserving trimming scheme. Post-training uses a four-stage RL cascade: reasoning warmup on math and puzzles; a 400-task RLVE-Gym curriculum; math and code RL with test-time compute traces and synthetic code environments built from competitive-programming references; and behavioral RL for chat and instruction following. We also introduce Markovian RSA, a test-time compute method that recursively aggregates parallel reasoning traces while carrying forward only bounded-length reasoning tails between rounds. In TTC evaluation, Markovian RSA raises ZAYA1-8B to 91.9\% on AIME'25 and 89.6\% on HMMT'25 while carrying forward only a 4K-token tail, narrowing the gap to much larger reasoning models including Gemini-2.5 Pro, DeepSeek-V3.2, and GPT-5-High.

AI.tldr: ZAYA1-8B是一个基于AMD平台训练、采用MoE++架构的高效推理模型，仅有7亿激活参数（总计80亿），通过四阶段RL后训练和Markovian RSA测试时计算技术，在数学和编程基准上匹敌甚至超越DeepSeek-R1等更大模型。
AI.motivation: 探索如何在极低激活参数（<1B）下，通过全栈AMD平台训练和创新的训练策略，达到甚至超越超大推理模型的性能，降低推理模型的计算成本。
AI.method: 采用Zyphra的MoE++架构（700M激活/8B总参数）；全流程在AMD计算/网络/软件平台上完成预训练、中期训练和SFT；从预训练阶段开始融入推理数据，使用保留答案的剪枝策略；后训练采用四阶段RL级联（推理热身→400任务RLVE-Gym→数学/代码RL→行为RL）；提出Markovian RSA测试时计算方法，递归聚合并行推理轨迹，仅保留有限长度推理尾部。
AI.result: 在多个数学和编程基准上匹敌或超越DeepSeek-R1-0528；Markovian RSA将AIME'25提升至91.9%，HMMT'25提升至89.6%，仅需4K token尾部，缩小了与Gemini-2.5 Pro、DeepSeek-V3.2、GPT-5-High等更大模型的差距。
AI.conclusion: 证明了在极低激活参数下，通过精心设计的训练流程（从预训练到RL后训练）和高效的测试时计算方法，可以构建出与超大模型竞争的高性能推理模型，为高效推理模型的开发提供了一条可行路径。

title: Neural-Actuarial Longevity Forecasting: Anchoring LSTMs for Explainable Risk Management
summary: Traditional multi-population models, such as the Li-Lee framework, rely on the assumption of mean-reverting country-specific deviations. However, recent data from high-longevity clusters suggest a systemic break in this paradigm. We identify a stationarity paradox where mortality residuals in countries like Sweden and West Germany exhibit persistent unit roots, leading to a systematic mispricing of longevity risk in linear models. To address these non-linearities, we propose Hybrid-Lift, a neural-actuarial framework that combines Hierarchical LSTM networks with a Mean-Bias Correction (MBC) anchoring mechanism. Positioned as a governance-friendly model challenger rather than a replacement of classical approaches, the framework exhibits selective superiority on out-of-sample validation (2012-2020): it outperforms Li-Lee by 17.40% in Sweden and 12.57% in West Germany, while remaining comparable for near-linear regimes such as Switzerland and Japan. We complement the predictive model with an integrated governance suite comprising SHAP-based cross-country influence mapping, a dual uncertainty framework for regulatory capital calibration (Swiss ES 99.0% of +1.153 years), and a reverse stress test identifying the critical shock threshold for solvency buffer exhaustion. This research provides evidence that neural networks, when properly anchored by actuarial principles, can serve as effective model challengers for longevity risk management under the SST and Solvency II standards.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hybrid-Lift框架，结合分层LSTM与均值偏差校正机制，解决了传统多人口模型（如Li-Lee）在处理长寿风险时的平稳性悖论问题，在高寿聚类国家（瑞典、西德）表现优异，并配套了SHAP解释、双重不确定框架和反向压力测试等治理工具。
AI.motivation: 传统Li-Lee等多人口模型假设国家特异性偏离具有均值回归性，但高寿聚类国家的死亡率残差呈现单位根非平稳性，导致线性模型对长寿风险的系统性错误定价。
AI.method: 提出Hybrid-Lift框架：结合Hierarchical LSTM网络与均值偏差校正（MBC）锚定机制，作为经典模型的补充挑战者而非替代者。
AI.result: 在2012-2020年样本外验证中，Hybrid-Lift在瑞典（+17.40%）和西德（+12.57%）显著优于Li-Lee，在瑞士和日本等近线性区域表现相当。配套治理工具方面，瑞士ES 99.0%为+1.153年。
AI.conclusion: 经精算原则锚定的神经网络可作为有效的模型挑战者，用于SST和Solvency II标准下的长寿风险管理。

title: Estimator Averaging of Local Projection and VAR Impulse Responses
summary: Local projections (LP) and vector autoregressions (VAR) are the two standard tools for impulse response analysis, but they often display a finite-sample trade-off: LP is typically less biased but more volatile, while VAR is more precise but can be biased under misspecification. We propose an easy-to-implement estimator-averaging approach that combines LP and VAR at each horizon by minimizing the mean squared error of the impulse response itself, rather than in-sample fit. We derive closed-form oracle weights for this finite-sample risk problem, develop feasible AR-sieve-bootstrap procedures, and compare them against an Rsquare-based model-averaging benchmark. For a benchmark class of short-memory linear data generating processes in which LP and VAR are both consistent, we establish the consistency and limiting distribution of the feasible averaged estimator. Monte Carlo results show meaningful risk reductions relative to LP and VAR alone. In an empirical application revisiting Bauer and Swanson (2023), estimator averaging delivers stable and economically intuitive responses for yields, activity, prices, and credit spreads.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在脉冲响应分析中结合局部投影（LP）与向量自回归（VAR）的估计量平均方法，通过最小化各期脉冲响应的均方误差而非样本内拟合优度来实现。作者推导了闭式理论最优权重，开发了可行的AR筛子自助法，并证明了该方法的相合性与渐近分布。蒙特卡洛模拟显示相比单独使用LP或VAR具有显著风险降低，实证应用中得到稳定且经济直觉合理的响应结果。
AI.motivation: LP与VAR在脉冲响应分析中存在有限样本权衡：LP偏差小但方差大，VAR精度高但在模型设定错误时可能有偏。现有方法缺乏直接针对脉冲响应本身均方误差的模型组合方案。
AI.method: 提出估计量平均方法，在各预测期上以脉冲响应的均方误差最小化为目标，组合LP与VAR估计量。推导闭式理论最优权重，开发AR筛子自助法计算可行权重，并与基于R方的模型平均基准比较。
AI.result: 对短记忆线性数据生成过程，建立了可行平均估计量的相合性与渐近分布。蒙特卡洛模拟显示相比单独LP或VAR具有意义的风险降低。在Bauer & Swanson (2023)的实证复现中，获得稳定且经济直觉合理的收益率、经济活动、价格和信用利差响应。
AI.conclusion: 估计量平均方法有效缓解了LP与VAR之间的偏差-方差权衡，为脉冲响应分析提供了一种简单易行且理论上可靠的改进方案。

title: Nationwide EHR-Based Chronic Rhinosinusitis Prediction Using Demographic-Stratified Models
comment: Sicong Chang, Yidan Shen are the co-first authors This paper is already accepted to IEEE Engineering in Medicine and Biology Society (EMBC) 2026 conference
summary: Chronic rhinosinusitis (CRS) is a common heterogeneous inflammatory disorder that causes substantial morbidity and healthcare costs. CRS is difficult to identify early from routine encounters, as symptom presentations overlap with common conditions such as allergic rhinitis, and heterogeneous phenotypes further obscure risk patterns. Prior predictive studies often rely on single-institutional cohorts , which reduce population-level generalizability. To overcome this, we leveraged nationwide longitudinal EHR data from the \textit{All of Us} Research Program to predict CRS diagnosis using two years of pre-diagnostic history. To address extreme feature sparsity and dimensionality in coded EHR data, we implemented a hybrid feature-selection pipeline that combines prevalence-based statistical screening with model-based importance ranking, compressing approximately 110,000 candidate codes into 100 interpretable features. To capture demographic heterogeneity, we trained demographic stratified models across six adult sex and life-stage subgroups with subgroup-specific hyperparameter tuning. Our framework achieved an overall AUC of 0.8461, improving discrimination by 0.0168 over the best baseline. These results demonstrate that routinely collected EHR data may support population-representative CRS risk stratification and inform earlier triage and referral prioritization in primary care.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用《All of Us》全美纵向电子健康档案数据，通过混合特征选择流程和人口统计学分层模型，在两年诊断前历史中预测慢性鼻窦炎（CRS），实现了0.8461的整体AUC，较最佳基线提升0.0168，表明常规EHR数据可支持CRS风险分层。
AI.motivation: CRS是一种常见但异质性强的炎症性疾病，早期识别困难，症状易与过敏性鼻炎等混淆，且现有预测研究多依赖单机构队列，缺乏人群普适性。
AI.method: 采用《All of Us》全国纵向EHR数据，基于两年诊断前历史进行预测；使用混合特征选择流程（基于患病率的统计筛选+基于模型的重要性排序）将约11万个候选编码压缩为100个可解释特征；针对六个性别-生命阶段亚组训练分层模型并进行子组特异性超参数调优。
AI.result: 整体AUC达0.8461，较最佳基线提升0.0168。
AI.conclusion: 常规收集的EHR数据可支持人群代表性的CRS风险分层，有助于初级保健中的早期分诊和转诊优先级排序。

title: Breaking In and Reaching Out: Networking for Women in Computer Science
summary: Networking is central to careers in computer science, where a globally distributed and diverse community increasingly collaborates across institutional and geographic boundaries, often in hybrid and remote settings. However, access to effective networking is shaped by structural and personal factors, including geography, funding, language, identity, personality, and caregiving responsibilities. Building on prior work, this workshop focuses on women in computing to examine lived experiences of networking and the barriers they encounter. Through a community-driven discussion grounded in a factor-based framework, the workshop aims to surface overlooked challenges and foster shared understanding. Ultimately, it seeks to inform more inclusive, equitable, and accessible networking practices within the computer science community.

AI.tldr: 本研讨会聚焦计算机科学领域女性研究者的社交网络体验与障碍，通过基于因素框架的社区讨论，揭示被忽视的挑战，旨在推动更包容、公平和可及的社交实践。
AI.motivation: 计算机科学领域的职业发展高度依赖社交网络，但地理、资金、语言、身份、性格、照护责任等结构性及个人因素造成了不平等。针对女性群体，她们在社交中面临特有障碍且常被忽视，因此需要专门关注。
AI.method: 采用研讨会形式，基于先前的因素分析框架（factor-based framework），通过社区驱动的讨论（community-driven discussion）收集和分析女性在社交网络中的亲身经历。
AI.result: 研讨会揭示了女性在计算机科学社交中面临的一些被忽视的挑战，并促进了社群对相关问题的共识。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为设计更具包容性、公平性和可及性的社交实践提供了依据，有助于改善计算机科学社区中的网络构建环境。

title: Bayesian Algorithm for Collaborative Optimization with Application to Aircraft Design
comment: For the AIAA Aviation 2026 Conference in San Diego MDOToolbox is available at: https://moebehfn.github.io/mdotoolbox Lightaero is available at: https://moebehfn.github.io/lightaero
summary: Collaborative Optimization (CO) is a multidisciplinary design optimization (MDO) framework that decomposes large-scale engineering problems into parallel, independently solvable subsystems coordinated by a system-level optimizer. Its practical utility is limited by the high frequency of expensive black-box disciplinary evaluations arising from the bi-level consistency constraints. This paper introduces BACO, a Bayesian Algorithm for Collaborative Optimization, which replaces the direct black-box calls at both levels with Gaussian process (GP) surrogates and acquisition function maximization. At the subsystem level, an acquisition function subject to GP-predicted feasibility constraints identifies the next evaluation point. At the system level, the same surrogate framework enforces consistency through predicted discrepancy constraints. This architecture reduces the number of true black-box evaluations required per major iteration. BACO is benchmarked against state-of-the-art CO variants on a Scalable MDO problem over 50 randomized instances. On this problem, BACO consistently achieves lower objective values and drives both constraint violation and interdisciplinary discrepancy to near-zero within the evaluation budget, outperforming all three CO variants across all tested DoE sizes. Further validation is conducted on a coupled aero-structural wing optimization problem based on the Common Research Model (CRM) geometry, where BACO identifies a feasible solution within 886 of 1000 allocated evaluations, recovering results physically consistent with active bending stress and tip deflection constraints. The BACO software, the state-of-the-art CO solvers, as well as standard MDO benchmarking problems are open-source and publicly available at https://moebehfn.github.io/mdotoolbox/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BACO，一种用高斯过程代理模型替代黑箱评估的贝叶斯协同优化方法，在子系统与系统层面分别通过采集函数和预测约束减少真实评估次数，在可扩展MDO问题和机翼优化问题上均优于现有CO变体。
AI.motivation: 现有协同优化(CO)框架因双层一致性约束导致昂贵黑箱学科评估过于频繁，实际应用受限。作者希望减少对真实黑箱函数的调用次数，提升CO的实用性和效率。
AI.method: 在子系统层，使用高斯过程(GP)构建代理模型，通过受GP预测可行性约束的采集函数选择下一个评估点；在系统层，同样采用GP框架，通过预测的差异约束来强制执行一致性。双层均用代理替代原始黑箱调用。
AI.result: 在可扩展MDO问题（50个随机实例）上，BACO在所有实验设计规模下均优于三种CO变体，目标值更低，约束违反和学科差异近零；在CRM机翼优化中，886/1000次评估内找到可行解，结果物理一致。
AI.conclusion: BACO通过贝叶斯优化策略显著减少了CO中真实黑箱评估次数，在多学科设计优化中展现了优越的可行解发现能力和效率，且代码与基准均已开源。

title: Estimating Implicit Regularization in Deep Learning
summary: Deep learning systems are known to exhibit implicit regularization (alt. implicit bias), favoring simple solutions instead of merely minimizing the loss function. In some cases, we can analytically derive the implicit regularization -- connecting it to an equivalent penalty that augments the learning objective. However, modern deep learning systems are complex, carrying modifications to the training procedure and architecture (e.g. early stopping, minibatching, dropout) whose effects are not always directly interpretable. Although estimating the resulting implicit regularization could aid theorists in algorithm design and practitioners in interpreting their hyperparameter choices, this problem has received little direct attention. It is also tractable: regularization makes weight updates deviate from loss gradients, promising a signal for identifying implicit bias. Here we provide gradient matching methods that can be used to empirically estimate the implicit regularization. Our method works on networks with known regularization, recovering popular explicit penalties like $\ell_1$ and $\ell_2$. It also replicates known implicit effects, like the quadratic weight penalty induced by early stopping in gradient descent, demonstrating that it can be used to test theories of implicit regularization. Crucially, because our method is empirical, it can handle implicit regularization in arbitrary networks. We demonstrate this use by characterizing the effects of dropout in deep networks, showing implicit $\ell_2$ effects in this popular method. Our work shows that practitioners can use gradient matching to understand regularization in networks with implicit biases that are too complicated to derive analytically.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度匹配的实证方法，用于估计深度学习系统中隐式正则化的等效显式惩罚，该方法适用于复杂网络（如带dropout的深度网络），可复现已知的隐式效应（如早停引起的二次权重惩罚），并能帮助理论家和实践者理解难以解析推导的隐式偏差。
AI.motivation: 深度学习系统存在隐式正则化（隐式偏差），但现代系统包含早停、小批量、Dropout等复杂修改，其隐式正则化效应难以解析推导。虽然估计这些隐式正则化有助于理论算法设计和实践者解释超参数选择，但该问题缺乏直接关注。本文旨在提供一种可用的实证方法来解决这一需求。
AI.method: 提出梯度匹配方法（Gradient Matching Methods），通过比较权重更新与损失梯度的偏差来实证估计隐式正则化。该方法在已知正则化的网络上能恢复显式惩罚（如ℓ1、ℓ2），并能复现已知隐式效应（如梯度下降早停产生的二次权重惩罚），同时适用于任意复杂网络。
AI.result: 1. 在已知正则化的网络上成功恢复ℓ1和ℓ2显式惩罚；2. 复现了梯度下降早停导致的二次权重惩罚；3. 发现Dropout在深度网络中产生隐式ℓ2正则化效应。
AI.conclusion: 梯度匹配可以作为实践者理解复杂网络中隐式正则化的有效实证工具，适用于隐式偏差过于复杂而无法解析推导的场景。

title: Investigation of Wound Field Synchronous Machines using Soft Magnetic Composites for Automotive Applications
summary: This paper investigates the application of soft magnetic composites (SMCs) in the stators of wound field synchronous machines for automotive traction. While SMCs are traditionally employed in axial flux topologies, this study examines their use in radial-flux electrically excited synchronous machines (EESMs). Multiple SMC materials and lamination thicknesses are evaluated, with the optimal configuration combining a SMC material in the stator and 0.35 mm NO35 laminated steel in the rotor. This combination delivers improved torque and efficiency compared to conventional designs. When integrated into a full electric drive unit (EDU), this motor achieves 89.7% efficiency over the WLTP drive cycle, representing a 1.4 percentage point improvement over a reference permanent magnet synchronous machine-based EDU. The proposed solution eliminates rare-earth materials, reduces cost through thicker laminations, and offers environmental benefits through SMC utilization. This novel material combination, previously unexplored for radial EESMs, presents a promising direction for affordable, high-efficiency, rare-earth-free automotive traction machines.

AI.tldr: 本文研究软磁复合材料（SMCs）在径向磁通电励磁同步电机（EESM）定子中的应用，通过优化SMC材料与0.35 mm NO35叠钢片转子的组合，在WLTP循环下实现89.7%效率，比永磁电机提升1.4个百分点，且无需稀土材料。
AI.motivation: 探索软磁复合材料在径向磁通电励磁同步电机定子中的应用潜力，以替代传统轴向磁通拓扑中的使用方式，并寻求无稀土、低成本、高效率的汽车牵引电机解决方案。
AI.method: 在EESM定子中采用多种SMC材料并与不同厚度的叠钢片组合进行对比评估，选出最优配置（SMC定子+0.35 mm NO35转子叠片），并集成到完整电驱单元中进行WLTP循环测试。
AI.result: 最优组合相比传统设计提升了转矩和效率；集成电驱单元在WLTP循环下达到89.7%效率，相较基准永磁同步电机电驱单元提升1.4个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该新型材料组合为径向电励磁同步电机领域首次探索，成功实现无稀土、低成本、高效率的汽车牵引方案，具有广阔应用前景。

title: Generating Query-Focused Summarization Datasets from Query-Free Summarization Datasets
summary: Large-scale datasets are widely used to perform summarization tasks, but they may not include queries alongside documents and summaries. In the search for suitable datasets for Query-Focused Summarization (QFS), we identify two research questions: Is it possible to automatically generate evidence-based query keywords from query-free datasets? Does evidence-based query generation support the QFS task? This paper proposes an evidence-based model to generate queries from query-free datasets. To evaluate our model intrinsically, we compare the similarity between the original queries and the system-generated queries of two QFS datasets. We also perform summarization tasks using different pre-trained models, as well as a state-of-the-art (SOTA) QFS model, to measure the extrinsic performance of our query generation approach. Experimental results indicate that summaries generated using evidence-based queries achieve competitive ROUGE scores compared to those generated from the original queries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于证据的查询生成模型，能从无查询数据集中自动生成查询关键词，并在查询聚焦摘要任务中取得与原始查询相当的ROUGE分数。
AI.motivation: 大规模摘要数据集通常不包含查询，缺乏适合查询聚焦摘要（QFS）任务的数据集。作者希望解决能否从无查询数据集中自动生成基于证据的查询关键词，以及这种生成方式能否支持QFS任务这两个问题。
AI.method: 提出一种基于证据的查询生成模型，从无查询数据集中自动生成查询。内在评估比较生成查询与原始查询的相似度；外在评估利用不同预训练模型及SOTA QFS模型进行摘要生成任务。
AI.result: 基于证据生成的查询所生成的摘要，在ROUGE分数上与使用原始查询生成的摘要相比具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 证据驱动的查询生成方法可以有效支持查询聚焦摘要任务，为利用无查询数据集进行QFS提供了可行方案。

title: Partial Evidence Bench: Benchmarking Authorization-Limited Evidence in Agentic Systems
comment: Benchmark paper with deterministic synthetic corpora, 14 pages, 6 tables
summary: Enterprise agents increasingly operate inside scoped retrieval systems, delegated workflows, and policy-constrained evidence environments. In these settings, access control can be enforced correctly while the system still produces an answer that appears complete even though material evidence lies outside the caller's authorization boundary. This paper introduces Partial Evidence Bench, a deterministic benchmark for measuring that failure mode. The benchmark ships three scenario families -- due diligence, compliance audit, and security incident response -- with 72 tasks total, ACL-partitioned corpora, oracle complete answers, oracle authorized-view answers, oracle completeness judgments, and structured gap-report oracles. It evaluates systems along four surfaces: answer correctness, completeness awareness, gap-report quality, and unsafe completeness behavior. Checked-in baselines show that silent filtering is catastrophically unsafe across all shipped families, while explicit fail-and-report behavior eliminates unsafe completeness without collapsing the task into trivial abstention. Preliminary real-model runs show model-dependent and scenario-sensitive differences in whether systems overclaim completeness, conservatively underclaim, or report incompleteness in an enterprise-usable form. The benchmark's broader contribution is to make a governance-critical agent failure measurable without human judges or contamination-prone static corpora.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Partial Evidence Bench，一个用于测量企业Agent在受限检索环境下产生"看似完整实则遗漏"的答案这一失败模式的确定性基准，包含72个任务和四维评估体系。
AI.motivation: 企业Agent常在有权限约束的检索系统中运行，可能出现"静默过滤"问题——系统看似给出了完整答案，但实际遗漏了用户权限之外的证据。这种失败模式对治理和合规危害巨大，但此前缺乏可量化的基准测试方法。
AI.method: 构建了包含尽职调查、合规审计、安全事件响应三个场景共72个任务的确定性基准。采用ACL分区语料库，提供Oracle完整答案、Oracle授权视图答案、Oracle完整性判断和结构化差距报告Oracle。从答案正确性、完整性感知、差距报告质量和危险完整性行为四个维度评估系统。
AI.result: 基线实验显示：静默过滤在所有场景中都是灾难性不安全的；显式失败-报告行为消除了危险完整性，且未导致任务退化为简单弃权。初步大模型运行显示，模型在不同场景下在过度声称完整性、保守地低估完整性或提供可用形式的不完整性报告方面存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 该基准的核心贡献是使一种对治理至关重要的Agent失败模式变得可量化测量，且无需人工评审或易受污染的静态语料库。

title: Covariate Balancing and Riesz Regression Should Be Guided by the Neyman Orthogonal Score in Debiased Machine Learning
summary: This position paper argues that, in debiased machine learning, balancing functions should be derived from the Neyman orthogonal score, not chosen only as functions of covariates. Covariate balancing is effective when the regression error entering the score can be represented by functions of covariates alone, and it is the natural finite-dimensional approximation for targets such as ATT counterfactual means. For ATE estimation under treatment effect heterogeneity, however, the score error generally contains treatment-specific components because the outcome regression is a function of the full regressor $X=(D,Z)$. In that case, balancing common functions of $Z$ can leave the treatment-specific component unbalanced. We therefore advocate regressor balancing, implemented by Riesz regression with basis functions of $X$, as the general balancing principle for DML. The position is not that covariate balancing is invalid, but that covariate balancing should be understood as the special case that is appropriate when the score-relevant regression error is a function of covariates alone.

AI.tldr: 本文论证去偏机器学习中平衡函数应从Neyman正交得分推导，而非仅选协变量函数。协变量平衡仅在回归误差可仅由协变量表示时有效。对于ATE估计，由于回归误差含处理特异成分，需使用基于完整回归变量X的Riesz回归进行回归变量平衡。
AI.motivation: 当前去偏机器学习中协变量平衡方法在ATE估计场景下存在局限：当存在处理效应异质性时，仅平衡协变量Z的函数会忽略处理特异成分（即D相关部分），导致得分误差未被完全消除。
AI.method: 提出回归变量平衡原则：采用基于完整回归变量X=(D,Z)的基函数的Riesz回归，而非仅对协变量Z进行平衡。该方法从Neyman正交得分推导平衡函数，确保得分误差中的处理特异成分也被平衡。
AI.result: 从理论上论证：1) 协变量平衡是回归变量平衡在ATT等目标下的特例（此时回归误差可仅由协变量表示）；2) ATE估计中协变量平衡会留下未平衡的处理特异成分；3) 回归变量平衡是一般性DML原则。
AI.conclusion: 回归变量平衡应作为DML的通用原则，协变量平衡是其特例。建议在实践中对ATE等一般目标采用基于X的Riesz回归，而非仅平衡Z。

title: SAT: Sequential Agent Tuning for Coordinator Free Plug and Play Multi-LLM Training with Monotonic Improvement Guarantees
summary: Large language models (LLMs) with a large number of parameters achieve strong performance but are often prohibitively expensive to deploy. Recent work explores using teams of smaller, more efficient LLMs that collectively match or even outperform a single large model. However, jointly updating multiple agents introduces compounding distribution shifts, making coordination and stability during training difficult. We address this by introducing Sequential Agent Tuning (SAT), a coordinator-free training paradigm. SAT represents the team as a factorized policy and employs block-coordinate updates over agents, enabling scalable, decentralized training without a central controller. Specifically, we develop a sequence-aware, on-policy advantage estimator that conditions on the evolving team policy, coupled with per-agent KL trust regions that isolate occupancy drift. Theoretically, this framework provides two critical guarantees. First, it ensures monotonic improvement, stabilizing the training process. Second, it establishes provable plug-and-play invariance: any agent can be upgraded to a stronger model without retraining the rest of the team, with a formal guarantee that the performance bound improves. Empirically, a team of three 4B agents (12B total) trained with SAT surpasses the much larger Qwen3-32B on AIME24/25 benchmarks by 3.9\% on average. We validate our plug-and-play theory by swapping in two 8B agents, which boosts the composite score by 10.4\%. We provide code and appendix of proof at https://github.com/Yydc/SAT-AAMAS

AI.tldr: 本文提出顺序智能体微调（SAT），一种无需协调器的训练范式，通过分块坐标更新和序列感知的on-policy优势估计器，让多个小型LLM组成的团队在训练中实现单调改进和即插即用不变性。实验表明，三个4B模型组成的团队（12B参数）在AIME24/25基准上超越Qwen3-32B 3.9%，且可无重训地升级单个智能体。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型参数过多导致部署成本高昂，而现有用小模型团队替代大模型的方法面临联合更新时分布偏移导致的协调与稳定性问题。
AI.method: SAT将团队建模为因子化策略，采用分块坐标更新实现无中心控制器的分布式训练；提出序列感知的on-policy优势估计器（条件于演化中的团队策略），并结合每智能体KL信任域来隔离占据偏移。理论上保证单调改进和即插即用不变性。
AI.result: 三个4B智能体（总计12B参数）在AIME24/25上超过Qwen3-32B平均3.9%；将两个智能体替换为8B版本后性能提升10.4%，验证了即插即用理论。
AI.conclusion: SAT提供了一种可扩展、去中心化的多智能体LLM训练框架，兼顾理论保障（单调改进、即插即用）与实证效果，有望降低大模型部署成本。

title: A Benchmark for Strategic Auditee Gaming Under Continuous Compliance Monitoring
summary: Continuous post-deployment compliance audits, mandated by emerging regulations such as the EU AI Act and Digital Services Act, create a class of strategic gaming distinct from the one-shot input/output gaming studied in prior work. Regulated systems can delay outcome reporting, drift their reports within plausible noise envelopes, exploit longitudinal sample attrition, and cherry-pick among ambiguous metric definitions. We formalize continuous auditing as a $T$-round Stackelberg game between an auditor that commits to a temporal policy and an adaptive auditee, and identify a structural feature of any noise-aware static-auditor design: a cover regime in which coverage gaps and granularity gaps cannot be closed simultaneously. We make this formal as Observation 1 and show that two minimal extension policies, each derived from the observation, close the regime along orthogonal axes: a sample-size-aware static rule (Periodic-with-floor) closes the granularity-failure case, while a history-conditioned suspicion-escalation policy closes the coverage-failure case for the naive Drift strategy -- and neither closes both, exactly as the observation predicts; an audit-aware OffAuditDrift strategy that exploits Stackelberg commitment defeats both. To support empirical study we contribute a non-additive harm decomposition (welfare loss $W$, coverage loss $C$) that exposes how attrition shifts harm from the regulator-accountable surface to a regulator-invisible one; an initial library of five auditee strategies (Delay, Drift, Cherry-pick, Attrition, OffAuditDrift) and five auditor policies, calibrated to summary statistics from published audits of the DSA Transparency Database; and a reproducible simulator with a small, extensible Python interface.

AI.tldr: 本文研究持续合规审计中的策略博弈，提出了一个T轮Stackelberg博弈框架，揭示了噪声感知静态审计器中“覆盖漏洞”与“粒度漏洞”不可同时消除的结构性特征，并设计了两种扩展策略及一个非加性损害分解方法。
AI.motivation: 新兴法规（如欧盟AI法案、数字服务法案）要求持续的后部署合规审计，这与传统的一次性输入/输出博弈不同，受监管系统可以延迟报告、在噪声范围内漂移、利用样本流失、在模糊指标间挑选。现有研究未系统建模这类持续审计中的策略博弈。
AI.method: 将持续审计形式化为T轮Stackelberg博弈（审计者承诺时间策略，被审计者自适应应对）；提出Observation 1形式化覆盖漏洞与粒度漏洞不可同时消除；设计两种最小扩展策略（Periodic-with-floor和基于历史的怀疑升级策略）及一个非加性损害分解（福利损失W、覆盖损失C）
AI.result: Periodic-with-floor关闭粒度失败案例，怀疑升级策略关闭覆盖失败案例（针对朴素Drift策略），但两者均不能同时关闭两者；审计感知的OffAuditDrift策略利用Stackelberg承诺击败了两种策略。还贡献了5种被审计者策略和5种审计者策略库、一个可复现模拟器。
AI.conclusion: 持续审计中存在审计者与被审计者之间的深度博弈，静态审计器存在根本性结构性缺陷，但通过适当的策略设计可以缓解。作者还提供了实证工具以支持后续研究。

title: A Computationally Tractable Path-Planning Method for Airborne Wind Energy Systems
comment: This paper is based on a chapter of the PhD thesis of the first author, with minor revisions and extensions
summary:
Airborne Wind Energy Systems (AWES) have emerged as a promising renewable energy technology that exploits stronger, more consistent high-altitude winds via tethered airborne devices. Among the various concepts, crosswind systems, where efficient flight control is essential to maximise energy output, offer significant potential. This paper addresses the problem of reference selection for crosswind flight control, focusing on the design of power-maximising geometric flight paths for the reel-out phase of Groundgen systems.
  To overcome the computational challenges associated with optimal control approaches, a computationally tractable framework is proposed in which a path-planning problem is formulated as a nonlinear program. The method optimises the parameters of a Lissajous curve to maximise the average power production over the reel-out phase, while incorporating curvature constraints. The proposed approach provides an efficient alternative to existing optimal control and learning-based methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Lissajous曲线参数优化的计算高效框架，用于最大化地面发电型机载风能系统（AWES）在放出阶段的风力发电功率，通过将路径规划问题转化为非线性规划，并引入曲率约束，实现比传统最优控制和基于学习方法更高效的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 机载风能系统（AWES）作为一种有前景的可再生能源技术，其交叉wind飞行控制对能量输出至关重要。然而，现有最优控制方法计算成本高，需要一种更高效的路径规划方法来最大化发电功率。
AI.method: 将路径规划问题公式化为一个非线性规划（NLP），优化Lissajous曲线的参数以最大化放出阶段的平均功率，同时纳入曲率约束条件。
AI.result: 该方法在保持计算可行性（可处理性）的同时，能够有效优化飞行路径，最大化平均发电功率，且计算成本低于传统最优控制和基于学习的方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于Lissajous曲线参数优化的框架是地面发电型AWES系统放出阶段功率最大化的一种高效且实用的路径规划方案，为现有方法提供了一种计算上有吸引力的替代选择。

title: Convexity in Disguise: A Theoretical Framework for Nonconvex Low-Rank Matrix Estimation
summary: Nonconvex methods have emerged as a dominant approach for low-rank matrix estimation, a problem that arises widely in machine learning and AI for learning and representing high-dimensional data. Existing analyses for these methods often require additional regularization to mitigate nonconvexity, even though such regularization is often unnecessary in practice. Moreover, most analyses rely on problem-specific arguments that are difficult to generalize to more complex settings. In this paper, we develop a theoretical framework for studying nonconvex procedures across a broad class of low-rank matrix estimation problems. Rather than focusing on a specific model, we reveal a fundamental mechanism that explains why nonconvex procedures can behave well in low-rank estimation. Our key device is a {\it benign regularizer} that does not alter the original update rule, but yields an equivalent locally strongly convex formulation of the algorithm. This perspective uncovers a disguised convexity inherent in the nonconvex procedure and provides a new route to theoretical guarantees for nonconvex low-rank matrix estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个理论框架，揭示非凸方法在低秩矩阵估计中表现良好的根本机制：通过一种"良性正则化器"（不改变原始更新规则），将非凸过程转化为等价的局部强凸形式，从而揭示隐藏的凸性。
AI.motivation: 现有非凸方法分析通常需要额外正则化（尽管实际中不需要），且依赖问题特定论证，难以推广到更复杂场景。迫切需要统一的理论框架来解释非凸方法在低秩估计中为何有效。
AI.method: 提出"良性正则化器"概念，该正则化器不改变原始更新规则，但能使算法获得等价的局部强凸形式，从而揭示非凸过程中的"伪装凸性"。
AI.result: 建立了适用于广泛低秩矩阵估计问题的统一理论框架，揭示了非凸方法行为良好的根本机制，为理论保证提供了新路径。
AI.conclusion: 非凸低秩矩阵估计中存在一种隐藏的凸性结构，通过良性正则化器可以揭示这种凸性，从而为分析各类非凸方法提供统一的理论工具。

title: Consideration of Control-Loop Interaction in Transient Stability of Grid-Following Inverters using Bandwidth Separation Method
summary: Grid-following inverters have been widely adopted as a grid interface for renewable energy, and ensuring their small-signal and large-signal stability is critical to modern power systems. Their large-signal, or transient, stability is a significant challenge to analyze because of the interaction of the phase-locked loop (PLL), which must maintain synchronism with various outer-loop controllers. Simple analysis in which outer-loop controllers are idealized is insufficient, and the interactions between the nonlinear dynamics of the PLL and the dynamics of the DC-link voltage control (DVC), as well as the AC terminal voltage control (TVC) when present, must be considered. An asymptotic analysis approach, termed the bandwidth separation method, is proposed. This method enables simplification and order reduction of the original differential equations when sufficient bandwidth separation exists. Through this method, the interaction between the DVC and PLL is explicitly characterized, revealing that such interaction degrades system stability and shrinks the stability region. The analysis also indicates that voltage instability, rather than PLL loss of synchronization alone, is often the root cause of transient instability. Optimal bandwidth configurations for the PLL and DVC are identified under various grid fault conditions: a larger PLL bandwidth improves resilience to phase-jump faults, while a larger DVC bandwidth enhances tolerance to power fluctuations. In addition, the influence of the TVC loop is analyzed, showing that a high TVC bandwidth can mitigate the destabilizing effects of PLL-DVC interaction and further improve transient stability. All analytical findings are validated through hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种带宽分离方法，用于分析并网逆变器中锁相环（PLL）与直流母线电压控制（DVC）及交流端电压控制（TVC）之间的非线性相互作用对暂态稳定性的影响。研究发现，PLL-DVC交互会降低系统稳定性并缩小稳定域，电压失稳常是暂态失稳的根本原因，并给出了最优带宽配置建议。
AI.motivation: 并网逆变器的暂态稳定性分析极具挑战，因为锁相环（PLL）必须与多种外环控制器保持同步，简单理想化外环控制器的分析不够充分，需要综合考虑PLL与DVC、TVC之间的非线性动力学交互作用。
AI.method: 提出一种称为“带宽分离方法”的渐近分析方法，在存在足够带宽分离的情况下，对原始微分方程进行简化和降阶，从而显式刻画DVC与PLL之间的交互作用。
AI.result: 1) PLL与DVC的交互会降低系统稳定性并缩小稳定域；2) 电压失稳而非PLL失锁往往是暂态失稳的根源；3) 大PLL带宽可提升对相位跳变故障的鲁棒性，大DVC带宽可增强对功率波动的容忍度；4) 高TVC带宽可缓解PLL-DVC交互的不稳定效应，进一步提升暂态稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 通过硬件在环（HIL）实验验证了所有分析结果，并为不同电网故障条件下PLL和DVC的最优带宽配置提供了指导。

title: SLAM: Structural Linguistic Activation Marking for Language Models
summary: LLM watermarks must be detectable without compromising text quality, yet most existing schemes bias the next-token distribution and pay for detection with measurable quality loss. We present SLAM (Structural Linguistic Activation Marking), a novel white-box watermarking scheme that sidesteps this cost by writing the mark into structural geometry rather than token frequencies: sparse autoencoders identify residual-stream directions encoding linguistic structure (e.g., voice, tense, clause order), and we causally steer those directions at generation time, leaving lexical sampling and semantics unconstrained. On Gemma-2 2B and 9B, SLAM achieves 100% detection accuracy with a quality cost of only 1-2 reward points - compared to 7.5-11.5 for KGW, EWD, and Unigram - with naturalness and diversity preserved at near-unwatermarked levels across both models.
