The trade-off is a complementary robustness profile: SLAM resists word-level edits but is vulnerable to paraphrase that restructures syntax (at a quality cost), the converse of token-distribution methods.

AI.tldr: SLAM提出了一种基于结构几何的白盒水印方案，通过稀疏自编码器操控语言结构方向而非词频，在Gemma-2上实现100%检测率且质量损失极低（1-2分），与词级水印方法形成互补的鲁棒性特征。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM水印方案通过偏置下一个词分布来嵌入水印，这不可避免地导致文本质量下降。作者希望找到一种不牺牲质量的水印方法。
AI.method: 使用稀疏自编码器识别残差流中编码语言结构（如语态、时态、从句顺序）的方向，在生成时因果地操控这些结构方向，而不改变词汇采样和语义。
AI.result: 在Gemma-2 2B和9B上达到100%检测准确率，质量损失仅1-2奖励分（对比基线方法7.5-11.5分），自然度和多样性接近无 watermark 水平。
AI.conclusion: SLAM实现了无损质量的水印嵌入，与词分布水印方法形成互补：抗词级编辑但易受句法改写影响，反之亦然。

title: BALAR : A Bayesian Agentic Loop for Active Reasoning
summary: Large language models increasingly operate in interactive settings where solving a task requires multiple rounds of information exchange with a user. However, most current systems treat dialogue reactively and lack a principled mechanism to reason about what information is missing and which question should be asked next. We propose BALAR (Bayesian Agentic Loop for Active Reasoning), a task-agnostic outer-loop algorithm that requires no fine-tuning and enables structured multi-turn interaction between an LLM agent and a user. BALAR maintains a structured belief over latent states, selects clarifying questions by maximizing expected mutual information, and dynamically expands its state representation when the current one proves insufficient. We evaluate BALAR on three diverse benchmarks: AR-Bench-DC (detective cases), AR-Bench-SP (thinking puzzles), and iCraft-MD (clinical diagnosis). BALAR significantly outperforms all baselines across all three benchmarks, with $14.6\%$ higher accuracy on AR-Bench-DC, $38.5\%$ on AR-Bench-SP, and $30.5\%$ on iCraft-MD.

AI.tldr: 提出BALAR算法，一种无需微调的任务无关外循环算法，通过维护结构化信念、最大化期望互信息选择澄清问题、动态扩展状态表示，使LLM能够在多轮交互中主动推理。在三个基准测试上显著优于所有基线方法（准确率提升14.6%-38.5%）。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在交互式场景中大多被动响应，缺乏主动推理缺失信息并决定该问什么问题的机制。
AI.method: 提出BALAR算法：(1)维护潜在状态的结构化信念；(2)通过最大化期望互信息选择最佳澄清问题；(3)当当前状态表示不足时动态扩展。
AI.result: 在AR-Bench-DC上准确率提升14.6%，AR-Bench-SP提升38.5%，iCraft-MD提升30.5%，在所有三个基准上显著优于基线。
AI.conclusion: BALAR是一种有效的任务无关外循环算法，无需微调即可显著提升LLM在多轮交互中的主动推理能力。

title: Scaling the Queue: Reinforcement Learning for Equitable Call Classification Capacity in NYC Municipal Complaint Systems
summary:
Municipal 311 call centers and complaint intake systems face a structural mismatch between incoming volume and classification capacity. The staff and heuristics available to triage, route, and prioritize complaints cannot scale with demand. This bottleneck produces differential service quality that follows income and racial lines (\cite{liu2024sla}). We develop an equity-centered reinforcement learning (RL) framework that augments call classification capacity across six New York City Department of Buildings (DOB) operational domains: boiler safety, crane and derrick oversight, heat and hot water complaints, housing complaint triage, scaffold safety, and Natural Area District (SNAD) protection.
  Rather than replacing human classifiers, our agents act as intelligent intake routers: learning to assign incoming complaints to action categories: escalate, batch, defer, inspect now. The proposed technique is designed to maximize throughput, minimize misclassification cost, and actively narrow historical equity gaps in service delivery. We formalize each domain as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) in which equitable classification coverage is a first-class reward objective. Post-hoc SHAP attribution reveals that complaint recurrence and neighborhood-level statistics are stronger predictors of actionable violations than raw complaint volume. This finding has direct implications for complaint routing given the demographic correlates of those features.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以公平为核心的强化学习框架，用于增强纽约市建筑局六个运营领域中的投诉分类能力。该框架将投诉智能路由至升级、批量、推迟、立即检查等行动类别，旨在最大化处理量、最小化误分类成本，并缩小历史服务公平性差距。
AI.motivation: 市政311呼叫中心面临投诉量激增与分类能力不足的结构性矛盾，导致服务质量沿收入和种族线分化，产生不公平现象。
AI.method: 构建以公平覆盖率为首要奖励目标的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），训练强化学习代理作为智能投诉路由器，将投诉分配至四种行动类别（升级、批量、推迟、立即检查），并使用SHAP进行事后归因分析。
AI.result: SHAP归因显示，投诉重复率和社区级统计特征比原始投诉量更能预测可执行的违规行为，这一发现对投诉路由有直接影响。
AI.conclusion: 以公平为中心强化学习框架能有效增强分类能力、提升服务公平性，且投诉重复率和社区特征是更可靠的违规预测指标。

title: Physics-Informed Neural Networks with Learnable Loss Balancing and Transfer Learning
summary: We propose a self-supervised physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework that adaptively balances physics-based and data-driven supervision for scientific machine learning under data scarcity. Unlike prior PINNs that rely on fixed or heuristic weighting of physics residuals and data loss, our approach introduces a learnable blending neuron that dynamically adjusts the relative contribution of each term based on their uncertainties. This mechanism enables stable training and improved generalization without manual tuning. To further enhance efficiency, we integrate a transfer learning strategy that reuses representations from related domains and adapts them to new physical systems with limited data. We validate the framework for the prediction of heat transfer in liquid-metal miniature heat sinks using only 87 CFD datapoints, where the adaptive PINN achieves an error <8%, outperforming shallow neural networks, kernel methods, and physics-only baselines. Our framework provides a general recipe for embedding physics adaptively into neural networks, offering a robust and reproducible approach for data-scarce problems across various scientific domains, including fluid dynamics and material modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出一种自监督物理信息神经网络框架，通过可学习的融合神经元动态平衡物理约束与数据驱动项，结合迁移学习策略，在仅用87个CFD数据点预测液态金属微型散热器热传递时误差<8%，优于多种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有PINN依赖固定或启发式权重来平衡物理残差与数据损失，需要手动调参且泛化性差，在数据稀缺场景下训练不稳定。
AI.method: 1) 引入可学习融合神经元，基于不确定性动态调整物理项与数据项的权重；2) 集成迁移学习策略，从相关领域复用表征并适应新物理系统。
AI.result: 在仅87个CFD数据点的液态金属微型散热器热传递预测任务中，自适应PINN误差<8%，优于浅层神经网络、核方法及纯物理基线。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一种将物理自适应嵌入神经网络的通用方案，为数据稀缺的科学问题（如流体动力学、材料建模）提供了鲁棒且可复现的方法。

title: From Review to Design: Ethical Multimodal Driver Monitoring Systems for Risk Mitigation, Incident Response, and Accountability in Automated Vehicles
summary:
As vehicles transition toward higher levels of automation, Driver Monitoring Systems (DMS) have become essential for ensuring human oversight, safety, and regulatory compliance in a vehicle. These systems rely on multimodal sensing and AI-driven inference to assess driver attention, cognitive state, and readiness to take control. While technologically promising, their deployment introduces a complex set of ethical and legal challenges - ranging from privacy and consent to data ownership and algorithmic fairness. While overarching frameworks such as the GDPR, EU AI Act, and IEEE standards offer important guidance, they lack the specificity required for addressing the unique risks posed by in-cabin sensing technologies.
  This paper adopts a review-to-design perspective, critically examining existing regulatory instruments and ethical frameworks -- such as the GDPR, the EU AI Act, and IEEE guidelines -- and identifying gaps in their applicability to the distinctive risks posed by multimodal, AI-enabled in-cabin monitoring. Building on this review, we propose a modular ethical design framework tailored specifically to Driver Monitoring Systems. The framework translates high-level principles into actionable design and deployment guidance, including user-configurable consent mechanisms, fairness-aware model development, transparency and explainability tools, and safeguards for driver emotional well-being.
  Finally, the paper outlines a risk analysis and failure mitigation strategy, emphasizing proactive incident response and accountability mechanisms tailored to the DMS context. Together, these contributions aim to inform the development of transparent, trustworthy, and human-centered driver monitoring systems for next-generation autonomous vehicles.

AI.tldr: 本文批判性地审视了GDPR、欧盟AI法案和IEEE指南等现有法规框架在驾驶员监控系统(DMS)中的适用性不足，提出了一个专门针对DMS的模块化伦理设计框架，涵盖用户可配置的同意机制、公平性感知模型开发、透明度和可解释性工具以及情感保障措施，并制定了风险分析与故障缓解策略，旨在为下一代自动驾驶汽车构建透明、可信且以人为本的监控系统。
AI.motivation: 随着车辆向更高自动化水平过渡，驾驶员监控系统(DMS)依赖多模态感知和AI推理来评估驾驶员注意力、认知状态和接管准备，但其部署带来了隐私、同意、数据所有权和算法公平性等一系列复杂的伦理与法律挑战。现有监管框架（如GDPR、欧盟AI法案、IEEE标准）虽提供重要指导，但缺乏针对车内感知技术特有风险的足够具体性。
AI.method: 本文采用从审查到设计(review-to-design)的研究视角，首先批判性审视GDPR、欧盟AI法案和IEEE指南等现有监管工具和伦理框架，识别其在多模态AI车内监控应用中的适用性差距；在此基础上，提出一个专门针对驾驶员监控系统的模块化伦理设计框架，将高层次原则转化为可操作的设计与部署指导。
AI.result: 提出了一个专门针对DMS的模块化伦理设计框架，涵盖用户可配置的同意机制、公平性感知的模型开发、透明度和可解释性工具、以及驾驶员情感福祉保障措施；同时制定了针对DMS上下文的风险分析和故障缓解策略，强调主动式事件响应和问责机制。
AI.conclusion: 本文的贡献在于为下一代自动驾驶汽车中透明、可信且以人为本的驾驶员监控系统的开发提供了系统性指导，弥补了现有通用伦理法规框架在车内监控场景中的具体化不足。

title: An Exact Algorithm for Load-Dependent Traveling Salesman Problem for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle Package Delivery
summary: In this article, we present a novel formulation for the load-dependent traveling salesman problem (LD-TSP), in which travel cost (or energy expended) depends on the vehicle's current load. This problem is relevant for package delivery and urban air mobility, where vehicles must transport and drop cargo at specified locations. The challenge lies in modeling the cost, which varies with both route sequence and onboard load. Our key contributions are: (i) formulating an energy dissipation model and proving energy expenditure depends linearly on vehicle mass and distance; and (ii) formulating a mixed-integer nonlinear programming formulation and providing a novel relaxation to obtain a mixed-integer linear program. Extensive numerical results show that optimal solutions for most instances with up to 50 targets are obtained within one minute. For unsolved instances within a 10-minute limit, optimality gaps are under 13%, highlighting the formulation's tightness. We further benchmark our approach against three proposed baseline formulations and another algorithm from a related problem, and demonstrate that our formulation outperforms all baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文针对负载依赖型旅行商问题（LD-TSP），提出了一种新的数学模型，将能量消耗建模为车辆质量与距离的线性函数，并通过松弛方法将混合整数非线性规划转化为混合整数线性规划。实验表明，该模型在50个目标点内多数实例可在一分钟内求解最优解，未解实例的优化间隙低于13%，且性能优于多个基线方法。
AI.motivation: 在包裹配送和城市空中交通中，车辆的能耗随载荷变化而变化，传统TSP模型无法准确描述这一依赖关系，因此需要一种能够建模载荷对旅行成本影响的新方法。
AI.method: (i) 建立能量耗散模型，证明能量消耗与车辆质量和行驶距离呈线性关系；(ii) 建立混合整数非线性规划（MINLP）模型，并提出一种松弛方法将其转化为混合整数线性规划（MILP）。
AI.result: 在50个目标点以内的多数实例中，最优解可在一分钟内获得；未能在10分钟内求解的实例，最优性间隙低于13%。与三种基线方法和另一相关算法相比，所提方法性能最优。
AI.conclusion: 该公式具有良好的紧致性，能够高效求解LD-TSP问题，并显著优于现有基线方法，为实际物流和空中交通中的路径规划提供了有效工具。

title: Permutation-preserving Functions and Neural Vecchia Covariance Kernels
summary: We introduce a novel framework for constructing scalable and flexible covariance kernels for Gaussian processes (GPs) by directly learning the covariance structure under a regression-type parameterization induced by Vecchia approximations, using deep neural architectures. Specifically, we model kriging coefficients and conditional standard deviations, deterministic quantities that uniquely characterize the covariance, providing stable and informative learning targets. Exploiting the permutation-equivariant structure of conditioning sets in the Vecchia factorization, we derive a universal representation for permutation-preserving functions and design neural architectures that respect this symmetry, leading to improved training stability and data efficiency. The proposed approach enables expressive, non-stationary kernel learning while maintaining computational scalability, thereby bridging classical GP methodology with modern deep learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Vecchia近似和深度神经网络的新框架，用于学习高斯过程的协方差核，实现了表达性强、非平稳且计算可扩展的核学习。
AI.motivation: 传统高斯过程的协方差核通常受限于预设的平稳形式，难以灵活表达复杂数据结构，且计算复杂度高。本文旨在通过深度神经网络直接学习协方差结构，同时保持计算可扩展性。
AI.method: 利用Vecchia近似将协方差学习转化为回归型参数化问题，建模克里金系数和条件标准差；设计置换等变神经网络架构，利用Vecchia分解中条件集的置换对称性，实现通用且对称保持的表示。
AI.result: 该方法能够学习表达性强、非平稳的协方差核，同时保持计算可扩展性；置换等变设计提升了训练稳定性和数据效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功连接了经典GP方法与深度学习，为大规模、非平稳高斯过程建模提供了有效且稳定的途径。

title: Foundation Twins: A New Generation of Power Systems Digital Twins using Foundation AI Models
summary: Power systems are inherently multi-timescale systems, with different physical phenomena and decision-making processes spanning multiple timescales, time horizons, and geographic scopes. I envision power systems digital twins (DTs) as powerful modeling and simulation tools that can accelerate and improve decision-making across different time scales and geographic scopes. However, until now, research has not delivered such a vision, and power systems DTs remain a concept distant from implementation. This is not a regular research paper. This is a position paper that outlines my vision for developing a new generation of power systems DTs that leverage recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML). I call these Foundation Twins. Foundation Twins combines the generalization features of foundation models with the decision-making capabilities of reinforcement learning (RL) architectures to deliver the envisioned power systems DTs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Foundation Twins概念，将基础模型的泛化能力与强化学习的决策能力相结合，旨在实现跨多时间尺度和地理范围的电力系统数字孪生愿景。
AI.motivation: 现有电力系统数字孪生研究尚未实现其跨时空尺度的决策加速与改进的愿景，论文作者希望利用AI/ML最新进展填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出Foundation Twins框架，融合基础模型（Foundation Models）的泛化特征与强化学习（RL）架构的决策能力，构建新一代电力系统数字孪生。
AI.result: 本文为立场论文，未提供实验性结果，但提出了一个概念性框架Foundation Twins，作为未来研究的蓝图。
AI.conclusion: Foundation Twins有望实现电力系统数字孪生的原始愿景，使其成为能够加速和改善跨时空尺度决策的强大建模与仿真工具。

title: ReaComp: Compiling LLM Reasoning into Symbolic Solvers for Efficient Program Synthesis
summary: LLMs can solve program synthesis tasks but remain inefficient and unreliable on hard instances requiring large combinatorial search. Given a small set of reasoning traces, we use coding agents to compile them into reusable symbolic program synthesizers over constrained DSLs. The resulting solvers require no LLM calls at test time and are strong standalone systems: symbolic solver ensembles reach 91.3% accuracy on PBEBench-Lite and 84.7% on PBEBench-Hard, outperforming LLMs with test-time scaling for the latter by +16.3 percentage points at zero LLM inference cost. They also complement LLM search, improving PBEBench-Hard accuracy from 68.4% to 85.8% while reducing reported token usage by 78%, and raising SLR-Bench hard-tier accuracy from 34.4% to 58.0% in a neuro-symbolic hybrid setting. Compared to directly using coding agents as per-instance solvers, induced solvers are substantially more Pareto-efficient, amortizing a small one-time construction cost over many zero-token executions. Finally, most solvers transfer zero-shot to a real historical linguistics task - predicting sound changes in natural language data - reaching 80.1% accuracy under ensembling and recovering some plausible linguistic rules. Together, these results show that reasoning traces can be compiled into reusable symbolic solvers that solve many tasks directly, complement LLM inference on hard cases, and provide a scalable route to domain-general solver induction. We release code and data for reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用编码代理将推理轨迹编译为可复用的符号化程序合成器，在多种任务上取得高精度，无需LLM推理成本，并能与LLM互补提升效率。
AI.motivation: LLM在需要大规模组合搜索的困难程序合成任务上效率低且不可靠，现有方法依赖大量LLM调用，成本高昂。
AI.method: 给定少量推理轨迹，使用编码代理将其编译为受限DSL上的可复用符号化程序合成器，形成符号求解器集成系统。
AI.result: 符号求解器在PBEBench-Lite达91.3%、PBEBench-Hard达84.7%准确率，零LLM推理成本下超越测试时扩展的LLM 16.3个百分点；与LLM混合使用可减少78% token消耗；在历史语言学任务上达80.1%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 推理轨迹可被编译为可复用的符号求解器，直接解决多数任务，在困难情况下补充LLM推理，为领域通用的求解器归纳提供可扩展路径。

title: Intelligent CCTV for Urban Design: AI-Based Analysis of Soft Infrastructure at Intersections
comment: 16 pages, 6 figures, 7 tables, Submitted/Under Review at the International Journal of Transportation Research (Submitted on 12 Jan 2026)
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) and computer vision are transforming transportation data collection. This study introduces an AI-enabled analytics framework leveraging existing CCTV infrastructure to evaluate the impact of soft interventions, such as temporary pedestrian refuges and curb extensions, on vehicle speed and safety. Using deep learning and perspective-based speed estimation, we evaluated driver behavior before and after interventions, with repeated post-installation monitoring in Week 1 and Week 2, in Minneapolis. Findings reveal that at unsignalized intersections, mean and 85th-percentile speeds fell by up to 18.75% and 16.56%, respectively, while pass-through traffic decreased by as much as 12.2%. Signalized intersections showed comparable reductions except one location, with mean and 85th-percentile speeds dropping by up to 20.0% and 17.19%. These results demonstrate the traffic-calming effectiveness of soft infrastructure and underscore the utility of AI-powered methods for rapid, low-cost, and evidence-based transport policy evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文利用AI和计算机视觉技术，基于现有CCTV基础设施评估临时行人庇护所和路缘扩展等软干预措施对车辆速度和安全的影响。在明尼阿波利斯市的实验显示，这些干预措施在无信号灯和信号灯交叉口均显著降低了车速（最高降幅达20%），证明了软基础设施的交通稳静化效果以及AI方法在交通政策评估中的价值。
AI.motivation: 探索利用现有CCTV基础设施和AI技术，低成本、快速地评估软干预措施（临时行人庇护所、路缘扩展）对车辆速度和安全的影响，从而为交通政策提供数据驱动的决策支持。
AI.method: 采用AI驱动分析框架，结合深度学习与基于透视的速度估计算法，利用现有CCTV摄像头数据，在干预前后（干预后第1周和第2周）对驾驶员行为进行持续监测和评估。
AI.result: 在无信号灯交叉口，平均速度与85百分位速度分别下降18.75%和16.56%，过境交通流量减少12.2%；信号灯交叉口除一个地点外也有类似下降，平均速度与85百分位速度分别下降20.0%和17.19%。
AI.conclusion: 软基础设施措施具有显著的交通稳静化效果，AI驱动的分析方法为快速、低成本、基于证据的交通政策评估提供了有效工具。

title: Inference on Linear Regressions with Two-Way Unobserved Heterogeneity
summary: We develop a general estimation and inference procedure for the common parameters in linear panel data regression models with nonparametric two-way specification of unobserved heterogeneity. The procedure takes as input any first-step estimators of the nonparametric regression function and the fixed effects and relies on two key ingredients: First, we develop moment conditions for the common parameters that are Neyman orthogonal with respect to the nonparametric regression function. Second, we employ a novel adjustment of the nonparametric regression estimator so the estimated fixed effects do not generate incidental parameter biases. Together, these ensure that the resulting estimator of the common parameters is root-NT -- asymptotically normally distributed under weak conditions on the estimators of fixed effects and regression function. Next, we propose a novel two-step estimator of the nonparametric regression function and the fixed effects and verify that this particular estimator satisfies the conditions of our general theory. A numerical study shows that the proposed estimators perform well in finite samples.

AI.tldr: 本文针对线性面板数据回归模型中存在非参数双向异质性的问题，提出了一套通用的估计与推断方法。通过构建Neyman正交矩条件并调整非参数回归估计量以消除固定效应的 incidental parameter bias，使得共同参数的估计量在弱条件下达到根号NT一致性和渐近正态性。同时，提出了一个新的两步估计器，并通过数值实验验证了其有限样本性能。
AI.motivation: 线性面板数据模型中存在非参数双向异质性（个体固定效应和时间固定效应），传统方法因未充分处理非参数成分与固定效应之间的相互影响，导致共同参数估计存在偏差。作者旨在开发一套稳健且通用的估计与推断框架，克服 incidental parameter bias 问题。
AI.method: 1) 构建针对共同参数的 Neyman 正交矩条件，使其对非参数回归函数的估计误差不敏感。2) 对非参数回归估计量进行新型调整，消除固定效应估计导致的 incidental parameter biases。3) 提出一个两步估计器：第一步估计非参数回归函数和固定效应；第二步利用调整后的矩条件估计共同参数。4) 推导根号NT一致性和渐近正态性的充分条件。
AI.result: 理论上证明了在弱条件下共同参数估计量的根号NT一致性和渐近正态性；数值模拟表明所提估计器在有限样本中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了处理面板数据双向非参数异质性的通用推断工具，Neyman正交化与固定效应调整的结合有效消除了偏差，提出的两步估计器兼具理论保证和实用性能。

title: Horizon-Constrained Rashomon Sets for Chaotic Forecasting
summary: Predictive multiplicity and chaotic dynamics represent two fundamental challenges in machine learning that have evolved independently despite their conceptual connections. We bridge this gap by introducing horizon-constrained Rashomon sets, a theoretical framework that characterizes how model multiplicity evolves with prediction horizon in chaotic systems. Unlike static prediction tasks where the Rashomon set remains fixed, chaos induces exponential divergence among initially similar models, fundamentally transforming the nature of predictive equivalence. We prove that the effective Rashomon set contracts exponentially with lead time at a rate determined by the maximum Lyapunov exponent and introduce Lyapunov-weighted metrics that provide tighter bounds on predictive disagreement. Leveraging these insights, we develop decision-aligned selection algorithms that choose among near-optimal models based on downstream utility rather than forecast accuracy alone. Extensive experiments on synthetic chaotic systems (Lorenz-96, Kuramoto-Sivashinsky) and real-world applications (wind power, traffic, weather) demonstrate that our framework improves decision quality by 18-34\% while maintaining competitive predictive performance. This work establishes the first rigorous connection between chaos theory and predictive multiplicity, providing principled guidance for deploying machine learning in safety-critical chaotic domains.

AI.tldr: 本文首次建立了混沌理论与预测多重性之间的严格联系，提出Horizon-constrained Rashomon Sets框架，证明在混沌系统中Rashomon集随预测 horizon指数收缩，并开发了基于下游效用的决策对齐选择算法，在多个混沌系统中实现18-34%的决策质量提升。
AI.motivation: 预测多重性（Rashomon效应）与混沌动力学虽然存在概念上的联系，但两者在机器学习研究中长期独立发展。现有工作缺乏对混沌系统中模型多样性如何随时间演化的理论理解，这阻碍了在安全关键混沌领域（如天气、能源、交通）中可靠部署机器学习模型。
AI.method: 1. 提出Horizon-constrained Rashomon Sets理论框架，刻画混沌系统中预测模型等价性随预测horizon的演化规律；2. 证明Rashomon集以最大Lyapunov指数决定的速率指数收缩；3. 引入Lyapunov加权度量，提供更紧的预测差异上界；4. 开发决策对齐的选择算法，基于下游效用而非单纯预测精度择优。
AI.result: 在Lorenz-96、Kuramoto-Sivashinsky等合成混沌系统及风力发电、交通、天气等真实应用中，该方法在保持竞争性预测性能的同时，将决策质量提升18-34%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了混沌理论与预测多重性的首个严谨理论连接，为在安全关键混沌领域部署机器学习提供了原则性指导。

title: Cooperative Profiles Predict Multi-Agent LLM Team Performance in AI for Science Workflows
summary: Multi-agent systems built from teams of large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed for collaborative scientific reasoning and problem-solving. These systems require agents to coordinate under shared constraints, such as GPUs or credit balances, where cooperative behavior matters. Behavioral economics provides a rich toolkit of games that isolate distinct cooperation mechanisms, yet it remains unknown whether a model's behavior in these stylized settings predicts its performance in realistic collaborative tasks. Here, we benchmark 35 open-weight LLMs across six behavioral economics games and show that game-derived cooperative profiles robustly predict downstream performance in AI-for-Science tasks, where teams of LLM agents collaboratively analyze data, build models, and produce scientific reports under shared budget constraints. Models that effectively coordinate games and invest in multiplicative team production (rather than greedy strategies) produce better scientific reports across three outcomes, accuracy, quality, and completion. These associations hold after controlling for multiple factors, indicating that cooperative disposition is a distinct, measurable property of LLMs not reducible to general ability. Our behavioral games framework thus offers a fast and inexpensive diagnostic for screening cooperative fitness before costly multi-agent deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文通过35个开源大语言模型在6个行为经济学博弈中的表现，发现模型在博弈中展现的合作倾向能够稳健预测其在AI-for-Science多智能体协作任务中的下游表现，合作性更强的模型生成的科学报告在准确性、质量和完成度上均更优。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统越来越多地被用于协作科学推理和问题解决，但缺乏有效手段来预测模型在真实协作任务中的表现。行为经济学的博弈工具能隔离不同的合作机制，但尚不清楚模型在这些博弈中的行为是否能预测其在实际协作任务中的性能。
AI.method: 对35个开源权重LLM进行6种行为经济学博弈测试（如公共物品博弈、囚徒困境等），提取合作性特征；然后在AI-for-Science场景中让LLM团队在共享预算约束下协作分析数据、构建模型和撰写科学报告，考察合作特征与下游表现（准确性、质量、完成度）的关联，并控制多种混淆因素。
AI.result: 博弈中衍生的合作轮廓稳健地预测了下游科学协作任务的表现。擅长协调博弈、投入乘法团队生产（而非贪婪策略）的模型产出的科学报告在准确性、质量和完成度三个维度上均更优。该关联在控制多项因素后依然显著，表明合作倾向是LLM一种独立可测量的属性，不能简化为通用能力。
AI.conclusion: 行为经济学博弈框架可作为快速、低成本的诊断工具，在昂贵的多智能体部署前筛选模型的合作适配性，为多智能体系统的模型选择提供依据。

title: Optimal Design of Stealthy Attacks in Partially Observed Linear Systems: A Likelihood-Based Approach
summary: We study the optimal design of stealthy attacks against partially observed linear control systems. We first propose a novel likelihood-based detection mechanism derived from the innovation process, based on which we quantify stealthiness and formulate an attack design problem that trades off performance degradation and detectability. We develop a tractable control-theoretic framework for optimal stealthy attacks under two information structures: deterministic attacks fixed prior to system evolution, and adaptive attacks constructed from available observations. In the adaptive setting, the attacker's partial observation leads to a stochastic control problem with an endogenous information structure. We address this challenge through a hierarchical optimization framework combined with the separation principle, reducing the problem to a Markovian control formulation and yielding semi-explicit optimal attacks. We further establish well-posedness of the resulting systems and illustrate through numerical experiments how information constraints shape the trade-off between attack effectiveness and stealthiness.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了针对部分观测线性控制系统的 stealthy 攻击最优设计，提出了基于创新过程的似然检测机制，并在两种信息结构（确定性攻击和自适应攻击）下建立了可处理的控制理论框架，通过分层优化和分离原理解决了自适应攻击中的随机控制问题，获得了半显式最优攻击策略。
AI.motivation: 现有 stealthy 攻击设计缺乏对部分观测信息结构下攻击者最优策略的系统性理论框架，尤其是自适应攻击中内生信息结构带来的随机控制挑战尚未被充分解决。
AI.method: 1. 提出基于创新过程的似然检测机制量化 stealthiness；2. 建立性能退化与可检测性之间的权衡优化问题；3. 针对确定性攻击和自适应攻击两种信息结构分别建模；4. 采用分层优化框架结合分离原理，将自适应攻击问题转化为马尔可夫控制问题并求解半显式最优攻击。
AI.result: 获得了两种信息结构下的半显式最优 stealthy 攻击策略，并通过数值实验验证了信息约束如何影响攻击有效性与 stealthiness 之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的基于控制理论的框架为部分观测线性系统下的最优 stealthy 攻击设计提供了可处理的解决方案，揭示了信息结构对攻击策略的深刻影响。

title: Relaxed Sparsest-Permutation Formulation for Causal Discovery at Scale
summary: Despite the growing availability of large datasets, causal structure learning remains computationally prohibitive at scale. We revisit sparsest-permutation learning for linear structural equation models and show that exact Cholesky factorization is unnecessary for structure recovery. This observation motivates a support-level relaxation that searches for sparse triangular factors over a precision-support screening graph. The relaxed formulation can be efficiently evaluated via masked zero-fill incomplete Cholesky factorization, enabling scalable comparison of candidate orderings. At the population level, we establish soundness for Markov equivalence class (MEC) recovery under no-cancellation and sparsest Markov representation assumptions, as well as robustness to ordering misspecification. Motivated by these guarantees, we introduce SCOPE, a sparse-Cholesky pipeline that provides a scalable implementation of the relaxed formulation. Experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that SCOPE matches the MEC recovery accuracy of substantially slower baselines, while achieving significantly reduced runtime and scaling to 10k variables.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCOPE方法，通过松弛稀疏排列学习问题并利用掩码零填充不完全Cholesky分解，实现了大规模线性结构方程模型下的高效因果结构学习，在10k变量规模上显著降低运行时间的同时保持MEC恢复准确性。
AI.motivation: 大规模数据集的因果结构学习计算成本过高，现有方法难以扩展到高维场景。作者希望解决sparsest-permutation learning在大规模线性SEM中的计算瓶颈问题。
AI.method: 1) 观察到精确Cholesky分解对结构恢复并非必要，提出基于支持域的松弛方法；2) 在精度-支持筛选图上搜索稀疏三角因子；3) 利用掩码零填充不完全Cholesky分解高效评估候选排序；4) 提出SCOPE流程实现该松弛框架。
AI.result: 实验表明SCOPE在MEC恢复准确率上与显著更慢的基线方法相当，同时大幅减少运行时间，可扩展至10k变量规模。
AI.conclusion: 在无抵消和最稀疏马尔可夫表示假设下，SCOPE在总体水平上保证了MEC恢复的合理性和对排序误指定的鲁棒性，为大规模因果发现提供了实用且可扩展的方案。

title: Community-to-Vehicle: Integrating Electric Vehicles into Energy Communities -- A Swiss Case Study
summary: The institutional separation between local energy communities and public electric vehicle (EV) charging limits the efficient use of locally generated renewable energy. This paper introduces the concept of community-to-vehicle (C2V) as an institutional design mechanism to bridge this gap by enabling EV charging within the community boundary, where locally generated photovoltaic (PV) surplus is preferentially allocated and offered to external users at a community charging price. Building on the recently introduced local electricity community framework in Switzerland, we design scenarios that capture the transition from full separation to coordinated EV charging and evaluate their impacts on EV users and the community. The results show that C2V significantly improves local PV utilization and enhances economic performance, reducing EV charging costs relative to commercial alternatives while generating additional revenue streams for the community. These findings highlight the potential of C2V as a practical, implementable mechanism for integrating EV charging into local energy communities, providing a clear pathway for adopting coordinated community-EV interaction within existing regulatory frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出社区到车辆（C2V）机制，将电动汽车充电整合进本地能源社区，优先分配本地光伏余电，显著提升光伏利用率、降低充电成本并为社区创造额外收入。
AI.motivation: 本地能源社区与公共电动汽车充电之间的制度分离限制了本地可再生能源的有效利用，亟需一种机制来弥合这一鸿沟。
AI.method: 基于瑞士本地电力社区框架，设计从完全分离到协调充电的多种场景，通过模拟评估C2V机制对电动汽车用户和社区的影响。
AI.result: C2V显著提升了本地光伏利用率，降低了电动汽车充电成本，同时为社区创造了额外收入流。
AI.conclusion: C2V是一种可行且可实施的机制，能够将电动汽车充电整合进本地能源社区，为在现有监管框架内采用协调的社区-电动汽车互动提供了清晰路径。

title: Chainwash: Multi-Step Rewriting Attacks on Diffusion Language Model Watermarks
summary: Statistical watermarking is a common approach for verifying whether text was written by a language model. Most existing schemes assume autoregressive generation, where tokens are produced left to right and contextual hashing is well defined. Diffusion language models generate text by denoising tokens in arbitrary order, so these schemes cannot be applied directly. A recent watermark by Gloaguen et al. addresses this gap for LLaDA 8B Instruct and reports true positive detection above 99%. This paper studies what happens when watermarked text is rewritten not once but several times. Using the same watermark configuration, 1,605 watermarked completions of about 300 tokens each are produced across five WaterBench domains. Each completion is rewritten by four open weight language models, from 1.5B to 8B parameters, none of which know the watermark key. Five rewrite styles are tested: paraphrase, humanize, simplify, academic, and summarize expand. Each style is chained for up to five hops, producing 160,500 rewritten texts in total. The watermark is detected on 87.9% of the original outputs at the standard significance threshold. After a single rewrite, detection falls to between 14% and 41% depending on the rewriter and style. After five chained rewrites, detection falls to 4.86%, meaning 94.76% of the originally detected texts are no longer flagged. After three rewrites, the detector score has dropped 86% of the way from its watermarked baseline toward the null distribution. Repeated rewriting is therefore a much stronger attack than a single rewrite, and the result holds across all four rewriters tested.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了针对扩散语言模型水印的多轮改写攻击。使用LLaDA 8B Instruct的水印方案，对1,605段水印文本进行最多5轮链式改写（涉及4种语言模型、5种改写风格）。结果显示：原始水印检测率87.9%，单轮改写后降至14-41%，五轮改写后仅4.86%，即94.76%的水印文本不再被检测到。多轮改写是比单轮改写更强的攻击方式。
AI.motivation: 现有水印方案主要针对自回归生成模型设计，扩散语言模型因生成顺序任意而无法直接适用。虽然已有工作（Gloaguen等人）提出了针对LLaDA的水印方案并取得高检测率，但该水印在面对多次改写攻击时的鲁棒性尚未被研究。
AI.method: 使用LLaDA 8B Instruct的水印配置，生成1,605段约300 token的水印文本（覆盖5个WaterBench领域）。由4个未知水印密钥的开源模型（1.5B-8B参数）进行最多5轮链式改写，涉及5种改写风格（paraphrase, humanize, simplify, academic, summarize expand），总计产生160,500段改写文本，并统计各轮次后的水印检测率。
AI.result: 1) 原始水印检测率87.9%；2) 单轮改写后降至14-41%（因改写器与风格而异）；3) 五轮改写后检测率仅4.86%，94.76%的原始检测文本不再被标记；4) 三轮改写后，检测分数已向零分布方向下降86%。
AI.conclusion: 重复改写是比单次改写更强的水印攻击方式，该结果在4种改写器上均成立。当前针对扩散语言模型的水印方案对多轮改写攻击的鲁棒性不足。

title: When Helpfulness Becomes Sycophancy: Sycophancy is a Boundary Failure Between Social Alignment and Epistemic Integrity in Large Language Models
summary: This position paper argues that sycophancy in LLMs is a boundary failure between social alignment and epistemic integrity. Existing work often operationalizes sycophancy through external behavior such as agreement with incorrect user beliefs, position reversals, or deviation from an objective standard of correctness. These formulations capture only overt forms of the phenomenon and leave subtler boundary failures involving epistemic integrity and social alignment underspecified. We argue that sycophancy should not be understood as agreement alone, but as alignment behavior that displaces independent epistemic judgment. To clarify this boundary, we propose a three-condition framework for sycophancy. First, the user expresses a cue in the form of a belief, preference, or self-concept. Second, the model shifts toward that cue through alignment behavior. Third, this shift compromises epistemic accuracy, independent reasoning, or appropriate correction. We also introduce a taxonomy for classifying sycophancy, consisting of alignment targets, mechanisms, and severity. The paper concludes by discussing implications for alignment evaluation and argues for boundary-aware assessment, structured rubrics, and mitigation strategies, while situating these proposals alongside alternative views of sycophancy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLM中的谄媚行为是社会对齐与认知诚信之间的边界失效问题，并构建了一个三条件框架（用户线索、对齐行为、认知损害）及分类体系来系统定义和评估该现象。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅将谄媚行为简单定义为"同意用户错误观点"等外部可观察行为，忽略了涉及认知诚信与社会对齐边界的微妙失败模式，缺乏对谄媚本质的理论界定。
AI.method: 提出三条件框架：(1)用户表达线索（信念/偏好/自我认知）；(2)模型通过对齐行为向该线索偏移；(3)这种偏移损害了认知准确性、独立推理或适当纠正。并构建包含对齐目标、机制和严重程度的分类体系。
AI.result: 构建了边界感知的评估框架、结构化评分准则和缓解策略，将谄媚重新定义为"取代独立认知判断的对齐行为"，而非简单的一致性偏差。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁采用边界感知评估方法，并建议开发结构化评估准则和针对性缓解策略，以在保持社会对齐的同时维护模型的认知诚信。

title: Optimal Contextual Pricing under Agnostic Non-Lipschitz Demand
summary: We study contextual dynamic pricing with linear valuations and bounded-support agnostic noise, whose induced demand curve may be non-Lipschitz with arbitrary jumps and atoms. Such discontinuities break the cross-context interpolation arguments used by smooth-demand pricing algorithms, while the best previous method achieved only $\tilde O(T^{3/4})$ regret. We propose Conservative-Markdown Redirect-UCB Pricing, a polynomial-time algorithm that combines randomized parameter estimation, conservative residual-grid probing, and confidence-based one-step redirection. Our algorithm achieves $\tilde O(T^{2/3})$ optimal regret, matching the known lower bounds of Kleinberg and Leighton (2003) up to logarithmic factors and improving over the previous upper bound of Xu and Wang (2022). Under stochastic well-conditioned contexts, this closes the long-existing open regret gap in linear-valuation contextual pricing under agnostic non-Lipschitz noise distribution.

AI.tldr: 本文针对具有线性估值和有界支撑不可知噪声（可能导致非Lipschitz需求曲线）的上下文动态定价问题，提出了Conservative-Markdown Redirect-UCB Pricing算法，实现了$\tilde O(T^{2/3})$的最优遗憾界，匹配已知下界，改进了此前$\tilde O(T^{3/4})$的上界。
AI.motivation: 现有针对平滑需求的跨上下文插值方法在非Lipschitz噪声（需求曲线存在任意跳跃和原子）下失效，而此前最佳方法仅能达到$\tilde O(T^{3/4})$的遗憾界，与已知下界之间存在缺口。
AI.method: 提出Conservative-Markdown Redirect-UCB Pricing算法，包含三个关键组件：随机化参数估计、保守残差网格探测、基于置信度的一步重定向。
AI.result: 算法达到$\tilde O(T^{2/3})$的最优遗憾界，匹配Kleinberg和Leighton (2003)的下界（对数因子内），优于Xu和Wang (2022)的$\tilde O(T^{3/4})$上界。
AI.conclusion: 在随机良态上下文条件下，该工作闭合了线性估值上下文定价在不可知非Lipschitz噪声分布下的长期开放遗憾差距。

title: Sparse Prefix Caching for Hybrid and Recurrent LLM Serving
summary:
Prefix caching is a key latency optimization for autoregressive LLM serving, yet existing systems assume dense per-token key/value reuse. State-space models change the structure of the problem: a recurrent layer can resume from a single stored state rather than requiring the entire token history. This asymmetry opens a new design point between no reuse and dense caching: store exact recurrent states at a sparse set of checkpoint positions and, on a cache hit, resume from the deepest stored checkpoint and recompute the remaining suffix exactly.
  We formalize sparse prefix caching as checkpoint placement under a distribution over overlap depths, yielding an exact O(NM) dynamic program. For use cases where requests share a non-trivial prefix (e.g. asking different questions about a single long document), we show that our method consistently improves the Pareto frontier traced by standard heuristics on real-world data. Across QuALITY and System Prompts, distribution-aware placement dominates every fixed-budget baseline on the measured layer-group Pareto frontier and matches or outperforms the strongest heuristic (block caching) while typically using substantially fewer checkpoints, with the largest gains at low checkpoint budgets where the overlap distribution is most non-uniform. The method is most relevant when many requests share a substantial but not identical prefix within a retained cache entry. It preserves exact outputs, does not change the recurrent computation itself or require new recurrent update kernels, applies to recurrent/SSM layers whose hidden state can be extracted and restored exactly, and for hybrid models can be combined with existing KV-cache compression techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文提出稀疏前缀缓存方法，通过在有状态空间模型的循环层中稀疏设置检查点并精确重计算后缀，在缓存命中率和存储开销之间取得最优权衡，并通过动态规划实现分布感知的检查点放置。
AI.motivation: 现有前缀缓存假设密集的逐token键值重用，但状态空间模型（SSM）的循环层只需单个隐状态即可恢复，无需完整token历史。这种不对称性启发了稀疏缓存的新的设计点。
AI.method: 形式化稀疏前缀缓存为在重叠深度分布下的检查点放置问题，提出精确的O(NM)动态规划算法，用于选择稀疏检查点位置，使缓存命中时从最深检查点恢复并重计算剩余后缀。
AI.result: 在QuALITY和System Prompts数据集上，分布感知的放置方法在所有固定预算基线中占据主导的帕累托前沿，匹配或超越最强启发式方法（块缓存），同时使用更少的检查点，在低预算下收益最大。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于存在实质性但不完全相同前缀的请求场景（如对同一长文档提不同问题），保持精确输出，不改变循环计算本身，无需新内核，可与其他KV缓存压缩技术结合。

title: A Few Good Clauses: Comparing LLMs vs Domain-Trained Small Language Models on Structured Contract Extraction
summary:
This paper evaluates whether a domain trained Small Language Model (SLM) can outperform frontier Large Language Models on structured contract extraction at radically lower cost. We test Olava Extract, a self hosted legal domain Mixture of Experts model, against five frontier models.
  Olava Extract achieved the strongest aggregate performance in the study, with a macro F1 of 0.812 and a micro F1 of 0.842, while reducing inference cost by 78% to 97% compared with the frontier models tested. It also achieved the highest precision scores, producing fewer hallucinated and unsupported extractions, an important distinction in legal workflows where hallucinations create operational risk and downstream review burden.
  The findings shows that high performing, human comparable legal AI no longer requires the largest externally hosted models. More broadly, they challenge the assumption that commercially valuable enterprise AI capability must remain tied to ever larger models, massive infrastructure expenditure, and centrally hosted providers.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了一个领域训练的小语言模型（SLM）Olava Extract，在结构化合同提取任务中，它以78%-97%的低成本超越了五个前沿大语言模型（LLM），取得了最高的宏F1（0.812）和微F1（0.842）分数，同时产生更少的幻觉和无效提取，挑战了企业AI能力必须依赖更大模型和中央托管提供商的假设。
AI.motivation: 验证领域训练的小语言模型（SLM）能否在结构化合同提取任务中以极低成本超越前沿大语言模型（LLM），并挑战企业AI必须依赖更大模型和高额基础设施投入的假设。
AI.method: 将自托管的法律领域专家混合模型（MoE）Olava Extract与五个前沿大语言模型进行对比，评估其在结构化合同提取任务上的性能（宏F1、微F1、精确率）和推理成本。
AI.result: Olava Extract在宏F1（0.812）和微F1（0.842）上取得最强综合表现，推理成本降低78%-97%，同时精确率最高，产生的幻觉和无效提取更少。
AI.conclusion: 高性能、可媲美人类的法律AI不再需要最大的外部托管模型；有价值的企事业AI能力不必依赖更大模型、大规模基础设施支出和集中式托管提供商。

title: Stability of the Monge Map in Semi-Dual Optimal Transport
summary: This paper shows that the semi-dual formulation of the optimal transport problem has a degenerate saddle-point structure, and that its numerical solution is equivalent to solving a constrained optimization problem. We derive necessary and sufficient conditions for the convergence of Monge maps without requiring optimality of the dual potential. This analysis helps explain why, in practice, numerical algorithms often require more iterations to update the transport map than the potential.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了最优传输半对偶公式的退化鞍点结构，证明了其数值解等价于约束优化问题，并给出了蒙日映射收敛的充要条件，解释了为何实际算法中传输映射的更新比势函数需要更多迭代。
AI.motivation: 为了理解最优传输问题中半对偶公式的数值求解困难，特别是为何传输映射的更新通常比势函数需要更多迭代。
AI.method: 分析了半对偶最优传输问题的鞍点结构，推导了蒙日映射收敛的充要条件（不依赖对偶势的最优性）。
AI.result: 发现了半对偶公式的退化鞍点结构，并建立了数值求解与约束优化问题的等价性；给出了蒙日映射收敛的充要条件。
AI.conclusion: 该分析解释了实际算法中传输映射更新比势函数需要更多迭代的原因，为改进最优传输算法的效率提供了理论依据。

title: In-Context Positive-Unlabeled Learning
summary: Positive-unlabeled (PU) learning addresses binary classification when only a set of labeled positives is available alongside a pool of unlabeled samples drawn from a mixture of positives and negatives. Existing PU methods typically require dataset-specific training or iterative optimization, which limits their applicability when many tasks must be solved quickly or with little tuning. We introduce PUICL, a pretrained transformer that solves PU classification entirely through in-context learning. PUICL is pretrained on synthetic PU datasets generated from randomly instantiated structural causal models, exposing it to a wide range of feature-label relationships and class-prior configurations. At inference time, PUICL receives the labeled positives and the unlabeled samples as a single input and returns class probabilities for the unlabeled rows in one forward pass, with no gradient updates or per-task fitting. On 20 semi-synthetic PU benchmarks derived from the UCI Machine Learning Repository, OpenML, and scikit-learn, PUICL outperforms four standard PU learning baselines in average AUC and accuracy, and is competitive on F1-score. These results show that the in-context learning paradigm extends naturally beyond fully supervised tabular prediction to the semi-supervised PU setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PUICL，一种基于预训练Transformer的模型，通过上下文学习（in-context learning）解决正类-无标签（PU）分类问题。该模型在合成因果模型生成的数据上预训练，推理时无需梯度更新或任务特定调参，在20个PU基准上超越四种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有PU学习方法通常需要针对特定数据集进行训练或迭代优化，当需要快速解决多个任务时适用性受限。作者希望利用上下文学习的范式，让模型无需梯度更新或任务特定调参就能直接解决PU分类问题，从而提升效率和通用性。
AI.method: PUICL是一个预训练Transformer模型，在随机实例化结构因果模型生成的合成PU数据集上预训练，使其暴露于多样的特征-标签关系和类别先验配置。推理时，将标记正样本和无标签样本作为单个输入，通过一次前向传播直接返回无标签样本的类别概率，无需梯度更新或每任务拟合。
AI.result: 在来自UCI、OpenML和scikit-learn的20个半合成PU基准上，PUICL在平均AUC和准确率上优于四种标准PU学习基线，在F1分数上具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 上下文学习范式可以自然地扩展到半监督PU学习场景，超越了全监督表格预测任务，为PU学习提供了一种高效、无需调参的解决方案。

title: SOPF-Based Adaptive Droop Control for Hybrid AC--HVDC Grids Under Offshore Wind Uncertainty
summary: The integration of massive offshore wind into hybrid AC-HVDC grids demands robust DC voltage regulation, yet conventional fixed-gain droop controllers struggle under severe stochastic volatility. This paper bridges the gap between system-level economic dispatch and converter-level control by proposing a novel Stochastic Optimal Power Flow (SOPF)-based adaptive droop framework. Rather than relying on heuristic or reactive tuning, wind forecast uncertainty is modeled using a zone-wise Beta distribution that accurately captures the heteroscedastic nature of wind errors across low, mid, and high power regimes. By leveraging Polynomial Chaos Expansion (PCE) within a chance-constrained SOPF, the system's stochastic states are formulated analytically. Crucially, the optimal adaptive droop gain is extracted directly from the first-order PCE coefficients via a Jacobian-free sensitivity analysis, embedding statistical voltage-security guarantees directly into the local converter control. Validation on a 4-terminal AC-HVDC system demonstrates that scenario-adaptive gains significantly outperform standard fixed-coefficient approaches, effectively minimizing active-power tracking errors during extreme wind disturbances.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于随机最优潮流（SOPF）的自适应下垂控制框架，通过多项式混沌展开（PCE）和机会约束优化，将风电不确定性建模为分区分段的Beta分布，直接从PCE一阶系数中提取最优自适应下垂增益，实现交直流混合电网的鲁棒直流电压调节。
AI.motivation: 大规模海上风电接入混合交直流电网时，传统固定增益下垂控制器难以应对风电的剧烈随机波动，亟需一种能够融合系统级经济调度与换流器级控制的新方法。
AI.method: 采用分区Beta分布建模风电预测误差的异方差性；基于多项式混沌展开（PCE）构建机会约束随机最优潮流（SOPF）；通过无雅可比灵敏度分析从PCE一阶系数中直接提取最优自适应下垂增益。
AI.result: 在4端交直流混合系统上的验证表明，所提场景自适应增益方法显著优于传统固定系数方法，在极端风电扰动下有效最小化了有功功率跟踪误差。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功桥接了系统级经济调度与换流器级控制，为含大规模海上风电的混合电网提供了兼具经济性与安全性的电压调节方案。

title: PRISM: Perception Reasoning Interleaved for Sequential Decision Making
summary: Scaling LLM-based embodied agents from text-only environments to complex multimodal settings remains a major challenge. Recent work identifies a perception-reasoning-decision gap in standalone Vision-Language Models (VLMs), which often overlook task-critical information. In this paper, we introduce PRISM, a framework that tightly couples perception (VLM) and decision (LLM) through a dynamic question-answer (DQA) pipeline. Instead of passively accepting the VLM's description, the LLM critiques it, probes the VLM with goal-oriented questions, and synthesizes a compact image description. This closed-loop interaction yields a sharp, task-driven understanding of the scene. We evaluate PRISM on the ALFWorld and Room-to-Room (R2R) benchmarks. We show that: (1) PRISM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art image-based models, (2) our Interactive goal-oriented perception pipeline yields systematic and substantial gains, and (3) PRISM is fully automatic, eliminating the need for handcrafted questions or answers.

AI.tldr: PRISM通过动态问答管道紧密耦合VLM和LLM，让LLM主动向VLM提问以获取任务关键信息，在ALFWorld和R2R基准上显著优于现有图像模型。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM在感知-推理-决策链条中存在信息遗漏问题，单靠VLM被动描述无法捕捉任务关键信息，需构建主动提问机制来弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 提出PRISM框架：LLM不再被动接受VLM的描述，而是通过动态问答管道主动批评VLM输出、提出目标导向问题，并综合生成精炼的图像描述，形成闭环交互。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和R2R基准上，PRISM显著优于最先进的基于图像模型，且无需手工设计问答对，完全自动化。
AI.conclusion: 交互式目标导向感知管道能系统性地提升具身智能体的性能，紧密耦合VLM和LLM是缩小感知-推理-决策差距的有效途径。

title: MidSteer: Optimal Affine Framework for Steering Generative Models
summary: Steering intermediate representations has emerged as a powerful strategy for controlling generative models, particularly in post-deployment alignment and safety settings. However, despite its empirical success, it currently lacks a comprehensive theoretical framework. In this paper, we bridge this gap by formalizing the theory of concept steering. First, we establish a link between steering and affine concept erasure, proving that the standard approach for removing unwanted behaviors is a special case of LEACE (a closed-form method for affine erasure). Next, we formulate a principled theoretical framework for concept switching, LEACE-Switch, and characterize the assumptions under which it provides an optimal affine solution. Building on this analysis, we then introduce MidSteer (Minimal Disturbance concept Steering), a more general affine framework for concept manipulation that relaxes these assumptions and enables directed, minimal-disturbance transformations. We demonstrate that MidSteer performs favorably across a range of tasks, modalities, and architectures, including vision diffusion models and large language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了概念操控的理论框架，建立了Steering与LEACE的联系，并引入MidSteer方法实现最小扰动的概念操纵，在多种模型和任务上表现良好。
AI.motivation: 尽管steering方法在生成模型的控制中取得了实证成功，但缺乏系统的理论框架，作者希望填补这一空白。
AI.method: 1) 建立steering与仿射概念擦除（LEACE）之间的理论联系；2) 提出LEACE-Switch框架，刻画概念切换的最优仿射解；3) 引入MidSteer，一种更一般的仿射框架，放松假设条件，实现定向、最小干扰的概念变换。
AI.result: MidSteer在视觉扩散模型和大语言模型等多种任务、模态和架构上表现优于以往方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文为概念steering提供了严格的理论基础，并提出了更灵活有效的MidSteer方法，推动了生成模型可控性的理论发展。

title: Who Prices Cognitive Labor in the Age of Agents? A Position on Compute-Anchored Wages
summary: A natural intuition about the economics of AI agents is that, because agents can be replicated at near-zero marginal cost, they constitute a labor input in infinitely elastic supply, and therefore drive cognitive-labor wages to zero. We argue this framing is wrong in mechanism but partially correct in conclusion, and that the correction matters for both theory and policy. \textbf{Agents are not labor; they are a production technology that converts compute capital $K_c$ into effective units of cognitive labor $L_A$.} Once this is recognized, the elastic-supply margin that anchors the equilibrium wage migrates from the labor market to the compute capital market. Building on the textbook factor-pricing framework \citep{mankiw2020}, we derive a \emph{Compute-Anchored Wage} (CAW) bound stating that, on tasks where human and agent cognitive labor are substitutes, the competitive human wage is bounded above by $λ\cdot k \cdot r_c$, where $r_c$ is the rental rate of compute capital, $k$ is the compute intensity of one effective agent-labor unit, and $λ$ is the relative human-to-agent productivity. We generalize the result through CES aggregation, separate substitutable from complementary tasks (yielding a directional inversion of skill-biased technical change), and discuss factor-share consequences. The position is concise: \emph{the price-setter for cognitive labor is no longer the labor market.}

AI.tldr: 本文论证AI智能体并非传统意义上的劳动力，而是一种将计算资本转化为认知劳动的生产技术。在此认知下，认知劳动的均衡工资不再由劳动力市场决定，而是由计算资本市场的租金率锚定，形成"计算锚定工资"（CAW）上界。
AI.motivation: 纠正"AI智能体因可零边际成本复制而将认知劳动工资推向零"这一流行的错误直觉，指出其机制理解有误，并提出正确的理论框架以指导政策分析。
AI.method: 基于标准要素定价框架（Mankiw, 2020），将智能体建模为将计算资本Kc转化为有效认知劳动单位LA的生产技术，推导出计算锚定工资（CAW）上界，并通过CES加总、区分可替代与互补任务、讨论要素份额进行推广。
AI.result: 推导出竞争性人力工资的上界为 λ·k·rc（计算资本租金率×计算强度×相对生产率），指出认知劳动的定价者已从劳动力市场转变为计算资本市场。
AI.conclusion: 智能体不是无限弹性的劳动力供给，而是受计算资本市场约束的生产技术；这一修正对劳动经济学理论和技术政策（如技能偏向性技术变革的方向反转）具有重要意义。

title: A closer target setting approach to boundary problems with the Russell graph measure
summary: A Russell graph measure (RGM) is one of the standard DEA models, but its efficiency measure is not well-defined--or has unacceptable properties--at the boundary of the nonnegative orthant. This is known as a boundary problem. Existing studies have tackled this issue; however, their models may fail to identify an efficient target or fail to satisfy some desirable properties of efficiency measures. In this paper, we incorporate a closer target setting approach into the RGM model with production trade-offs to overcome such issues. We demonstrate that the efficiency measure of the proposed model overcomes the boundary problem and has stronger properties than existing models. We also demonstrate that the efficiency scores of the proposed model can be computed by solving a series of LPs. We conduct a numerical experiment with a real-world dataset to illustrate how targets provided by our model are realistic compared with the existing model, which also suggests the validity of our model in applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合更近目标设定方法和生产权衡的Russell图测度(RGM)模型，解决了标准RGM在非负象限边界处的边界问题，并通过一系列线性规划求解效率分数。实验表明，该模型能提供更现实的目标，具有更强的性质。
AI.motivation: 标准Russell图测度(RGM)在非负象限边界处存在效率度量定义不良或性质不可接受的边界问题，现有模型要么无法识别有效目标，要么无法满足效率度量的某些期望性质。
AI.method: 本文将更近目标设定方法融入带有生产权衡的RGM模型中，通过引入生产权衡来克服边界问题，并采用一系列线性规划(LP)来求解效率分数。
AI.result: 所提出模型克服了边界问题，相比现有模型具有更强的性质；通过真实数据集实验表明，该模型提供的目标比现有模型更现实合理。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的改进RGM模型有效解决了边界问题，具有更强的理论性质，且在实际应用中能提供更现实的效率目标，验证了模型的有效性。

title: Variational Smoothing and Inference for SDEs from Sparse Data with Dynamic Neural Flows
comment: Yu Wang and Arnab Ganguly contributed equally to this work. Corresponding to Arnab Ganguly
summary: Stochastic differential equations (SDEs) provide a flexible framework for modeling temporal dynamics in partially observed systems. A central task is to calibrate such models from data, which requires inferring latent trajectories and parameters from sparse, noisy observations. Classical smoothing methods for this problem are often limited by path degeneracy and poor scalability. In this work, we developed a novel method based on characterization of the posterior SDE in terms of conditional backward-in-time score defined as the gradient of a function solving a Kolmogorov backward equation with multiplicative updates at observation times. We learn this conditional score using neural networks trained to satisfy both the governing PDE and the observation-induced jump conditions, thereby integrating continuous-time dynamics with discrete Bayesian updates. The resulting score induces a posterior SDE with the same diffusion coefficient but a modified drift, enabling efficient posterior trajectory sampling. We further derive a likelihood-based objective for learning the SDE parameters, yielding an evidence lower bound (ELBO) for joint state smoothing and parameter estimation. This leads to a variational EM-style procedure, where the neural conditional score is optimized to approximate the smoothing distribution, followed by a maximization step over the SDE parameters using samples from the induced posterior. Experiments on nonlinear systems demonstrate accurate and stable inference with a very few observations demonstrating significant improved scalability compared to classical MCMC methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件反向分数（conditional backward-in-time score）的SDE后验推断方法，通过学习神经网络求解Kolmogorov后向方程和观测更新的跳跃条件，实现了高效的轨迹平滑与参数估计，实验表明在少观测条件下比经典MCMC方法更具可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 经典平滑方法（如MCMC）存在路径退化（path degeneracy）和可扩展性差的问题，难以从稀疏、带噪声的观测中高效推断潜在轨迹和参数。
AI.method: 1. 将后验SDE表征为条件反向分数（conditional score），该分数通过求解带观测跳跃条件的Kolmogorov后向方程得到。2. 用神经网络学习该条件分数，同时满足连续时间动力学和离散贝叶斯更新。3. 后验SDE保持原扩散系数，仅修改漂移项。4. 推导ELBO用于联合平滑和参数估计，采用变分EM流程交替优化。
AI.result: 在非线性系统实验中，该方法在极少观测数据下实现了准确且稳定的推断，相比经典MCMC方法显著提升了可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的神经条件分数方法有效克服了路径退化问题，为SDE的平滑与参数估计提供了一种可扩展的新范式。

title: Kirigami-Structured Electronic Capsule for Long-Term Continuous Gastric Monitoring
summary: Ingestible electronic systems enable non-invasive, in situ sensing within the gastrointestinal (GI) tract, yet clinical translation has been limited by uncontrolled transit, short operational lifetimes, and unreliable wireless communication that prevent continuous monitoring. Here, we present a gastric-resident ingestible robotic platform that achieves week-long operation through integration of a bioinspired, electrically triggered release mechanism with a kirigami-enabled electronic architecture. A kirigami-patterned flexible printed circuit board spans the capsule body and deployable superelastic arms, enabling high-density integration of sensing, power management, and wireless modules within a constrained volume while tolerating large mechanical deformation during gastric residence. Stable retention and on-demand disassembly are achieved using thermally responsive polycaprolactone joints that transition from rigid to compliant states under electrical activation, avoiding dependence on variable chemical triggers. Reliable telemetry in the highly attenuating gastric environment is maintained using a dual-band Bluetooth Low Energy and sub-gigahertz module with RSSI- and throughput-aware adaptive transmission, balancing link robustness and energy consumption. We demonstrate long-term, continuous monitoring of gastric radiation exposure, enabling early detection of dose accumulation and providing a promising in vivo alternative to wearable or handheld dosimeters. Swine studies confirm stable gastric residence, sustained real-time telemetry, and safe gastrointestinal passage following triggered disassembly. This work establishes kirigami-enabled integration as a scalable strategy for long-term gastric-resident robotic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于折纸（kirigami）结构的胃驻留可摄入机器人平台，通过电控热响应释放机制和柔性电路设计，实现长达一周的胃内连续监测，并在猪模型中验证了稳定驻留、实时遥测和安全排出能力。
AI.motivation: 现有可摄入电子系统存在通过时间不可控、工作寿命短、无线通信不可靠等问题，无法实现连续监测，亟需一种能在胃内长期稳定驻留的机器人平台。
AI.method: 1) 采用kirigami图案化的柔性印刷电路板，实现高密度集成传感、电源管理和无线模块；2) 使用电控热响应聚己内酯（PCL）接头实现可控驻留和按需分离；3) 采用双频蓝牙低功耗+亚GHz模块的自适应传输策略，优化链路鲁棒性和能耗。
AI.result: 猪模型实验证实：该平台可实现稳定胃内驻留、持续实时遥测，并在电控分离后安全通过胃肠道。成功展示了连续监测胃部辐射暴露的能力，可早期检测剂量累积。
AI.conclusion: 本工作确立了kirigami集成作为长期胃驻留机器人系统的可扩展策略，为替代可穿戴或手持式剂量计提供了有前景的体内监测方案。

title: The Cost of Context: Mitigating Textual Bias in Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are increasingly integrated with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to mitigate hallucinations, the introduction of external documents can conceal severe failure modes at the instance level. We identify and formalize the phenomenon of recorruption, where the introduction of even perfectly accurate "oracle" context causes a capable model to abandon an initially correct prediction. Through a mechanistic diagnosis of internal attention matrices, we show that recorruption is driven by a two-fold attentional collapse: (1) visual blindness, characterized by the systemic suppression of visual attention mass ($M_{vis}$) and sharpness ($S_{vis}$), and (2) a structural positional bias that forces the model to prioritize boundary tokens over semantic relevance. Our analysis reveals an Illusion of Success, demonstrating that many seemingly correct RAG outcomes are merely positional coincidences where the model's textual copying bias happens to align with the ground-truth location. To address these vulnerabilities, we propose Bottleneck Attention Intervention for Recovery (BAIR), a parameter-free, inference-time framework that restores visual saliency and applies position-aware penalties to textual distractors. Across medical factuality, social fairness, and geospatial benchmarks, BAIR successfully restores multimodal grounding and improves diagnostic reliability without requiring model retraining or fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了一个被忽视的隐患：在MLLM中引入RAG即使使用完全正确的上下文，也可能导致模型放弃原本正确的预测（称为"recorruption"）。作者通过注意力机制分析发现这是由视觉失明和位置偏见共同导致的，并提出了一种无需训练的推理时干预方法BAIR来恢复多模态基础能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究认为RAG可以有效缓解MLLM的幻觉问题，但作者发现即使引入完美准确的上下文（oracle context）也可能导致模型出错，这种"recorruption"现象被忽视，且其背后的机制尚不明确。
AI.method: (1) 通过内部注意力矩阵的机制分析，识别出"recorruption"由两方面注意力崩溃驱动：视觉注意力质量和锐度被系统性抑制（视觉失明），以及模型存在结构性的位置偏见（优先关注边界token而非语义相关区域）。(2) 提出BAIR框架，这是一种参数无关、推理时干预方法，通过恢复视觉显著性并对文本干扰施加位置感知惩罚来修复多模态基础能力。
AI.result: 在医学事实性、社会公平性和地理空间基准测试上，BAIR成功恢复多模态基础能力，提升了诊断可靠性，且无需模型重训练或微调。
AI.conclusion: RAG对MLLM的帮助存在"成功的幻觉"——许多看似正确的RAG输出只是位置巧合（模型文本复制偏差恰好与正确答案位置一致），而非真正的多模态理解。BAIR作为一种轻量级方法可以有效缓解这一问题。

title: Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Financial Document Question Answering
comment: 22 pages, 11 figures, 13 tables, submitted to Expert Systems with Applications
summary: Financial document question answering (QA) demands complex multi-step numerical reasoning over heterogeneous evidence--structured tables, textual narratives, and footnotes--scattered across corporate filings. Existing retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) approaches adopt a single-pass retrieve-then-generate paradigm that struggles with the compositional reasoning chains prevalent in financial analysis. We propose FinAgent-RAG, an agentic RAG framework that orchestrates iterative retrieval-reasoning loops with self-verification, specifically engineered for the precision requirements of financial numerical reasoning. The framework integrates three domain-specific innovations: (1) a Contrastive Financial Retriever trained with hard negative mining to distinguish semantically similar but numerically distinct financial passages, (2) a Program-of-Thought reasoning module that generates executable Python code for precise arithmetic rather than relying on error-prone LLM-based mental computation, and (3) an Adaptive Strategy Router that dynamically allocates computational resources based on question complexity, reducing API costs by 41.3% on FinQA while preserving accuracy. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets--FinQA, ConvFinQA, and TAT-QA--demonstrate that FinAgent-RAG achieves 76.81%, 78.46%, and 74.96% execution accuracy respectively, outperforming the strongest baseline by 5.62--9.32 percentage points. Ablation studies, cross-backbone evaluation with four LLMs, and deployment cost analysis confirm the framework's robustness and practical viability for financial institutions.

AI.tldr: FinAgent-RAG是一个面向金融文档问答的代理式RAG框架，通过迭代检索-推理循环与自我验证，在FinQA、ConvFinQA、TAT-QA三个基准上分别达到76.81%、78.46%、74.96%的执行准确率，超越最强基线5.62-9.32个百分点，并降低41.3%的API成本。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG方法采用单轮检索-生成范式，难以应对金融分析中需要跨结构化表格、文本和脚注进行组合式数值推理的复杂需求，且大模型直接计算容易出错。
AI.method: 提出三项核心创新：1）对比学习+难负例挖掘的金融检索器提升数值区分能力；2）Program-of-Thought模块生成可执行Python代码进行精确算术；3）自适应策略路由根据问题复杂度动态分配计算资源以降低成本。
AI.result: 在FinQA（76.81%）、ConvFinQA（78.46%）、TAT-QA（74.96%）上均取得最优执行准确率，超越最强基线5.62-9.32个百分点，API成本降低41.3%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过agentic迭代检索-推理机制有效解决了金融数值推理的精度问题，在跨模型评估和部署成本分析中展现出鲁棒性和实际部署可行性。

title: Data-Driven Variational Basis Learning Beyond Neural Networks: A Non-Neural Framework for Adaptive Basis Discovery
summary: Classical representation systems such as Fourier series, wavelets, and fixed dictionaries provide analytically tractable basis expansions, but they are not intrinsically adapted to the empirical structure of modern high-dimensional data. Neural networks overcome this limitation by learning features from data, yet they do so through layered nonlinear parameterizations that often sacrifice interpretability, explicit control over basis structure, and mathematical transparency. In this manuscript we develop a non-neural alternative that learns basis functions directly from data through variational optimization. The proposed framework, termed Data Driven Variational Basis Learning (DVBL), treats basis atoms as primary optimization variables and learns them jointly with sample-specific coefficients and, when appropriate, a latent linear evolution operator. This yields a data-adaptive basis expansion that remains explicit, interpretable, and amenable to rigorous analysis. We formulate the model, establish existence of minimizers, prove blockwise descent properties for an alternating minimization algorithm, give conditions for coefficient recovery and basis identifiability, and show how manifold and dynamical regularization can be integrated without invoking neural architectures. We also discuss the conceptual novelty of the framework relative to classical dictionary learning, spectral methods, Koopman operator methods, and deep representation learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非神经网络的变分优化方法(DVBL)，直接从数据中学习可解释、显式的自适应基函数，并建立理论保证和算法性质。
AI.motivation: 传统表示系统（傅里叶、小波等）具有解析可处理性但无法适应现代高维数据的经验结构；神经网络虽能学习特征但牺牲了可解释性和数学透明性。因此需要一种既数据自适应、又保持显式和可解释性的基学习方法。
AI.method: 提出数据驱动变分基学习(DVBL)框架，将基原子作为主优化变量，联合学习基函数、样本特定系数以及潜在线性演化算子（如有需要），通过交替最小化算法求解，并可集成流形和动力学正则化。
AI.result: 建立了极小值存在性、交替最小化算法的块坐标下降性质、系数恢复与基可辨识性的条件等理论结果。
AI.conclusion: DVBL提供了介于传统解析基与神经表示之间的新范式，兼具数据适应性、可解释性和数学严谨性，与字典学习、谱方法、Koopman方法及深度表示学习形成概念性区分。

title: LLMSpace: Carbon Footprint Modeling for Large Language Model Inference on LEO Satellites
summary: Large language models (LLMs) impose rapidly growing energy demands, creating an emerging energy and carbon crisis driven by large-scale inference. Solar-powered, AI-enabled low Earth orbit (LEO) satellites have been proposed to mitigate terrestrial electricity consumption, but their lifecycle carbon footprint remains poorly understood due to launch emissions, satellite manufacturing, and radiation-hardened hardware requirements. This paper presents \textit{LLMSpace}, the first carbon modeling framework for LLM inference on AI-enabled LEO satellites. LLMSpace jointly models operational and embodied carbon, peripheral subsystems, radiation-hardened accelerators and memories, and LLM-specific workload characteristics such as prefill-decode behavior and token generation. Using realistic satellite and GPU configurations, LLMSpace reveals key trade-offs among carbon footprint, inference latency, hardware design, and operational lifetime for sustainable space-based LLM inference. Source code: https://github.com/UnchartedRLab/LLMSpace.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLMSpace，首个针对AI卫星上LLM推理的碳建模框架，揭示太空推理在碳足迹、延迟、硬件设计与寿命间的权衡。
AI.motivation: LLM推理导致地面能源消耗快速增长，太阳能低轨卫星虽被提出作为替代方案，但其全生命周期（含发射、制造、加固硬件）的碳足迹尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: LLMSpace同时建模运营碳与隐含碳，涵盖外围子系统、辐射加固加速器与存储器，以及LLM特有的prefill-decode行为和token生成特征，采用真实卫星与GPU配置进行权衡分析。
AI.result: 揭示了碳足迹、推理延迟、硬件设计与运行寿命之间的关键权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 为可持续的太空LLM推理提供了首个系统性碳建模工具和设计指导。

title: Universal Adaptive Proximal Gradient Methods via Gradient Mapping Accumulation
summary: We propose an adaptive proximal gradient method for minimizing the sum of two functions, where one is a simple convex function, and the other belongs to one of the three classes: nonconvex smooth, convex nonsmooth, or convex smooth. The key feature of the method is an adaptive step size that accumulates historical gradient mapping norms in the denominator. Without any modification or knowledge of problem parameters, the method converges across all three problem classes under mild bounded-iterates and bounded-variance assumptions, with rates matching those of the proximal gradient method up to logarithmic factors, in both deterministic and stochastic settings. For the convex setting, we further propose an accelerated variant. It retains a similar near-optimal convergence rate for the nonsmooth case and achieves an improved rate of order $\widetilde{O}\big(1/t^2 + σ/\sqrt{t}\big)$ for the smooth case, which is optimal up to logarithmic factors. Notably, we develop new techniques for controlling the effect of stochastic noise, which are applicable across all three problem classes in the stochastic setting and enable simplified analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应近端梯度方法，通过累积历史梯度映射范数到分母中实现自适应步长，无需修改或预知问题参数，即可在非凸光滑、凸非光滑和凸光滑三类问题上收敛，收敛速率在确定性/随机设置下均与近端梯度法匹配（至多对数因子）。在凸情形中，还提出了加速变体，对光滑情形达到近最优的$\widetilde{O}\big(1/t^2 + σ/\sqrt{t}\big)$速率。此外，发展了控制随机噪声的新技术。
AI.motivation: 现有近端梯度方法通常需要针对不同问题类别手动调整步长或知晓问题参数（如Lipschitz常数），缺乏统一的、自适应的优化框架。作者希望设计一种无需问题参数的、跨问题类别的自适应方法，并同时处理确定性和随机优化场景。
AI.method: 提出自适应近端梯度方法，核心创新在于步长自适应机制：分母累积历史梯度映射范数，从而动态调节步长。对于凸情形，进一步引入加速变体（类似Nesterov加速）。在随机设置中，通过新颖的噪声控制技术统一处理三类问题。
AI.result: 1）在确定性和随机设置下，方法在非凸光滑、凸非光滑、凸光滑三类问题上均收敛，速率与近端梯度法匹配（至多对数因子差距）。2）加速变体在凸光滑情形达到$\widetilde{O}(1/t^2 + σ/\sqrt{t})$速率，对凸非光滑情形保留近最优速率。3）噪声控制技术可统一适用于三类问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自适应近端梯度方法是一个统一、高效且实用的优化框架，不需要问题参数先验知识，在广泛的问题类别上都能达到理论上的近最优收敛速率。所发展的噪声控制技巧为随机优化分析提供了简化路径。

title: Spherical Flows for Sampling Categorical Data
summary: We study the problem of learning generative models for discrete sequences in a continuous embedding space. Whereas prior approaches typically operate in Euclidean space or on the probability simplex, we instead work on the sphere $\mathbb S^{d-1}$. There the von Mises-Fisher (vMF) distribution induces a natural noise process and admits a closed-form conditional score. The conditional velocity is in general intractable. Exploiting the radial symmetry of the vMF density we reduce the continuity equation on $\mathbb S^{d-1}$ to a scalar ODE in the cosine similarity, whose unique bounded solution determines the velocity. The marginal velocity and marginal score on $(\mathbb S^{d-1})^L$ both decompose into posterior-weighted tangent sums that differ only by per-token scalar weights. This gives access to both ODE and predictor-corrector (PC) sampling. The posterior is the only learned object, trained by a cross-entropy loss. Experiments compare the vMF path against geodesic and Euclidean alternatives. The combination of vMF and PC sampling significantly improves results on Sudoku and language modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在球面流形S^{d-1}上学习离散序列的生成模型，利用von Mises-Fisher (vMF)分布的径向对称性将连续性方程简化为标量ODE，通过后验加权的切线和方法实现ODE和预测-校正采样，在数独和语言建模任务上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有离散序列生成模型多基于欧氏空间或概率单纯形，缺乏适合的流形结构与噪声过程，难以有效捕捉离散数据的几何特性。
AI.method: 1) 在球面S^{d-1}上利用vMF分布诱导噪声过程；2) 利用vMF的径向对称性将连续性方程简化为关于余弦相似度的标量ODE；3) 推导出边际速度和边际分数在后验加权切线空间中的分解形式；4) 仅需通过交叉熵损失训练后验分布；5) 支持ODE和预测-校正(PC)两种采样方法。
AI.result: vMF路径在数独和语言建模任务上显著优于测地线路径和欧氏空间方法，且vMF与PC采样的组合效果最佳。
AI.conclusion: 球面流形结合vMF分布为离散序列生成提供了更自然的几何框架，后验加权的分解形式使得训练和采样高效可行。

title: Absolute Stability of Nonlinear Negative Imaginary Systems with Application to Potential Energy Shaping
summary: This paper establishes absolute stability conditions for nonlinear negative imaginary (NI) systems interconnected with static nonlinear feedback. We first show that the NI property is preserved when the feedback nonlinearity can be expressed as the gradient of a continuously differentiable function, and the composite storage of the resulting system remains positive definite. This condition provides a direct connection between nonlinear static feedback and storage-function shaping along the measured output channels. Building on this result, conditions are derived for absolute stability of the closed-loop system under mild assumptions. The linear specialization of the results strictly generalizes prior absolute stability results for linear NI systems, allowing coupled nonlinearities not covered by existing slope-restricted or sector-bounded frameworks. Finally, the proposed theory is illustrated through a linear example highlighting this generalization and a nonlinear example that shows the utility of the proposed results in potential energy shaping.

AI.tldr: 本文针对非线性负虚（NI）系统与静态非线性反馈互联的绝对稳定性问题，提出了稳定性条件。核心发现是当反馈非线性可表示为连续可微函数的梯度时，NI性质得以保持且复合存储函数正定，由此建立绝对稳定性判据，并通过线性和非线性算例验证了方法的通用性和有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有线性NI系统的绝对稳定性结果无法处理斜率受限或扇区有界框架不覆盖的耦合非线性，需要建立更通用的非线性NI系统绝对稳定性理论。
AI.method: 首先证明当反馈非线性为连续可微函数的梯度时NI性质保持且复合存储正定；基于此推导闭环系统绝对稳定性条件。
AI.result: 线性特例严格推广了现有线性NI系统的绝对稳定性结果；通过线性算例展示了推广性，非线性算例展示了在势能整形中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 建立了非线性NI系统与静态非线性反馈互联的更普适绝对稳定性框架，为势能整形等应用提供了理论工具。

title: When2Speak: A Dataset for Temporal Participation and Turn-Taking in Multi-Party Conversations for Large Language Models
comment: Currently under review. Dataset can be found: https://huggingface.co/datasets/duke-trust-lab/When2Speak
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at generating contextually appropriate responses but remain poorly calibrated for multi-party conversations, where deciding when to speak is as critical as what to say. In such settings, naively responding at every turn leads to excessive interruptions and degraded conversational coherence. We introduce When2Speak, a grounded synthetic dataset and four-stage generation pipeline for learning intervention timing in group interactions. The dataset comprises over 215,000 examples derived from 16,000 conversations involving 2-6 speakers, spanning diverse conversational styles, tones, and participant dynamics, and explicitly modeling SPEAK vs. SILENT decisions at each turn. Our pipeline combines real-world grounding, structured augmentation, controlled transcript synthesis, and fine-tuning-ready supervision, and is fully open-sourced to support reproducibility and adaptation to domain-specific conversational norms. Across multiple model families, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on When2Speak significantly outperforms zero-shot baselines (e.g., the average Macro F1 increase across 4B+ parameter models was 60%, with the largest increase being 120%). However, SFT-trained models remain systematically over-conservative, missing nearly half of warranted interventions as seen through the Missed Intervention Rate (MIR), which was on average 0.50 and is noticed even at larger model sizes. To address this limitation, we apply reinforcement learning with asymmetric reward shaping, which reduces MIR to 0.186-0.218 and increases recall from 0.479 to 0.78-0.81. Our findings establish that temporal participation is a distinct and trainable dimension of conversational intelligence, and that grounded synthetic data provides an effective and scalable pathway for enabling LLMs to participate more naturally and appropriately in multi-party interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出When2Speak——一个用于训练LLM在多人群聊中判断何时该说话/保持沉默的合成数据集和四阶段生成流水线，通过监督微调和强化学习显著改善了对话干预时机把控。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在多人群聊中缺乏"何时该说话"的判断能力，不加选择地回应会导致过度打断和对话连贯性下降。作者希望将"说话时机"作为可训练维度纳入对话智能。
AI.method: 构建了包含215,000+样本的When2Speak数据集（来自16,000段2-6人对话），采用四阶段生成流水线：真实世界接地、结构化增强、受控转录合成、微调就绪监督。先进行SFT，再使用非对称奖励塑形的强化学习优化。
AI.result: SFT后4B+模型平均Macro F1提升60%（最大提升120%），但模型过于保守，错过约50%的合理干预（MIR≈0.50）。RL非对称奖励塑形将MIR降至0.186-0.218，召回率从0.479提升至0.78-0.81。
AI.conclusion: 时序参与是对话智能中可独立训练的重要维度，基于接地合成数据的方法是让LLM在多人群聊中更自然参与的有效可扩展途径。

title: LaTA: A Drop-in, FERPA-Compliant Local-LLM Autograder for Upper-Division STEM Coursework
summary: Large-language-model (LLM) graders promise to relieve the grading burden of upper-division STEM courses, but most deployments to date send student work to third-party APIs, violating FERPA and exposing institutions to data risk while requiring substantial assignment modification. We present $\textbf{LaTA}\ (\textit{LaTeX Teaching Assistant})$, a drop-in, open-source autograder that runs entirely on commodity on-premises hardware and assumes a LaTeX-native workflow already adopted by many engineering and physics courses. LaTA implements a four-stage pipeline (ingest, segment, grade, report) using a locally hosted open-weight chain-of-thought LLM grader (gpt-oss:120b) that compares student work to an instructor-authored reference solution and applies a YAML rubric with binary per-item scoring. We deployed LaTA in Winter~2026 in ME 373 (Mechanical Engineering Methods) at Oregon State University, grading every weekly assignment for approximately 200 students on a single Mac Studio at \$0 marginal cost per assignment and 1--3 minutes of wall-clock time per submission, enabling regrading of corrected assignments and greatly expanded TA office hour offerings. The instructor-confirmed grading-error rate held at roughly $0.02$--$0.04\%$ per rubric line item across the term. Relative to the same instructor's previous traditionally-graded cohort, the LaTA-graded cohort outperformed by approximately $11\%$ on the midterm exam and $8\%$ on the final exam, and reported large gains in self-assessed confidence on every stated learning objective ($N = 159$ survey responses, $Δ\geq +1.49$ Likert points, $p < 10^{-27}$ on every comparison). We release the code under AGPLv3.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 LaTA（LaTeX Teaching Assistant），一个完全在本地硬件上运行的开源自动评分系统。该系统针对已采用 LaTeX 工作流的工程与物理课程设计，通过四阶段流水线（摄取、分割、评分、报告）结合本地部署的开源链式思考大语言模型进行评分。在俄勒冈州立大学 ME 373 课程中部署一学期，服务约 200 名学生，边际成本为零，评分错误率仅 0.02–0.04%，且使用 LaTA 的班级在期中和期末考试成绩上分别比传统评分班级高出约 11% 和 8%。
AI.motivation: 现有使用大语言模型进行评分的方法多依赖第三方 API，这违反了 FERPA 法规并带来数据安全风险，同时需要大量修改作业格式。作者希望开发一个无需向外部发送数据、能无缝融入已有 LaTeX 工作流的本地自动评分系统，以减轻高年级 STEM 课程的评分负担。
AI.method: LaTA 采用四阶段流水线：(1) 摄取（ingest）— 接收学生 LaTeX 提交；(2) 分割（segment）— 将作业分解为可评分的子项；(3) 评分（grade）— 使用本地部署的开源链式思考大语言模型（gpt-oss:120b）将学生答案与教师参考答案对比，并依据 YAML 格式的二元逐项评分标准进行评分；(4) 报告（report）— 生成评分结果。系统运行在一台 Mac Studio 上，无 API 调用成本。
AI.result: 在俄勒冈州立大学 ME 373 课程中，LaTA 为约 200 名学生的每周作业评分，每份作业耗时 1–3 分钟，边际成本为零。教师确认的评分错误率约为每条评分项 0.02–0.04%。与传统评分班级相比，LaTA 班级的期中考试成绩高出约 11%，期末考试成绩高出约 8%。159 份调查问卷显示，学生在所有学习目标上的自评信心均大幅提升（Likert 分值提升 ≥ +1.49，p < 10⁻²⁷）。
AI.conclusion: LaTA 证明了在完全本地化的硬件上，利用开源大语言模型对高阶 STEM 课程进行高效、低错误率、零边际成本的自动评分是可行的。该系统不仅减轻了教师评分负担，还使重新评分和扩充助教办公时间成为可能，且使用该系统的学生表现出更优的学习成果和更高的自信心。代码以 AGPLv3 许可证开源发布。

title: Adaptive Computation Depth via Learned Token Routing in Transformers
summary: Standard transformer architectures apply the same number of layers to every token regardless of contextual difficulty. We present Token-Selective Attention (TSA), a learned per-token gate on residual updates between consecutive transformer blocks. Each gate is a lightweight two-layer multi-layer perceptron (MLP) that produces a continuous halting probability, making the mechanism end-to-end differentiable with 1.7% parameter overhead and no changes to the base architecture. Notably, TSA learns difficulty-proportional routing without any explicit depth pressure: even at $λ=0$ (no depth regularisation), the task-loss gradient alone drives the router to skip 20% of token-layer operations. On character-level language modeling, TSA saved 14-23% of token-layer operations (TLOps) across Tiny-Shakespeare and enwik8 at <0.5% quality loss. At matched efficiency, TSA achieved 0.7% lower validation loss than early exit, and the learned routing transfers directly to inference-time sparse execution for real wall-clock speedup.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Token-Selective Attention (TSA)，一种轻量级的可学习逐token门控机制，通过在每个token的残差更新上施加门控，使模型能够根据上下文难度动态跳过中间层的计算，以1.7%的参数开销实现端到端可微的稀疏执行，在字符级语言建模任务上节省14-23%的计算量且质量损失小于0.5%。
AI.motivation: 标准Transformer对所有token应用相同数量的层，忽略了不同token在上下文中的难度差异，导致计算效率低下。
AI.method: 在每个Transformer块之间的残差更新上引入一个轻量级两层MLP作为门控，生成连续的停止概率，实现端到端可微。门控网络仅增加1.7%参数，无需修改基础架构。即使λ=0（无深度正则化），任务损失梯度也能驱使路由器跳过20%的token-层操作。
AI.result: 在字符级语言建模任务上，TSA在Tiny-Shakespeare和enwik8数据集上节省14-23%的token-层操作，质量损失小于0.5%。在同等效率下，比early exit方法降低0.7%的验证损失。
AI.conclusion: TSA学会了与难度成比例的路由策略，学习到的路由可直接迁移到推理时的稀疏执行，实现实际的加速效果。

title: Evaluation Awareness in Language Models Has Limited Effect on Behaviour
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) sometimes note in their chain of thought (CoT) that they may be under evaluation. Researchers worry that this verbalised evaluation awareness (VEA) causes models to adapt their outputs strategically, optimising for perceived evaluation criteria, which, for instance, can make models appear safer than they actually are. However, whether VEA actually has this effect is largely unknown. We tested this across open-weight LRMs and benchmarks covering safety, alignment, moral reasoning, and political opinion. We tested this both on-policy, sampling multiple CoTs per item and comparing those that spontaneously contained VEA against those that did not, and off-policy, using model prefilling to inject evaluation-aware sentences where missing and remove them where present, with subsequent resampling. VEA has limited effect on model behaviour: injecting VEA into CoTs produces near-zero effects ($ω\leq 0.06$), removing it causes small shifts ($ω\leq 0.12$) and spontaneously occurring VEA shifts answer distributions by at most 3.7 percentage points ($ω\leq 0.31$). Our findings call for caution when interpreting high VEA rates as evidence of strategic behaviour or alignment tampering. Evaluation awareness may pose a smaller safety risk than the current literature assumes.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了大型推理模型（LRMs）在思维链中出现的"评估意识"（VEA）现象，发现VEA对模型行为的影响极其有限，无论是注入还是移除VEA都只产生微小效果，自发出现的VEA对答案分布的影响也不大。这表明评估意识可能并不如当前文献所担忧的那样构成重大安全风险。
AI.motivation: 研究者担忧LRMs在思维链中展现的评估意识（VEA）可能导致模型策略性地调整输出，为迎合评估标准而表现得比实际更安全，从而掩盖对齐失败的风险。然而这一担忧缺乏实证支持，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 在多个开源LRM上，针对安全、对齐、道德推理和政治观点等基准进行测试。采用两种策略：（1）on-policy：对每个问题采样多条思维链，比较自发出现VEA与未出现VEA的情况；（2）off-policy：通过预填充方法，在缺失处注入评估意识语句，在存在处移除它们，然后重新采样。
AI.result: 注入VEA几乎无影响（ω≤0.06），移除VEA产生微小影响（ω≤0.12），自发出现的VEA使答案分布最多偏移3.7个百分点（ω≤0.31）。总体效应非常有限。
AI.conclusion: 高VEA发生率不应被轻易解读为模型存在策略性行为或对齐篡改的证据。评估意识带来的安全风险可能远低于当前文献的假设，需要对该领域的担忧保持审慎态度。

title: Verifiable Model-Free Safety Filters via Reinforcement Learning
summary: This paper presents a reinforcement learning approach of a model-free safety filter, drawing inspiration from the framework of model-based Predictive Safety Filters (PSFs). Similar to conventional PSFs, our method adopts a Quadratic Programming (QP) formulation by representing the filter as an unrolled QP solver network. However, unlike existing PSFs that derive QP parameters explicitly from system models, we learn these parameters directly through Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL), thereby eliminating the dependency on accurate system identification. Furthermore, compared to traditional neural network-based methods, this QP structure allows us to furnish a formal certificate for the persistent safety of the learned filter. Numerical results demonstrate that our method outperforms both conventional model-based PSFs and RL-trained Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) baselines in terms of safety guarantees, minimal intervention, and per-step computational load.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于强化学习的无模型安全过滤器，通过将过滤器表示为展开的QP求解器网络，并用深度强化学习直接学习QP参数，在消除对精确系统模型依赖的同时，提供了形式化的持续安全保证。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于模型的安全预测过滤器（PSF）依赖精确的系统模型，而模型不准确会导致安全性下降。现有神经网络方法虽不依赖模型，但缺乏形式化的安全保证。作者希望结合两者的优势。
AI.method: 将安全过滤器设计为展开的二次规划（QP）求解器网络，不依赖系统模型推导QP参数，而是通过深度强化学习（DRL）直接学习这些参数，从而避免了对精确系统辨识的需求。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在安全性保证、最小干预度以及每步计算开销方面，均优于传统的基于模型的PSF和基于强化学习的MLP基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了无模型且具备形式化安全保证的安全过滤器，为将结构化的优化框架与强化学习结合提供了有效范式。

title: Spectral Lens: Activation and Gradient Spectra as Diagnostics of LLM Optimization
summary: Training loss and throughput can hide distinct internal representation in language-model training. To examine these hidden mechanics, we use spectral measurements as practical and operational diagnostics. Using a controlled family of decoder-only models adapted from the modded NanoGPT codebase, we introduce an empirical protocol based on activation covariance and per-sample gradient SVD spectra. This dual-view reveals three empirical findings and one mechanistic explanation. First, batch size acts as a latent determinant of representation geometry: runs that reach equal loss settle into systematically distinct activation spectra. Second, the activation covariance tail measured early in training reliably forecasts downstream token efficiency. Third, movement of the activation spectrum head (leading modes), together with gradient spectra, characterizes underlying learning-dynamics changes, separating learning-side architectural improvements from primarily execution-side gains. These predictive and diagnostic signals persist across the 12-, 36-, and 48-layer model tiers. Finally, a mechanistic model proves the main observations and explains how activation covariance spectra correlate with task-aligned feature learning.

AI.tldr: 本文通过激活协方差和梯度SVD谱的双重视角，揭示了大语言模型训练中隐藏的内部表征机制。研究发现：批次大小是表征几何的潜在决定因素；早期激活协方差谱尾可预测下游token效率；激活谱头与梯度谱的移动可区分学习架构改进与执行效率提升；最后用机制模型解释了核心观察。
AI.motivation: 训练损失和吞吐量无法揭示语言模型训练中隐藏的内部表征差异，作者希望通过谱分析方法来"揭开黑箱"，理解模型训练过程中内部表征的实际变化规律。
