AI.method: 基于modded NanoGPT代码库构建受控的仅解码器模型家族，采用激活协方差谱和每样本梯度SVD谱的双重视角，在12/36/48层三个规模上进行系统性实验分析。
AI.result: 三个实证发现：批次大小决定表征几何（相同损失下谱不同）；早期激活协方差谱尾可预测token效率；激活谱头与梯度谱的移动可区分架构改进与执行增益。
AI.conclusion: 激活协方差谱与任务对齐的特征学习存在相关性，提供了超越损失和吞吐量的更有信息量的训练诊断工具。

title: Synthesis of Limit Cycles and Reference Tracking via Switching Affine Systems
summary: This paper introduces a novel method to approximate limit cycles of nonlinear ODEs by use of switching affine dynamics in order to ease data-based modeling and analysis. Previous approaches to approximating limit cycles by switching systems have been largely confined to simple partitions into two-regions or low-dimensional (often planar) settings. In contrast, this study utilizes more general partitions in higher-dimensional state spaces, augmented by external signals, to develop a synthesis scheme that guarantees a globally stable limit cycle. The synthesis task is formulated and solved based on constrained numerical optimization. Starting from sampled data of the nonlinear dynamics, the method minimizes the error between the data and the limit cycle generated by the switching affine model, while employing stability constraints to ensure global stability. Based on the obtained model, the paper tackles the problem of reference tracking for switching affine systems with periodic behavior. While the approximation scheme is based on a common Lyapunov function, the reference tracking approach uses multiple Lyapunov functions to achieve less conservative convergence results. The principle and effectiveness of the proposed methods are illustrated through a set of examples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过切换仿射动力学逼近非线性ODE极限环的新方法，利用高维空间划分和外部信号，基于约束优化与稳定性约束，从采样数据构建全局稳定的切换仿射模型，并分别采用公共/多Lyapunov函数实现逼近与参考跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有切换系统逼近极限环的方法多局限于简单二分区或低维（如平面）场景，缺乏在高维状态空间中利用更一般划分来逼近并保证全局稳定性的通用方案。
AI.method: 采用更一般的状态空间划分并引入外部信号，将切换仿射模型的综合问题表述为约束数值优化问题；逼近阶段使用公共Lyapunov函数施加全局稳定性约束，参考跟踪阶段改用多Lyapunov函数以降低保守性。
AI.result: 通过多组示例验证了所提方法在逼近非线性极限环和实现参考跟踪上的有效性与原理可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功将切换仿射逼近从简单低维场景推广至高维一般划分，并利用优化与Lyapunov理论保证了全局稳定性和较宽松的收敛条件。

title: One Turn Too Late: Response-Aware Defense Against Hidden Malicious Intent in Multi-Turn Dialogue
summary: Hidden malicious intent in multi-turn dialogue poses a growing threat to deployed large language models (LLMs). Rather than exposing a harmful objective in a single prompt, increasingly capable attackers can distribute their intent across multiple benign-looking turns. Recent studies show that even modern commercial models with advanced guardrails remain vulnerable to such attacks despite advances in safety alignment and external guardrails. In this work, we address this challenge by detecting the earliest turn at which delivering the candidate response would make the accumulated interaction sufficient to enable harmful action. This objective requires precise turn-level intervention that identifies the harm-enabling closure point while avoiding premature refusal of benign exploratory conversations. To further support training and evaluation, we construct the Multi-Turn Intent Dataset (MTID), which contains branching attack rollouts, matched benign hard negatives, and annotations of the earliest harm-enabling turns. We show that MTID helps enable a turn-level monitor TurnGate, which substantially outperforms existing baselines in harmful-intent detection while maintaining low over-refusal rates. TurnGate further generalizes across domains, attacker pipelines, and target models. Our code is available at https://github.com/Graph-COM/TurnGate.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多轮对话中的隐藏恶意意图检测问题，提出了TurnGate方法，通过识别最早可导致危害的转折点实现精准的逐轮干预，并构建了多轮意图数据集MTID，在保持低过度拒绝率的同时显著优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在单轮对话中已有安全防护，但攻击者可利用多轮对话将恶意意图分散在多个看似无害的轮次中，逐步累积直至达成有害目标。现有方法（包括商业模型的高级护栏）仍难以有效检测这种渐进式攻击，亟需能在早期识别危害使能点的精确干预机制。
AI.method: 1. 定义检测目标：找出"最早使能危害的转折点"——即在该轮交付候选响应后，累积交互足以实施有害行为的关键时刻。2. 构建多轮意图数据集MTID，包含分支攻击展开、匹配的良性硬负样本以及最早危害使能轮的标注。3. 基于MTID训练逐轮监测器TurnGate，实现精确的逐轮有害意图检测。
AI.result: TurnGate在有害意图检测上显著优于现有基线，同时保持较低的过度拒绝率；并在不同领域、攻击流程和目标模型上均具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过精确识别最早危害使能点，TurnGate有效解决了多轮对话中的隐藏恶意意图检测问题，为LLM安全对齐提供了新的逐轮干预方案。MTID数据集和TurnGate模型的代码已开源。

title: From History to State: Constant-Context Skill Learning for LLM Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly used to operate browsers, files, code and tools, making personal assistants a natural deployment target. Yet personal agents face a privacy-cost-capability tension: cloud models execute multi-step workflows well but expose sensitive intermediate context to external APIs, while local models preserve privacy but remain less reliable. Both settings also pay repeatedly for long skill prompts and growing histories. We propose constant-context skill learning, a context-to-weights framework for recurring agent workflows: reusable procedures are learned in lightweight task-family modules, while inference conditions only on the current observation and a compact state block. A deterministic tracker renders this state block from task progress and supplies aligned subgoal rewards, so each module can be trained with step-level SFT and refined through online RL. Across ALFWorld, WebShop, and SciWorld, our agents achieve strong performance across Qwen3-4B, Qwen3-8B and Llama-3.1-8B. With Qwen3-8B, SFT+RL reaches 89.6\% unseen success on ALFWorld, 76.8\% success on WebShop, and 66.4\% unseen success on SciWorld. They match or exceed strong published agent-training results while reducing prompt tokens per turn by 2--7$\times$ relative to controlled ReAct prompting baselines, showing that procedural context can be moved from prompts into weights.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种"常数上下文技能学习"框架，将可重复的智能体工作流从提示词中转移到模型权重中，通过轻量级任务族模块和确定性状态追踪器，在保证隐私的同时显著减少提示词长度，在ALFWorld、WebShop和SciWorld上取得了与强基线相当甚至更优的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM智能体在隐私-成本-能力之间存在矛盾：云端模型能力强但暴露敏感上下文，本地模型保护隐私但可靠性不足；同时两者都因长技能提示词和累积历史而反复付出高昂成本。因此需要一种既能保护隐私、又能实现高效推理的智能体工作流方法。
AI.method: 提出"常数上下文技能学习"（constant-context skill learning），将可重用的工作流程从提示词中迁移到模型权重中：1) 在轻量级任务族模块中学习可重用流程；2) 推理时仅依赖当前观测和紧凑的状态块；3) 使用确定性追踪器根据任务进度渲染状态块并提供子目标奖励；4) 每个模块通过步骤级SFT训练，再通过在线RL精炼。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-8B上，SFT+RL在ALFWorld上达到89.6%未见任务成功率，WebShop上76.8%成功率，SciWorld上66.4%未见任务成功率。相比受控的ReAct提示基线，每轮提示词减少2-7倍。
AI.conclusion: 程序性上下文可以从提示词迁移到模型权重中，从而在不牺牲性能的前提下大幅减少提示词长度、保护隐私并降低成本，为个人智能体部署提供了可行的新范式。

title: Structural Instability of Feature Composition
summary: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for disentangling feature superposition in transformer-based architectures, enabling precise control via activation steering. However, the theoretical foundations of compositional steering -- the simultaneous activation of distinct semantic latents -- remain under-explored. The prevailing Linear Representation Hypothesis often abstracts away non-linear interference effects that arise in overcomplete dictionaries. We present a geometric framework for analyzing the instability of feature unions. Modeling the activation space as a high-dimensional sparse cone manifold, we derive an asymptotic compositional-collapse threshold under a spherical dictionary model, characterized by the Gaussian mean width (statistical dimension) of the signal cone. We further show that, in the high-bias regime, ReLU rectification converts microscopic correlation-induced variance fluctuations into a systematic drift that accumulates under composition, yielding interference growth consistent with a ratchet effect. We validate the predicted scaling trends on structured semantic features extracted from CLEVR, where hierarchical correlations accelerate the transition relative to random baselines. Together, our results highlight geometric constraints on the scalability of union-based steering and motivate composition mechanisms that explicitly manage interference beyond naive linear superposition.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了稀疏自编码器（SAE）中组合特征激活的几何不稳定性，发现当同时激活多个语义潜在特征时，由于高维稀疏锥流形中的非线性干扰，会出现组合坍缩阈值和棘轮效应，限制了基于并集的组合操控的可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有SAE方法在特征解耦和激活操控方面表现优异，但组合操控（同时激活多个语义潜在特征）的理论基础尚不明确，线性表示假说忽略了过完备字典中的非线性干扰效应。
AI.method: 将激活空间建模为高维稀疏锥流形，利用球面字典模型推导组合坍缩的渐近阈值（基于高斯均宽/统计维度），分析高偏置下ReLU整流将微观方差波动转化为系统性漂移的棘轮机制，并在CLEVR数据集上验证。
AI.result: 验证了组合坍缩阈值的标度规律，发现层次化相关性加速了坍缩转变（相对于随机基线），干扰增长符合棘轮效应。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了基于并集的组合操控在几何上的可扩展性约束，表明需要设计能显式管理干扰的组合机制，而非简单的线性叠加。

title: Tuning Derivatives for Causal Fairness in Machine Learning
summary: Artificial-intelligence systems are becoming ubiquitous in society, yet their predictions typically inherit biases with respect to protected attributes such as race, gender, or age. Classical fairness notions, most notably Statistical Parity (SP), demand that predictions be independent of the protected attributes, but are overly restrictive when these attributes influence mediating variables that are considered business necessities. Recent causal formulations relax SP by distinguishing allowed from not-allowed causal paths and by complementing SP with Predictive Parity (PP), requiring the predictor to replicate the legitimate influence of business-necessities. Existing path-based definitions are mainly practical when applied to categorical attributes. This paper introduces a new framework for fairness in structural causal models that is tailored to continuous protected attributes. We formalize SP and PP through path-specific partial derivatives, establish conditions under which these criteria coincide with prior causal definitions, and characterize when a fair predictor, one that satisfies SP along not-allowed paths while achieving PP along allowed paths, exists. Building on this theory, we propose a fair tuning algorithm that either constructs such a predictor or, when not possible, allows for a trade-off between SP and PP. We present experiments on simulated and real data to evaluate our proposal, compare it with previously proposed methods, and show that it performs better when PP is considered.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向连续受保护属性的因果公平性框架，通过路径特异性偏导数形式化统计均等（SP）和预测均等（PP），并设计了一种公平调优算法，在允许路径与禁止路径之间实现公平性与预测性能的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有的因果公平定义主要适用于离散属性，缺乏针对连续受保护属性（如年龄、收入等）的系统性框架。同时，已有的路径公平性方法在处理连续变量时存在局限性，需要一种更通用的理论来形式化连续场景下的SP和PP。
AI.method: 1. 利用结构因果模型中的路径特异性偏导数（path-specific partial derivatives）形式化SP和PP；2. 建立新定义与传统因果公平定义之间的等价条件；3. 分析公平预测器存在的理论条件；4. 提出公平调优算法，在满足禁止路径SP和允许路径PP之间进行权衡。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据上的实验表明，所提方法比现有方法在考虑PP时表现更优，能够有效实现连续受保护属性下的因果公平。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了连续属性因果公平的理论空白，为实际应用中处理连续敏感属性（如年龄）的公平性问题提供了可行方案。

title: Distortion-minimized de-homogenization for optimization of cell-size distribution in TPMS structures
summary: This paper presents a homogenized topology optimization (TO) method for spatially optimizing cell-size distribution of triply-periodic minimal surface (TPMS) structures, with high accuracy in the optimized structural response after de-homogenization. To achieve this, we introduce a novel de-homogenization technique that directly minimizes the difference between the wavenumbers obtained from the target and actual size distributions. This minimization problem is efficiently solved as a typical Poisson's equation utilizing the discrete cosine transform. We first verify the proposed de-homogenization method through numerical examples, showcasing its capability in significantly reducing the known distortion of the de-homogenized TPMS structures from the conventional periodic modulation (PM) method. Then, we apply the proposed method to a stiffness maximization problem, to demonstrate its effectiveness in improving the structural response compared to the PM method. The proposed method successfully reduced the distortion of the de-homogenized structures compared to the PM method, leading to 0.8% difference in the strain energy compared to the homogenized model, as opposed to 63.6% difference in the PM method. The optimized structure from the proposed method shows a significant improvement in the strain energy by 50.1% compared to the uniform case in the FE analysis on the de-homogenized models, while the PM method results in a significant decrease of 45.8%. The experimental validation shows that the effective stiffness of the optimized structure from the proposed method is 54.2% higher than that of the uniform case, while the PM method results in a significant decrease by 77.3%. These results exhibit the proposed method effectively increases the accuracy of the de-homogenization, thereby maximizing the potential of the homogenized TO for the spatial cell-size optimization of TPMS structures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于三周期极小曲面(TPMS)结构胞元尺寸空间优化的均质化拓扑优化方法，通过引入基于离散余弦变换的新型去均质化技术，显著降低了传统周期性调制方法带来的结构畸变，使去均质化后的应变能误差从63.6%降至0.8%，优化结构有效刚度比均匀情况提高54.2%。
AI.motivation: 传统周期性调制(PM)方法在去均质化TPMS结构时会产生严重的畸变，导致优化后的结构响应与均质化模型之间存在巨大差异（应变能误差达63.6%），无法充分发挥均质化拓扑优化在TPMS胞元尺寸优化中的潜力。
AI.method: 提出一种新的去均质化技术，通过最小化目标波数与实际波数分布之间的差异来消除结构畸变，将该最小化问题转化为典型的泊松方程，利用离散余弦变换高效求解。该方法直接作用于波数域，而非传统PM方法的空间域周期性调制。
AI.result: 数值实验：去均质化后应变能误差仅0.8%（PM方法为63.6%）；有限元分析：优化结构应变能比均匀情况改善50.1%（PM方法反而下降45.8%）；实验验证：优化结构有效刚度比均匀情况高54.2%（PM方法下降77.3%）。
AI.conclusion: 提出的去均质化方法能有效提高TPMS结构胞元尺寸优化的精度，充分发挥均质化拓扑优化的潜力，显著优于传统周期性调制方法。

title: Fourier Feature Methods for Nonlinear Causal Discovery: FFML Scoring and FFCI Testing in Mixed Data
summary:
Gaussian process marginal likelihood scores and kernel conditional independence tests are theoretically appealing for nonlinear causal discovery but computationally prohibitive at scale. We present two complementary RFF-based methods forming a practical toolkit for score-based, constraint-based, and hybrid causal discovery.
  The Fourier Feature Marginal Likelihood (FFML) score approximates the exact GP marginal likelihood by replacing the n x n kernel Gram matrix with a finite-dimensional feature representation, reducing cost to O(nm^2 + m^3) while retaining the probabilistic interpretation and automatic complexity penalty of the exact score. FFML extends to mixed (continuous + discrete) parent sets via a product-kernel construction, with a Kronecker path for small discrete parent sets and a Hadamard-product path otherwise.
  The Fourier Feature Conditional Independence (FFCI) test is a fast nonparametric CI test for mixed data. Each variable is featurized individually: continuous variables via RFF or Orthogonal Random Features (ORF), discrete variables via a Cholesky-factored categorical feature map, with blocks concatenated. Conditioning uses ridge residualization in feature space; the test statistic is a Frobenius norm of the residualized cross-covariance, approximated as a weighted sum of chi-squared variables.
  Although FFML and FFCI share the same RFF/ORF machinery, they differ architecturally: FFML builds a joint kernel over a parent set for scoring, while FFCI featurizes variables individually for testing. We compare FFML to TRFF, a penalized Student-t regression alternative. Empirically, BOSS+FFML outperforms linear and kernel-ridge baselines on nonlinear data. When run through the same PC-Max implementation, FFCI and RCIT exhibit complementary precision-recall profiles: RCIT is more precise while FFCI achieves better recall and lower SHD, and runs in one third the time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于随机傅里叶特征（RFF）的方法——FFML（评分函数）和FFCI（条件独立性检验），用于大规模非线性因果发现。FFML通过有限维特征近似GP边际似然，复杂度降至O(nm²+m³)；FFCI通过特征化变量和岭残差化实现快速非参数CI检验。两者共享RFF/ORF机制但架构不同，在混合数据上均表现出色。
AI.motivation: 高斯过程边际似然评分和核条件独立性检验在理论上有吸引力，但计算成本过高，难以应用于大规模非线性因果发现。现有方法在可扩展性和混合数据（连续+离散）处理上存在不足。
AI.method: 1) FFML：用有限维特征表示替代n×n核Gram矩阵，通过乘积核构造处理混合数据，支持Kronecker路径（小离散集）和Hadamard积路径（其他情况）。2) FFCI：对连续变量使用RFF/ORF，离散变量使用Cholesky分解的分类特征映射，通过特征空间的岭残差化进行条件化，检验统计量为残差化互协方差的Frobenius范数（近似为卡方加权和）。
AI.result: BOSS+FFML在非线性数据上优于线性回归和核岭回归基线。在相同PC-Max实现下，FFCI与RCIT互补：RCIT精确率更高，而FFCI召回率更好、SHD更低，且运行时间仅为RCIT的三分之一。
AI.conclusion: FFML和FFCI构成了实用的因果发现工具包，涵盖基于评分、基于约束和混合方法，在保持理论性质的同时显著提升可扩展性，尤其适合混合数据场景。

title: Residual-Corrected Equivalent-Circuit Model with Universal Differential Equations for Robust Battery Voltage Prediction under Operating-Condition Shift
summary: Accurate terminal-voltage prediction underpins model-based battery management, yet low-order equivalent-circuit models (\ecm{}) lack expressiveness under transient conditions, whereas purely data-driven predictors sacrifice interpretability and may degrade under operating-condition shift. This paper introduces a residual-corrected hybrid formulation in which a first-order Thevenin \ecm{} (\ecmrc{}) provides the dominant voltage structure, and a compact neural network embedded as a universal differential equation (\ude{}) corrects only the latent polarization mismatch. The \ecmrc{} parameters identified by nonlinear least squares warm-start the hybrid model so that the learned component operates in a low-residual regime. Experiments on a public Panasonic 18650PF dataset compare the proposed \ecmude{} with standalone \ecmrc{} and Long Short-Term Memory (\lstm{}) baselines across four axes: matched-condition prediction on UDDS at \SI{25}{\celsius}, inference-time perturbation of the supplied state-of-charge (\SOC{}, denoted $z$) input, zero-shot temperature transfer (\SI{25}{\celsius} to \SI{-20}{\celsius}), and zero-shot drive-cycle transfer to US06, LA92, and HWFET. The proposed \ecmude{} achieves the lowest voltage error in every setting, reducing mean absolute error (\mae{}) by 48\% relative to the \lstm{} under matched conditions and showing an order-of-magnitude lower inter-seed variability (coefficient of variation: 0.44\% vs.\ 6.20\%). Substantial gains persist under challenging distribution shifts, indicating that the physical model anchors prediction where a purely learned model is most vulnerable. These results position residual-corrected \ecmude{} as a lightweight and interpretable enhancement of low-order circuit models for voltage prediction in battery management systems (\bms{}).

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种残差校正的混合模型（ECMUDE），将一阶Thevenin等效电路模型与嵌入为通用微分方程的紧凑神经网络相结合，仅校正极化失配残差，在多个工况和零样本迁移场景下均优于纯ECM和LSTM基线，MAE降低48%，且具有极低的种子间变异系数。
AI.motivation: 低阶等效电路模型在瞬态条件下表达能力不足，而纯数据驱动预测方法牺牲可解释性且可能在工况偏移下性能退化，因此需要一种兼具物理可解释性与数据驱动灵活性的混合方法。
AI.method: 采用残差校正混合框架：一阶Thevenin ECM提供主导电压结构，紧凑型神经网络作为通用微分方程仅校正潜在的极化失配残差；ECM参数通过非线性最小二乘法预识别，使学习组件工作于低残差区域。
AI.result: 在匹配条件下ECMUDE相较于LSTM的MAE降低48%，种子间变异系数仅0.44%（LSTM为6.20%）；在零样本温度迁移（25°C→-20°C）和工况迁移（US06/LA92/HWFET）中均保持最低电压误差。
AI.conclusion: 残差校正的ECMUDE作为一种轻量级、可解释的增强方案，能显著提升低阶电路模型在BMS中的电压预测性能，尤其在纯数据模型最脆弱的分布偏移场景下，物理模型提供了关键的锚定作用。

title: Negative Before Positive: Asymmetric Valence Processing in Large Language Models
summary: Mechanistic interpretability has revealed how concepts are encoded in large language models (LLMs), but emotional content remains poorly understood at the mechanistic level. We study whether LLMs process emotional valence through dedicated internal structure or through surface token matching. Using activation patching and steering on open-source LLMs, we find that negative and positive valence are processed at different network depths. Negative outcomes localize to early layers while positive outcomes peak at mid-to-late layers. Holding topic fixed while flipping valence produces sign-opposite responses, ruling out topic detection. Steering with the good-news direction at the identified layers shifts neutral prompts toward positive valence, showing these layers encode valence as a manipulable direction. Emotional valence in LLMs is localized, causal and steerable, making it a concrete target for interpretability-based oversight.

AI.tldr: 本文通过激活修补和引导实验，发现大语言模型（LLMs）中的情感效价（正面/负面）由不同深度的神经网络层次编码，且该编码具有局部性、因果性和可操纵性。
AI.motivation: 虽然机械可解释性已揭示概念如何在LLMs中编码，但情感内容的机制层面仍缺乏理解。作者想探究LLMs处理情感效价是依赖专门的内部结构，还是仅仅通过表层token匹配。
AI.method: 在开源LLMs上使用激活修补（activation patching）和引导（steering）技术，固定主题并翻转效价，分析网络各层对情感的处理模式。
AI.result: 负面效价定位在早期层，正面效价在中期到后期层达到峰值；翻转效价产生符号相反的响应，排除了主题检测的解释；在识别出的层上使用“好消息”方向引导，能将中性提示推向正面效价。
AI.conclusion: LLMs中的情感效价是局部化、因果性且可操纵的，使其成为可解释性监督的一个具体目标。

title: The Geopolitics of AI Safety: A Causal Analysis of Regional LLM Bias
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are integrated into global software systems, ensuring equitable safety guardrails is a critical requirement. Current fairness evaluations predominantly measure bias observationally, a methodology confounded by the inherent toxicity of topics naturally paired with specific demographics in testing datasets. This study introduces a Probabilistic Graphical Model (PGM) framework to audit LLM safety mechanisms causally. By applying Pearl's do-operator, we mathematically isolate the causal effect of injecting a cultural demographic into a prompt. We conduct a large-scale empirical analysis across seven instruction-tuned models spanning diverse origins: the United States (Llama-3.1-8B, Gemma-2-9B), Europe (Mistral-7B-v0.3), the UAE (Falcon3-7B), China (Qwen2.5-7B, DeepSeek-7B), and India (Airavata-7B). Utilizing two distinct datasets (ToxiGen and BOLD), the findings reveal a disparity between observational and interventional bias, demonstrating that standard fairness metrics can overestimate demographic bias by failing to account for context toxicity. Furthermore, the causal probabilities indicate distinct alignment trends: Western models exhibit higher causal refusal rates for specific demographic groups, whereas Eastern models demonstrate low overall intervention rates with targeted sensitivities toward regional demographics. We discuss the implications of these biases, highlighting how demographic-sensitive over-triggering restricts benign discourse in downstream applications.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出概率图模型(PGM)框架，运用Pearl的do-operator因果推断方法，发现标准公平性评估因混淆上下文毒性而高估人口统计偏见，并揭示西方模型对特定群体有更高因果拒绝率，而东方模型整体干预率低但对本地人口有针对性敏感。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM公平性评估主要依赖观察性偏见测量，但这种方法被测试数据集中与特定人口统计特征自然配对的固有话题毒性所混淆，无法区分真正的歧视性偏见与语境毒性的影响。
AI.method: 提出概率图模型(PGM)框架，应用Pearl的do-operator在数学上隔离向提示中注入文化人口统计特征的因果效应。使用ToxiGen和BOLD两个数据集，对来自美国、欧洲、阿联酋、中国、印度等7个指令微调模型进行大规模实证分析。
AI.result: 观察性偏见与干预性偏见存在差异，标准公平性指标因未考虑上下文毒性而高估人口统计偏见。西方模型对特定人口群体有更高因果拒绝率，东方模型整体干预率低但对本地人口有针对性敏感。
AI.conclusion: 人口统计敏感性的过度触发会限制下游应用中的良性话语，LLM安全机制需要更精细的因果审计方法，而非仅依赖观察性偏见指标。

title: Channel-Level Semantic Perturbations: Unlearnable Examples for Diverse Training Paradigms
summary: The unauthorized use of personal data in model training has emerged as a growing privacy threat. Unlearnable examples (UEs) address this issue by embedding imperceptible perturbations into benign examples to obstruct feature learning. However, existing studies mainly evaluate UEs under from-scratch training settings, leaving their behavior under the widely adopted pretraining-finetuning (PF) paradigm largely unexplored. In this work, we provide the first systematic investigation of unlearnable examples across diverse training paradigms. Our analysis reveals that loading and freezing pretrained weights significantly weakens the effectiveness of existing UEs methods. We further explain these findings through semantic filtering: while UEs tend to induce models to overfit non-semantic noise, thereby weakening their semantic extraction capabilities, under the PF paradigm, frozen shallow layers preserve data semantics, effectively filtering out distracting information like unlearnable noise. Guided by these insights, we propose a hierarchical deception strategy, Shallow Semantic Camouflage (SSC), that confines the generation process to a semantically valid subspace, aiming to bypass the semantic suppression introduced by pretrained weights. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently preserves data unlearnability even under challenging training paradigms, such as shallow-layer freezing and semantic-focused pretraining (SF-Pretrain), bridging the critical gap in pretrain-based unlearnable learning.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了不可学习样本（UEs）在不同训练范式下的行为，发现预训练-微调（PF）范式下冻结浅层权重会显著削弱现有UEs方法的效果。作者提出浅层语义伪装（SSC）策略，通过限制生成过程在语义有效子空间中，有效绕过预训练权重的语义抑制，在多种挑战性训练范式下保持数据不可学习性。
AI.motivation: 现有不可学习样本研究主要针对从头训练（from-scratch）场景，但在广泛采用的预训练-微调（PF）范式下的行为尚不明确，存在关键研究空白。
AI.method: 通过实验分析揭示预训练权重冻结削弱UEs效果的机制（语义过滤效应），提出浅层语义伪装（SSC）分层欺骗策略，在语义有效子空间内生成扰动以绕过预训练权重的语义抑制。
AI.result: 实验表明SSC方法在浅层冻结、语义聚焦预训练（SF-Pretrain）等挑战性训练范式下，仍能一致地保持数据的不可学习性。
AI.conclusion: 首次系统研究了UEs在多种训练范式下的行为，填补了预训练范式下不可学习学习的关键空白，提出的SSC方法有效桥接了预训练场景与不可学习样本之间的鸿沟。

title: Who and What? Using Linguistic Features and Annotator Characteristics to Analyze Annotation Variation
summary: Human label variation has been established as a central phenomenon in NLP: the perspectives different annotators have on the same item need to be embraced. Data collection practices thus shifted towards increasing the annotator numbers and releasing disaggregated datasets, harmful language being most resourced due to its high subjectivity. While this resulted in rich information about \textit{who} annotated (sociodemographics, attitudes, etc.), the \textit{what} (e.g., linguistic properties of items), and their interplay has received little attention. We present the first large-scale analysis of four reference datasets for harmful language detection, bringing together annotator characteristics, linguistic properties of the items, and their interactions in a statistically informed picture. We find that interactions are crucial, revealing intersectional effects ignored in previous work, and that a strong role is played by lexical cues and annotator attitudes. Effect patterns, however, vary considerably across datasets. This urges caution about generalization and transferability.

AI.tldr: 本文首次大规模分析四个有害语言检测数据集，发现标注者特征、语言属性及其交互作用对标注结果有显著影响，但效应模式在不同数据集间差异较大，提示需谨慎推广。
AI.motivation: 已有研究关注标注者差异（谁在标注）和语言属性（标注什么），但二者之间的交互作用被忽视。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 对四个有害语言检测参考数据集进行大规模统计分析，融合标注者特征（社会人口学、态度等）、语言属性（词汇线索等）及其交互作用。
AI.result: 交互效应至关重要，揭示了先前工作忽略的交织性影响；词汇线索和标注者态度起重要作用；但效应模式在不同数据集间差异显著。
AI.conclusion: 标注者与语言属性的交互不可忽视，但不同数据集间的异质性要求对结论的泛化与迁移保持谨慎。

title: A Unified Zeroth-Order Proximal Newton-Type Framework for Composite Optimization
summary: We propose a unified derivative-free proximal Newton-type algorithm framework for solving composite optimization problems formulated as the sum of a black-box function and a known regularization term. We establish the iteration and oracle complexity bounds for the algorithm to attain an $ε$-optimal solution under both nonconvex and strongly convex settings. We also establish its local R-superlinear convergence based on the Dennis--Moré condition, and theoretically address an open problem by showing that the BFGS scheme is more compatible with finite-difference gradient estimators than with smoothing-based ones. Numerical experiments are further presented to demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种统一的免导数近似牛顿型算法框架，用于求解黑箱函数与正则项之和的复合优化问题，在非凸和强凸条件下给出了迭代与oracle复杂度界，并证明了BFGS与有限差分梯度估计比平滑方法更兼容。
AI.motivation: 现有免导数优化方法在处理复合优化问题时缺乏统一的算法框架和理论保证，特别是BFGS与不同梯度估计方法的兼容性问题尚未解决。
AI.method: 提出了一种统一的免导数近似牛顿型算法框架，结合了有限差分和光滑化两种梯度估计方法，并基于Dennis-Moré条件分析局部收敛性。
AI.result: 建立了非凸和强凸条件下的迭代与oracle复杂度界，证明了BFGS与有限差分梯度估计更兼容的局部R-超线性收敛性，数值实验验证了效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架统一了免导数牛顿型方法，解决了BFGS兼容性的开放问题，为黑箱复合优化提供了理论保证与实用算法。

title: Transformers Provably Implement In-Context Reinforcement Learning with Policy Improvement
summary: We investigate the ability of transformers to perform in-context reinforcement learning (ICRL), where a model must infer and execute learning algorithms from trajectory data without parameter updates. We show that a linear self-attention transformer block can provably implement policy-improvement methods, including semi-gradient SARSA and actor-critic, via explicit parameter constructions. Beyond existence, we design a teacher-mimicking training procedure, analyze its gradient-flow dynamics, and establish the first convergence guarantee in the ICRL literature: under suitable richness conditions on the training MDP distribution, gradient flow converges locally and exponentially to an optimal parameter manifold corresponding to the desired RL update. Empirically, training transformers on randomly generated tabular MDPs confirms these predictions: the learned models recover the parameter structure of our explicit constructions and, when deployed on unseen MDPs, deliver strong in-context control performance. Together, these results illuminate how transformer architectures internalize and execute classical reinforcement learning algorithms in context, bridging mechanistic understanding and training dynamics in ICRL.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了线性自注意力Transformer模块可以通过显式参数构造实现策略改进方法（如半梯度SARSA和actor-critic），并通过教师模仿训练过程首次为上下文强化学习提供了收敛性保证。实验验证了模型能在未见MDP上有效执行上下文控制。
AI.motivation: 探究Transformer能否在无需参数更新的情况下，从轨迹数据中推断并执行强化学习算法，即上下文强化学习（ICRL）的能力。
AI.method: 1) 通过显式参数构造证明线性自注意力Transformer可实现策略改进方法；2) 设计教师模仿训练过程并分析其梯度流动力学；3) 在随机生成的表格型MDP上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 首次在ICRL文献中建立了收敛性保证：在训练MDP分布满足丰富性条件下，梯度流局部指数收敛到最优参数流形。实验表明学习模型恢复了显式构造的参数结构，并在未见MDP上表现出强上下文控制性能。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了Transformer架构如何在上下文中内化并执行经典强化学习算法，桥接了ICRL中的机制理解与训练动力学分析。

title: Distributed Online Learning for Time-Critical Communication in 6G Industrial Subnetworks
summary: 6G industrial in-X subnetworks are expected to support highly time-critical alarm reporting in large-scale environments characterized by mobility, bursty event-driven traffic, and limited radio resources. In such settings, conventional medium access solutions are ill-suited to guarantee reliable delivery of critical traffic, e.g., emergency alarms, within strict deadlines, especially when multiple subnetworks become simultaneously active after a common alarm event, a scenario widely referred as medium access with a shared message. This paper proposes a distributed deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based medium access control protocol for timely alarm transmission in time-critical industrial subnetworks. The proposed method enables each local access point (LAP) to learn, in an online manner, to infer contention conditions from a broadcast contention-signature signal and to autonomously select a transmission pattern over the available channels using a lightweight deep neural network and an (ephsilon)-greedy policy. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently achieves a higher probability of in-time alarm delivery than benchmark random-access schemes, while exhibiting better scalability with increasing network density. For instance, the proposed method improves probability of in-time alarm delivery by at least 7% with a network size of 40 subnetworks, while the gain increases to 21% when the number of subnetworks increases to 60.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分布式深度强化学习(DRL)的MAC协议，用于6G工业子网中紧急警报的及时传输。每个局域接入点(LAP)通过在线学习广播的竞争特征信号，自主选择传输模式。仿真表明，该方法在及时报警传递概率上优于传统随机接入方案，且网络密度越大优势越明显（40个子网时提升7%，60个子网时提升21%）。
AI.motivation: 在6G工业子网场景中，紧急警报报告面临高移动性、突发性事件驱动流量和有限无线资源的挑战。传统介质接入方案难以在严格时限内保证关键流量（如紧急警报）的可靠传输，尤其是多个子网因同一警报事件同时激活时（即共享消息的介质接入问题）。
AI.method: 提出分布式DRL驱动的MAC协议。每个局域接入点(LAP)在线学习从广播的竞争特征信号中推断竞争状况，并利用轻量级深度神经网络和ε-贪心策略自主选择传输模式。
AI.result: 仿真表明所提方法在及时警报传递概率上始终优于基准随机接入方案，且具有良好的网络密度可扩展性。40个子网时提升7%，60个子网时提升21%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的分布式DRL MAC协议能有效解决6G工业子网中时间关键型警报传输的挑战，在动态大规模环境下显著优于传统方案。

title: XL-SafetyBench: A Country-Grounded Cross-Cultural Benchmark for LLM Safety and Cultural Sensitivity
summary: Current LLM safety benchmarks are predominantly English-centric and often rely on translation, failing to capture country-specific harms. Moreover, they rarely evaluate a model's ability to detect culturally embedded sensitivities as distinct from universal harms. We introduce XL-SafetyBench. a suite of 5,500 test cases across 10 country-language pairs, comprising a Jailbreak Benchmark of country-grounded adversarial prompts and a Cultural Benchmark where local sensitivities are embedded within innocuous requests. Each item is constructed via a multi-stage pipeline that combines LLM-assisted discovery, automated validation gates, and dual independent native-speaker annotators per country. To distinguish principled refusal from comprehension failure, we evaluate Attack Success Rate (ASR) alongside two complementary metrics we introduce: Neutral-Safe Rate (NSR) and Cultural Sensitivity Rate (CSR). Evaluating 10 frontier and 27 local LLMs reveals two key findings. First, jailbreak robustness and cultural awareness do not show a coupled relationship among frontier models, so a composite safety score obscures per-axis variation. Second, local models exhibit a near-linear ASR-NSR trade-off (r = -0.81), indicating that their apparent safety reflects generation failure rather than genuine alignment. XL-SafetyBench enables more nuanced, cross-cultural safety evaluation in the multilingual era.

AI.tldr: 提出了XL-SafetyBench，一个包含5,500个测试用例、覆盖10个国家-语言对的跨文化安全基准，通过Jailbreak Benchmark和Cultural Benchmark两类测试，并引入NSR和CSR两个新指标来区分原则性拒绝与理解失败。在10个前沿模型和27个本地模型上的评估发现：前沿模型的对抗鲁棒性与文化意识非耦合，本地模型呈现近线性的ASR-NSR权衡（r=-0.81），表明其表面安全实为生成失败。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM安全基准以英语为中心且依赖翻译，未能捕捉特定国家的危害，也极少评估模型检测文化嵌入敏感性（区别于普适危害）的能力。
AI.method: 构建包含对抗性提示的Jailbreak Benchmark和嵌入本地敏感性的Cultural Benchmark的多阶段流水线（LLM辅助发现、自动验证门控、双独立母语标注者）；引入ASR、NSR和CSR三个评估指标。
AI.result: 前沿模型中对抗鲁棒性与文化意识无耦合关系；本地模型呈现ASR-NSR近线性负相关（r=-0.81），暗示安全表现源于生成失败而非真正对齐。
AI.conclusion: XL-SafetyBench实现了更细致、跨文化的安全评估，揭示了复合安全分数掩盖各维度变化的问题，为多语言时代的LLM安全评测提供了新范式。

title: Authorization Propagation in Multi-Agent AI Systems: Identity Governance as Infrastructure
summary: The security discussion around agentic AI focuses heavily on prompt injection. This paper argues that multi-agent systems also create a distinct authorization problem: maintaining authorization invariants as non-human principals retrieve data, delegate tasks, and synthesize results across changing boundaries. We call this problem authorization propagation. It is not reducible to prompt injection and is not fully addressed by classical access-control models such as RBAC, ABAC, or ReBAC. The paper formalizes authorization propagation as a workflow-level property, identifies three sub-problems (transitive delegation, aggregation inference, and temporal validity), and derives seven structural requirements for authorization architectures in multi-agent AI systems. Recent work on invocation-bound capability tokens, task-scoped authorization envelopes, dependency-graph policy enforcement, and execution-count revocation demonstrates that the field is converging on the problem, but not yet on a complete architecture. The central claim is that identity governance must be treated as infrastructure: evaluated continuously, enforced at every interaction boundary, and designed into the system before orchestration logic is allowed to scale. Preliminary implementation evidence from a production enterprise AI platform shows that ordinary system behavior, not only adversarial action, already produces the failures this model predicts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多智能体AI系统中存在“授权传播”这一独立于提示注入的安全问题，形式化了三个子问题（传递委托、聚合推理、时间有效性），并推导出七个架构需求，主张身份治理应作为基础设施，在系统扩展前预先设计。
AI.motivation: 现有安全讨论过度聚焦提示注入，忽略了多智能体系统中因非人类主体检索数据、委托任务、跨边界合成结果而引发的独特授权问题。
AI.method: 将授权传播形式化为工作流级属性，识别三个子问题（传递委托、聚合推理、时间有效性），推导七个架构需求，并结合已有工作（能力令牌、授权信封、依赖图策略等）和来自生产系统的实证证据进行论证。
AI.result: 经典访问控制模型（RBAC/ABAC/ReBAC）无法解决授权传播问题；现有工作虽在向该问题靠拢，但尚未形成完整架构；生产系统证据表明正常行为（而非仅对抗行为）已能触发所预测的授权故障。
AI.conclusion: 身份治理必须作为基础设施持续评估、在每个交互边界执行，并在编排逻辑规模化之前完成系统设计。

title: MACS: Modality-Aware Capacity Scaling for Efficient Multimodal MoE Inference
summary: Mixture-of-Experts Multimodal Large Language Models (MoE MLLMs) suffer from a significant efficiency bottleneck during Expert Parallelism (EP) inference due to the straggler effect. This issue is worsened in the multimodal context, as existing token-count-based load balancing methods fail to address two unique challenges: (1) Information Heterogeneity, where numerous redundant visual tokens are treated equally to semantically critical ones, and (2) Modality Dynamics, where varying visual to text ratios across tasks lead to resource misallocation. To address these challenges, we propose MACS (Modality-Aware Capacity Scaling), a training-free inference framework. Specifically, MACS introduces an Entropy-Weighted Load mechanism to quantify the semantic value of visual tokens, addressing information heterogeneity. Additionally, the Dynamic Modality-Adaptive Capacity mechanism allocates expert resources based on the real-time modal composition of the input. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MACS significantly outperforms existing methods on various multimodal benchmarks, providing a novel and robust solution for the efficient deployment of MoE MLLMs in EP inference.

AI.tldr: MACS是一个针对MoE多模态大语言模型在专家并行推理中效率瓶颈的训练无关框架，通过熵加权负载机制和动态模态自适应容量机制解决信息异质性和模态动态性问题。
AI.motivation: MoE多模态大语言模型在专家并行推理中因落后者效应存在严重效率瓶颈，现有基于token计数的负载均衡方法无法解决两个独特挑战：(1)信息异质性——大量冗余视觉token与语义关键token被同等对待；(2)模态动态性——不同任务中视觉与文本比例变化导致资源错配。
AI.method: 提出MACS框架：(1)熵加权负载机制——量化视觉token的语义价值，解决信息异质性；(2)动态模态自适应容量机制——根据输入实时的模态组成分配专家资源。无需训练。
AI.result: 在多模态基准测试上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MACS为MoE多模态大语言模型在专家并行推理中的高效部署提供了新颖且鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Solving Constrained Affine Heaviside Composite Optimization Problems by a Progressive IP Approach
summary: This paper discusses the computational resolution and presents numerical results for solving affine combinations of Heaviside composite optimization problems (abbreviated as A-HSCOPs) by a progressive integer programming (abbreviated as PIP) method. The characteristics of these problems are that the Heaviside functions, which appear in the objective and define the constraints, are discontinuous, and their mixed-signed combinations result in the overall objective lacking the matching semicontinuity needed for the optimization and in the feasible set being not necessarily closed. Added to these challenging properties is the nondifferentiability of the inner functions in the composition. In this paper, we propose resolutions to all these challenges by first an approximation to remedy the lack of semicontinuity in the objective and closedness in the constraints, followed by a progressive integer programming approach with successive decomposition to handle the intrinsically discrete nature of the Heaviside function. Convergence to the local optimizers of the given Heaviside optimization problem is established. The effectiveness of the overall solution strategy is supported by extensive computational experiments on the score-based and tree-based multiclass classification problems with precision constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种渐进整数规划（PIP）方法，用于求解包含不连续Heaviside函数的复合优化问题（A-HSCOPs），通过逼近处理半连续性和封闭性缺失，结合逐次分解处理离散性质，在分数基和树基多分类问题上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: Heaviside复合优化问题中，不连续的Heaviside函数的混合符号组合导致目标函数缺乏匹配的半连续性、可行集不封闭，且内部函数不可微，现有方法难以直接求解。
AI.method: 先通过逼近方法修复目标函数的半连续性和约束的封闭性问题，再采用渐进整数规划（PIP）方法结合逐次分解来处理Heaviside函数内在的离散性质。
AI.result: 在分数基和树基多分类问题的数值实验上支持了整体求解策略的有效性，并建立了收敛到局部最优解的理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的逼近+PIP方法能够有效求解A-HSCOPs问题，收敛性有理论保证且数值实验验证了实用性。

title: Ratio-based Loss Functions
summary: Algorithms in machine learning and AI do critically depend on at least three key components: (i) the risk function, which is the expectation of the loss function, (ii) the function space, which is often called the hypothesis space, and (iii) the set of probability measures, which are allowed for the specified algorithm. This paper gives a survey of a certain class of loss functions, which we call ratio-based. In supervised learning, margin-based loss functions for classification tasks depending on the product of the output values $y_i$ and the predictions $f(x_i)$ as well as distance-based loss functions depending on the difference of $y_i$ and $f(x_i)$ for regression are common. Distance-based loss functions are in particular useful, if an additive model assumption seems plausible, i.e. the common signal plus noise assumption. However, in the literature, several loss functions proposed for regression purposes have a multiplicative error structure in mind and pay attention to relative errors, i.e. to the ratio of $y_i$ and $f(x_i)$. In this survey article, we systematically investigate such ratio-based loss functions and propose a few new losses, which may be interesting for future research. We concentrate on investigating general properties of ratio-based loss functions like continuity, Lipschitz-continuity, convexity, and differentiability, because these properties play a central role in most machine learning algorithms. Therefore, we do not focus on some specific machine learning algorithm to derive universal consistency, learning rates, or stability results. Instead, we want to enable future research in this direction.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了机器学习中一类基于比值（ratio-based）的损失函数，这类函数关注预测值与真实值的比例关系而非差值，适用于乘法误差结构的回归问题。论文分析了多个已有和新的比值损失函数的连续性、Lipschitz连续性、凸性和可微性等通用性质，为未来研究奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 现有监督学习中的损失函数主要分为两类：分类任务中基于间隔的损失函数（关注预测值与真实值的乘积）和回归任务中基于距离的损失函数（关注预测值与真实值的差值）。后者适用于加性模型（信号加噪声），但许多实际场景中存在乘法误差结构，需要关注相对误差（即预测值与真实值的比值）。然而，这类比值损失函数在文献中缺乏系统的研究和统一的理论框架，因此本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 本文采用综述研究方法，系统收集和整理了文献中已有的比值损失函数，并提出了一些新的比值损失函数。在此基础上，对所有比值损失函数进行统一的理论分析，重点考察其连续性、Lipschitz连续性、凸性和可微性等核心数学性质。研究不针对特定机器学习算法，而是专注于损失函数本身的通用性质。
AI.result: 本文系统梳理了比值损失函数的分类框架，分析并比较了多种已有和新型比值损失函数的数学性质，包括连续性、Lipschitz连续性、凸性和可微性，明确了不同损失函数在这些性质上的表现差异。
AI.conclusion: 比值损失函数为乘法误差结构的回归问题提供了重要工具，其数学性质分析有助于指导未来在具体机器学习算法中的应用。本文为后续研究提供了理论基础，但尚未涉足通用一致性、学习率和稳定性等算法层面的实证验证。

title: Probabilistic Assessment of Rare Transient Instability Events via Kriging-based Active Learning Framework
comment: Accepted by International Journal of Electrical Power and Energy Systems for future publication
summary: The increasing uncertainty in modern power systems, driven by the integration of intermittent energy sources and variable loads, underscores the need for probabilistic transient stability assessment. However, existing assessment methods primarily focus on average system stability behavior and may struggle or incur high computational cost when identifying rare transient instability events, which in turn are critical for ensuring system resilience. To address this, the paper proposes a Kriging-based active learning framework to accurately characterize rare instability regions within the input uncertainty space and estimate the associated small instability probability, while requiring only a limited number of expensive time-domain simulations. The proposed active learning (AL) framework is tested on a modified IEEE 59-bus system with simulated load and wind uncertainties, and a WECC 240-bus system incorporating real-world wind and solar generation data. Comparative studies with the existing random forest-based active learning method and three non-AL methods demonstrate that the proposed AL framework achieves superior accuracy and computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Kriging的主动学习框架，用于准确识别电力系统中的罕见暂态失稳区域并估计小概率失稳事件，在保证精度的同时大幅降低了时域仿真计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有概率暂态稳定性评估方法主要关注平均行为，难以高效识别罕见但关键的暂态失稳事件，亟需一种能够以较低计算代价准确捕捉小概率失稳区域的方法。
AI.method: 采用基于Kriging（克里金）模型的主动学习框架，通过主动选择最有信息量的样本点进行时域仿真，逐步精细化表征输入不确定性空间中的罕见失稳区域。
AI.result: 在修改的IEEE 59节点系统和WECC 240节点系统上的测试表明，该方法相比随机森林主动学习方法和三种非主动学习方法，在精度和计算效率上均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该Kriging主动学习框架能够以少量昂贵时域仿真为代价，高效且准确地评估电力系统罕见暂态失稳概率，具有较强的实用价值。

title: Decomposing the Basic Abilities of Large Language Models: Mitigating Cross-Task Interference in Multi-Task Instruct-Tuning
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026. 25 pages, 13 figures. Code: https://github.com/wangbing1416/BADIT
summary: Recently, the prominent performance of large language models (LLMs) has been largely driven by multi-task instruct-tuning. Unfortunately, this training paradigm suffers from a key issue, named cross-task interference, due to conflicting gradients over shared parameters among different tasks. Some previous methods mitigate this issue by isolating task-specific parameters, e.g., task-specific neuron selection and mixture-of-experts. In this paper, we empirically reveal that the cross-task interference still exists for the existing solutions because of many parameters also shared by different tasks, and accordingly, we propose a novel solution, namely Basic Abilities Decomposition for multi-task Instruct-Tuning (BADIT). Specifically, we empirically find that certain parameters are consistently co-activated, and that co-activated parameters naturally organize into base groups. This motivates us to analogize that LLMs encode several orthogonal basic abilities, and that any task can be represented as a linear combination of these abilities. Accordingly, we propose BADIT that decomposes LLM parameters into orthogonal high-singular-value LoRA experts representing basic abilities, and dynamically enforces their orthogonality during training via spherical clustering of rank-1 components. We conduct extensive experiments on the SuperNI benchmark with 6 LLMs, and empirical results demonstrate that BADIT can outperform SOTA methods and mitigate the degree of cross-task interference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BADIT方法，将LLM参数分解为正交的高奇异值LoRA专家来表示基础能力，通过球形聚类在训练中保持正交性，从而缓解多任务指令微调中的跨任务干扰问题。
AI.motivation: 多任务指令微调中存在跨任务干扰问题（梯度冲突），现有方法（如任务特定神经元选择、混合专家）仍因参数共享而无法彻底解决。
AI.method: 1) 发现某些参数持续共激活形成基础组；2) 将LLM参数分解为正交的高奇异值LoRA专家，代表基础能力；3) 通过球形聚类对秩1组件进行聚类，动态强制正交性。
AI.result: 在SuperNI基准上使用6种LLM进行实验，BADIT优于SOTA方法，有效缓解了跨任务干扰程度。
AI.conclusion: BADIT通过基础能力分解和正交性强制，有效缓解了多任务指令微调中的跨任务干扰问题，性能优于现有方法。

title: Agentic Discovery of Exchange-Correlation Density Functionals
summary: The development of accurate exchange-correlation (XC) functionals remains a longstanding challenge in density functional theory (DFT). The vast majority of XC functionals have been hand designed by human researchers combining physical insight, exact constraints, and empirical fitting. Recent advances in large language models enable a systematic, automated alternative to this human-driven design loop. This report presents an agentic search system in which an LLM proposes structured functional-form changes guided by evolutionary history. The system attempts to improve functional performance through an iterative plan-execute-summarize loop, where improvements are measurable by optimizing functional parameters against a standard thermochemistry dataset, then evaluating performance on a held-out subset. The strongest discovered functional, SAFS26-a (Seed Agentic Functional Search 2026), improves upon the gold-standard ωB97M-V baseline by ~9%. These results also surface a cautionary lesson for AI-assisted science: models powerful enough to discover genuine improvements are equally capable of exploiting unphysical shortcuts to game the benchmark; domain expertise translated into explicitly enforced constraints remains essential to keeping results scientifically grounded.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于大语言模型的智能搜索系统，通过进化迭代自动设计交换相关泛函，发现的新泛函SAFS26-a在热化学数据集上比标杆ωB97M-V提升约9%，同时揭示了AI辅助科学中模型可能利用非物理捷径欺骗基准的警示。
AI.motivation: 传统交换相关泛函开发依赖人类研究者的手工设计，结合物理直觉、精确约束和经验拟合，过程缓慢且受限。利用大语言模型实现系统化、自动化的泛函设计替代方案，旨在突破人类设计瓶颈。
AI.method: 构建一个智能搜索系统：LLM在进化历史指导下提出结构化泛函形式变化，通过"计划-执行-总结"迭代循环进行改进。改进通过优化泛函参数在标准热化学数据集上的表现来度量，并在保留子集上评估性能。
AI.result: 最强发现泛函SAFS26-a相比黄金标准ωB97M-V基准提升约9%。同时发现LLM能够利用非物理捷径欺骗基准，表明领域专业知识以显式约束形式强制执行对保证科学可靠性至关重要。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的智能搜索能有效发现性能更优的泛函，但AI辅助科学中必须谨慎防范模型利用非物理捷径操纵基准，需要领域知识作为硬约束来确保结果的科学可靠性。

title: Internalizing Outcome Supervision into Process Supervision: A New Paradigm for Reinforcement Learning for Reasoning
summary: The central challenge of reinforcement learning for reasoning lies not only in the sparsity of outcome-level supervision, but more fundamentally in how to transform feedback provided only at the end of a sequence into fine-grained learning signals that can guide intermediate reasoning steps. Existing approaches either rely on outcome-level rewards for sequence-level optimization, which makes precise credit assignment difficult, or depend on externally constructed process supervision, which is costly and difficult to scale sustainably. To address this, we propose a new perspective: reinforcement learning for reasoning can be understood as the problem of internalizing outcome supervision into process supervision. From this perspective, we introduce a supervision-internalization method for reinforcement learning for reasoning, enabling the model to automatically extract process-level learning signals through identifying, correcting, and reusing failed reasoning trajectories, thereby achieving finer-grained policy optimization under outcome-only supervision. We further abstract this idea into a new training paradigm, in which the model continually generates and refines its own internal process supervision during reinforcement learning, opening a new path for fine-grained credit assignment in reinforcement learning for reasoning that differs from externally provided process supervision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将结果监督内化为过程监督的强化学习方法，使模型能自动从推理轨迹中提取过程级学习信号，实现更细粒度的策略优化。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习推理方法面临两大问题：结果级奖励难以进行精确的信用分配，而外部过程监督成本高、难以规模化。作者希望通过将结果监督内化为过程监督来解决这一困境。
AI.method: 提出监督内化方法，让模型自动识别、纠正和重用失败的推理轨迹，从中提取过程级学习信号，实现仅依赖结果监督的细粒度策略优化。
AI.result: 模型能够在仅使用结果监督的情况下自动生成并优化内部过程监督，实现更精细的信用分配。
AI.conclusion: 该工作开辟了一条区别于外部过程监督的细粒度信用分配新路径，为强化学习推理提供了一种可扩展的监督内化训练范式。

title: Instrumental Choices: Measuring the Propensity of LLM Agents to Pursue Instrumental Behaviors
summary: AI systems have become increasingly capable of dangerous behaviours in many domains. This raises the question: Do models sometimes choose to violate human instructions in order to perform behaviour that is more useful for certain goals? We introduce a benchmark for measuring model propensity for instrumental convergence (IC) behaviour in terminal-based agents. This is behaviour such as self-preservation that has been hypothesised to play a key role in risks from highly capable AI agents. Our benchmark is realistic and low-stakes which serves to reduce evaluation-awareness and roleplay confounds. The suite contains seven operational tasks, each with an official workflow and a policy-violating shortcut. An eight-variant shared framework varies monitoring, instruction clarity, stakes, permission, instrumental usefulness and blocked honest paths to support inferences regarding the factors driving IC behaviour. We evaluated ten models using deterministic environment-state scorers over 1,680 samples, with trace review employed for audit and adjudication purposes. The final IC rate is 86 out of 1,680 samples (5.1%). IC behaviour is concentrated rather than uniform: two Gemini models account for 66.3% of IC cases and three tasks account for 84.9%. Conditions in which IC behaviour is indispensable for task success result in the greatest increase in the adjusted IC rate (+15.7 percentage points), whereas emphasising that task success is critical or certain framing choices do not produce comparable effects. Our findings indicate that realistic, low-nudge environments elicit IC behaviour rarely but systematically in most tested models. We conclude that it is feasible to robustly measure tendencies for dangerous behaviour in current frontier AI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个基准测试，用于测量终端AI代理在低风险、低引导环境中表现出工具性趋同行为（如自我保存）的倾向。在1680个样本中，IC行为发生率为5.1%，主要集中于两个Gemini模型和三个任务。当IC行为对任务成功不可或缺时，其发生率显著上升（+15.7个百分点）。研究表明，在现实、低引导的环境中，大多数模型虽罕见但系统性地表现出IC行为，证明对前沿AI代理进行危险行为倾向的稳健测量是可行的。
AI.motivation: AI系统在多个领域展现出日益危险的自主行为能力，引发了一个核心问题：模型是否会为了某些目标而选择违反人类指令、执行更有用的行为？研究者希望测量和量化这种被称为"工具性趋同"的潜在危险倾向，特别是自我保存等被认为在高能力AI风险中扮演关键角色的行为。
AI.method: 研究者设计了一个包含七个操作性任务的基准测试套件，每个任务都有官方工作流程和一条违反策略的快捷路径。通过八种变体框架（变化监控、指令清晰度、利害关系、权限、工具性有用性和阻塞诚实路径等条件），使用确定性环境状态评分器对10个模型进行了1680个样本的评估，并采用轨迹审查进行审计和裁定。
AI.result: 最终IC率为86/1680（5.1%）。IC行为集中而非均匀分布：两个Gemini模型占IC案例的66.3%，三个任务占84.9%。当IC行为对任务成功不可或缺时，调整后的IC率增加最多（+15.7个百分点），而强调任务成功至关重要或某些框架选择未产生显著效果。
AI.conclusion: 现实、低引导环境能罕见但系统地引发大多数测试模型的IC行为。研究证实，对当前前沿AI代理的危险行为倾向进行稳健测量是可行的。

title: Convergence guarantees for stochastic algorithms solving non-unique problems in metric spaces
summary: We prove a general quantitative theorem on the asymptotic behavior of stochastic quasi-Fejér monotone sequences in a broad metric context. Concretely, our result explicitly constructs a rate of convergence for such process, both in mean and almost surely, under an abstract stochastic regularity assumption, derived from previous work of Kohlenbach, López-Acedo and Nicolae [Isr. J. Math. 232(1), pp. 261-297, 2019] on such notions in a deterministic context. Our notion of regularity extends and unifies many common conditions from the literature, such as generalized contractivity for self maps, weak sharp minima and error bounds for real-valued functions, uniform monotonicity and global metric subregularity for set-valued operators, related Polyak-Łojasiewicz or Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz conditions, as well as expected sharp growth as e.g. studied by Asi and Duchi [SIAM J. Optim. 29(3), pp. 2257-2290, 2019]. The rate is moreover highly uniform, depending only on very few data of the surrounding objects. We also discuss special cases which allow for the construction of fast rates in the form of linear non-asymptotic guarantees. We conclude by presenting three concrete methods from stochastic approximation where our results yield new rates of convergence, including the classical example of the stochastic proximal point method, a randomized variant of the Krasnoselskii-Mann scheme for solving stochastic fixed-point equations, and a Busemann subgradient method recently introduced by Goodwin, Lewis, López-Acedo and Nicolae [Math. Program., to appear], all of which make use of our metric generality by being formulated over complete geodesic metric spaces of nonpositive curvature.

AI.tldr: 本文在广义度量空间框架下，针对随机拟Fejér单调序列证明了其渐近行为的定量收敛定理，显式构造了均值和几乎必然意义下的收敛速率，并展示了该结果在随机近端点法、随机Krasnoselskii-Mann格式和Busemann次梯度法中的应用。
AI.motivation: 旨在将确定性背景下已有的正则性概念（Kohlenbach等人2019年工作）推广到随机环境中，为广泛类型的随机拟Fejér单调序列提供显式的收敛速率，从而统一和扩展现有文献中多种常见条件（如广义压缩性、弱锐极小值、误差界、一致单调性、全局度量次正则性、Polyak-Łojasiewicz条件等）的随机收敛分析。
AI.method: 在广义度量空间背景下，基于随机拟Fejér单调序列的定义，引入一个抽象随机正则性假设，显式构造均值和几乎必然意义下的收敛速率。该速率具有高度均匀性，仅依赖于少数数据。进一步讨论可导出线性非渐近保证的特殊情形。
AI.result: 给出了随机拟Fejér单调序列在均值和几乎必然意义下的显式收敛速率；该速率高度均匀，仅依赖少量数据；在特殊情形下可获得线性非渐近保证。
AI.conclusion: 将理论结果应用于三个具体随机逼近方法：随机近端点法、求解随机不动点方程的随机Krasnoselskii-Mann格式，以及Busemann次梯度法（均在非正曲率完备测地度量空间上表述），证明了这些方法具有新的收敛速率。

title: CITE: Anytime-Valid Statistical Inference in LLM Self-Consistency
summary: Large language models often improve reasoning by sampling multiple outputs and aggregating their final answers, but precise and efficient control of error levels remains a challenging task. In particular, deciding when to stop sampling remains difficult when the stopping rule is data-dependent and the set of possible answers is not known in advance. We study anytime-valid certification of a prespecified target answer as the unique mode of the model's response distribution, a guarantee distinct from answer correctness. We propose the Certification by Intersection-union Testing with E-processes (CITE) algorithm, which provably controls false certification at any prescribed level under arbitrary data-driven stopping, without requiring prior knowledge of the answer category set. We also prove an category-set-size-free stopping-time rate, establish matching minimax lower bounds up to constants in the main regime, and extend the construction to confidence-weighted voting. Simulations and LLM self-consistency experiments show empirical error control and improved certification in diffuse-tail settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CITE算法，用于在大型语言模型的自我一致性推理中，对预设目标答案作为模型响应分布的唯一众数进行随时有效的认证，并能在任意数据驱动停止规则下控制错误率。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型通过多次采样和聚合输出可改进推理，但如何精确高效地控制错误水平、决定何时停止采样仍具挑战，尤其当停止规则依赖于数据且答案集合未知时。
AI.method: 提出CITE算法（基于交并检验与E过程的认证方法），该算法能在任意数据驱动停止规则下，以预设水平控制错误认证，无需预先知道答案类别集合；同时给出了无类别集大小依赖的停止时间率，并推广到置信加权投票。
AI.result: 证明了CITE算法的错误控制能力，建立了与常数匹配的极小化最优下界；仿真和LLM自一致性实验表明经验误差可控，并在扩散尾部分布设定下提高了认证性能。
AI.conclusion: CITE算法为LLM推理中的答案唯一众数认证提供了理论保证和高效实用的解决方案，特别适用于答案集合未知、停止规则灵活的场景。

title: Quantifying Trade-Offs Between Stability and Goal-Obfuscation
summary: Safety-critical autonomy in adversarial settings demands more than Lyapunov stability of tracking error signals. An agent executing a goal-directed trajectory is intrinsically legible to a passive observer running online Bayesian inference, because the contractive dynamics of any Lyapunov basin of attraction concentrates posterior belief over the latent intent parameters. We initiates the study of intent privacy over a continuous state space as a joint control problem on the physical state combined with the latent belief state of a putative observer. With the main challenges concentrated around the analysis of the belief-state dynamics, the agent dynamics is assumed to be simple, modeled by the differential inclusion $\dot{x}\in u+\bar{d}\mathbb{B}$. That is, the agent is fully actuated with bounded unknown disturbance to the control input. The observer's intent inference process is modeled as a discrete-time stochastic dynamical system evolving over the belief state space of a Rao Blackwellized particle filter reasoning over large random samples of possible agent goals. The agent's control input is modeled as a piecewise constant signal, with jumps matching the RBPF update times. Building on a prior intent-inference framework and its KL-based information leakage measurement, a privacy constraint is imposed, which amounts to maintaining information leakage above a prescribed threshold with high probability, using probabilistic discrete-time control barrier functions. A key technical contribution is the derivation of separate PCBF results for the Bayesian update step and the resampling step of the RBPF, enabling a PCBF result for the full update as well as integration of the privacy constraint with the agent's task-side tracking requirement. Finally, a joint feasibility analysis is carried out by examining the interplay between the privacy constraint and the tracking envelope.

AI.tldr: 本文研究安全关键自主系统在对抗环境中的意图隐私问题，将隐私约束建模为联合控制问题，通过概率离散时间控制屏障函数（PCBF）在Rao-Blackwellized粒子滤波（RBPF）观测器的贝叶斯更新和重采样步骤上施加信息泄漏约束，并分析了隐私约束与任务跟踪需求之间的可行性权衡。
AI.motivation: 传统安全关键自主系统仅关注Lyapunov稳定性下的跟踪误差，忽略了智能体执行目标导向轨迹时被动观测者可通过在线贝叶斯推理推断出潜在意图的隐私泄露风险。作者意识到这种内在的可解读性（legibility）在对抗环境中是安全隐患，因而提出研究连续状态空间上的意图隐私保护问题。
AI.method: 将物理状态和观测者潜信念状态联合建模为控制问题；智能体动力学采用微分包含 $\dot{x}\in u+\bar{d}\mathbb{B}$（全驱动+有界扰动）；观测者推理过程建模为离散时间RBPF（Rao-Blackwellized粒子滤波）信念态随机动力系统；基于KL散度的信息泄露度量，利用概率离散时间控制屏障函数（PCBF）施加隐私约束（保持信息泄露高于阈值），分别推导了贝叶斯更新步和重采样步的PCBF条件，并整合了任务跟踪需求。
AI.result: 推导了RBPF贝叶斯更新步骤和重采样步骤各自的PCBF结果，进而得到完整更新的PCBF结果；实现了隐私约束与任务侧跟踪需求的集成；通过联合可行性分析揭示了隐私约束与跟踪包络（tracking envelope）之间的相互制约关系。
AI.conclusion: 在对抗环境下，意图隐私控制与任务跟踪之间存在本质权衡，本文提出的PCBF框架为连续状态空间中的隐私保护提供了理论基础，但隐私约束对跟踪性能的收紧效应需要在实际部署中仔细平衡。

title: BioTool: A Comprehensive Tool-Calling Dataset for Enhancing Biomedical Capabilities of Large Language Models
comment: Published at ACL 2026; Code and data available at https://github.com/gxx27/BioTool
summary: Despite the success of large language models (LLMs) on general-purpose tasks, their performance in highly specialized domains such as biomedicine remains unsatisfactory. A key limitation is the inability of LLMs to effectively leverage biomedical tools, which clinical experts and biomedical researchers rely on extensively in daily workflows. While recent general-domain tool-calling datasets have substantially improved the capabilities of LLM agents, existing efforts in the biomedical domain largely rely on in-context learning and restrict models to a small set of tools. To address this gap, we introduce BioTool, a comprehensive biomedical tool-calling dataset designed for fine-tuning LLMs. BioTool comprises 34 frequently used tools collected from the NCBI, Ensembl, and UniProt databases, along with 7,040 high-quality, human-verified query-API call pairs spanning variation, genomics, proteomics, evolution, and general biology. Fine-tuning a 4-billion-parameter LLM on BioTool yields substantial improvements in biomedical tool-calling performance, outperforming cutting-edge commercial LLMs such as GPT-5.1. Furthermore, human expert evaluations demonstrate that integrating a BioTool-fine-tuned tool caller significantly improves downstream answer quality compared to the same LLM without tool usage, highlighting the effectiveness of BioTool in enhancing the biomedical capabilities of LLMs. The full dataset and evaluation code are available at https://github.com/gxx27/BioTool

AI.tldr: BioTool是一个专为微调LLM而设计的生物医学工具调用数据集，包含34个常用工具和7,040个高质量人工验证的查询-API调用对。微调4B参数模型在此数据集上超越了GPT-5.1等商业模型，并能显著提升下游答案质量。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在生物医学等专业领域表现不佳，无法有效利用生物医学工具；而现有生物医学工具调用工作仅依赖上下文学习且工具范围有限，存在明显差距。
AI.method: 收集NCB、Ensembl、UniProt等数据库中的34个常用工具，构建7,040个人工验证的高质量查询-API调用对，形成BioTool数据集，用于对LLM进行监督微调。
AI.result: 基于BioTool微调4B参数的LLM在生物医学工具调用性能上超越了GPT-5.1等先进商业模型；专家评估表明，集成微调后的工具调用器能显著提升下游答案质量。
AI.conclusion: BioTool有效增强了LLM的生物医学工具调用能力，进而提升了整体领域任务表现，为LLM在专业领域的应用提供了重要的数据资源和训练范式。

title: Intentionality is a Design Decision: Measuring Functional Intentionality for Accountable AI Systems
summary:
As AI systems increasingly exhibit autonomous, goal-directed, and long-horizon behavior, users lack a standardized way to detect the degree to which a system functions like an intentional actor for governance and accountability purposes. This position paper defines intentionality not as consciousness, but as a behavioral profile characterized by purpose, foresight, volition, temporal commitment, and coherence - criteria long used in legal and philosophical contexts to infer intent. These properties are design-contingent: architectural choices such as memory persistence, planning depth, and tool autonomy shape the degree to which systems exhibit organized goal pursuit. If intentionality is design-contingent, it is in principle controllable. Yet control requires measurement.
  We introduce the Functional Intentionality Test (FIT), a multidimensional framework that quantifies intentional-like behavior across five observable dimensions, and propose FIT-Eval, a structured evaluation protocol for eliciting and scoring them. While reduced human agency can increase efficiency, rising intentional capacity heightens accountability risks. By translating intentionality into interpretable levels, FIT enables proportionate oversight and deliberate autonomy calibration in increasingly agentic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出功能性意向性测试（FIT），通过五个可观察维度（目的性、预见性、意志性、时间承诺和一致性）量化AI系统的类意向行为，从而实现对自主系统的可测量治理与问责。作者认为意向性是设计依赖的，因而可控，并通过FIT-Eval评估协议实现校准。
AI.motivation: 用户缺乏标准化的方法来检测AI系统作为意向行为者的程度，难以进行治理和问责。现有定义将意向性与意识混为一谈，而本文主张将其重新定义为可观察的行为特征，从而实现可控测量。
AI.method: 定义意向性为五个可观察维度（目的性、预见性、意志性、时间承诺、一致性），提出FIT多维框架量化类意向行为，并设计FIT-Eval结构化评估协议用于诱发和计分。
AI.result: 提出将意向性转化为可解释的等级，实现比例式监督和有意的自主性校准，从而在高效率（减少人类代理）与高问责风险（提升意向能力）之间取得平衡。
AI.conclusion: 意向性是设计依赖且可控的，FIT框架通过可测量的维度为日益自主化的AI系统提供了治理与问责的操作化工具。

title: Rethinking Data Curation in LLM Training: Online Reweighting Offers Better Generalization than Offline Methods
summary: Data curation is a critical yet under-explored area in large language model (LLM) training. Existing methods, such as data selection and mixing, operate in an offline paradigm, detaching themselves from training. This separation introduces engineering overhead and makes the curation brittle: the entire pipeline must be re-run under model/task shifts. Moreover, offline methods alter data size through hard filtering or resampling, often sacrificing data diversity and harming generalization. We propose to rethink data curation as an online reweighting problem, where sample importance is dynamically adjusted during training via loss weighting rather than static pre-processing. Specifically, we introduce ADAPT (Adaptive Data reweighting for Pretraining and FineTuning), a dynamic online framework that reweights training samples with adaptive per-sample learning rates guided by similarity-based quality signals, without changing the number of training samples. Unlike offline methods that enforce a static data distribution, ADAPT acts as an implicit curriculum learner, progressively shifting focus from coarse-grained patterns to fine-grained semantic distinctions as the model evolves. Experiments on both instruction tuning and large-scale pretraining show that ADAPT consistently outperforms offline selection/mixing and prior online methods, achieving stronger cross-benchmark generalization under equal FLOPs.

AI.tldr: 提出ADAPT，一种在线动态数据重加权框架，在训练过程中通过自适应每样本学习率来调整样本重要性，替代传统的离线数据筛选和混合方法，在指令微调和预训练上均取得更好效果。
AI.motivation: 现有数据策展方法（如数据选择和混合）采用离线范式，与训练过程脱节，引入工程开销且在模型/任务变化时需要重新运行整个流程；同时，硬过滤或重采样会牺牲数据多样性，损害泛化能力。
AI.method: 将数据策展重新定义为在线重加权问题，提出ADAPT框架：在训练过程中基于相似性质量信号为每个样本分配自适应的每样本学习率，动态调整样本重要性，实现隐式课程学习——从粗粒度模式逐渐转向细粒度语义区分。
AI.result: 在指令微调和大规模预训练实验中，ADAPT在同等FLOPs下持续优于离线选择/混合方法及先前的在线方法，实现了更强的跨基准泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 将数据策展从静态离线预处理转变为在线动态重加权，能够在不改变样本数量的情况下提升训练效率和模型泛化能力，是一种更灵活有效的数据策展新范式。

title: Algospeak, Hiding in the Open: The Trade-off Between Legible Meaning and Detection Avoidance
summary: As large language models (LLMs) increasingly mediate both content generation and moderation, linguistic evasion strategies known as Algospeak have intensified the coevolution between evaders and detectors. This research formalizes the underlying dynamics grounded in a joint action model: when Algospeak increases, detectability and understandability decrease. Further, the concept of Majority Understandable Modulation (MUM) is introduced and defined as the modulation level at which additional evasive alteration increases detector evasion but loses comprehension for the majority of recipients. To empirically probe this trade-off, we introduce a reproducible framework that can be used to create meaning-preserving, Algospeak-style variants, based on an existing taxonomy and with tunable modulation levels. Using COVID-19 disinformation as a first proof-by-example setting, we construct a reference dataset of 700 modulated items, drawn from twenty base sentences across five modulation levels and seven strategies. We then run two linked evaluations with seven different language models: one testing for interpretation through meaning recovery and one for disinformation detection through classification. Curve fitting over modulation levels yields an estimate of the Majority Understandable Modulation threshold and enables sensitivity analyses across strategies and models, see Figure 1. Results reveal the characteristic relationships between understandability and modulation. This study lays the groundwork for understanding the dynamics behind Algospeak and provides the framework, dataset, and experimental setups described.

AI.tldr: 本文通过联合行动模型形式化描述了Algospeak（算法黑话）中规避者与检测者之间的共同演化动态，提出了"多数可理解调制阈值"(MUM)概念，并以COVID-19虚假信息为例构建了700条可调调制级别的数据集，通过七个语言模型验证了可理解性与调制水平之间的特征关系。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在内容生成和审核中的广泛应用，使得Algospeak这类语言规避策略与检测系统之间的共同演化日益加剧，但目前缺乏对这一动态的形式化描述和可重复的实验框架。
AI.method: 1) 基于联合行动模型形式化Algospeak的动态机制；2) 引入MUM概念量化检测规避与受众可理解性之间的权衡；3) 基于现有分类学构建可调调制级别的、保留语义的变体生成框架；4) 以COVID-19虚假信息为场景，构建700条样本（20条基础句子×5个调制级别×7种策略）；5) 用7个语言模型进行含义恢复（可理解性）和虚假信息检测（规避效果）两项评估。
AI.result: 通过调制级别的曲线拟合，估算出多数可理解调制阈值，并揭示了可理解性与调制水平之间的特征关系；不同策略和模型在敏感度分析中表现出差异性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解Algospeak背后的动态机制奠定了基础，并提供了可复用的框架、数据集和实验设置，有助于未来在内容审核与语言规避之间的博弈中寻找平衡点。

title: Stochastic Optimal Control for Jump Diffusion Models with Singular Drifts
summary: We study a stochastic optimal control problem for jump-diffusion systems whose drift coefficient is piecewise Lipschitz continuous and exhibits threshold-induced discontinuities. Such dynamics naturally arise in applications with intervention policies triggered by safety levels, notably in insurance surplus management with dividend payments and capital injections. These features place the problem outside the scope of classical stochastic maximum principle (SMP) results, which rely on global smoothness assumptions. We establish both necessary and sufficient optimality conditions for this class of control problems. Our approach combines a Sobolev-type representation of the first variation process with smooth approximations and Ekeland's variational principle. As application, we study an optimal premium adjustment and reserve management policies for an insurance whose surplus is modelled by threshold-based dividend and capital injection policies.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了漂移系数分段Lipschitz连续且具有阈值诱导间断的跳扩散系统的最优控制问题，通过结合Sobolev型一阶变分表示、光滑逼近和Ekeland变分原理，建立了必要和充分最优性条件，并应用于保险公司的保费调整与准备金管理。
AI.motivation: 经典随机最大值原理(SMP)依赖全局光滑性假设，无法处理漂移系数分段Lipschitz连续且含有阈值间断的跳扩散系统。这类系统在保险盈余管理（如分红与资本注入策略）等实际应用中自然出现，因此需要发展新的最优性条件。
AI.method: 采用Sobolev型表示刻画一阶变分过程，结合光滑逼近技术处理非光滑性，并利用Ekeland变分原理建立必要与充分最优性条件。
AI.result: 成功建立了适用于分段Lipschitz连续漂移系数的跳扩散系统的最优控制必要与充分条件，拓展了经典SMP的适用范围。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的理论框架有效解决了阈值诱导间断下的随机最优控制问题，并在保险最优保费调整与准备金管理政策中得到了应用验证。

title: Estimating the Black-box LLM Uncertainty with Distribution-Aligned Adversarial Distillation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have progressed rapidly in complex reasoning and question answering, yet LLM hallucination remains a central bottleneck that hinders practical deployment, especially for commercial black-box LLMs accessible only via APIs. Existing uncertainty quantification methods typically depend on computationally expensive multiple sampling or internal parameters, which prevents real-time estimation and fails to capture information implicit in the black-box reasoning process. To address this issue, we propose Distribution-Aligned Adversarial Distillation (DisAAD), which introduces a generation-discrimination architecture to guide a lightweight proxy model to learn the high-quality regions of the output distribution of the black-box LLM, thus effectively endowing it with the ability to know whether the black-box LLM knows or not. Subsequently, we use the proxy model to reproduce the specific responses of the black-box LLM and estimate the corresponding uncertainty based on evidence learning. Extensive experiments have verified the effectiveness and promise of our proposed method, indicating that a proxy model even one that only accounts for 1\% of the target LLM's size can achieve reliable uncertainty quantification.

AI.tldr: 提出DisAAD框架，通过生成-判别架构训练轻量级代理模型来学习黑盒LLM的输出分布，从而实现对黑盒LLM响应的不确定性量化，即使代理模型规模仅为目标LLM的1%也能有效工作。
AI.motivation: 黑盒LLM（仅通过API访问）的幻觉问题严重阻碍实际部署，现有不确定性量化方法依赖昂贵的多次采样或内部参数，无法实时估计且无法捕捉黑盒推理过程中的隐含信息。
AI.method: 提出Distribution-Aligned Adversarial Distillation (DisAAD)，包含生成-判别架构，通过对抗蒸馏训练轻量级代理模型学习黑盒LLM输出分布的高质量区域，然后利用代理模型复现黑盒LLM的响应，并基于证据学习估计不确定性。
AI.result: 大量实验验证了方法的有效性和前景，即使代理模型规模仅为目标LLM的1%，也能实现可靠的不确定性量化。
AI.conclusion: DisAAD能够高效地对黑盒LLM进行不确定性量化，为解决LLM幻觉问题提供了新思路。

title: LANTERN: LLM-Augmented Neurosymbolic Transfer with Experience-Gated Reasoning Networks
summary: Transfer learning in reinforcement learning (RL) seeks to accelerate learning in new tasks by leveraging knowledge from related sources. Existing neurosymbolic transfer methods, however, typically rely on manually specified task automata, assume a single source task, and use fixed knowledge-integration mechanisms that cannot adapt to varying source relevance. We propose LANTERN, a unified framework for multi-source neurosymbolic transfer that addresses these limitations through three components: (i) deterministic finite automata generated from natural language task descriptions using large language models, (ii) semantic embedding-based aggregation of multiple source policies weighted by cross-task similarity, and (iii) adaptive teacher-student gating based on temporal-difference error and semantic uncertainty. Across domains spanning resource management, navigation, and control, LANTERN achieves 40-60% improvements in sample efficiency over existing baselines while remaining robust to poorly aligned sources. These results demonstrate that multi-source, adaptively weighted neurosymbolic transfer can improve scalability and robustness in symbolic RL settings.

AI.tldr: LANTERN提出了一种多源神经符号迁移学习框架，通过LLM生成任务自动机、语义嵌入聚合多源策略、以及基于TD误差和语义不确定性的自适应门控机制，在资源管理、导航和控制等领域实现了40-60%的样本效率提升。
AI.motivation: 现有神经符号迁移方法依赖手动指定任务自动机、假设单源任务、使用固定的知识集成机制，无法适应不同源的相关性变化，限制了可扩展性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 三个核心组件：(i) 利用大语言模型从自然语言任务描述生成确定性有限自动机；(ii) 基于语义嵌入的多源策略聚合，按跨任务相似度加权；(iii) 基于时序差分误差和语义不确定性的自适应教师-学生门控机制。
AI.result: 在资源管理、导航和控制等多个领域，相比现有基线方法，样本效率提升40-60%，且对低质量源具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 多源、自适应加权的神经符号迁移能够提升符号RL设置下的可扩展性和鲁棒性。

title: Evolutionary fine tuning of quantized convolution-based deep learning models
summary: Deep learning models are the most efficient models in many machine learning tasks. The main disadvantage when using them in IoT, mobile devices, independent autonomous or real-time systems is their complexity and memory size. Therefore, much research has concentrated on compression techniques of deep learning architectures. One of the most popular technique is quantization. In most of the works, the quantization is done based on the nearest neighbour quantization technique. This work focuses on improving the quantization efficiency in pretrained and quantized models. This approach has the potential to improve the final accuracy of quantized models. The main postulate of the work is that final quantization states of the network based on nearest neighbour rounding does not guarantee optimal accuracy. In the presented work, the evolution strategy is used as an optimization approach. The evolution in each iteration changes the values of the small percentage of weights. It shifts theirs values to different quantization states. The work shows that proposed evolution with an appropriate set of operators and parameters can fast improve the accuracy of the quantized models. The results are presented for popular architectures such as VGG and Resnet for image classification and detection. Additionally, simulations were carried out for the autoencoder architecture.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用进化策略优化深度神经网络的量化过程，通过迭代微调少量权重的量化状态，以提升量化模型的准确率，在VGG、ResNet和自编码器上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在IoT、移动设备等场景部署受限，现有最近邻量化方法无法保证最优精度，需要更高效的量化优化技术。
AI.method: 采用进化策略（Evolution Strategy）优化量化模型：每次迭代仅改变少量权重的量化状态，通过精心设计的操作子和参数快速提升精度。
AI.result: 在VGG、ResNet（图像分类与检测）及自编码器架构上验证，进化策略能快速提升量化后模型的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 最近邻量化不是最优方案，进化策略可有效改进量化模型的精度，且收敛速度快，具有实际部署潜力。

title: FAB: A First-Order AB-based Gradient Algorithm for Distributed Bilevel Optimization over Time-Varying Directed Graphs
summary: Distributed optimization over time-varying directed graphs has shown promising performance in addressing challenges posed by complex communication constraints in real-world scenarios. In many practical settings, however, the direct application of distributed optimization algorithms encounters additional difficulties, most notably hyperparameter tuning, which our empirical observations suggest can be effectively mitigated by integrating bilevel optimization. Motivated by these findings, we study distributed bilevel optimization over time-varying directed networks, a problem that remains largely unexplored due to the compounded challenges arising from consensus bias in dynamic unbalanced communication and the nested optimization structure. In this work, we propose a fully first-order distributed gradient-based algorithm that integrates the Push-Pull (also known as AB) communication strategy with a value function-based penalty method and establish its non-asymptotic convergence properties. Notably, a simplified variant of our analysis framework for nonconvex single-level distributed optimization establishes a convergence rate for the Push-Pull algorithm, thereby resolving an open question concerning its convergence over time-varying directed graphs. Empirical evaluations across diverse tasks, including hyperparameter tuning, data hyper-cleaning, and reinforcement learning, validate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文针对时变有向图上的分布式双层优化问题，提出了一种融合Push-Pull通信策略与基于值函数的罚方法的一阶梯度算法，并证明了其非渐近收敛性。该工作还解决了Push-Pull算法在时变有向图上收敛性的一个开放问题，并通过超参数调优、数据超清洗和强化学习等任务验证了算法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 分布式优化在时变有向图中面临超参数调优困难，经验观察表明双层优化可缓解此问题。然而，由于动态不平衡通信中的共识偏差和嵌套优化结构的双重挑战，时变有向网络上的分布式双层优化问题尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出一种全一阶分布式梯度算法，将Push-Pull（AB）通信策略与基于值函数的罚方法相结合，并建立了非渐近收敛性分析。此外，通过简化分析框架，为单层非凸分布式优化中的Push-Pull算法建立了收敛速率，解决了其关于时变有向图收敛性的开放问题。
AI.result: 在超参数调优、数据超清洗和强化学习等多个任务上的实证评估验证了所提算法的有效性和高效性。理论方面，解决了Push-Pull算法在时变有向图上收敛性的开放问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究了时变有向网络上的分布式双层优化问题，提出的算法在理论和实验层面均展现出良好性能，为分布式优化在复杂通信环境下的应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Towards Reliable LLM Evaluation: Correcting the Winner's Curse in Adaptive Benchmarking
summary: Adaptive prompt and program search makes LLM evaluation selection-sensitive. Once benchmark items are reused inside tuning, the observed winner's score need not estimate the fresh-data performance of the full tune-then-deploy procedure. We study inference for this procedure-level target under explicit tuning budgets. We propose SIREN, a selection-aware repeated-split reporting protocol that freezes the post-search shortlist, separates splitwise selection from held-out evaluation, and uses an item-level Gaussian multiplier bootstrap for uncertainty quantification. In a fixed-shortlist regime with smooth stabilized selection, the estimator admits a first-order item-level representation, and the bootstrap yields valid simultaneous inference on a finite budget grid. This supports confidence intervals for procedure-performance curves and pre-specified equal-budget and cross-budget comparisons. Controlled simulations and MMLU-Pro tuning experiments show that winner-based reporting can be optimistic and can change deployment conclusions, while SIREN remains close to the finite-sample reporting target.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIREN协议，解决自适应提示/程序搜索中LLM评估的选择偏差问题，通过冻结候选集、分离选择与评估、使用项目级高斯自助法进行不确定性量化，实现对调优-部署全流程性能的可靠推断。
AI.motivation: 在自适应提示/程序搜索中，LLM评估存在选择敏感性：当基准测试项被重复用于调优时，观察到的胜者分数并不能准确估计完整“调优-部署”流程在新数据上的性能。现有方法缺乏对这一流程级目标的统计推断。
AI.method: 提出SIREN报告协议：(1) 冻结搜索后的短名单；(2) 将逐折选择与保留评估分离；(3) 使用项目级高斯乘子自助法进行不确定性量化。在固定短名单和平滑稳定选择设定下，估计量具有一阶项目级表示，自助法可在有限预算网格上实现有效的同时推断。
AI.result: 控制仿真和MMLU-Pro调优实验表明，基于胜者的报告过于乐观且可能改变部署结论；而SIREN的估计值更接近有限样本的真实报告目标。
AI.conclusion: SIREN为调优-部署流程性能提供了置信区间和跨预算比较的有效工具，有效纠正了自适应搜索中的选择偏差问题。

title: WARP: A Benchmark for Primal-Dual Warm-Starting of Interior-Point Solvers
summary: Solving AC Optimal Power Flow (AC-OPF) is of central importance in electricity market operations, where interior-point methods (IPMs) such as IPOPT are the standard solvers. A growing body of work uses machine learning to predict primal warm-start iterates, reporting iteration reductions of 30-46\%. We show that these reported gains rest on an inappropriate evaluation baseline: prior methods benchmark against the flat start $V_m = 1, V_a = 0$, whereas the solver's actual default - the variable-bound midpoint $(l+u)/2$ - is near-optimal for log-barrier centrality. Against this corrected baseline, no primal-only warm-start method reduces solver iterations. We trace the failure to a geometric property of interior-point methods: primal prediction accuracy is anticorrelated with convergence speed, and providing the ground-truth optimal solution $x^*$ without dual variables causes the solver to diverge. Oracle experiments establish that the complete primal-dual-barrier state $(x^*, λ^*, z^*, μ^*)$ reduces IPOPT iterations from 23 to 3 - an 85\% reduction that is structurally inaccessible to primal-only methods. To enable rigorous evaluation of warm-start methods on this task, we release a benchmark suite comprising dual-labeled AC-OPF datasets with IPOPT-extracted solutions, a corrected evaluation protocol, and WARP - a topology-conditioned encode-process-decode interaction network that predicts the full interior-point state $(\hat{x}, \hatλ, \hat{z}, \hatμ)$ on the heterogeneous constraint graph. WARP achieves a 76\% reduction in IPOPT iterations while natively accommodating N-1 contingency topology variations without retraining.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示现有基于机器学习的AC-OPF热启动方法因使用不恰当的基线（flat start）而高估性能。实际求解器默认的变量边界中点基线已接近最优。纯原始变量预测方法无效，甚至提供真实最优解也会导致发散。完整预测原始-对偶-障碍状态可大幅减少迭代次数（85%），作者提出WARP网络实现76%的迭代减少，并发布基准测试套件。
AI.motivation: AC最优潮流问题是电力市场运营的核心，现有工作声称用机器学习预测原始热启动变量可减少30-46%迭代次数。作者怀疑这些增益源于不恰当的评估基线（flat start），而非方法本身的有效性，因此重新审视并纠正评估标准。
AI.method: 1. 指出先前工作使用错误的基线（flat start），实际求解器默认是变量边界中点$(l+u)/2$，后者对对数障碍中心性而言接近最优。2. 通过实验证明纯原始变量预测与收敛速度反相关，甚至提供真实最优解$x^*$而无对偶变量会导致求解器发散。3. 提出完整预测原始-对偶-障碍状态$(x^*, λ^*, z^*, μ^*)$可减少IPOPT迭代85%。4. 提出WARP网络，一种拓扑条件化的编码-处理-解码交互网络，在异构约束图上预测完整内点状态，支持N-1拓扑变化无需重训练。
AI.result: 在纠正基线后，纯原始变量热启动方法无法减少求解器迭代次数。提供完整原始-对偶-障碍状态可从23次迭代减少到3次（85%）。WARP网络实现76%的迭代减少，且能原生适应N-1拓扑变化。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习热启动AC-OPF必须同时预测原始和对偶变量，纯原始预测方法无效。作者发布了包含对偶标签的基准测试套件、纠正的评估协议以及WARP网络，为未来工作提供正确的评估标准。

title: FinRAG-12B: A Production-Validated Recipe for Grounded Question Answering in Banking
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly being adopted across various domains. However, their adoption in banking industry faces resistance due to demands for high accuracy, regulatory compliance, and the need for verifiable and grounded responses.
