AI.method: AlphaCrafter包含三个智能体：(1) Miner通过LLM引导搜索持续扩展因子池；(2) Screener评估市场状态构建基于市场体制的因子组合；(3) Trader在风险约束下将因子组合转化为量化策略，三者构成闭环横截面交易系统。
AI.result: 在CSI 300和S&P 500上，AlphaCrafter在风险调整收益上持续优于基线，且跨试验方差最低。
AI.conclusion: 集成且自适应的因子到执行设计能够产生稳健的交易表现，填补了全自动理性驱动量化管线的空白。

title: Neural Co-state Policies: Structuring Hidden States in Recurrent Reinforcement Learning
summary: A key capability of intelligent agents is operating under partial observability: reasoning and acting effectively despite missing or incomplete state observations. While recurrent (memory-based) policies learned via reinforcement learning address this by encoding history into latent state representations, their internal dynamics remain uninterpretable black boxes. This paper establishes a formal link between these hidden states and the Pontryagin minimum principle (PMP) from optimal control. We demonstrate that for standard recurrent architectures, latent representations map directly to PMP co-states, which allows the readout layer to be interpreted as performing Hamiltonian minimization. Because standard reward maximization does not naturally discover this alignment, we introduce a PMP-derived co-state loss to explicitly structure the internal dynamics. Empirically, this approach matches or improves performance on partially observable DMControl tasks, and is robust against zero-shot out-of-distribution sensor masking. By framing recurrent networks as dynamic processes governed by the minimum principle, we provide a principled approach to designing robust continuous control policies.

AI.tldr: 本文建立神经网络隐状态与庞特里亚金最小原理（PMP）协态之间的形式化联系，通过引入PMP协态损失函数来结构化循环网络的内部动力学，在部分可观测控制任务中取得与基线相当或更优的表现，并对传感器遮蔽具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 强化学习中基于记忆（循环神经网络）的策略在部分可观测环境下表现良好，但其内部隐藏状态的动态过程是不透明、不可解释的黑盒。本文旨在建立理论框架来解释这些隐状态，并利用最优控制原理来结构化其动力学。
AI.method: 1）理论上证明标准循环架构的隐状态与PMP协态（costate）之间存在直接映射关系，读出层执行哈密顿量最小化。2）由于标准奖励最大化不会自然发现这种对齐，引入PMP衍生的协态损失函数来显式结构化内部动力学。
AI.result: 在部分可观测的DMControl任务上，该方法匹配或提升了性能表现，并且在零样本的域外传感器遮蔽场景下表现出鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 将循环网络视为受最小原理支配的动态过程，为设计鲁棒的连续控制策略提供了一种有理论依据的方法，实现了可解释性与性能之间的平衡。

title: Beyond the Independence Assumption: Finite-Sample Guarantees for Deep Q-Learning under $τ$-Mixing
summary: Finite-sample analyses of deep Q-learning typically treat replayed data as independent, even though it is sampled from temporally dependent state-action trajectories. We study the Deep Q-networks (DQN) algorithm under explicit dependence by modelling the minibatches used for updating the network as $τ$-mixing. We show that this assumption holds under certain dependence conditions on the underlying trajectories and the mechanism used to sample minibatches. Building on this observation, we extend statistical analyses of DQN with fully connected ReLU architectures to dependent data. We formulate each update as a nonparametric regression problem with $τ$-mixing observations and derive finite-sample risk bounds under this dependence structure. Our results show that temporal dependence leads to a degradation in the statistical rate by inducing an additional dimensionality penalty in the rate exponent, reflecting the reduced effective sample size of $τ$-mixing data. Moreover, we derive the sample complexity of DQN under $tau$-mixing from these risk bounds. Finally, we empirically demonstrate on standard Gymnasium environments that the independence assumption is systematically violated and that replay sampling yields approximately exponentially decaying correlations, supporting our theoretical framework.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度Q学习（DQN）在依赖数据（τ-混合过程）下的有限样本分析，证明了回放缓冲区中的时序依赖性会导致统计速率退化，并引入了额外的维度惩罚项，同时通过实验验证了独立性假设的违背以及回放采样产生近似指数衰减的相关性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度Q学习的有限样本分析通常假设回放数据是独立的，但实际上数据来自时序依赖的状态-动作轨迹。作者旨在填补这一理论与实际之间的差距，在显式考虑时序依赖性的情况下分析DQN的统计性质。
AI.method: 1) 将DQN更新中用到的minibatch建模为τ-混合过程，并证明该假设在特定依赖条件下成立；2) 将每次更新视为非参数回归问题，结合τ-混合观测进行分析；3) 推导全连接ReLU架构DQN在依赖数据下的有限样本风险界；4) 从风险界推导样本复杂度；5) 在标准Gymnasium环境中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 1) 时序依赖性导致统计速率退化，具体表现为在率指数中引入额外的维度惩罚项，反映了τ-混合数据的有效样本量减少；2) 推导了τ-混合条件下DQN的样本复杂度；3) 实验表明独立性假设被系统性地违背，回放采样产生近似指数衰减的相关性，支持了理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 本文为理解深度Q学习在真实依赖数据下的行为提供了理论基础，揭示了时序依赖性对学习效率的负面影响机制，并验证了τ-混合建模的合理性。

title: More Aligned, Less Diverse? Analyzing the Grammar and Lexicon of Two Generations of LLMs
summary: This study contributes to a growing line of research in comparing LLM-generated texts with human-authored text, in this case, English news text. We focus in particular on the evaluation of syntactic properties through formal grammar frameworks. Our analysis compares two generations of LLMs in the context of two human-authored English news datasets from two different years. Employing the Head-Driven Phrase Structure Grammar (HPSG) formalism, we investigate the distributions of syntactic structures and lexical types of AI-generated texts and contrast them with the corresponding distributions in the human-authored New York Times (NYT) articles. We use diversity metrics from ecology and information theory to quantify variation in grammatical constructions and lexical types. We show that English news text has changed little in the given time frame, while newer LLMs display reduced syntactic and, especially, lexical diversity compared to older, non-instruction-tuned models. These findings point to future work in studying effects of instruction tuning, which, while enhancing coherence and adherence to prompts, may narrow the expressive range of model output.

AI.tldr: 本文使用HPSG形式语法框架，比较两代LLM生成的英文新闻文本与人类撰写新闻（NYT）的句法和词汇多样性。研究发现，人类新闻文本随时间变化不大，而较新的LLM（经过指令微调）相比旧模型在句法和词汇多样性上有所下降，提示指令微调可能限制了模型的表达范围。
AI.motivation: 目前对LLM生成文本与人类文本的比较研究日益增多，但大多关注风格或语义层面，缺乏对句法结构分布的系统性量化分析。本文旨在通过严格的形式语法框架（HPSG）来评估两类文本在句法层面的差异。
AI.method: 采用中心语驱动短语结构语法（HPSG）作为分析框架，比较两代LLM生成文本与两个年份的人类作者纽约时报（NYT）语料。引入生态学和信息论中的多样性指标，量化句法结构和词汇类型的分布差异。
AI.result: 人类英文新闻文本在给定时间范围内变化很小；较新的LLM（指令微调模型）相比旧模型（非指令微调）展示出更低的句法多样性，尤其是词汇多样性显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 指令微调虽然增强了文本的连贯性和对提示的遵循程度，但可能以牺牲表达多样性为代价，缩小了模型输出的句法和词汇范围，为未来研究指令微调对语言多样性的影响提供了方向。

title: Belief Memory: Agent Memory Under Partial Observability
summary: LLM agents that operate over long context depend on external memory to accumulate knowledge over time. However, existing methods typically store each observation as a single deterministic conclusion (e.g., inferring "API~X failed" from temporary errors), even though such observations are inherently partial and potentially ambiguous. By committing to one conclusion and discarding uncertainty, these methods introduce self-reinforcing error: the agent acts on the stored conclusion, never revisits alternatives, and reinforces the conclusion over time. To address this issue, we propose BeliefMem, which shifts the memory paradigm from committing to a single conclusion per observation to retaining multiple candidate conclusions with their probabilities. Concretely, BeliefMem stores the candidate conclusions as separate memory entries, each carrying a probability that is updated via Noisy-OR rules as new observations arrive. At retrieval, all candidates surface together with their probabilities, keeping alternatives visible to the agent. Since each conclusion in memory retains its probability, BeliefMem preserves the uncertainty that the deterministic paradigm discards, enabling the agent to act with high confidence on well-evidenced knowledge while retaining the capacity to update its confidence when new evidence arrives. Empirical evaluations on LoCoMo and ALFWorld benchmarks show that, even with limited data, BeliefMem achieves the best average performance, remarkably outperforming well-known baselines. More broadly, such probabilistic memory produces substantial gains and explores a new direction for agent memory in partially observable environments.

AI.tldr: 提出BeliefMem，一种概率记忆框架，将观察存储为多个候选结论及其概率，而非单一确定性结论，通过Noisy-OR规则更新概率，从而保留不确定性，避免错误自我强化，在LoCoMo和ALFWorld上取得最佳平均性能。
AI.motivation: 现有外部记忆方法将每个观察存储为单一确定性结论，忽略了观察的局部性和模糊性，导致自我强化错误（self-reinforcing error）：代理一旦采纳某个结论便不再回访替代假设，随时间推移该结论被不断强化，而潜在错误无法纠正。
AI.method: BeliefMem将每个观察的多个候选结论作为独立记忆条目存储，每条携带一个概率；利用Noisy-OR规则随新观察到达更新各候选概率；检索时所有候选及其概率同时呈现给代理，保留不确定性信息，使代理可在证据充分时高置信度行动，同时保留证据变化时更新置信度的能力。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo和ALFWorld基准上，即使数据有限，BeliefMem在平均性能上达到最优，显著优于多个知名基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 这种概率记忆范式在部分可观测环境下为智能体记忆开辟了新方向，能有效处理观察的不确定性，避免确定性记忆带来的错误累积。

title: Conditional Diffusion Under Linear Constraints: Langevin Mixing and Information-Theoretic Guarantees
summary:
We study zero-shot conditional sampling with pretrained diffusion models for linear inverse problems, including inpainting and super-resolution. In these problems, the observation determines only part of the unknown signal. The remaining degrees of freedom must be sampled according to the correct conditional data distribution. Existing projection-based samplers enforce measurement consistency by correcting the observed component during reverse diffusion. However, measurement consistency alone does not determine how probability mass should be distributed along the feasible set, and this can lead to biased conditional samples.
  We analyze this issue through a normal--tangent decomposition of the score function. For Gaussian noising, the observed-direction score is exactly determined by the measurement; only the tangent conditional score is unknown. We prove that the error from replacing this score by the unconditional tangent score is upper bounded by a dimension-free conditional mutual information between observed and unobserved components. This gives an information-theoretic decomposition into initialization and pathwise score-mismatch errors. Motivated by the theory, we propose a projected-Langevin initialization followed by guided reverse denoising, which outperforms a strong projection-based baseline in inpainting and super-resolution experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于预训练扩散模型的零样本条件采样（用于线性逆问题，如图像修补和超分辨率），分析了投影式采样器在条件分布上的偏差，提出了一种基于投影-朗之万初始化和引导式反向去噪的方法，并在理论上给出了分数匹配误差的信息论上界。
AI.motivation: 现有的投影式条件采样器仅强制观测分量的一致性，但无法正确分配可行集上的概率质量，导致条件样本有偏。需要从理论上理解偏差来源并提出更优的方法。
AI.method: 通过分数函数的法向-切向分解，证明观测方向分数由测量精确确定，切向条件分数未知。推导了用无条件切向分数替代的误差上界（由条件互信息决定），提出投影-朗之万初始化+引导式反向去噪方法。
AI.result: 在图像修补和超分辨率实验中，所提方法优于强投影式基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 条件互信息给出了初始化误差和路径分数匹配误差的信息论分解，为设计更好的条件扩散采样器提供了理论指导。

title: Decoupled PFNs: Identifiable Epistemic-Aleatoric Decomposition via Structured Synthetic Priors
summary: Prior-Fitted Networks (PFNs) amortize Bayesian prediction by meta-learning over a synthetic task prior, but their standard output is a posterior predictive distribution over noisy observations. For sequential decision-making, such as active learning and Bayesian optimization, acquisition should prioritize epistemic uncertainty about the latent signal rather than irreducible aleatoric observation noise. We show that this epistemic--aleatoric split is not identifiable in general from the posterior predictive distribution alone, even when that distribution is known exactly. We then exploit a distinctive advantage of PFNs: because the synthetic data-generating process is under our control, each task can contain an explicit latent signal and noise function, and the generator can provide query-level labels for both the noiseless target and the observation-noise variance. We use these labels to train a decoupled PFN with separate latent-signal and aleatoric heads. The observation-level predictive is induced by convolving the latent signal distribution with the learned noise model. Empirically, epistemic-only acquisition mitigates the failure mode of total-variance exploration in noisy and heteroscedastic settings. In matched comparisons, decoupled models usually improve over tuned observation-level baselines, with the clearest gains in HPO; in broader sweeps, a decoupled model obtains the best average rank in both HPO and synthetic BO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出解耦先验拟合网络（Decoupled PFN），通过分离信号后验与噪声模型，解决贝叶斯主动学习中认知不确定性（epistemic）与偶然不确定性（aleatoric）的不可辨识问题，从而提升决策性能。
AI.motivation: 标准PFN输出的是含噪声的后验预测分布，无法区分认知不确定性（应优先探索）与偶然不确定性（不可约噪声），导致主动学习/贝叶斯优化中获取函数失效。
AI.method: 在合成数据生成过程中显式分解潜在信号与噪声函数，训练具有独立信号头与噪声头的解耦PFN；预测时通过将信号分布与学习到的噪声模型卷积得到观测级分布。
AI.result: 仅认知不确定性的获取函数在噪声场景下避免了总方差探索的失败模式；在HPO和合成BO中解耦模型平均排名最优。
AI.conclusion: 利用PFN合成数据生成可控性的优势，通过显式解耦认知与偶然不确定性，显著提升序列决策任务中的样本效率与鲁棒性。

title: Navigating by Old Maps: The Pitfalls of Static Mechanistic Localization in LLM Post-Training
summary: The "Locate-then-Update" paradigm has become a predominant approach in the post-training of large language models (LLMs), identifying critical components via mechanistic interpretability for targeted parameter updates. However, this paradigm rests on a fundamental yet unverified assumption: can mechanisms derived from current static parameters reliably guide future dynamic parameter updates? To investigate this, we systematically track the structural evolution of Transformer circuits throughout the supervised fine-tuning (SFT) process, revealing the underlying dynamics of task mechanisms. We introduce three novel metrics-Circuit Distance, Circuit Stability, and Circuit Conflict-to analyze circuit evolution across three dimensions: neural migration, semantic stability, and cross-task interference. Our empirical results reveal that circuits inherently exhibit "Free Evolution" during parameter updates. Consequently, static mechanisms extracted from current states inevitably suffer from temporal latency, making them fundamentally inadequate for guiding future states. Moreover, by deconstructing the "illusion of effectiveness" in existing methods, this work underscores the necessity of "foresight" in mechanistic localization and proposes a predictive framework for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了“定位-更新”范式在LLM后训练中的基本假设，通过追踪SFT过程中Transformer电路的演化，发现电路存在“自由演化”特性，导致静态机制无法有效指导未来参数更新，并提出了预测性框架。
AI.motivation: 质疑“Locate-then-Update”范式的根本假设：当前静态参数中推导的机制是否能可靠地指导未来的动态参数更新？
AI.method: 系统性追踪SFT过程中Transformer电路的结构演化，提出三个新指标：Circuit Distance（电路距离）、Circuit Stability（电路稳定性）、Circuit Conflict（电路冲突），从神经迁移、语义稳定性和跨任务干扰三个维度分析电路演化。
AI.result: 发现电路在参数更新过程中固有地表现出“自由演化”特性；静态机制存在时间延迟，无法充分指导未来状态；解构了现有方法的“有效性幻觉”。
AI.conclusion: 强调了机制定位中“预见性”的必要性，并提出了一个用于未来研究的预测性框架。

title: Causal Probing for Internal Visual Representations in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Despite the remarkable success of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) across diverse tasks, the internal mechanisms governing how they encode and ground distinct visual concepts remain poorly understood. To bridge this gap, we propose a causal framework based on activation steering to actively probe and manipulate internal visual representations. Through systematic intervention across four visual concept categories, our results reveal a divergence in concept encoding: entities exhibit distinct localized memorization, whereas abstract concepts are globally distributed across the network. Critically, this divergence uncovers a mechanistic driver of scaling laws: increasing model depth is indispensable for encoding distributed and complex abstract concepts, whereas entity localization remains remarkably invariant to scale. Furthermore, reverse steering uncovers that blocking explicit output triggers a surge in latent activations, exposing a compensatory mechanism between perception and generation. Finally, extending our analysis to visual reasoning, we expose a disconnect between perception and reasoning although MLLMs successfully recognize geometric relations, they treat them merely as static visual features, failing to trigger the procedural execution necessary for abstract problem-solving.

AI.tldr: 本文通过激活转向的因果框架探究多模态大语言模型(MLLM)内部视觉概念的编码机制，发现实体概念呈局部记忆化编码，而抽象概念呈全局分布式编码；这种差异揭示了缩放定律的机械驱动力——深度增加对编码分布式抽象概念不可或缺；反向转向实验暴露了感知与生成之间的补偿机制；视觉推理分析表明MLLM将几何关系视为静态视觉特征而非触发程序化执行，揭示了感知与推理之间的脱节。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型虽在各类任务中表现优异，但其内部如何编码和接地不同视觉概念的机制仍不清楚，因此需要因果框架来主动探测和操纵内部视觉表征。
AI.method: 基于激活转向(activation steering)的因果框架，通过系统性干预四种视觉概念类别(实体与抽象概念)的表示，结合反向转向实验和视觉推理分析来探究编码机制。
AI.result: (1)实体概念表现为局部记忆化编码，抽象概念呈全局分布式编码；(2)模型深度增加对编码分布式抽象概念至关重要；(3)反向转向揭示感知与生成间存在补偿机制；(4)MLLM将几何关系当作静态视觉特征而非触发程序化推理。
AI.conclusion: MLLM的视觉概念编码存在实体与抽象的本质性差异，这种差异驱动了缩放定律；当前模型在感知与推理之间仍存在根本性脱节，缺乏真正的抽象推理能力。

title: Two-Stage Learned Decomposition for Scalable Routing on Multigraphs
summary: Most neural methods for Vehicle Routing Problems (VRPs) are limited to Euclidean settings or simple graphs. In this work, we instead consider multigraphs, where parallel edges represent distinct travel options with varying trade-offs (e.g., distance vs time). Few methods are designed for such formulations and those that do exist face major scalability issues. We mitigate these scalability issues via a Node-Edge Policy Factorization (NEPF) approach, which splits the routing policy into a node permutation stage and an edge selection stage. To enable the decomposition, we introduce a pre-encoding edge aggregation scheme and a non-autoregressive architecture for the edge stage, as well as a hierarchical reinforcement learning method to train the stages jointly. Our experiments across six VRP variants demonstrate that NEPF matches or outperforms the state-of-the-art in terms of solution quality, while being significantly faster in training and inference.

AI.tldr: 提出节点-边策略分解（NEPF）方法，将多图VRP策略拆分为节点排列和边选择两个阶段，通过预编码边聚合、非自回归边架构和分层强化学习联合训练，在六个VRP变体上实现与现有方法相当或更优的求解质量，同时显著提升训练和推理速度。
AI.motivation: 现有神经VRP方法多局限于欧几里得设置或简单图，难以处理具有并行边（多种出行选项）的多图场景，且已有方法存在严重的可扩展性问题。
AI.method: 提出节点-边策略分解（NEPF）方法：将路由策略分解为节点排列阶段和边选择阶段；引入预编码边聚合方案和非自回归架构处理边阶段；采用分层强化学习联合训练两个阶段。
AI.result: 在六个VRP变体上的实验表明，NEPF在求解质量上匹配或超越现有最优方法，同时在训练和推理速度上显著更快。
AI.conclusion: NEPF有效解决了多图VRP中的可扩展性问题，证明了策略分解在复杂路由场景中的潜力和效率优势。

title: Milestone-Guided Policy Learning for Long-Horizon Language Agents
summary: While long-horizon agentic tasks require language agents to perform dozens of sequential decisions, training such agents with reinforcement learning remains challenging. We identify two root causes: credit misattribution, where correct early actions are penalized due to terminal failures, and sample inefficiency, where scarce successful trajectories result in near-total loss of learning signal. We introduce a milestone-guided policy learning framework, BEACON, that leverages the compositional structure of long-horizon tasks to ensure precise credit assignment. BEACON partitions trajectories at milestone boundaries, applies temporal reward shaping within segments to credit partial progress, and estimates advantages at dual scales to prevent distant failures from corrupting the evaluation of local actions. On ALFWorld, WebShop, and ScienceWorld, BEACON consistently outperforms GRPO and GiGPO. Notably, on long-horizon ALFWorld tasks, BEACON achieves 92.9% success rate, nearly doubling GRPO's 53.5%, while improving effective sample utilization from 23.7% to 82.0%. These results establish milestone-anchored credit assignment as an effective paradigm for training long-horizon language agents. Code is available at https://github.com/ZJU-REAL/BEACON.

AI.tldr: BEACON 通过里程碑引导的策略学习框架，解决了长程智能体任务中强化学习的信用错误分配和样本效率低下问题，在多个基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 长程智能体任务中，强化学习面临两个核心难题：(1) 信用错误分配——正确的早期动作因最终失败而被错误惩罚；(2) 样本效率低下——成功轨迹稀少导致学习信号近乎完全丢失。现有方法无法解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出 BEACON 框架，利用长程任务的组合结构进行精确信用分配：(1) 在里程碑边界划分轨迹；(2) 在片段内进行时间奖励塑形以奖励局部进展；(3) 在双重尺度估计优势，防止远端失败污染局部动作评估。
AI.result: 在 ALFWorld、WebShop、ScienceWorld 上，BEACON 一致优于 GRPO 和 GiGPO。在长程 ALFWorld 任务中，成功率达 92.9%（GRPO 仅 53.5%），有效样本利用率从 23.7% 提升至 82.0%。
AI.conclusion: 里程碑锚定的信用分配是训练长程语言智能体的有效范式，为长程强化学习提供了新的解决思路。

title: Prober.ai: Gated Inquiry-Based Feedback via LLM-Constrained Personas for Argumentative Writing Development
comment: Prototype awarded second place at the NYEdTech Hackathon (March 2026) https://www.nyedtechhackathon.com/2026-submissions
summary: The proliferation of large language models (LLMs) in educational settings has paradoxically undermined the cognitive processes they purport to support. Students increasingly outsource critical thinking to AI assistants that generate polished text on demand, resulting in measurable cognitive debt and diminished argumentative reasoning skills. We present Prober.ai, a web-based writing environment that inverts the conventional AI-tutoring paradigm: rather than generating or rewriting student text, the system constrains an LLM (Gemini 3 Flash Preview) through persona-specific system prompts and structured JSON output schemas to produce only targeted, inquiry-based questions about argumentative weaknesses. A two-phase interaction architecture -- Challenge and Unlock -- implements a pedagogical friction mechanism whereby revision suggestions are gated behind mandatory student reflection. The system's design is grounded in Toulmin's argumentation theory, research on peer feedforward questioning mechanisms, and evidence on AI-supported feedback in writing instruction. A functional prototype was developed in 36 hours during the NY EdTech Hackathon (March 2026), where it was awarded second place. We describe the system architecture, the prompt engineering methodology for constraining LLM output to pedagogically aligned JSON schemas, and discuss implications for scalable, cognition-preserving AI integration in writing education.

AI.tldr: Prober.ai 是一个基于网页的写作环境，通过逆向AI辅导范式——限制LLM仅生成针对论证弱点的探究性问题，并采用"挑战-解锁"两阶段交互机制强制学生反思——来解决学生因使用AI而导致的认知债务和论证推理能力下降问题。该系统在36小时内开发完成，并在NY EdTech黑客松中获得第二名。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在教育场景中的普及反而削弱了学生的认知过程：学生将批判性思维外包给AI助手，导致可测量的"认知债务"和论证推理能力下降。现有AI辅导范式（生成或改写学生文本）无法解决这一问题。
AI.method: 采用逆向AI辅导范式：通过角色特定的系统提示和结构化JSON输出模式，将LLM（Gemini 3 Flash Preview）约束为仅生成针对论证弱点的探究性问题。提出"挑战-解锁"两阶段交互架构，将修改建议的提供置于学生强制反思之后，实现教学性摩擦机制。理论基础包括Toulmin论证理论、同伴反馈前置提问机制以及AI辅助写作反馈研究。
AI.result: 在NY EdTech黑客松（2026年3月）中36小时内开发出功能原型，获得第二名。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了可扩展的、保护认知能力的AI写作教育整合方案，通过约束而非替代学生思考的系统设计，为AI在教育中的合理应用提供了新路径。

title: Differentiable Parameter Optimization for DAEs with State-Dependent Events
summary: Differential-algebraic equations (DAEs) with state-dependent events arise in systems whose continuous dynamics are constrained by algebraic equations and interrupted by mode changes, switching logic, impacts, or state reinitializations. Gradient-based parameter learning for such systems is challenging because algebraic variables are implicitly defined, event times depend on the parameters, and reset maps introduce discontinuities. This paper studies differentiable parameter optimization for semi-explicit DAEs with events. We formulate the learning problem as a constrained least-squares problem with DAE dynamics, algebraic constraints, guard equations, and reset maps. We then develop two complementary gradient-computation strategies. The first is an automatic-differentiation-through-simulation method that solves algebraic variables inside the vector field, differentiates the algebraic solve using the implicit function theorem, and handles events through segmented differentiable integration. The second is an explicit discrete-adjoint method that represents the forward simulation as an event-split residual system and computes gradients by solving for the Lagrange multipliers of smooth-segment and event residuals. The formulation clarifies that residual terms in the adjoint method are equality constraints, not heuristic penalties. We compare the two approaches in terms of gradient interpretation, event-time handling, implementation complexity, and local validity. Both methods provide gradients for the event path selected by the forward simulation and are valid under fixed event ordering and transversal guard crossings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了含事件驱动半显式微分代数方程（DAE）的可微参数优化问题，提出了两种互补的梯度计算方法：自动微分仿真法和显式离散伴随法，并对其进行了比较分析。
AI.motivation: 含状态相关事件的DAE系统在工程中广泛存在（如切换逻辑、碰撞等），但梯度学习面临代数变量隐式定义、事件时间依赖参数、重置映射不连续等挑战，亟需可微优化方法。
AI.method: 将学习问题建模为含DAE动力学、代数约束、守卫方程和重置映射的约束最小二乘问题；提出两种梯度策略：(1)自动微分仿真法——求解向量场中的代数变量，利用隐函数定理求导，通过分段可微积分处理事件；(2)显式离散伴随法——将正向仿真表示为事件分割残差系统，求解拉格朗日乘子计算梯度。
AI.result: 明确了伴随法中残差项为等式约束而非启发式惩罚项；两种方法均能为正向仿真选择的事件路径提供梯度，在固定事件顺序和横向守卫穿越条件下有效。
AI.conclusion: 从梯度解释、事件时间处理、实现复杂度、局部有效性等维度对两种方法进行了比较，为含事件DAE系统的可微参数学习提供了理论框架和实用方案。

title: Risk-Controlled Post-Processing of Decision Policies
summary: Predictive models are often deployed through existing decision policies that stakeholders are reluctant to change unless a risk constraint requires intervention. We study risk-controlled post-processing: given a deterministic baseline policy, choose a new policy that maximizes agreement with the baseline subject to a chance constraint on a user-specified loss. At the population level, we show that the optimal policy has a threshold structure: it follows the baseline except on contexts where switching to the oracle fallback policy yields a large reduction in conditional violation risk. At the finite-sample level, given a fitted fallback policy and score, we develop a post-processing algorithm that uses calibration data to select a threshold. Leveraging tools from algorithmic stability and stochastic processes, we show that under regularity conditions, in the i.i.d. setting, the expected excess risk of the post-processed policy is $O(\log n/n)$. In the special case when an exact-safe fallback policy is available, the algorithm achieves precise expected risk control under exchangeability. In this setting, we also give high-probability near-optimality guarantees on the post-processed policy. Experiments on a COVID-19 radiograph diagnosis task, an LLM routing problem, and a synthetic multiclass decision task show that targeted post-processing can meet or nearly meet risk budgets while preserving substantially more agreement with the baseline than score-blind random mixing.

AI.tldr: 本文研究风险控制下的后处理策略：给定一个确定性基线策略，在满足用户指定损失的机会约束下，最大化与新策略的一致性。最优策略具有阈值结构，仅在切换至"神谕回退策略"能大幅降低条件违规风险时才偏离基线。理论证明了在i.i.d.设定下期望超额风险率为O(log n/n)，实验验证了该方法在多个任务上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有预测模型往往通过既定的决策策略部署，利益相关者不愿轻易更改策略，除非风险约束要求干预。因此需要一种在满足风险约束的前提下，尽可能保持与原策略一致性的后处理方法。
AI.method: 提出风险控制后处理方法：给定基线策略，选择最大化与基线一致性的新策略，同时满足用户指定损失的机会约束。最优策略呈阈值结构：通常跟随基线，仅当切换到神谕回退策略能大幅降低条件违规风险时才切换。利用校准数据选择阈值，结合算法稳定性与随机过程工具，给出理论保证。
AI.result: 在i.i.d.设定下，后处理策略的期望超额风险率为O(log n/n)；当存在精确安全的回退策略时，可实现精确的期望风险控制并给出高概率近优性保证。实验表明在COVID-19放射诊断、LLM路由和合成多类决策任务中，该方法能在满足风险预算的同时，比盲目随机混合保留更多与基线的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的风险控制后处理方法在理论上具有严格的风险控制保证和最优性，实践上能有效平衡风险约束与策略一致性，为在实际部署中保留现有策略的同时满足风险要求提供了可行方案。

title: Uncovering Entity Identity Confusion in Multimodal Knowledge Editing
summary: Multimodal knowledge editing (MKE) aims to correct the internal knowledge of large vision-language models after deployment, yet the behavioral patterns of post-edit models remain underexplored. In this paper, we identify a systemic failure mode in edited models, termed Entity Identity Confusion (EIC): edited models exhibit an absurd behavior where text-only queries about the original entity's identity unexpectedly return information about the new entity. To rigorously investigate EIC, we construct EC-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark that directly probes how image-entity bindings shift before and after editing. Our analysis reveals that EIC stems from existing methods failing to distinguish between Image-Entity (I-E) binding and Entity-Entity (E-E) relational knowledge in the model, causing models to overfit E-E associations as a shortcut: the image is still perceived as the original entity, with the new entity's name serving only as a spurious identity label. We further explore potential mitigation strategies, showing that constraining edits to the model's I-E processing stage encourages edits to act more faithfully on I-E binding, thereby substantially reducing EIC. Based on these findings, we discuss principled desiderata for faithful MKE and provide methodological guidance for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文发现多模态知识编辑后的模型存在“实体身份混淆”（EIC）问题：文本查询原实体时错误返回新实体信息。通过构建EC-Bench诊断基准，揭示问题根源在于编辑方法混淆了图像-实体绑定与实体-实体关系知识，并提出通过约束编辑作用于图像-实体处理阶段来缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MKE方法主要关注编辑有效性，但缺乏对编辑后模型行为模式的深入分析，尤其是实体身份层面的异常表现。
AI.method: 1) 构建EC-Bench诊断基准，系统性检测编辑前后图像-实体绑定的变化；2) 通过分析揭示EIC的成因：模型将E-E关系作为捷径过度拟合，而图像仍被感知为原实体；3) 探索缓解策略，约束编辑作用于模型的I-E处理阶段。
AI.result: 发现编辑后模型存在系统性EIC故障：文本查询原实体身份时返回新实体信息；EIC源于现有方法无法区分I-E绑定与E-E关系知识；通过约束I-E阶段编辑可显著减少EIC。
AI.conclusion: 提出了忠实多模态知识编辑的原则性要求，为未来研究提供了方法论指导，强调编辑应作用于图像-实体绑定层面而非实体-实体关系层面。

title: Text-Graph Synergy: A Bidirectional Verification and Completion Framework for RAG
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become a core paradigm for enhancing factual grounding and multi-hop reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs). Traditional text-based RAG often retrieves logically irrelevant pseudo-evidence, while graph-based RAG is frequently hindered by search-time pruning, which may discard potentially valid reasoning paths. Existing hybrid approaches primarily adopt simple evidence concatenation or unidirectional enhancement, which fails to address the fundamental "Information Island" problem caused by asymmetric reasoning flows between unstructured text and structured graphs. We propose \textbf{TGS-RAG}, a unified framework for \textbf{T}ext-\textbf{G}raph \textbf{S}ynergistic enhancement. TGS-RAG introduces a bidirectional mechanism: (i) a \textbf{Graph-to-Text} channel that employs a Global Voting strategy from visited graph nodes to re-rank and refine textual evidence, filtering out semantic noise; and (ii) a \textbf{Text-to-Graph} channel that utilizes the \textbf{Memory-based Orphan Entity Bridging} algorithm. This algorithm utilizes textual cues to proactively resurrect valid but previously pruned reasoning paths from the search history without additional database overhead. Experimental results on multiple multi-hop reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that TGS-RAG significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving a superior balance between retrieval precision and computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: TGS-RAG提出了一种文本-图双向协同增强的统一框架，通过Graph-to-Text通道的全局投票策略和Text-to-Graph通道的记忆孤儿实体桥接算法，解决了非对称推理流导致的"信息孤岛"问题，在多跳推理基准上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统文本RAG常检索逻辑无关的伪证据，图RAG受搜索剪枝限制可能丢弃有效推理路径，现有混合方法仅简单拼接或单向增强，无法解决非对称推理流导致的"信息孤岛"问题。
AI.method: 提出TGS-RAG统一框架，包含双向机制：(1) Graph-to-Text通道：采用全局投票策略，利用已访问图节点重排序并精炼文本证据，过滤语义噪声；(2) Text-to-Graph通道：提出记忆孤儿实体桥接算法，利用文本线索从搜索历史中主动复活被剪枝的有效推理路径，无需额外数据库开销。
AI.result: 在多跳推理基准上显著优于SOTA基线，在检索精度和计算效率之间实现了更优平衡。
AI.conclusion: TGS-RAG通过文本与图的真正双向协同增强，有效解决了混合RAG中的信息孤岛问题，为多跳推理提供了更高效、更准确的检索增强方案。

title: Information Theoretic Adversarial Training of Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) remain vulnerable to adversarial prompting despite advances in alignment and safety, often exhibiting harmful behaviors under novel attack strategies. While adversarial training can improve robustness, existing approaches are computationally expensive and difficult to scale. Recent continuous adversarial training methods, such as Continuous adversarial training (CAT) and Continuous Adversarial Preference Optimization (CAPO), address this challenge by leveraging gradient-based perturbations in the embedding space, enabling more efficient and expressive attacks. Building on this paradigm, we propose WARDEN, a distributionally robust adversarial training framework for LLMs that dynamically reweights adversarial examples through an f -divergence ambiguity set around the empirical training distribution. Our method optimizes the worst-case adversarial loss within a divergence ball around the empirical data distribution, automatically emphasizing harder adversarial examples. Using the convex dual formulation, the objective reduces to a log-sum-exp form under the KL divergence, with a dynamical parameter controlling the strength of reweighting. This study leads to a new class of information-theoretic objectives that significantly reduce attack success rates while maintaining model utility. Across multiple LLMs and attack settings, WARDEN substantially reduces attack success rates with computational and utility costs comparable to CAT-, CAPO-, and MixAT-based baselines, making it a practical approach for scalable robust alignment.

AI.tldr: WARDEN提出了一种基于分布鲁棒优化的对抗训练框架，通过f-散度模糊集动态重加权对抗样本，在保持计算效率和模型实用性的同时，显著降低了大语言模型在对抗性提示下的攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型尽管经过对齐和安全训练，仍易受对抗性提示攻击。现有的对抗训练方法计算成本高且难以扩展，而连续对抗训练方法虽更高效，但仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 提出WARDEN框架，通过f-散度模糊集对经验训练分布周围的对抗样本进行动态重加权，优化散度球内的最坏情况对抗损失。利用凸对偶形式将目标函数简化为log-sum-exp形式，并通过动态参数控制重加权强度。
AI.result: 在多个大语言模型和攻击设置下，WARDEN显著降低了攻击成功率，同时计算成本和模型效用与CAT、CAPO和MixAT等基线方法相当。
AI.conclusion: WARDEN是一种实用且可扩展的鲁棒对齐方法，通过信息论目标在保持效率的同时大幅提升模型安全性。

title: Distributionally Robust Multi-Objective Optimization
summary: Multi-objective optimization (MOO) has received growing attention in applications that require learning under multiple criteria. However, the existing MOO formulations do not explicitly account for distributional shifts in the data. We introduce distributionally robust multi-objective optimization (DR-MOO), which minimizes multiple objectives under their respective worst-case distributions. We propose Pareto-type solution concepts for DR-MOO and develop multi-gradient descent algorithms (MGDA) with provable guarantees. Leveraging a Lagrangian dual reformulation, we first design a double-loop MGDA that uses an inner loop to estimate dual variables and achieves a total sample complexity $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-12})$ for reaching an $ε$-Pareto-stationary point. To further improve efficiency, we incorporate gradient clipping to handle generalized-smooth and biased gradient estimates, removing the need for double sampling. This yields a single-loop double-clip MGDA with substantially improved sample complexity $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-4})$. Our theory applies to the nonconvex setting and does not require bounded objectives or gradients. Experiments demonstrate that our methods are competitive with state-of-the-art MGDA baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出分布鲁棒多目标优化（DR-MOO），在考虑数据分布偏移的情况下同时优化多个目标。作者设计了双循环和单循环两种多梯度下降算法（MGDA），分别达到O(ε⁻¹²)和O(ε⁻⁴)的样本复杂度，实验证明与现有MGDA基线方法竞争力相当。
AI.motivation: 现有MOO方法未显式考虑数据分布偏移问题，而实际应用中分布偏移普遍存在，需要一种能够针对最坏情况分布同时优化多个目标的方法。
AI.method: 提出DR-MOO框架，基于拉格朗日对偶重构设计双循环MGDA（内环估计对偶变量，外环更新参数），以及单循环双裁剪MGDA（引入梯度裁剪处理广义光滑和有偏梯度估计）。
AI.result: 双循环MGDA达到O(ε⁻¹²)样本复杂度，单循环双裁剪MGDA大幅提升至O(ε⁻⁴)；理论适用于非凸设置且不要求有界目标或梯度；实验与SOTA MGDA基线竞争。
AI.conclusion: DR-MOO为存在分布偏移的多目标优化提供了理论基础和高效算法，单循环方法在理论上显著优于双循环方法，且实际性能良好。

title: Dynamic Treatment on Networks
summary: In networks, effective dynamic treatment allocation requires deciding both whom to treat and also when, so as to amplify policy impact through spillovers. An early intervention at a well-connected node can trigger cascades that change which nodes are worth targeting in the next period. Existing treatment strategies under network interference are largely static while dynamic treatment frameworks typically ignore network structure altogether. We integrate these perspectives and propose Q-Ising, a three-stage pipeline that (i) estimates network adoption dynamics via a Bayesian dynamic Ising model from a single observed panel, (ii) augments treatment adoption histories with continuous posterior latent states, and (iii) learns a dynamic policy via offline reinforcement learning. The Bayesian mechanism enables uncertainty quantification over dynamic decisions, yielding posterior ensemble policies with interpretable spillover estimates. We provide a finite-sample regret upper bound that decomposes into standard offline-RL uncertainty, network abstraction error, and first stage error in Ising state estimation. We apply our method to data from Indian village microfinance networks and synthetic stochastic block models under simulated heterogeneous susceptible-infected-susceptible (SIS) dynamics and demonstrate that adaptive targeting outperforms static centrality benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Q-Ising方法，结合贝叶斯动态Ising模型与离线强化学习，用于网络环境下的动态治疗分配，并通过印度村庄微型金融网络数据验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有网络干扰下的治疗策略多为静态，而动态治疗框架又忽略网络结构，缺乏同时考虑"何时治疗"与"治疗谁"的方法。
AI.method: 提出Q-Ising三阶段流程：(i) 利用贝叶斯动态Ising模型从单一观测面板估计网络采纳动态；(ii) 用连续后验潜状态增强治疗采纳历史；(iii) 通过离线强化学习学习动态策略。
AI.result: 在印度村庄微型金融网络和合成随机块模型上，自适应定位方法优于静态中心性基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯机制支持动态决策的不确定性量化，提供可解释的溢出效应估计，且有限样本遗憾上界可分解为标准离线RL不确定性、网络抽象误差和第一阶段Ising状态估计误差。

title: MemReranker: Reasoning-Aware Reranking for Agent Memory Retrieval
summary: In agent memory systems, the reranking model serves as the critical bridge connecting user queries with long-term memory. Most systems adopt the "retrieve-then-rerank" two-stage paradigm, but generic reranking models rely on semantic similarity matching and lack genuine reasoning capabilities, leading to a problem where recalled results are semantically highly relevant yet do not contain the key information needed to answer the question. This deficiency manifests in memory scenarios as three specific problems. First, relevance scores are miscalibrated, making threshold-based filtering difficult. Second, ranking degrades when facing temporal constraints, causal reasoning, and other complex queries. Third, the model cannot leverage dialogue context for semantic disambiguation. This report introduces MemReranker, a reranking model family (0.6B/4B) built on Qwen3-Reranker through multi-stage LLM knowledge distillation. Multi-teacher pairwise comparisons generate calibrated soft labels, BCE pointwise distillation establishes well-distributed scores, and InfoNCE contrastive learning enhances hard-sample discrimination. Training data combines general corpora with memory-specific multi-turn dialogue data covering temporal constraints, causal reasoning, and coreference resolution. On the memory retrieval benchmark, MemReranker-0.6B substantially outperforms BGE-Reranker and matches open-source 4B/8B models as well as GPT-4o-mini on key metrics. MemReranker-4B further achieves 0.737 MAP, with several metrics on par with Gemini-3-Flash, while maintaining inference latency at only 10--20\% of large models. On finance and healthcare vertical-domain benchmarks, the models preserve generalization capabilities on par with mainstream large-parameter rerankers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MemReranker，通过多阶段LLM知识蒸馏构建的专用重排序模型家族，解决智能体记忆系统中通用重排序模型缺乏推理能力导致检索结果语义相关但缺乏关键信息的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有"检索-重排序"范式中，通用重排序模型仅依赖语义相似度匹配，缺乏真正的推理能力，导致检索结果虽语义相关但不含回答问题所需的关键信息，具体表现为：分数校准差、复杂查询排序退化、无法利用对话上下文消歧。
AI.method: 基于Qwen3-Reranker，通过多阶段LLM知识蒸馏构建0.6B/4B模型家族。多教师成对比较生成校准软标签，BCE逐点蒸馏建立良好分布分数，InfoNCE对比学习增强难样本判别。训练数据混合通用语料和包含时间约束、因果推理、共指消解的特定记忆场景多轮对话数据。
AI.result: 在记忆检索基准上，MemReranker-0.6B显著优于BGE-Reranker，性能匹配开源4B/8B模型及GPT-4o-mini。MemReranker-4B达0.737 MAP，多项指标与Gemini-3-Flash持平，推理延迟仅为大模型的10-20%。在金融和医疗垂直领域保持与主流大参数重排序器相当的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性的知识蒸馏和数据策略，小参数专用重排序模型能在记忆检索任务上超越通用模型，达到大模型性能水平的同时保持极低推理延迟和跨领域泛化能力。

title: Retrieval-Conditioned Topology Selection with Provable Budget Conservation for Multi-Agent Code Generation
comment: 30 pages, 9 figures. NeurIPS 2026 Evaluations and Datasets Track Submission Under review
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems for code generation face a fundamental routing problem: the optimal orchestration topology depends on the structural complexity of the code under modification, yet existing systems select topologies without consulting the codebase. We present Retrieval-Guided Adaptive Orchestration (RGAO), an architecture that closes this loop by extracting a structural complexity vector from a hierarchical code index before selecting the orchestration topology. RGAO operates within Code-Agent, a multi-agent framework whose sub-agents are governed by formal contracts with six-dimensional budget vectors. Our headline contribution is the composition of two previously separate lines of work -- complexity-conditioned LLM routing and formal resource algebras -- yielding a property neither admits alone: provable budget conservation under retrieval-conditioned dynamic topology selection. Concretely we contribute: (1) a complexity-conditioned topology router that reduces proxy-measured misrouting from 30.1% to 8.2%; (2) a budget algebra with a structural-induction conservation theorem; and (3) a hierarchical code retrieval engine. Empirical evaluation demonstrates sub-millisecond DAG construction and linear tree-index scalability.

AI.tldr: 提出RGAO架构，通过层次化代码索引提取结构复杂度向量来动态选择多智能体LLM代码生成系统的编排拓扑，并结合形式化资源代数实现预算守恒，将误路由率从30.1%降至8.2%。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在未咨询代码库的情况下选择编排拓扑，导致路由问题——最优拓扑取决于代码修改的结构复杂度。
AI.method: RGAO架构包含三个贡献：(1) 复杂度条件的拓扑路由器，从层次化代码索引中提取结构复杂度向量；(2) 预算代数，具有结构归纳守恒定理；(3) 层次化代码检索引擎。系统在Code-Agent多智能体框架内运行，子智能体由六维预算向量的形式合同管理。
AI.result: 误路由率从30.1%降至8.2%，支持亚毫秒级DAG构建和线性树索引可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 首次将复杂度条件的LLM路由与形式化资源代数这两个独立方向结合，实现了检索条件下动态拓扑选择的可证明预算守恒——这是单独任一方法都无法实现的特性。

title: Active Learning for Conditional Generative Compressed Sensing
summary: Generative compressed sensing uses the range of a pretrained generator as a nonlinear model for recovering structured signals from limited measurements. We study a conditional version of this problem for image recovery from subsampled Fourier measurements using prompt-conditioned generative models. Our framework separates two roles of conditioning: the prompt used to design the sampling distribution and the prompt used to define the recovery model. For ReLU and Lipschitz conditional generators, we prove stable recovery bounds showing that prompt-matched Christoffel sampling retains the same Christoffel complexity constant as existing near-optimal generative compressed sensing theory, while prompt mismatch incurs an explicit compatibility penalty. Experiments with Stable Diffusion show that prompts meaningfully reshape Christoffel sampling distributions and influence image recovery. Overall, our results suggest that prompts should be treated as design variables with distinct effects on sensing, approximation, and recovery.

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于提示条件生成模型的压缩感知，理论证明了提示匹配的Christoffel采样能保持近最优恢复界，而提示不匹配会带来兼容性惩罚，并通过Stable Diffusion实验验证了提示对采样分布和图像恢复的影响。
AI.motivation: 将生成压缩感知扩展到条件（prompt-conditioned）版本，以利用预训练条件生成模型从有限傅里叶测量中恢复图像，并理解提示(prompt)在采样、逼近和恢复中的不同作用。
AI.method: 将提示(prompt)分为两类：一类用于设计采样分布（Christoffel采样），另一类用于定义恢复模型。对ReLU和Lipschitz条件生成器进行理论分析，并结合Stable Diffusion进行实验验证。
AI.result: 理论上证明提示匹配的Christoffel采样能保持近最优的生成压缩感知恢复界；提示不匹配会带来显式的兼容性惩罚。实验表明提示能显著改变Christoffel采样分布并影响图像恢复质量。
AI.conclusion: 提示应被视为设计变量，其对感知（sensing）、逼近（approximation）和恢复（recovery）具有不同的影响，为条件生成压缩感知提供了理论基础和实践指导。

title: DARTS: Targeting Prognostic Covariates in Budget-Constrained Sequential Experiments
summary: Randomized controlled trials typically assume that prognostic covariates are known and available at no cost. In practice, obtaining high-dimensional pretreatment data is costly, forcing a trade-off between covariate-adaptive precision and a measurement budget. We introduce Dynamic Adaptive Rerandomization via Thompson Sampling (DARTS), which treats covariate acquisition as a sequential optimization problem embedded within a design-based causal inference task. A budgeted combinatorial Thompson sampler learns which covariates are most prognostic across successive batches; selected covariates then drive rerandomization and regression adjustment to reduce batch-level average treatment effect variance. Our primary theoretical contribution is a decoupling result: adaptive covariate selection based on past batches preserves batch-level randomization validity, and the cumulative inverse-variance weighted estimator achieves at least nominal asymptotic coverage. We further derive a Bayes risk bound for the acquisition layer that matches the minimax lower bound up to logarithmic factors. Empirically, DARTS systematically concentrates the budget on informative features, significantly closing the efficiency gap to oracle designs while maintaining strict inferential validity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DARTS框架，将高代价协变量获取嵌入试验设计，通过自适应Thompson采样学习关键协变量，在预算约束下通过重随机化和回归调整提升因果推断效率，并证明批次级随机化有效性与渐近覆盖保证。
AI.motivation: 传统RCT假设协变量已知且免费，但在高维预处理数据获取成本高昂的现实场景下，需要在协变量自适应精度和测量预算之间做出权衡。现有方法缺乏在预算约束下序贯选择协变量的系统方案。
AI.method: 将协变量获取建模为序贯优化问题，使用预算约束的组合Thompson采样器在批次间学习最具预测性的协变量；选定变量驱动重随机化和回归调整以降低批次平均处理效应方差；提出解耦理论证明自适应选择不破坏随机化有效性。
AI.result: 推导了获取层的贝叶斯风险界（匹配极小化下界至对数因子）；累积逆方差加权估计量达到名义渐近覆盖；实证显示DARTS系统性地将预算集中在信息特征上，显著缩小了与oracle设计的效率差距。
AI.conclusion: DARTS在预算约束下实现了高效且有效的因果推断，兼具理论保证与实证优越性，为高成本协变量获取场景提供了可落地的设计范式。

title: IRC-Bench: Recognizing Entities from Contextual Cues in First-Person Reminiscences
summary: When people recount personal memories, they often refer to people, places, and events indirectly, relying on contextual cues rather than explicit names. Such implicit references are central to reminiscence narratives: first-person accounts of lived experience used in therapeutic, archival, and social settings. They pose a difficult computational problem because the intended entity must be inferred from dispersed narrative evidence rather than from a local mention. We introduce IRC-Bench, the Implicit Reminiscence Context Benchmark, for evaluating implicit entity recognition in reminiscence transcripts. The benchmark targets non-locality: entity-identifying cues are distributed across multiple, non-contiguous clauses, unlike named entity recognition, entity linking, or coreference resolution. IRC-Bench comprises 25,136 samples constructed from 12,337 Wiki-data-linked entities across 1,994 transcripts spanning 11 thematic domains. Each sample pairs an Entity-Grounded Narrative, in which the target entity is explicitly mentioned, with an Entity-Elided Narrative, in which direct mentions are removed. We evaluate 19 configurations across LLM generation, dense retrieval, RAG, and fine-tuning. QLoRA-adapted Llama 3.1 8B performs best in the open-world setting (38.94% exact match; 51.59% Jaccard), while fine-tuned DPR leads closed-world retrieval (35.38% Hit@1; 71.49% Hit@10). We release IRC-Bench with data, code, and evaluation tools.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IRC-Bench基准，用于评估回忆叙述中隐含实体识别。该基准包含25,136个样本，来自1,994篇跨11个主题领域的回忆录。实验对比了LLM生成、密集检索、RAG和微调等19种配置，结果表明QLoRA微调的Llama 3.1 8B在开放世界设置中表现最佳（38.94%精确匹配），微调DPR在封闭世界检索中领先（35.38% Hit@1）。
AI.motivation: 人们在回忆个人经历时常常使用隐含指代（如不直接提及人名、地名），这种非明确的实体引用在治疗、档案和社交等场景中很常见。现有方法如命名实体识别、实体链接和指代消解都无法处理这种跨分散叙述片段分布的非局部实体线索，因此需要专门针对回忆叙述中隐含实体识别的基准。
AI.method: 构建IRC-Bench基准数据集：从1,994篇涵盖11个主题领域的回忆录中，提取12,337个维基数据链接实体，生成25,136个样本对。每个样本包含显式提及目标实体的Entity-Grounded Narrative和删除直接提及的Entity-Elided Narrative。评估了19种配置，包括LLM生成、密集检索（DPR）、RAG和微调（QLoRA适应Llama 3.1 8B）等方法。
AI.result: 开放世界设置中，QLoRA微调的Llama 3.1 8B表现最优（精确匹配38.94%，Jaccard指数51.59%）；封闭世界检索中，微调DPR表现最佳（Hit@1为35.38%，Hit@10为71.49%）。
AI.conclusion: 回忆叙述中的隐含实体识别是一个具有挑战性的非局部推理问题，现有方法虽有初步效果但仍有巨大提升空间。IRC-Bench为这一任务提供了标准化评估框架，并公开了数据、代码和评估工具以推动后续研究。

title: Large Vision-Language Models Get Lost in Attention
summary: Despite the rapid evolution of training paradigms, the decoder backbone of large vision--language models (LVLMs) remains fundamentally rooted in the residual-connection Transformer architecture. Therefore, deciphering the distinct roles of internal modules is critical for understanding model mechanics and guiding architectural optimization. While prior statistical approaches have provided valuable attribution-based insights, they often lack a unified theoretical basis. To bridge this gap, we propose a unified framework grounded in information theory and geometry to quantify the geometric and entropic nature of residual updates. Applying this unified framework reveals a fundamental functional decoupling: Attention acts as a subspace-preserving operator focused on reconfiguration, whereas FFNs serve as subspace-expanding operators driving semantic innovation. Strikingly, further experiments demonstrate that replacing learned attention weights with predefined values (e.g., Gaussian noise) yields comparable or even superior performance across a majority of datasets relative to vanilla models. These results expose severe misallocation and redundancy in current mechanisms, suggesting that state-of-the-art LVLMs effectively ``get lost in attention'' rather than efficiently leveraging visual context.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于信息论和几何学的统一框架，揭示LVLMs中Attention和FFN模块的功能解耦：Attention保持子空间但进行特征重配置，FFN扩展子空间并推动语义创新。实验发现用预定义值（如高斯噪声）替换学习到的注意力权重，在多数数据集上表现相当甚至更好，表明现有机制存在严重的冗余和错配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有解码器骨干虽基于残差连接Transformer架构，但各内部模块的独特角色尚不清晰；先前的统计归因方法缺乏统一的理论基础。
AI.method: 提出基于信息论和几何学的统一框架，量化残差更新的几何和熵特性，并设计对照实验替换注意力权重为预定义值（如高斯噪声）进行验证。
AI.result: Attention是子空间保持算子（重配置），FFN是子空间扩展算子（语义创新）；用高斯噪声等预定义值替换注意力权重后，多数数据集表现与原始模型相当甚至更优。
AI.conclusion: 当前LVLMs的注意力机制存在严重的冗余和资源错配，模型实际上"迷失在注意力中"而非有效利用视觉上下文，亟需架构层面的优化。

title: On Semantic Loss Fine-Tuning Approach for Preventing Model Collapse in Causal Reasoning
summary: Standard fine-tuning of transformer models on causal reasoning tasks leads to catastrophic model collapse, where models learn trivial solutions such as always predicting "Yes" or "No" regardless of input structure. We demonstrate that fine-tuning Gemma 270M on transitivity and d-separation tasks without semantic loss results in 100% collapse rate, with models achieving misleadingly high accuracy (73.9%) while learning no causal reasoning. We propose a semantic loss function with graph-based logical constraints and dynamic lambda scheduling that prevents this collapse. Our approach achieves 70.4% accuracy on transitivity tasks and 68.6% on d-separation tasks with stable, context-dependent predictions, representing a 42.7% improvement over collapsed baselines. Adversarial evaluation on 1,000 structural reasoning samples shows semantic models achieve 67-70% accuracy while collapsed models fail catastrophically at 43-71%. We validate our findings through comprehensive benchmarking on 200,000+ evaluation samples across five model variants, demonstrating that semantic loss is essential and not optional, for stable causal reasoning in transformers.

AI.tldr: 微调Transformer进行因果推理会导致模型崩溃（始终预测"Yes"或"No"）。本文提出一种带有图约束和动态调度的语义损失函数，有效防止崩溃，在传递性和d-separation任务上分别达到70.4%和68.6%准确率，较基线提升42.7%。
AI.motivation: 标准微调Transformer模型于因果推理任务会导致灾难性的模型崩溃——模型学会学习无关输入的简单答案（如总是预测"Yes"或"No"），表面准确率高但实际未学到任何因果推理能力。
AI.method: 提出语义损失函数，包含基于图的逻辑约束和动态lambda调度策略，在微调过程中防止模型学习到琐碎解。
AI.result: 传递性任务准确率70.4%，d-separation任务68.6%，较崩溃基线提升42.7%；对抗评估中语义模型稳定在67-70%，崩溃模型仅43-71%且表现不稳定。
AI.conclusion: 语义损失对于Transformer进行稳定因果推理是必要而非可选的，能够有效防止模型崩溃并保持上下文相关的预测能力。

title: Quadratic Objective Perturbation: Curvature-Based Differential Privacy
summary: Objective perturbation is a standard mechanism in differentially private empirical risk minimization. In particular, Linear Objective Perturbation (LOP) enforces privacy by adding a random linear term, while strong convexity and stability are ensured by an additional deterministic quadratic term. However, this approach requires the strong assumption of bounded gradients of the loss function, which excludes many modern machine learning models. In this work, we introduce Quadratic Objective Perturbation (QOP), which perturbs the objective with a random quadratic form. This perturbation induces strong convexity and enforces stability of the problem through curvature, thereby enabling privacy and allowing sensitivity to be controlled through spectral properties of the perturbation rather than assumptions on the gradients. As a result, we obtain $(\varepsilon, δ)$-differential privacy under weaker assumptions, in the interpolation regime. Furthermore, we extend the analysis to account for approximate solutions, showing that privacy guarantees are preserved under inexact solves. Additionally, we derive utility guarantees in terms of empirical excess risk, and provide a theoretical and numerical comparison to LOP, highlighting the advantages of curvature-based perturbations. Finally, we discuss algorithmic aspects and show that the resulting problems can be solved efficiently using modern splitting schemes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出二次目标扰动（QOP）方法，通过在目标函数中添加随机二次型实现差分隐私，无需梯度有界假设，利用曲率控制灵敏度，在插值条件下达到(ε,δ)-差分隐私，并支持近似求解。
AI.motivation: 现有的线性目标扰动（LOP）方法要求损失函数的梯度有界，这一强假设排除了许多现代机器学习模型。本文旨在提出一种无需梯度有界假设的差分隐私经验风险最小化方法。
AI.method: 提出二次目标扰动（QOP），用随机二次型扰动目标函数，通过曲率诱导强凸性并确保问题稳定性，利用扰动的谱特性控制灵敏度，从而在更弱假设下实现差分隐私。
AI.result: 在插值条件下实现了(ε,δ)-差分隐私，且假设条件弱于LOP；证明了近似求解仍能保持隐私保证；给出了经验超额风险的理论效用保证；理论及数值比较显示曲率基扰动的优势。
AI.conclusion: QOP通过曲率而非梯度假设来控制隐私，放宽了LOP的强假设限制，且支持高效求解，为差分隐私优化提供了更通用的框架。

title: HNC: Leveraging Hard Negative Captions towards Models with Fine-Grained Visual-Linguistic Comprehension Capabilities
summary: Image-Text-Matching (ITM) is one of the defacto methods of learning generalized representations from a large corpus in Vision and Language (VL). However, due to the weak association between the web-collected image-text pairs, models fail to show a fine-grained understanding of the combined semantics of these modalities. To address this issue we propose Hard Negative Captions (HNC): an automatically created dataset containing foiled hard negative captions for ITM training towards achieving fine-grained cross-modal comprehension in VL. Additionally, we provide a challenging manually-created test set for benchmarking models on a fine-grained cross-modal mismatch task with varying levels of compositional complexity. Our results show the effectiveness of training on HNC by improving the models' zero-shot capabilities in detecting mismatches on diagnostic tasks and performing robustly under noisy visual input scenarios. Also, we demonstrate that HNC models yield a comparable or better initialization for fine-tuning

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hard Negative Captions（HNC）数据集，通过在图像-文本匹配训练中引入硬负样本，提升模型对跨模态细粒度语义的理解能力，实验证明该方法能改善零样本检测和噪声鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有图像-文本匹配方法因网络采集数据中图像与文本关联弱，模型缺乏对跨模态语义的细粒度理解，需解决该问题。
AI.method: 提出HNC数据集：自动生成包含硬负样本的文本描述，用于ITM训练；同时构建人工标注的细粒度跨模态不匹配测试集。
AI.result: HNC训练提升模型在诊断任务上的零样本不匹配检测能力，在噪声视觉输入下表现鲁棒，并能为下游微调提供更优初始化。
AI.conclusion: HNC数据集能有效提升VL模型对跨模态语义的细粒度理解，增强零样本泛化能力和鲁棒性。

title: Chain of Risk: Safety Failures in Large Reasoning Models and Mitigation via Adaptive Multi-Principle Steering
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) increasingly expose chain-of-thought-like reasoning for transparency, verification, and deliberate problem solving. This creates a safety blind spot: harmful or policy-violating content may appear in reasoning traces even when final answers appear safe. We test whether final-answer safety is a sufficient proxy for the full reasoning-answer trajectory by scoring both stages under a unified twenty-principle safety rubric. Using prompts from seven public harmfulness and jailbreak sources, plus four out-of-distribution (OOD) sources, we evaluate 15 open-weight and API-based LRMs across 41K prompts per model. Reasoning traces consistently reveal additional safety risks beyond final answers, especially in high-severity stage-wise failures: leak cases, where unsafe reasoning precedes a safe-looking answer, and escape cases, where benign-looking reasoning precedes an unsafe final response. Principle-level analysis shows that risk concentrates in misinformation, legal compliance, discrimination, physical harm, and psychological harm. We further propose adaptive multi-principle steering, a white-box test-time mitigation that learns one unsafe-to-safe activation direction per safety principle and activates only directions whose current hidden state is closer to the unsafe than safe centroid. On three steerable open reasoning models, adaptive steering reduces unsafe counts in both reasoning traces and final answers on held-out and OOD benchmarks. DeepSeek-R1-Qwen-7B achieves a 40.8% average unsafe-count reduction while retaining 97.7% macro-averaged accuracy on BBH, GSM8K, and MMLU. These results suggest that LRM safety should be evaluated and mitigated over the full exposed reasoning-answer trajectory, not only at the final-answer stage.

AI.tldr: 大型推理模型（LRMs）的思维链推理轨迹中常出现不安全内容，即使最终答案看似安全。本文提出统一二十原则安全框架评估推理与答案两个阶段，发现推理阶段隐藏额外安全风险（泄露和逃逸两类故障模式），并提出自适应多原则引导（adaptive multi-principle steering）的测试时缓解方法，在DeepSeek-R1-Qwen-7B上实现40.8%不安全计数降低，同时保持97.7%宏观平均准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有LRM安全评估仅关注最终答案安全性，忽略了推理轨迹中可能暴露的违反政策内容（即使最终答案看似安全）。推理透明性带来了安全盲点，需要系统地评估推理-答案全轨迹的安全性。
AI.method: 1）构建统一二十原则安全评分体系，对推理轨迹和最终答案分别评分；2）使用7个公开有害/越狱提示源+4个OOD源，评估15个模型共41K提示/模型；3）提出自适应多原则引导：为每个安全原则学习不安全→安全的激活方向，仅在当前隐藏状态更接近不安全质心时激活对应方向。
AI.result: 1）推理轨迹持续暴露出超出最终答案的额外安全风险；2）识别出两类高危阶段故障：泄露（不安全推理→安全答案）和逃逸（安全推理→不安全答案）；3）风险集中在虚假信息、法律合规、歧视、身体伤害、心理伤害五个原则；4）自适应引导在DeepSeek-R1-Qwen-7B上降低40.8%不安全计数，保持97.7%宏观平均准确率。
AI.conclusion: LRM安全性应在完整的推理-答案轨迹上进行评估和缓解，而非仅在最终答案阶段。自适应多原则引导是一种有效的白盒测试时安全缓解方法。

title: Robustness of Graph Self-Supervised Learning to Real-World Noise: A Case Study on Text-Driven Biomedical Graphs
summary: Graph Self-Supervised Learning (GSSL) offers a powerful paradigm for learning graph representations without labeled data. However, existing work assumes clean, manually curated graphs. Recent advances in NLP enable the large-scale automatic extraction of knowledge graphs from text, opening new opportunities for GSSL while introducing substantial real-world noise. This type of noise remains largely unexplored, as prior robustness studies typically rely on synthetic perturbations. To address this gap, we present the first comprehensive evaluation of GSSL methods on text-driven graphs for unsupervised term typing. We introduce Noise-Aware Text-Driven Graph GSSL (NATD-GSSL), a unified framework that combines automatic graph construction, graph refinement, and GSSL. Our evaluation follows a dual-graph protocol that contrasts a noisy graph derived from MedMentions with a clean Unified Medical Language System (UMLS) reference graph, aligned through a shared gold standard. Our results reveal variability in robustness across both pretext tasks and Graph Neural Network (GNN) architectures. Relation reconstruction is highly sensitive to noise and benefits from well-defined schemas, whereas feature reconstruction is considerably more robust, achieving performance comparable to clean-graph settings. Contrastive objectives are generally less affected by noise but depend strongly on alignment with downstream tasks. GNN architecture also plays a critical role: bidirectional relational message-passing designs are better suited to noisy, text-driven graphs, while unidirectional relational ones perform best on clean graphs. Overall, NATD-GSSL provides practical guidance for applying GSSL to real-world, noisy graphs and achieves up to a 7\% improvement over pretrained language model baselines. All code and benchmarks are publicly available at https://github.com/OthmaneKabal/MC2GAE.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统评估了图自监督学习（GSSL）在文本驱动噪声图上的表现，提出了NATD-GSSL框架，通过双图协议对比噪声图与干净图，发现关系重构对噪声敏感而特征重构鲁棒，双向关系消息传递架构更适合噪声图，整体相比预训练语言模型提升最高7%。
AI.motivation: 现有GSSL方法假设图数据是干净且人工精心整理的，但NLP技术可大规模自动从文本中抽取知识图谱，这种自动构建过程会引入真实世界的噪声。以往关于鲁棒性的研究多依赖合成扰动，未能充分探索这种真实噪声的影响。作者旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出NATD-GSSL统一框架，包含自动图构建、图精炼和GSSL三阶段。采用双图评估协议：噪声图来自MedMentions自动抽取，干净图来自UMLS参考知识图谱，两者通过共享标注对齐。系统评估不同预训练任务（关系重构、特征重构、对比学习）和不同GNN架构（双向/单向关系消息传递）的表现。
AI.result: 关系重构对噪声高度敏感但受益于良好定义的图模式；特征重构最为鲁棒，性能接近干净图设置；对比学习受噪声影响较小但依赖与下游任务的对齐。双向关系消息传递GNN更适合噪声图，单向关系GNN更适合干净图。整体比预训练语言模型提升最高7%。
AI.conclusion: NATD-GSSL为将GSSL应用于真实世界噪声图提供了实用指导。不同预训练任务和GNN架构对噪声的鲁棒性存在显著差异，特征重构和双向消息传递架构是处理噪声文本驱动图的推荐方案。

title: GRALIS: A Unified Canonical Framework for Linear Attribution Methods via Riesz Representation
comment: 25 pages, 6 tables, 2 figures. Theoretical framework with preliminary experimental validation on BreaKHis (1,187 images, DenseNet-121). Extended empirical comparison in preparation
summary: The main XAI attribution methods for deep neural networks -- GradCAM, SHAP, LIME, Integrated Gradients -- operate on separate theoretical foundations and are not formally comparable. We present GRALIS (Gradient-Riesz Averaged Locally-Integrated Shapley), a mathematical framework establishing a representation theory for attributions: every additive, linear, and continuous attribution functional on L^2(Q,mu) admits a unique canonical representation (Q, w, Delta), proved necessary by the Riesz Representation Theorem. This class encompasses SHAP, IG, LIME and linearized GradCAM, but excludes nonlinear functionals such as standard GradCAM or attention maps. Seven formal theorems provide simultaneous guarantees absent in any individual method: (T1) necessary canonical form; (T2) exact completeness; (T3) Monte Carlo convergence O(1/sqrt(m))+O(1/k); (T4) exact Shapley Interaction Values; (T5) Hoeffding ANOVA decomposition; (T6) Sobol sensitivity generalization; (T7) multi-scale extension (MS-GRALIS) with minimum-variance weights. An algebraic appendix justifies the GRALIS-SIV correspondence via the Mobius transform without circularity. GRALIS satisfies 13.5/14 axiomatic properties vs. 2.5-6/14 for individual methods, including completeness, sensitivity, locality, order-k interactions and optimal multi-scale aggregation simultaneously. Preliminary validation on BreaKHis (1,187 histology images, DenseNet-121) reports deletion faithfulness AUC +0.015 (malignant), 96% class-conditional consistency, SAL = 0.762+/-0.109 and sparsity index 0.39. Extended comparison with baseline XAI methods is planned for a companion paper.

AI.tldr: GRALIS是一个统一XAI归因方法的数学框架，通过Riesz表示定理建立表示理论，涵盖SHAP、IG、LIME和线性化GradCAM，在14个公理属性中满足13.5个，并提供了七个形式化定理保证。在BreaKHis数据集上的初步验证显示了有竞争力的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的XAI归因方法（GradCAM、SHAP、LIME、IG）基于不同的理论基础，缺乏形式化的可比性和统一框架，导致方法选择困难且无法同时满足多种理想公理属性。
AI.method: 提出GRALIS框架，基于Riesz表示定理证明每个加法、线性和连续的归因泛函在L^2(Q,mu)上存在唯一的典范表示(Q, w, Delta)。该框架将SHAP、IG、LIME和线性化GradCAM纳入统一理论，并进一步扩展至Shapley交互值、Hoeffding ANOVA分解、Sobol灵敏度泛化和多尺度扩展（MS-GRALIS）。
AI.result: 在BreaKHis数据集（1,187张组织学图像，DenseNet-121）上验证：删除忠实度AUC +0.015（恶性），96%类条件一致性，SAL=0.762±0.109，稀疏指数0.39。满足13.5/14个公理属性，远超单个方法的2.5-6/14。
AI.conclusion: GRALIS提供了一个统一的理论框架，使得不同归因方法在数学上可比，并通过七个定理同时保证了完备性、收敛性、交互值计算、方差分解、灵敏度泛化和多尺度聚合等性质，显著优于现有单个方法。

title: A$^2$TGPO: Agentic Turn-Group Policy Optimization with Adaptive Turn-level Clipping
summary: Reinforcement learning for agentic large language models (LLMs) typically relies on a sparse, trajectory-level outcome reward, making it difficult to evaluate the contribution of individual tool-calls within multi-turn interactions. Existing approaches to such process credit assignment either depend on separate external process reward models that introduce additional consumption, or tree-based structural rollout that merely redistributes the outcome signal while constraining trajectory diversity. A promising alternative leverages the per-turn change in the policy's predicted probability of the ground-truth, termed Information Gain (IG), as an intrinsic process signal without an external evaluator. However, prior work on leveraging IG signals within the RL training loop faces three systematic challenges: normalizing across turns that face heterogeneous positional contexts can distort the relative standing of individual turns, accumulating a variable number of terms causes advantage magnitudes to drift with trajectory depth, and a fixed clipping range governs policy updates identically for turns with vastly different IG signals. In this paper, we propose A$^2$TGPO (Agentic Turn-Group Policy Optimization with Adaptive Turn-level Clipping), which retains IG as the intrinsic signal but re-designs how it is normalized, accumulated, and consumed: (i) turn-group normalization: normalizes IG within each (prompt, turn-index) group so that each turn is compared only against peers at the same interaction depth; (ii) variance-rescaled discounted accumulation: divides cumulative normalized IG by square root of accumulated terms to keep advantage magnitudes comparable across turn positions; and (iii) adaptive turn-level clipping: modulates each turn's clipping range based on its normalized IG, widening the update region for informative turns and narrowing it for uninformative ones.

AI.tldr: 本文提出A²TGPO方法，通过局部归一化、方差缩放累积和自适应裁剪三个改进，解决信息增益信号在智能体LLM强化学习中的训练不稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于信息增益（IG）的RL训练面临三大挑战：跨轮次归一化扭曲相对排序、累积项数变化导致优势幅度随轨迹深度漂移、固定裁剪范围无法适应不同轮次IG信号的差异。
AI.method: 提出A²TGPO，包含三个核心设计：(i) 轮次组归一化——在同(prompt, turn-index)组内归一化IG；(ii) 方差缩放折扣累积——用累积项数的平方根缩放归一化IG，保持优势量级可比；(iii) 自适应轮次级裁剪——根据归一化IG动态调整裁剪范围，信息量大则放宽、小则收紧。
AI.result: 论文尚未报告具体实验结果，但理论上该方法能更稳定地利用IG作为内在过程奖励信号，克服归一化失真、优势漂移和固定裁剪三个问题。
AI.conclusion: A²TGPO通过重新设计IG的归一化、累积和消费方式，为智能体LLM提供了一种无需外部过程奖励模型的过程级信用分配方案。

title: Attractor Geometry of Transformer Memory: From Conflict Arbitration to Confident Hallucination
summary: Language models draw on two knowledge sources: facts baked into weights (parametric memory, PM) and information in context (working memory, WM). We study two mechanistically distinct failure modes--conflict, when PM and WM disagree and interfere; and hallucination, when the queried fact was never learned. Both produce confident output regardless, making output-based monitoring blind by design. We show both failures share a unified geometric account. In the hidden-state space of autoregressive generation, learned facts form attractor basins. Conflict is basin competition: WM disrupts convergence to the correct basin without raising output entropy. Hallucination is basin absence: the hidden state drifts freely when no memorized basin exists. The frozen LM head, designed for next-token prediction, cannot distinguish these cases and fires confidently either way. We verify this account in a controlled synthetic task--entity identifiers mapped to unique codes with PM installed via LoRA adapters--where ground truth is exact and component roles can be causally isolated through targeted adapter placement. Geometric margin--the hidden state's distance to the nearest memorized basin--reads this geometry directly and separates correct recall from hallucination far more cleanly than output entropy, with zero false refusals where entropy-based detection cannot avoid rejecting the vast majority of correct outputs. The separation holds on natural-language factual queries from the pretrained model with no adaptation, confirming attractor geometry is structural rather than a fine-tuning artifact. The fraction of confident hallucinations follows a scaling law $C = \exp(-c/\barΔ)$, growing with scale even as overall error rates fall. Hidden states reliably encode epistemic state; the frozen output head systematically erases it--and this erasure worsens with scale.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了语言模型两种失败模式（冲突和幻觉）的统一的几何解释：在隐藏状态空间中，学得的事实形成吸引子盆地。冲突是盆地竞争，幻觉是盆地缺失。通过几何裕度（隐藏状态到最近记忆盆地的距离）可以比输出熵更干净地区分正确召回和幻觉，且这种分离随模型规模扩大而增强，同时输出头会系统性擦除这种认知状态信号。
AI.motivation: 语言模型存在两种机制性不同的失败模式——参数记忆与工作记忆冲突，以及查询事实从未被学习（幻觉）。两者都会产生自信输出，使得基于输出的监控方法本质上无效。现有方法无法区分这两种情况，需要更深入的机制理解。
AI.method: 提出统一的几何框架：（1）在自回归生成的隐藏状态空间中，学得事实形成吸引子盆地；（2）冲突被建模为盆地竞争，幻觉为盆地缺失；（3）使用几何裕度（隐藏状态到最近记忆盆地的距离）直接读取几何结构。通过合成任务（LoRA适配器植入事实）和自然语言任务进行验证。
AI.result: 几何裕度能比输出熵更干净地区分正确召回与幻觉（零错误拒绝），且在未适配的预训练模型上同样成立。自信幻觉的比例随规模呈标度律 C = exp(-c/Δ̄)，即随规模增长而增加。输出头系统性擦除隐藏状态中的认知状态信息，且这种擦除随规模扩大而加剧。
AI.conclusion: 隐藏状态可靠编码了认知状态，但冻结的输出头系统性地擦除了这种信息，且擦除随规模扩大而恶化。几何裕度作为一种无需微调的直接检测方法，可以有效识别幻觉。

title: A Unified Benchmark for Evaluating Knowledge Graph Construction Methods and Graph Neural Networks
summary: Knowledge graphs automatically constructed from text are increasingly used in real-world applications. However, their inherent noise, fragmentation, and semantic inconsistencies significantly affect the performance of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) on downstream tasks. Assessing their performance and robustness remains difficult, as it is often unclear whether observed results stem from the learning model or from the quality of the constructed graph itself. In this work, we introduce a dual-purpose benchmark designed to jointly evaluate (i) the performance of GNNs on noisy, text-derived graphs and (ii) the effectiveness of graph construction methods on a downstream task. The benchmark is built in the biomedical domain from a single textual corpus and includes two automatically constructed graphs generated using different extraction methods, alongside a high-quality reference graph curated by experts that serves as an upper performance bound. This design enables controlled comparison of construction methods and systematic evaluation of GNN robustness through semi-supervised node classification. We further provide a standardized, reproducible, and extensible evaluation framework, facilitating the integration of new graph extraction methods and learning models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个双用途基准，用于同时评估图神经网络(GNN)在噪声文本构建图上的性能以及图构建方法的效果。基准在生物医学领域构建，包含两种自动构建图和专家构建的高质量参考图，通过半监督节点分类实现系统评估。
AI.motivation: 从文本自动构建的知识图谱存在噪声、碎片化和语义不一致等问题，导致难以区分GNN性能下降是由于模型本身还是图质量所致，因此需要一种能够解耦这两个因素的评估方法。
AI.method: 在生物医学领域，基于同一文本语料库，采用不同方法自动构建两张图，同时引入专家构建的高质量参考图作为性能上界。通过半监督节点分类任务，实现图构建方法和GNN鲁棒性的联合评估。
AI.result: 提供了标准化、可重复、可扩展的评估框架，支持集成新的图构建方法和学习模型。通过参考图与自动构建图的对比，可量化不同构建方法对下游任务的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该基准能够有效解耦图构建质量与GNN模型性能，为从文本构建知识图谱的质量评估提供了系统化工具，有助于推动相关领域的发展。

title: Sharper Guarantees for Misspecified Kernelized Bandit Optimization
summary:
Existing guarantees for misspecified kernelized bandit optimization pay for misspecification through kernel complexity: in generic offline bounds, the misspecification level $\varepsilon$ is multiplied by $\sqrt{d_\mathrm{eff}}$, where $d_\mathrm{eff}$ is the kernel effective dimension, while in online regret bounds, the corresponding penalty is $\sqrt{γ_n}\,n\varepsilon$, where $γ_n$ is the maximum information gain after $n$ rounds of interaction.
  In this work, we show that, for a large class of kernels, the misspecification amplification can be reduced to logarithmic or polylogarithmic growth. In the offline setting, we first prove high-probability simple-regret bounds whose misspecification term is governed by a spectral Lebesgue constant. This yields logarithmic amplification for one-dimensional monotone spectra and polylogarithmic amplification for multivariate Fourier-diagonal product kernels. In the online setting, we modify a domain-splitting algorithm and prove a cumulative regret bound of $\widetilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{γ_n n}+n\varepsilon)$ under mild localized eigendecay assumptions, removing the extra $\sqrt{γ_n}$ factor from the misspecification term. The common principle is localization: spectral localization controls the Lebesgue constant of the offline approximation operator, while domain splitting implements the spatial analogue of this mechanism in the online setting, preventing local misspecification errors from being amplified globally.

AI.tldr: 本文提出局部化策略，将核化bandit优化中错误规范惩罚从复杂度（如$\sqrt{d_\mathrm{eff}}$或$\sqrt{\gamma_n}$）降低到对数或多项式对数增长，覆盖离线和在线两种场景。
AI.motivation: 现有核化bandit优化方法在处理模型错误规范时，错误惩罚项会乘以核复杂度因子（如$\sqrt{d_\mathrm{eff}}$或$\sqrt{\gamma_n}$），导致随数据增加而放大。本文旨在消除这一额外放大，实现更紧的错误界。
AI.method: 1) 离线场景：利用谱Lebesgue常数控制近似算子的错误传播，对一维单调谱和对角化乘积核分别得到对数/多项式对数放大。2) 在线场景：修改域分割算法，在温和局部特征衰减假设下证明累积遗憾界为$\widetilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{\gamma_n n}+n\varepsilon)$，去掉了$\sqrt{\gamma_n}$因子。核心思想是局部化——谱局部化控Lebesgue常数，域分割实现空间上的局部化。
AI.result: 离线：错误规范项的放大因子从$\sqrt{d_\mathrm{eff}}$降至对数/多项式对数水平。在线：累积遗憾中错误项从$\sqrt{\gamma_n}n\varepsilon$降至$n\varepsilon$，去除了$\sqrt{\gamma_n}$的额外放大。
AI.conclusion: 局部化是降低核化bandit问题中错误规范惩罚的核心机制，谱局部化和空间局部化分别适用于离线和在线场景，显著改善了现有边界。

title: Non-Myopic Active Feature Acquisition via Pathwise Policy Gradients
summary: Active feature acquisition (AFA) considers prediction problems in which features are costly to obtain and the learner adaptively decides which feature values to acquire for each instance and when to stop and predict. AFA can be formulated as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP), which naturally admits a sequential decision-making perspective. In this paper, we present non-myopic pathwise policy gradients (NM-PPG), a new AFA method built around this formulation. We introduce a continuous relaxation of the acquisition process that enables pathwise gradients through the full acquisition trajectory, avoiding the high variance of standard score-function policy gradients while allowing end-to-end optimization of a non-myopic acquisition policy. To better align training with deployment, we further develop a straight-through rollout scheme that follows hard feature acquisitions in the forward pass while backpropagating through the corresponding soft relaxation in the backward pass. We stabilize optimization with entropy regularization and staged temperature sharpening. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that NM-PPG yields superior performance relative to state-of-the-art AFA baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NM-PPG方法，通过连续松弛和直通式 rollout 实现非贪心的端到端特征获取策略优化，在AFA任务上优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 传统AFA方法要么是贪心的，要么使用高方差的score-function策略梯度。本文希望实现非贪心的、低方差的端到端优化策略。
AI.method: 1) 将AFA建模为POMDP；2) 引入连续松弛使路径梯度可通过整个获取轨迹；3) 提出直通式rollout方案（前向硬决策、反向软松弛）；4) 熵正则化与温度退火稳定优化。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，NM-PPG优于SOTA的AFA基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 非贪心的路径梯度方法能有效解决AFA问题，直通式rollout和连续松弛是关键设计。

title: TIDE: Every Layer Knows the Token Beneath the Context
summary: We revisit a universally accepted but under-examined design choice in every modern LLM: a token index is looked up once at the input embedding layer and then permanently discarded. This single-injection assumption induces two structural failures: (i) the Rare Token Problem, where a Zipf-type distribution of vocabulary causes rare-token embeddings are chronically under-trained due to receiving a fraction of the cumulative gradient signal compared to common tokens; and (ii) the Contextual Collapse Problem, where limited parameters models map distributionally similar tokens to indistinguishable hidden states. As an attempt to address both, we propose TIDE, which augments the standard transformer with EmbeddingMemory: an ensemble of K independent MemoryBlocks that map token indices to context-free semantic vectors, computed once and injected into every layer through a depth-conditioned softmax router with a learnable null bank. We theoretically and empirically establish the benefits of TIDE in addressing the issues associated with single-token identity injection as well as improve performance across multiple language modeling and downstream tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现代LLM中一个被普遍接受但未经充分检验的设计——每个token索引仅在输入嵌入层查询一次后即被永久丢弃（单次注入假设）。这种设计导致稀有token训练不足（稀有token问题）和语义相似token隐藏状态难以区分（上下文坍缩问题）。为此提出TIDE方法，通过嵌入记忆（EmbeddingMemory）机制，将token索引映射为上下文无关的语义向量，并在每一层通过深度条件软路由注入，有效缓解上述问题。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM中token索引仅在输入嵌入层注入一次即被丢弃，这种"单次注入假设"带来了两个结构性问题：稀有token因梯度累积不足而训练不充分（稀有token问题），以及参数有限的模型难以区分分布相似的token（上下文坍缩问题）。
AI.method: 提出TIDE方法，增强标准Transformer模型，核心是EmbeddingMemory机制——由K个独立的MemoryBlock组成的集成模块，将token索引映射为上下文无关的语义向量；通过深度条件软路由（depth-conditioned softmax router）和可学习空银行（learnable null bank）在每个层注入这些向量。
AI.result: 理论分析和实验结果表明TIDE能有效解决单次token身份注入带来的问题，并在多个语言建模和下游任务中提升性能。
AI.conclusion: TIDE通过跨层多次注入token身份信息，弥补了传统单次注入设计的缺陷，既改善了稀有token的训练效果，又增强了模型对不同token的区分能力，是一种有效的Transformer架构改进方案。

title: DataDignity: Training Data Attribution for Large Language Models
summary: Auditing language-model outputs often requires more than judging correctness: an auditor may need to identify which source document most likely supports the knowledge expressed in a response. We study this as pinpoint provenance: given a prompt, a target-model response, and a candidate corpus, rank the documents that best support the response. We introduce FakeWiki, a controlled benchmark of 3,537 fabricated Wikipedia-style articles designed to preserve ground-truth provenance while weakening lexical shortcuts. FakeWiki includes QA probes, source-preserving paraphrases, retro-generated variants, hard anti-documents that remain topically similar while removing answer-critical facts, and five query conditions: clean prompting plus four jailbreak-inspired transformations. We evaluate seven retrieval baselines, a training-free activation-steering retrieval-fusion method, SteerFuse, and a supervised contrastive provenance ranker, ScoringModel. ScoringModel maps response and document features into a shared space and is trained with InfoNCE using in-batch, retrieval-mined, and anti-document negatives. Across nine open-weight instruction-tuned LLMs and five query conditions, ScoringModel improves mean Recall@10 from 35.0 for the strongest retrieval baseline to 52.2, without inference-time fusion, and wins 41/45 model-by-condition cells. SteerFuse is usually second-best despite requiring no supervised training, showing that activation-space evidence can efficiently complement text retrieval. On jailbreak-inspired transformed queries, ScoringModel improves Recall@10 by 15.7 points on average over the best baseline. Overall, our work shows that robust training data attribution requires evaluation settings that separate true answer support from topical or lexical resemblance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究语言模型输出的溯源问题，提出了FakeWiki基准数据集和两种方法（ScoringModel和SteerFuse），其中ScoringModel在Recall@10上从35.0提升至52.2，显著优于现有检索基线。
AI.motivation: 语言模型输出的审计不仅需要判断正确性，还需要识别哪个源文档最可能支持回答中的知识。现有方法容易受词汇相似性和主题相似性干扰，缺乏能够区分真正答案支持与表面相似性的可靠溯源方法。
AI.method: 提出FakeWiki基准（含3,537篇虚构维基文章）、ScoringModel（监督对比溯源排序器，使用InfoNCE损失和多种负样本）和SteerFuse（免训练的激活空间检索融合方法）。
AI.result: ScoringModel在9种LLM和5种查询条件下，平均Recall@10从35.0提升至52.2，在41/45个模型-条件组合中表现最佳；SteerFuse通常排名第二。对越狱变换查询，ScoringModel的Recall@10平均提升15.7个点。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的训练数据归因需要能够区分真正答案支持与主题或词汇相似性的评估设置，激活空间证据可以有效补充文本检索。

title: Bayesian Rain Field Reconstruction using Commercial Microwave Links and Diffusion Model Priors
summary: Commercial Microwave Links (CMLs) offer dense spatial coverage for rainfall sensing but produce path-integrated measurements that make accurate ground-level reconstruction challenging. Existing methods typically oversimplify CMLs as point sensors and neglect line integration relating rainfall to signal attenuation, resulting in degraded performance under heterogeneous precipitation. In this work, we view rain field reconstruction as a Bayesian inverse problem with Diffusion Models (DMs) as high-fidelity spatial priors. We show that diffusion models better preserve key rainfall statistics compared to censored Gaussian processes. Framing rainfall estimation as a Bayesian inverse problem with a DM prior enables training-free posterior sampling using a broad family of methods, including Plug-and-Play, Sequential Monte Carlo, and Replica Exchange methods. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over established CML-based reconstruction baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用扩散模型作为高保真空间先验，将降雨场重建视为贝叶斯逆问题，通过训练无关的后验采样方法（Plug-and-Play、序贯蒙特卡洛、副本交换等）从微波链路路径积分衰减数据中重建地面降雨分布，在合成和真实数据集上均优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将商用微波链路（CML）简化为点传感器，忽略了降雨与信号衰减之间的路径积分关系，在降水异质性条件下性能严重下降。亟需一种能有效利用CML路径积分测量信息、并保留降雨空间统计特性的高精度重建方法。
AI.method: 将降雨场重建形式化为贝叶斯逆问题，采用扩散模型（DM）作为高保真空间先验；利用Plug-and-Play、序贯蒙特卡洛、副本交换等家族方法实现免训练的后验采样，从而在不重新训练模型的前提下完成从路径积分衰减数据到地面降雨分布的推理。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界数据集上，该方法一致优于基于CML的现有重建基线；扩散模型相比删失高斯过程能更好地保留关键降雨统计量（如极值、空间结构等）。
AI.conclusion: 将扩散模型作为先验与贝叶斯逆问题框架结合，是提升CML降雨重建精度的有效途径，尤其适用于异质性降水场景，且具备良好的灵活性和泛化能力。

title: UniPrefill: Universal Long-Context Prefill Acceleration via Block-wise Dynamic Sparsification
summary: As large language models (LLMs) continue to advance rapidly, they are becoming increasingly capable while simultaneously demanding ever-longer context lengths. To improve the inference efficiency of long-context processing, several novel low-complexity hybrid architectures have recently been proposed, effectively alleviating the computational burden of long-context inference. However, existing research on long-context prefill acceleration remains predominantly focused on sparse attention mechanisms, which achieve their maximum speedup only on full-attention models. When transferred to emerging architectures--such as linear/full attention hybrids or sliding window/full attention hybrids--these prefill acceleration approaches suffer significant performance degradation. Furthermore, such methods are generally incompatible with continuous batching, making them difficult to integrate into modern inference engines such as vLLM. To this end, we propose UniPrefill, a prefill acceleration framework applicable to virtually any model architecture, which directly accelerates the model's computation at the token level. We further implement UniPrefill as a continuous batching operator and extend vLLM's scheduling strategy to natively support prefill-decode co-processing and tensor parallel for UniPrefill, enabling its seamless integration into vLLM. UniPrefill achieves up to 2.1x speedup in Time-To-First-Token (TTFT), with the acceleration becoming increasingly pronounced as the number of concurrent requests grows.

AI.tldr: 提出UniPrefill框架，通过token级计算加速和连续批处理集成，在多种模型架构上实现最高2.1倍的TTFT加速。
AI.motivation: 现有长上下文预填充加速方法主要针对稀疏注意力机制，无法有效迁移到线性/全注意力混合或滑动窗口/全注意力混合等新兴架构，且与连续批处理不兼容。
AI.method: 提出UniPrefill，一种适用于任意模型架构的token级预填充加速框架；将其实现为连续批处理算子；扩展vLLM调度策略以原生支持预填充-解码协同处理和张量并行。
AI.result: TTFT加速最高达2.1倍，且随并发请求数增加加速效果更显著。
AI.conclusion: UniPrefill能够无缝集成到vLLM等现代推理引擎中，有效解决多种架构下的长上下文预填充加速问题。

title: GCCM: Enhancing Generative Graph Prediction via Contrastive Consistency Model
