summary: Conditional generative models, particularly diffusion-based methods, have recently been applied to graph prediction by modeling the target as a conditional distribution given the input graph, yielding competitive results compared to deterministic predictor. However, existing diffusion-based prediction methods typically require expensive iterative denoising at inference and often suffer from unstable sampling, which motivates recent efforts to reduce inference denoising steps and enable stable sampling via techniques such as consistency training. Despite this progress, we find that existing consistency training methods for graph prediction could potentially fall into a shortcut solution: the model may attempt to satisfy the self-consistency constraint by ignoring the noisy target (i.e., assigning it negligible weight), ultimately collapsing into a purely deterministic predictor. To mitigate such shortcut solution, we propose GCCM, a graph contrastive consistency model that goes beyond isolated pairwise matching between the same target at different noise levels by introducing negative pairs into a contrastive consistency objective. This adds an additional separation requirement, making the shortcut solution no longer trivially sufficient to satisfy the proposed objective. Moreover, we apply feature perturbation to the input node/edge features to break identical conditioning on the input graph, so that the shortcut no longer yields the same predictions across noise levels and becomes less attractive. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that GCCM mitigates the shortcut solution and yields consistent performance improvements in graph prediction compared to deterministic predictors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GCCM（图对比一致性模型），通过引入对比一致性目标和特征扰动策略，解决现有图预测任务中一致性训练方法存在的捷径解问题（模型忽略含噪目标退化为确定性预测器），在基准数据集上取得了优于确定性预测器的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散的图预测方法需要昂贵的迭代去噪，且存在采样不稳定问题。虽然一致性训练可减少去噪步数，但现有方法存在捷径解：模型可能忽略含噪目标（赋予其可忽略的权重）来满足自一致性约束，最终退化为纯确定性预测器。
AI.method: 1) 提出图对比一致性模型（GCCM），在一致性目标中引入负样本对，构建对比一致性损失，增加分离要求使捷径解不再满足目标；2) 对输入节点/边特征施加扰动，打破对输入图的相同条件化，使捷径解在不同噪声水平下产生不同预测从而不再有吸引力。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的大量实验表明，GCCM有效缓解了捷径解问题，相比确定性预测器在图预测任务上取得了一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过对比学习和特征扰动两种策略，成功解决了图预测中一致性模型的捷径解问题，为扩散模型在图预测任务中的高效推理提供了更稳定的方案。

title: Approximate Next Policy Sampling: Replacing Conservative Target Policy Updates in Deep RL
summary: We revisit a classic "chicken-and-egg" problem in reinforcement learning: to safely improve a policy, the value function must be accurate on the state-visitation distribution of the updated policy. That distribution over states is unknown and cannot be sampled for the purposes of training the value function. Conservative updates solve this problem, but at the cost of shrinking the policy update. This paper explores an alternative solution, Approximate Next Policy Sampling (ANPS), which addresses the problem by modifying the training distribution rather than constraining the policy update. ANPS is satisfied if the distribution of the training data approximates that of the next policy. To demonstrate the feasibility and efficacy of ANPS, we introduce Stable Value Approximate Policy Iteration (SV-API). SV-API modifies the standard approximate policy iteration loop to hold the target policy fixed while an iteratively updated behavioral policy gathers relevant experience. It only commits to a new policy once a convergence criterion has been met. If certain stability criteria are met, the update is guaranteed to be safe; otherwise, it remains no less safe than standard approximate policy iteration. Applying SV-API to PPO yields Stable Value PPO (SV-PPO), which matches or improves performance on high-dimensional discrete (Atari) and continuous control benchmarks while executing substantially larger target policy updates. These results demonstrate the viability of ANPS as a new solution to this classic challenge in RL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出近似下一策略采样（ANPS）框架，通过修改训练数据分布而非约束策略更新来解决强化学习中的"鸡生蛋"问题。基于此，作者开发了稳定值近似策略迭代（SV-API）算法及其PPO变体SV-PPO，在Atari和连续控制基准测试中匹配或超越基线性能，并能够执行更大的目标策略更新。
AI.motivation: 强化学习中存在经典难题：要安全改进策略，值函数必须在更新后策略的状态访问分布上保持准确，但该分布未知且无法采样。传统保守更新方法通过缩小策略更新幅度来妥协，作者希望探索一种不牺牲更新幅度的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出ANPS框架，通过让训练数据分布近似下一策略的分布来解决该问题。具体实现为SV-API：修改标准近似策略迭代流程，固定目标策略，使用迭代更新的行为策略收集相关经验，仅在满足收敛准则后才提交新策略。将SV-API应用于PPO得到SV-PPO。
AI.result: SV-PPO在高维离散控制（Atari）和连续控制基准测试中匹配或提升了性能，同时能够执行显著更大的目标策略更新。满足特定稳定性准则时，更新保证安全；否则也不比标准近似策略迭代更不安全。
AI.conclusion: ANPS作为解决RL中"鸡生蛋"问题的新方案具有可行性，证明了通过修改训练分布而非约束策略更新来安全地进行策略改进的路径有效。

title: Grokking or Glitching? How Low-Precision Drives Slingshot Loss Spikes
summary: Deep neural networks exhibit periodic loss spikes during unregularized long-term training, a phenomenon known as the "Slingshot Mechanism." Existing work usually attributes this to intrinsic optimization dynamics, but its triggering mechanism remains unclear. This paper proves that this phenomenon is a result of floating-point arithmetic precision limits. As training enters a high-confidence stage, the difference between the correct-class logit and the other logits may exceed the absorption-error threshold. Then during backpropagation, the gradient of the correct class is rounded exactly to zero, while the gradients of the incorrect classes remain nonzero. This breaks the zero-sum constraint of gradients across classes and introduces a systematic drift in the parameter update of the classifier layer. We prove that this drift forms a positive feedback loop with the feature, causing the global classifier mean and the global feature mean to grow exponentially. We call this mechanism Numerical Feature Inflation (NFI). This mechanism explains the rapid norm growth before a Slingshot spike, the subsequent reappearance of gradients, and the resulting loss spike. We further show that NFI is not equivalent to an observed loss spike: in more practical tasks, partial absorption may not produce visible spikes, but it can still break the zero-sum constraint and drive rapid growth of parameter norms. Our results reinterpret Slingshot as a numerical dynamic of finite-precision training, and provide a testable explanation for abnormal parameter growth and logit divergence in late-stage training.

AI.tldr: 本文证明深度神经网络训练中的周期性损失尖峰（Slingshot Mechanism）是由浮点数精度限制引起的。当正确类别的logit与其他类别的logit差异超过吸收误差阈值时，正确类别的梯度被精确舍入为零，破坏了梯度的零和约束，导致分类器均值和特征均值指数增长，形成正反馈循环，这一机制被称为数值特征膨胀（Numerical Feature Inflation, NFI）。
AI.motivation: 已有研究将Slingshot现象归因于优化动力学，但其触发机制尚不清楚。本文旨在揭示这一现象的底层原因。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明浮点数精度限制导致梯度舍入为零，破坏零和约束，产生正反馈循环（NFI机制），并区分了NFI与可见损失尖峰的关系。
AI.result: NFI机制解释了Slingshot尖峰前的快速范数增长、梯度重新出现以及损失尖峰的产生。部分吸收情况下虽无可见尖峰，但仍会驱动参数范数快速增长。
AI.conclusion: 将Slingshot重新解释为有限精度训练下的数值动力学现象，为训练后期的参数异常增长和logit发散提供了可检验的解释。

title: YEZE at SemEval-2026 Task 9: Detecting Multilingual, Multicultural and Multievent Online Polarization via Heterogeneous Ensembling
comment: Accepted to the SemEval-2026 workshop of the ACL 2026 conference
summary: This paper presents our system for SemEval-2026 Task 9: Detecting Multilingual, Multicultural and Multievent Online Polarization, which identifies polarized social media content in 22 languages through three subtasks: binary detection, target classification, and manifestation identification. We propose a heterogeneous ensemble of multilingual pretrained models, combining XLM-RoBERTa-large and mDeBERTa-v3-base. We investigate techniques such as multi-task learning, translation-based data augmentation, and class weighting to improve classification performance under severe label imbalance. Our findings indicate that independent task modeling combined with class weighting is more effective.

AI.tldr: 本文针对SemEval-2026 Task 9多语言多文化多事件在线极化检测任务，提出了一种基于XLM-RoBERTa-large和mDeBERTa-v3-base的异构集成模型，通过独立任务建模与类别加权策略处理22种语言的极化检测，实验表明该方法优于多任务学习和数据增强技术。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体极化现象日益严重，但现有检测方法多局限于单一语言或单一事件。该任务覆盖22种语言、包含二元检测、目标分类和表现识别三个子任务，需要应对严重的标签不平衡问题，因此需要设计高效的多语言极化检测系统。
AI.method: 采用异构集成策略，融合XLM-RoBERTa-large和mDeBERTa-v3-base两个多语言预训练模型；对比研究了多任务学习、基于翻译的数据增强和类别加权等多种技术；最终采用独立任务建模+类别加权作为最优方案。
AI.result: 实验表明，独立任务建模搭配类别加权策略在多语言极化检测中效果最佳，优于多任务学习和翻译数据增强方法。
AI.conclusion: 对于多语言社交媒体极化检测任务，异构集成预训练模型结合独立建模和类别加权是处理跨语言标签不平衡问题的有效方案。

title: Saliency-Aware Regularized Quantization Calibration for Large Language Models
summary: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is an effective approach for deploying large language models (LLMs) under memory and latency constraints. Most existing PTQ methods determine quantization parameters by minimizing a layer-wise reconstruction error on a predetermined calibration dataset, usually optimized via either scale search or Gram-based methods. However, from the perspective of generalization risk, existing calibration objectives of PTQ based only on empirical reconstruction error on limited or unrepresentative calibration data could move the quantized weights away from the original weights. This may cause the generalization risk to diverge, potentially degrading downstream performance. To address this issue, we propose \emph{Saliency-Aware Regularized Quantization Calibration} (SARQC) a unified framework that augments the standard PTQ objective with a saliency-aware regularization term. This term encourages quantized weights to stay close to the original weights during calibration, leading to improved generalization during inference. SARQC integrates seamlessly into existing PTQ pipelines, enhancing both scale search and Gram-based methods under a unified formulation. Extensive experiments on dense and Mixture-of-Experts LLMs demonstrate consistent improvements in perplexity and zero-shot accuracy, without additional computational overhead during inference.

AI.tldr: 提出SARQC框架，通过显著性感知正则化项增强量化校准，使量化权重接近原始权重，提升PTQ的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有PTQ方法仅基于有限校准数据上的经验重构误差确定量化参数，可能导致量化权重偏离原始权重，泛化风险发散，损害下游性能。
AI.method: 在标准PTQ目标中加入显著性感知正则化项，鼓励量化权重在校准过程中保持接近原始权重，统一整合到scale search和Gram-based方法中。
AI.result: 在密集和MoE大语言模型上，困惑度和零样本准确率持续提升，且推理时无额外计算开销。
AI.conclusion: SARQC是一种即插即用的统一框架，能有效改善PTQ的泛化能力，且不增加推理负担。

title: A Robust Foundation Model for Conservation Laws: Injecting Context into Flux Neural Operators via Recurrent Vision Transformers
summary: We propose an architecture that augments the Flux Neural Operator (Flux NO), which combines the classical finite volume method (FVM) with neural operators, with ViT-based context injection. Our model is formulated as a hypernetwork: it extracts solution dynamics over a finite temporal window, encodes them with a recurrent Vision Transformer, and generates the parameters of a context-conditioned neural operator. This enables the model to infer and solve conservation laws without explicit access to the governing equation or PDE coefficients. Experimentally, we show that the proposed method preserves the robustness, generalization ability, and long-time prediction advantages of Flux NO over standard neural operators, while delivering reliable numerical solutions across a broad range of conservative systems, including previously unseen fluxes. Our code is available at https://github.com/xx257xx/CONTEXT_FLUX_NO.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合Flux Neural Operator与ViT上下文注入的架构，通过超网络形式从有限时间窗口提取动力学特征，生成上下文条件的神经算子参数，从而在未知PDE系数下求解守恒律，保持了Flux NO的鲁棒性、泛化能力和长时预测优势。
AI.motivation: 现有的Flux NO虽然结合了有限体积法与神经算子，但在处理未知通量/未知PDE系数（即无显式控制方程）的保守系统时仍有局限。作者希望进一步提升模型对未知动力学的适应能力，使其能直接从观测数据推断守恒律并求解。
AI.method: 采用超网络架构：先用循环Vision Transformer (ViT) 对有限时间窗口内的解动力学进行编码，然后据此生成上下文条件化的神经算子参数。该上下文条件注入使得Flux NO能根据观测到的动态特征调整自身行为，无需显式给出PDE系数。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持Flux NO相对于标准神经算子的鲁棒性、泛化能力和长时间预测优势的同时，能够在广泛的保守系统（包括未见过的通量）上提供可靠的数值解。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的上下文条件化Flux NO架构有效提升了模型对未知保守系统的适应能力，在无显式PDE信息下仍能准确求解，拓展了神经算子在物理模拟中的适用场景。

title: PACE: Prune-And-Compress Ensemble Models
summary: Ensemble models achieve state-of-the-art performance on prediction tasks, but usually require aggregating a large number of weak learners. This can hinder deployment, interpretability, and downstream tasks such as robustness verification. Remedies to this issue fall into two main camps: pruning, which discards redundant learners, and compression, which generates new ones from scratch. We introduce PACE, a framework that interleaves these paradigms in a two-phase strategy. First, new learners are actively generated via a theoretically grounded procedure to enhance the diversity of the initial ensemble. When no more relevant learners can be found, a second phase of pruning is performed on this enriched ensemble. During both operations, PACE allows fine control on the faithfulness to the original ensemble. Experiments show that our method outperforms prior pruning and compression methods while offering principled control of faithfulness guarantees.

AI.tldr: PACE是一个两阶段框架，先主动生成新学习器增强集成多样性，再剪枝冗余学习器，在保证对原始集成保真度的同时优于现有剪枝与压缩方法。
AI.motivation: 集成模型虽性能优异，但大量弱学习器导致部署困难、可解释性差及鲁棒性验证受阻；现有剪枝（丢弃冗余）与压缩（从头生成）方法各自独立，缺乏联合优化思路。
AI.method: 提出PACE框架，采用两阶段策略：阶段一基于理论驱动的过程主动生成新学习器以增强多样性；阶段二对增强后的集成执行剪枝。两阶段均可精细控制对原始集成的保真度。
AI.result: 实验表明PACE在性能上优于现有剪枝与压缩方法，同时提供了原则性的保真度控制机制。
AI.conclusion: 将生成与剪枝有机结合的两阶段策略是提升集成模型实用性的有效路径，且保真度可控。

title: Temporal Functional Circuits: From Spline Plots to Faithful Explanations in KAN Forecasting
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, 6 tables, plus appendix. Under review at NeurIPS 2026
summary: Unlike MLPs, Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) expose explicit learnable edge functions on every connection, enabling mechanistic explanation in time-series forecasting. This paper introduces Temporal Functional Circuits, a framework that transforms KAN edge functions from latent visualizations into faithful, temporally grounded explanations. Built on a gated residual KAN that decomposes forecasts into a linear base and a sparsely activated KAN correction, the framework (i) maps each edge to input lags via output-aware attribution, (ii) ranks edges by learned activation range, and (iii) validates faithfulness through edge-level interventions including zeroing and spline removal. Removing the learned B-spline component while retaining the base SiLU term degrades forecasts, providing evidence that the spline shape itself carries predictive value beyond the base activation. On four synthetic regimes of increasing complexity, the learned gate opens progressively wider as signal complexity grows. On regime-switching signals, gated KAN achieves 59% lower MSE than linear-only models. Across eight benchmarks, the gated architecture is competitive with linear, attention, and MLP alternatives, while providing interpretable edge functions that MLP-based corrections cannot offer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出时间功能电路框架，将KAN边函数从潜在可视化转化为忠实、时间可解释的因果解释，通过门控残差KAN分解预测为线性基与稀疏KAN修正，并验证了B样条形状本身具有预测价值。
AI.motivation: MLP无法提供可解释的边函数，而KAN虽暴露显式可学习边函数，但其可视化缺乏时间维度上的忠实解释，因此需要一种能生成时间上可解释、因果忠实的方法。
AI.method: 构建门控残差KAN（gated residual KAN），将预测分解为线性基和稀疏激活的KAN修正；通过输出感知归因将每条边映射到输入滞后；按学习激活范围排序边；通过零化消除和样条移除进行边级干预验证忠实性。
AI.result: 在四种复杂度递增的合成机制上，门控随信号复杂度增加逐渐打开；在机制切换信号上，门控KAN的MSE比纯线性模型低59%；在8个基准上，门控架构与线性、注意力和MLP方案竞争力相当，同时提供MLP无法提供的可解释边函数。
AI.conclusion: 移除B样条组件（保留基座SiLU项）会降低预测性能，证明样条形状本身携带超越基座激活的预测价值，验证了框架的忠实性。

title: Rethinking RL for LLM Reasoning: It's Sparse Policy Selection, Not Capability Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning has become the standard for improving reasoning in large language models, yet evidence increasingly suggests that RL does not teach new strategies; it redistributes probability mass over solutions the base model already contains. In this work, we ask: if RL merely steers the model toward paths it already knows, is the RL optimization loop itself necessary? Through token-level analysis across multiple model families and RL algorithms, we find that RL's beneficial footprint is a sparse, predictable correction concentrated at high-entropy decision points where the model is uncertain which branch to take. Only 1--3\% of token positions are affected, the promoted token always lies within the base model's top-5 alternatives, and targeted corrections at those few positions causally recover a large fraction of RL's accuracy gain, while random corrections fail. The base model's own entropy identifies these positions without any RL-trained model, and the entire correction is low-dimensional, representable in a tiny fraction of model parameters. These findings reframe reasoning improvement as sparse policy selection, not capability acquisition. We translate this insight into ReasonMaxxer, a minimal RL-free method that applies contrastive loss only at entropy-gated decision points, using a few hundred base-model rollouts and no online generation. Across three model families, six scales, and six math reasoning benchmarks, ReasonMaxxer matches or exceeds full RL performance while requiring only tens of problems and minutes of single-GPU training, a reduction in training cost of roughly three orders of magnitude.

AI.tldr: 本文发现强化学习（RL）提升大语言模型推理能力的本质并非学习新策略，而是在高熵决策点上（模型不确定的分支）对已有token进行稀疏且可预测的校正（仅影响1-3%的位置）。据此提出ReasonMaxxer，一种无需RL的方法，仅对熵门控位置的对比损失进行优化，用极少量样本和分钟级单GPU训练即可达到甚至超越完整RL的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有证据表明RL并未教会模型新策略，而是重新分配已有解的分布。作者质疑：如果RL只是引导模型走向已知路径，那RL优化循环本身是否必要？
AI.method: 通过token级分析，发现RL的改进集中在高熵决策点（模型不确定性高的分支），且被提升的token始终在基座模型top-5备选内。据此提出ReasonMaxxer：仅在熵门控的决策点上应用对比损失，无需在线生成，仅需几百条基座模型 rollout 和几分钟单GPU训练。
AI.result: 在3个模型家族、6种规模、6个数学推理基准上，ReasonMaxxer以极低代价（数十道问题、分钟级单GPU训练）匹配或超越完整RL性能，训练成本降低约三个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 推理改进的本质是稀疏策略选择（sparse policy selection），而非能力获取（capability acquisition）。RL的优化循环可以被大幅简化。

title: Inference-Time Budget Control for LLM Search Agents
summary: LLM search agents increasingly rely on tools at inference time, but their trajectories are often constrained by hard limits on both tool calls and generated tokens. Under such dual budgets, better answers require not only stronger models, but also explicit control over which search action should receive the next budget unit and when the accumulated evidence is sufficient to commit a final answer. We study this problem in multi-hop question answering (QA) and formulate it as two-stage inference-time budget control. At search time, our controller assigns each feasible action a task-level Value-of-Information (VOI) score, defined as an operational estimate of marginal task value per unit budget under the current search state and remaining dual budget, and uses this score to choose among retrieval, decomposition, and answer commitment. After search, a selective evidence-grounded finalizer compares the trajectory answer with a refined candidate and rewrites only when the residual error appears to be a low-risk answer-form error. Across four multi-hop QA benchmarks, three LLM backbones, and four budget levels, the method yields positive aggregate gains over four audited baselines under the same hard dual-budget protocol. Ablations show that search-time budget control, especially budget-dependent penalty, provides the main performance gain, while answer-time control helps mainly when the retrieval path is already adequate. These results suggest that inference-time budget control for LLM search agents should govern both how budget is spent during search and how the final answer is committed.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多跳问答中LLM搜索代理在双重预算（工具调用次数和生成tokens）限制下的推理时预算控制问题。提出了一种两阶段方法：搜索阶段基于信息价值（VOI）分配预算，答案阶段选择性修正最终答案。实验表明该方法在四个基准、三个模型和四种预算水平下均优于基线。
AI.motivation: LLM搜索代理在推理时依赖工具，但受限于工具调用次数和生成tokens的双重硬预算。在这种限制下，更好的答案不仅需要更强的模型，还需要明确控制搜索动作的预算分配以及何时提交最终答案。现有方法缺乏对这种双重预算下推理时预算控制的研究。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为两阶段推理时预算控制：1）搜索阶段：控制器为每个可行动作计算任务级信息价值（VOI）分数，基于当前搜索状态和剩余双重预算估计边际任务价值/单位预算，并据此在检索、分解和答案提交间做出选择；2）答案阶段：选择性证据验证最终答案，仅在低风险情况下重写。
AI.result: 在四个多跳问答基准、三个LLM骨干网络和四种预算水平下，该方法在相同硬双重预算协议下相比四个基线获得正向聚合增益。消融实验显示搜索阶段预算控制（尤其是预算依赖惩罚）是主要性能来源，答案阶段控制主要在检索路径充足时起作用。
AI.conclusion: 推理时预算控制应同时管理搜索阶段的预算分配和最终答案的提交方式。这为LLM搜索代理在资源受限场景下的高效推理提供了新方向。

title: MEMOA: Massive Mixtures of Online Agents via Mean-Field Decentralized Nash Equilibria
summary: In the modern age of large-scale AI, federated learning has become an increasingly important tool for training large populations of AI agents; however, its computational and communication costs can rapidly fail to scale with the number of agents. This is precisely where decentralized agentic strategies shine: each agent acts autonomously, using only its own state together with a minimal summary of the ensemble, namely the mean-field. We derive the unique optimal decentralized policy in closed form. Optimality is characterized through a worst-client/minimax criterion: minimizing the under-performer regret, namely the maximal online cost incurred by the weakest agent in the ensemble. We further prove that the resulting decentralized policy asymptotically converges, in the large-population limit, to the Nash-optimal centralized policy, whose direct computation is not scalable. We use an online weighting mechanism to optimize the server-computed mixture of client predictions, thereby improving the mean prediction in addition to the previously optimized weakest-client prediction. Numerical experiments verify our theoretical guarantees and demonstrate that our decentralized policy typically outperforms natural greedy decentralized baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联邦学习中的去中心化最优策略，通过最小化最弱客户端的遗憾值，在理论上证明该策略在大规模群体极限下收敛到不可扩展的纳什最优集中式策略，并通过在线加权机制进一步优化整体预测性能。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中，随着智能体数量增加，计算和通信成本难以扩展；而去中心化策略中每个智能体仅基于自身状态和均值场（即整体摘要）自主行动。作者希望在这种设置下找到最优的去中心化策略。
AI.method: 采用最差客户端/极小极大准则（最小化表现最弱智能体的遗憾值）推导唯一最优去中心化策略的闭式解；通过在线加权机制优化服务器聚合的客户端预测混合结果，从而改善均值预测。
AI.result: 证明了该去中心化策略在大规模群体极限下渐近收敛到纳什最优集中式策略；数值实验验证了理论保证，并表明该策略优于自然的贪婪去中心化基线。
AI.conclusion: 提出的去中心化最优策略在可扩展性和性能之间取得了良好平衡，不仅保护了最弱客户端，还能通过在线加权提升整体预测质量。

title: Linear Semantic Segmentation for Low-Resource Spoken Dialects
summary: Semantic segmentation is a core component of discourse analysis, yet existing models are primarily developed and evaluated on high-resource written text, limiting their effectiveness on low-resource spoken varieties. In particular, dialectal Arabic exhibits informal syntax, code-switching, and weakly marked discourse structure that challenge standard segmentation approaches. In this paper, we introduce a new multi-genre benchmark (more than 1000 samples) for semantic segmentation in conversational Arabic, focusing on dialectal discourse. The benchmark covers transcribed casual telephone conversations, code-switched podcasts, broadcast news, and expressive dialogue from novels, and was annotated and validated by native Arabic annotators. Using this benchmark, we show that segmentation models performing well on MSA news genres degrade on dialectal transcribed speech. We further propose a segmentation model that targets local semantic coherence and robustness to discourse discontinuities, consistently outperforming strong baselines on dialectal non-news genres. The benchmark and approach generalize to other low-resource spoken languages.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向阿拉伯语方言会话的语义分割多体裁基准（超1000样本），发现现有模型在方言口语上性能下降，并提出了一种针对局部语义连贯性和话语不连续性的分割模型，在方言非新闻体裁上持续优于强基线。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割模型主要面向高资源书面文本，对低资源方言口语（如阿拉伯语方言）效果有限，因其存在非正式句法、语码转换和弱标记的话语结构。
AI.method: 构建多体裁基准（电话会话、语码转换播客、广播新闻、小说对话），由母语者标注验证；提出面向局部语义连贯性和话语不连续鲁棒性的分割模型。
AI.result: 在MSA新闻体裁上表现良好的分割模型在方言转录语音上性能下降；提出的模型在方言非新闻体裁上持续优于强基线。
AI.conclusion: 该基准和方法可推广到其他低资源口语语言。

title: Knowledge-Graph Paths as Intermediate Supervision for Self-Evolving Search Agents
summary: Self-evolving search agents reduce reliance on human-written training questions by generating and solving their own search tasks. We build on Search Self-Play (SSP), a representative Proposer and Solver framework in which questions are generated and answered via multi-step search and reasoning. In practice, however, SSP faces two bottlenecks: the Proposer constructs questions from isolated answer entities without relational context, yielding many invalid or unverifiable questions in early self-play training, while the Solver receives only a binary outcome reward that discards useful signal from partially on-track search trajectories. We address both bottlenecks by reusing knowledge-graph paths as construction-derived intermediate supervision for both question construction and reward shaping. First, we ground question construction in LLM-guided knowledge-graph subgraphs, providing relational context for the Proposer. Second, we observe that constructing and solving a multi-hop question can involve overlapping intermediate entities: the factual bridges used to formulate the question may provide approximate waypoints for answering it. Exploiting this overlap, we introduce Waypoint Coverage Reward (WCR), which grants graded partial credit to incorrect Solver trajectories according to their coverage of entities on the construction path, while preserving full reward for correct answers. Across seven QA benchmarks and nine model configurations, our approach improves the average score over standard SSP in all configurations, including notable gains on multi-hop QA tasks. These results suggest that knowledge-graph paths can be reused as lightweight intermediate supervision, providing both relational guidance and process feedback without additional task-specific human annotations or manually labeled process steps.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用知识图谱路径作为中间监督信号，改进自进化搜索代理中的问题构建和奖励塑造，解决了现有SSP框架中无效问题多和奖励稀疏两大瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有的自进化搜索代理（SSP框架）中，Proposer从孤立的答案实体构建问题，缺乏关系上下文，导致大量无效或不可验证的问题；同时Solver仅接收二元结果奖励，丢弃了部分正确搜索轨迹中的有用信号。
AI.method: 1) 将问题构建基于LLM引导的知识图谱子图，为Proposer提供关系上下文；2) 提出Waypoint Coverage Reward (WCR)，根据Solver轨迹对构建路径中实体的覆盖程度给予分级部分奖励，同时保留完全正确答案的全额奖励。
AI.result: 在7个QA基准和9种模型配置上，该方法在所有配置中均优于标准SSP，在多跳QA任务上提升尤为显著。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱路径可被复用为轻量级中间监督信号，提供关系引导和过程反馈，无需额外的人工标注或手动标记的过程步骤。

title: Shortcut Solutions Learned by Transformers Impair Continual Compositional Reasoning
summary: Identifying and exploiting common features across domains is at the heart of the human ability to make analogies, and is believed to be crucial for the ability to continually learn. To do this successfully, general and flexible computational strategies must be developed. While the extent to which Transformer neural network models can perform compositional reasoning has been the subject of intensive recent investigation, little work has been done to systematically understand how well these models can leverage their representations to learn new, related experiences. To address this gap, we expand the previously developed Learning Equality and Group Operations (LEGO) framework to a continual learning (CL) setting ("continual LEGO"). Using this continual LEGO experimental paradigm, we study the capability of feedforward and recurrent Transformer models to perform CL. We find that BERT, a canonical feedforward Transformer model, learns shortcut solutions that limits its ability to generalize and prevents strong forward transfer to new experiences. In contrast, we find evidence supporting the hypothesis that ALBERT, a recurrent version of BERT, learns a For loop-esque solution, which leads to better CL performance. When applying BERT and ALBERT models to a CL setting that requires composition across experiences, we find that both model families fail. Our investigation suggests that ALBERT models can have their performance drop rescued by use of training strategies that combine data across experiences, but this is not true for BERT models, where a detrimental shortcut solution becomes entrenched with initial training. Our results demonstrate that the recurrent ALBERT model may have an inductive bias better suited for CL and motivate future investigation of the interplay between Transformer architecture and computational solutions that emerge in modern models and tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了LEGO框架至持续学习（CL）场景（称为"continual LEGO"），系统比较了前馈Transformer（BERT）和循环Transformer（ALBERT）在持续学习中的表现。研究发现BERT倾向于学习捷径解，限制了泛化和前向迁移能力；而ALBERT则学习了类似For循环的解决方案，表现出更好的持续学习性能。但在需要跨经验组合的CL场景中，两种模型均失败。ALBERT的性能下降可通过跨经验联合训练策略得到缓解，而BERT的捷径解在初始训练后变得根深蒂固，难以改善。
AI.motivation: 填补Transformer模型在利用其表征能力学习新相关经验方面的系统性研究空白，探索这些模型能否像人类一样通过识别跨域共同特征进行类比学习和持续学习。
AI.method: 将LEGO框架扩展至持续学习设置（continual LEGO），使用该实验范式系统比较前馈Transformer（BERT）和循环Transformer（ALBERT）在持续学习任务中的表现，并分析不同训练策略（如跨经验数据联合训练）的效果。
AI.result: 1) BERT学习捷径解，限制了泛化能力和前向迁移；2) ALBERT学习类似For循环的解决方案，持续学习性能更优；3) 在需要跨经验组合的CL场景中，两种模型均失败；4) 跨经验联合训练可挽救ALBERT的性能下降，但对BERT无效。
AI.conclusion: 循环Transformer模型（ALBERT）可能具有更适合持续学习的归纳偏好，为未来研究Transformer架构与现代模型中涌现的计算解决方案之间的相互作用提供了启示。

title: Distributionally-Robust Learning to Optimize
summary: We propose a distributionally robust approach to learning hyperparameters for first-order methods in convex optimization. Given a dataset of problem instances, we minimize a Wasserstein distributionally robust version of the performance estimation problem (PEP) over algorithm parameters such as step sizes. Our framework unifies two extremes: as the robustness radius vanishes, we recover classical learning to optimize (L2O); as it grows, we recover worst-case optimal algorithm design via PEP. We solve the resulting problem with stochastic gradient descent, differentiating through the solution of an inner semidefinite program at each step. We prove high-probability bounds showing that the true risk of the learned algorithm is at most the in-sample L2O optimum plus a slack that shrinks with the sample size, and is no worse than the worst-case PEP bound. On unconstrained quadratic minimization, LASSO, and linear programming benchmarks, our learned algorithms achieve strong out-of-sample performance with certifiable robustness, outperforming both worst-case optimal and vanilla L2O baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分布鲁棒优化的超参数学习方法，用于凸优化中的一阶算法。该方法通过Wasserstein分布鲁棒优化性能估计问题(PEP)来调整算法参数(如步长)，统一了经典"学习优化"(L2O)和最坏情况最优算法设计(PEP)两个极端。实验表明，该方法在无约束二次最小化、LASSO和线性规划等任务上优于传统基线。
AI.motivation: 现有"学习优化"(L2O)方法虽然在特定问题分布上表现良好，但泛化性差、缺乏鲁棒性保证；而传统的性能估计问题(PEP)方法提供最坏情况保证，但过于保守。作者希望在这两个极端之间取得平衡，即在保证一定鲁棒性的同时，利用数据分布信息学习更优的算法参数。
AI.method: 提出Wasserstein分布鲁棒优化框架：给定问题实例数据集，最小化Wasserstein分布鲁棒版本的PEP问题。鲁棒半径为零时退化为L2O，半径增大时退化为最坏情况PEP。采用随机梯度下降求解，每一步需要微分求解内层半定规划(SDP)问题。
AI.result: 在高概率下，学习算法的真实风险被证明不超过样本内L2O最优值加上随样本量缩小的松弛项，且不差于最坏情况PEP界。在无约束二次最小化、LASSO和线性规划基准测试中，学习到的算法在保证可证鲁棒性的同时，实现了强泛化性能，超越了最坏情况最优算法和普通L2O基线。
AI.conclusion: 该工作成功统一了数据驱动的L2O和理论驱动的PEP两种范式，提供了一种兼具数据适应性和鲁棒性保证的算法超参数学习方法。框架的灵活性(通过鲁棒半径调节)为实现泛化-鲁棒性权衡提供了有效工具。

title: Quantifying the Statistical Effect of Rubric Modifications on Human-Autorater Agreement
summary: Autoraters, also referred to as LLM-as-judges, are increasingly used for evaluation and automated content moderation. However, there is limited statistical analysis of how modifications in a rubric presented to both humans and autoraters affect their score agreement. Rubrics that ask for an overall or \emph{holistic} judgment - for example, rating the ``quality'' of an essay - may be inconsistently interpreted due to the complexity or subjectivity of the criteria. Conversely, rubrics can ask for \emph{analytic} judgments, which decompose assessment criteria - for example, ``quality'' into ``fluency'' and ``organization''. While these rubrics can be edited to improve the individual accuracy of both human and automated scoring, this approach may result in disagreement between the two scores, or with the associated holistic judgment. Designing and deploying reliable autoraters requires understanding not just the relationship between human and autorater annotations but how that relationship changes as holistic or analytic judgments are elicited. The results indicate that rubric edits providing representative examples and additional context, and reducing positional bias in the rubric increased human-autorater agreement, while higher rubric complexity and conservative aggregation methods tended to decrease it. The findings from the automatic essay scoring and instruction-following evaluation domains suggest that practitioners should carefully analyze domain- and rubric-specific performance to move towards higher human-autorater agreement.

AI.tldr: 研究分析评分标准（rubric）的修改如何影响人类与AI评分者（autoraters）之间的一致性，发现提供示例和上下文、减少位置偏差能提高一致性，而复杂的评分标准和保守的聚合方法会降低一致性。
AI.motivation: Autoraters（LLM-as-judges）被广泛用于评估和内容审核，但评分标准（rubric）的修改如何影响人机评分一致性尚缺乏统计分析，特别是整体性（holistic）与分析性（analytic）评分标准的不同影响。
AI.method: 通过统计分析方法，研究rubric修改（如增加示例、提供上下文、减少位置偏差、提高复杂性、改变聚合方法）对人与autorater评分一致性的影响，并在自动作文评分和指令遵循评估两个领域进行实验。
AI.result: 提供代表性示例和额外上下文、减少位置偏差的rubric修改能提高人机一致性；而更高的rubric复杂性和保守的聚合方法会降低一致性。
AI.conclusion: 设计可靠的autorater需要理解人机标注关系如何随整体性或分析性评分标准变化，建议实践者仔细分析领域和rubric特定的性能以提高人机一致性。

title: Resolving the bias-precision paradox with stochastic causal representation learning for personalized medicine
summary: Estimating individualized treatment effects from longitudinal observational data is central to data-driven medicine, yet existing methods face a fundamental limitation: reducing confounding bias often suppresses clinically informative heterogeneity, degrading patient-specific predictions. Here, we identify this tension as a bias-precision paradox in causal representation learning and introduce sampling-based maximum mean discrepancy (sMMD), a stochastic alignment strategy that replaces global adversarial balancing with subset-level matching. We instantiate this approach in a framework for counterfactual outcome prediction with attribution-grounded interpretability. Across two large-scale ICU cohorts (n = 27,783), our framework improves accuracy under distribution shift, reducing error by up to 11.5% and substantially increasing recall in high-risk tasks. Mechanistic analyses show that sMMD selectively preserves clinically decisive variables. In human-AI evaluation, our method outperforms clinicians-in-training and large language models, and improves clinician accuracy by 14.7% while reducing decision time, enabling interpretable, real-time clinical decision support.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于采样的最大均值差异（sMMD）方法，解决因果表示学习中偏差-精度悖论，通过子集级匹配替代全局对抗平衡，在ICU大规模队列中提升个体化治疗效果估计的准确性与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在减少混淆偏差时往往会抑制临床异质性，导致患者个体化预测精度下降。作者识别出这一偏差-精度悖论，旨在通过新的对齐策略缓解该矛盾。
AI.method: 提出采样最大均值差异（sMMD），一种随机对齐策略，用子集级匹配替代全局对抗平衡；实例化为反事实结果预测框架，并集成归因可解释性。
AI.result: 在两大ICU队列（n=27,783）上，分布偏移下误差降低11.5%，高风险任务召回率大幅提升；人机评估中优于实习医生和大型语言模型，辅助临床医生准确率提升14.7%，决策时间缩短。
AI.conclusion: sMMD通过选择性保留临床关键变量，在不牺牲精度的情况下有效去偏，为可解释、实时的临床决策支持提供了可行方案。

title: Online Localized Conformal Prediction
summary: Conformal prediction is a framework that provides valid uncertainty quantification for general models with exchangeable data. However, in the online learning and time-series settings, exchangeability is not satisfied. Existing online conformal methods, such as adaptive conformal inference (ACI), can achieve long-run validity, yet they remain inefficient under covariate heterogeneity because they rely on global calibration. We propose \emph{Online Localized Conformal Prediction (OLCP)}, which combines online adaptation with covariate-dependent localization to better reflect heterogeneity. To reduce sensitivity to the localization bandwidth, we further develop \emph{OLCP-Hedge}, which performs bandwidth selection as an online expert aggregation problem using a constrained online convex optimization framework. Importantly, we provide coverage guarantees for both algorithms and demonstrate through simulations and real-data experiments that the proposed methods attain valid long-run coverage with narrower prediction sets than existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在线局部保形预测（OLCP）及其改进版本OLCP-Hedge，通过结合在线适应与协变量相关的局部校准，在非可交换的在线学习与时间序列场景中实现更窄的预测集且保证长期覆盖有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的在线保形方法（如ACI）在协变量异质性下效率低下，因为它们依赖全局校准，无法反映局部数据分布的差异。
AI.method: 提出OLCP（在线适应+协变量依赖的局部校准），并进一步提出OLCP-Hedge，将带宽选择转化为在线专家聚合问题，使用约束在线凸优化框架。
AI.result: 仿真和真实数据实验表明，所提方法在保证有效长期覆盖率的同时，预测集比现有基线更窄。
AI.conclusion: OLCP及其变体能够在非可交换场景下实现更高效的（更窄预测集）不确定性量化，同时维持长期覆盖有效性。

title: When and Why SignSGD Outperforms SGD: A Theoretical Study Based on $\ell_1$-norm Lower Bounds
summary: Sign-based optimization algorithms, such as SignSGD and Muon, have garnered significant attention for their remarkable performance in training large foundation models. Despite this empirical success, we still lack a theoretical understanding of when and why these sign-based methods outperform vanilla SGD. The core obstacle is that under standard smoothness and finite variance conditions, SGD is known to be minimax optimal for finding stationary points measured by $\ell_2$-norms, thereby fundamentally precluding any complexity gains for sign-based methods in standard settings. To overcome this barrier, we analyze sign-based optimizers leveraging $\ell_1$-norm stationarity, $\ell_\infty$-smoothness, and a separable noise model, which can better capture the coordinate-wise nature of signed updates. Under this distinct problem geometry, we derive matched upper and lower bounds for SignSGD and explicitly characterize the problem class in which SignSGD provably dominates SGD. Specifically, we compare the \emph{upper bound of SignSGD} with the \emph{lower bound of SGD}, illustrating that SignSGD effectively reduces the complexity by a factor of $d$ under \emph{sparse noise}, where $d$ is the problem dimension. Furthermore, we elevate this framework to the matrix domain, providing an equivalent optimal lower bound for the Muon optimizer, proving that extending the sign operator to matrices preserves this optimal scaling with dimensionality. Finally, we bridge our theoretical bounds to practice, demonstrating that the theoretical superiority of SignSGD accurately predicts its faster convergence during the pretraining of a 124M parameter GPT-2 model.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上证明了符号优化算法（SignSGD和Muon）在ℓ∞-光滑性和稀疏噪声假设下，相比于SGD可实现d倍（维度因子）的复杂度降低，并通过GPT-2预训练实验验证了理论优势。
AI.motivation: 尽管符号优化算法（SignSGD、Muon）在训练大模型方面表现出色，但理论上缺乏对其为何优于SGD的理解。核心障碍在于标准ℓ₂范数下SGD已被证明是极小化最优的，无法解释符号方法的优势。
AI.method: 提出使用ℓ₁范数平稳性、ℓ∞-光滑性和可分离噪声模型来分析符号优化器，推导SignSGD的匹配上下界，并将框架扩展到矩阵领域以分析Muon优化器。
AI.result: 推导出SignSGD在稀疏噪声下相比SGD可将复杂度降低d倍；为Muon优化器提供了等价的最优下界，证明符号算子扩展到矩阵后保持了维度上的最优缩放。
AI.conclusion: 理论优势在124M参数GPT-2预训练中得到验证，符号优化器的理论优越性准确预测了其更快的收敛速度。

title: Bandit Learning in General Open Multi-agent Systems
summary: Recent developments in digital platforms have highlighted the prevalence of open systems, where agents can arrive and depart over time. While bandit learning in open systems has recently received initial attention, existing work imposes structural assumptions that are frequently violated in practice. A learning paradigm for general open systems creates fresh challenges: newly arriving agents induce endogenous non-stationarity; agent patterns determine how quickly information accumulates; and new agents make regret scale further with the time horizon. To this end, we formulate a unified open-system bandit problem with general dynamics, including heterogeneous rewards and general agent patterns. We introduce new concepts to capture the inherent complexities: the \emph{pre-training degree} of new agents quantifies how much information an agent carries upon entry, \emph{stability} measures the impact of new agents on the system, and \emph{global dynamic regret} compares the cumulative expected reward of all active agents with that of the varying optimal arms. We develop certified global-UCB learning methodologies with provable guarantees. Our regret bounds reveal that entry uncertainty enters linearly via the pre-training degree, while in stable regimes, regret is governed by the time needed to identify a persistent optimal arm, as well as by the agent patterns. We further show that these dependencies are tight via lower bounds in hard instances.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了开放系统中多智能体在线学习的通用问题，提出了开放系统多臂老虎机（Open-System Bandit）的统一定义，引入预训练度、稳定性、全局动态遗憾等新概念，并设计了具有理论保证的全局上置信界（Global-UCB）算法，从理论上刻画了新智能体进入对系统学习效率的根本影响。
AI.motivation: 现有开放系统学习研究均施加了结构性假设，无法适用于智能体到达/离开模式多样、奖励异构的真实场景；新智能体不断进入引发的内生非平稳性、信息累积速度的异质性、以及遗憾随时间增长的扩张效应，亟需一个统一的通用理论框架。
AI.method: 提出开放系统多臂老虎机统一模型（含异构奖励与一般智能体到达模式）；定义预训练度（量化新智能体携带的初始信息）、稳定性（度量新智能体对系统的扰动程度）、全局动态遗憾（对比所有活动智能体累计期望收益与动态最优收益）；设计全局-UCB学习算法，并给出上界保证；构造困难实例以证明下界紧致性。
AI.result: 遗憾上界表明：新智能体进入不确定性以预训练度的形式线性进入遗憾；在稳定系统中，遗憾由识别持久最优臂所需时间及智能体到达模式共同决定；通过下界证明这些依赖关系是紧的（tight）。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了开放系统在线学习的通用理论基础，揭示了新智能体进入所引入的非平稳性与信息瓶颈的内在结构，为未来异构动态环境下的自适应学习系统设计提供了理论指引。

title: LatentRAG: Latent Reasoning and Retrieval for Efficient Agentic RAG
summary: Single-step retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) provides an efficient way to incorporate external information for simple question answering tasks but struggles with complex questions. Agentic RAG extends this paradigm by replacing single-step retrieval with a multi-step process, in which the large language model (LLM) acts as a search agent that generates intermediate thoughts and subqueries to iteratively interact with the retrieval system. This iterative process incurs substantial latency due to the autoregressive generation of lengthy thoughts and subqueries. To address this limitation, we propose LatentRAG, a novel framework that shifts both reasoning and retrieval from discrete language space to continuous latent space. Unlike existing explicit methods that generate natural language thoughts or subqueries token-by-token, LatentRAG produces latent tokens for thoughts and subqueries directly from the hidden states in a single forward pass. We align LLMs with dense retrieval models in the latent space, enabling retrieval over latent subquery tokens and supporting end-to-end joint optimization. To improve transparency and encourage semantically meaningful latent representations, we incorporate a parallel latent decoding mechanism that translates latent tokens back into natural language. Extensive experiments on seven benchmark datasets show that LatentRAG achieves performance comparable to explicit agentic RAG methods while reducing inference latency by approximately 90%, substantially narrowing the latency gap with traditional single-step RAG.

AI.tldr: LatentRAG将Agentic RAG的推理和检索过程从离散语言空间转移到连续潜在空间，通过单次前向传播生成潜在token，在保持性能的同时将推理延迟降低约90%。
AI.motivation: 现有Agentic RAG方法虽然能处理复杂问题，但多步迭代过程（生成中间思考文本和子查询）导致严重的推理延迟。作者希望在不牺牲性能的前提下大幅降低延迟。
AI.method: 提出LatentRAG框架，将LLM的思考和子查询生成从逐token的自回归生成转变为在连续潜在空间中直接生成潜在token；将LLM与稠密检索模型在潜在空间对齐，实现端到端联合优化；引入并行潜在解码机制将潜在token翻译回自然语言以提升可解释性。
AI.result: 在七个基准数据集上，LatentRAG的性能与显式Agentic RAG方法相当，但推理延迟降低了约90%，大幅缩小了与传统单步RAG的延迟差距。
AI.conclusion: LatentRAG有效地解决了Agentic RAG的高延迟问题，证明了将推理和检索迁移到连续潜在空间的可行性，为构建高效且强大的RAG系统提供了新方向。

title: Conceal, Reconstruct, Jailbreak: Exploiting the Reconstruction-Concealment Tradeoff in MLLMs
summary: Intent-obfuscation-based jailbreak attacks on multimodal large language models (MLLMs) transform a harmful query into a concealed multimodal input to bypass safety mechanisms. We show that such attacks are governed by a \emph{reconstruction--concealment tradeoff}: the transformed input must hide harmful intent from safety filters while remaining recoverable enough for the victim model to reconstruct the original request. Through a reconstruction analysis of three representative black-box methods, we find that existing transformations struggle to balance this tradeoff, limiting their effectiveness. In contrast, we show that character-removed variants achieve a better balance. Building on this, we propose \emph{concealment-aware variant construction}, which greedily selects character-removed variants that are low in harmful-keyword alignment and mutually diverse, and instantiates them through five modality-aware prompting strategies. We further introduce \emph{keyword-related distractor images} that depict the harmful keyword in diverse contexts, providing more effective auxiliary visual context than generic distractor images. Experiments across closed-source and open-source MLLMs show the proposed strategies outperform strong baselines, revealing an underexplored vulnerability: a model's own reconstruction ability can be exploited to recover hidden harmful intent and produce unsafe responses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于意图混淆的多模态大语言模型越狱攻击，揭示重构-隐藏权衡，并提出字符移除变体与关键词干扰图像两种新策略，有效绕过安全机制。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒越狱攻击方法在隐藏有害意图与保持可重构性之间存在矛盾，难以有效平衡，攻击效果有限。
AI.method: 提出隐蔽感知变体构建方法，贪心选择低有害关键词对齐且多样化的字符移除变体；设计关键词相关干扰图像，提供更有效的辅助视觉上下文；结合五种模态感知提示策略。
AI.result: 在闭源和开源MLLM上的实验表明，所提策略优于强基线方法，揭示了模型自身重构能力可被利用来恢复隐藏的有害意图并产生不安全响应。
AI.conclusion: MLLM的重构能力是一把双刃剑——既能理解用户意图，也可能被攻击者利用来绕过安全防护，需警惕这一未充分探索的漏洞。

title: Optimizer-Model Consistency: Full Finetuning with the Same Optimizer as Pretraining Forgets Less
summary: Optimizers play an important role in both pretraining and finetuning stages when training large language models (LLMs). In this paper, we present an observation that full finetuning with the same optimizer as in pretraining achieves a better learning-forgetting tradeoff, i.e., forgetting less while achieving the same or better performance on the new task, than other optimizers and, possibly surprisingly, LoRA, during the supervised finetuning (SFT) stage. We term this phenomenon optimizer-model consistency. To better understand it, through controlled experiments and theoretical analysis, we show that: 1) optimizers can shape the models by having regularization effects on the activations, leading to different landscapes around the pretrained checkpoints; 2) in response to this regularization effect, the weight update in SFT should follow some specific structures to lower forgetting of the knowledge learned in pretraining, which can be obtained by using the same optimizer. Moreover, we specifically compare Muon and AdamW when they are employed throughout the pretraining and SFT stages and find that Muon performs worse when finetuned for reasoning tasks. With a synthetic language modeling experiment, we demonstrate that this can come from Muon's strong tendency towards rote memorization, which may hurt pattern acquisition with a small amount of data, as for SFT.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大语言模型监督微调时，使用与预训练相同的优化器（即"优化器-模型一致性"）能实现更好的学习-遗忘权衡，比使用不同优化器或LoRA更少遗忘预训练知识。通过实验和理论分析，揭示了优化器通过正则化效应影响模型激活和损失景观，以及Muon优化器在推理任务微调中表现较差的原因——其倾向于死记硬背，不利于小样本下的模式学习。
AI.motivation: 探索监督微调阶段不同优化器对预训练知识遗忘的影响，发现优化器-模型一致性现象，并试图解释其背后的机制。
AI.method: 通过对比实验（预训练与微调使用相同/不同优化器、LoRA）、理论分析优化器对激活的正则化效应，以及合成语言建模实验比较Muon与AdamW的行为差异。
AI.result: 1) 相同优化器在SFT中遗忘更少且性能不差；2) 优化器通过正则化效应塑造激活分布和损失景观；3) Muon在推理微调中表现差因其强死记硬背倾向。
AI.conclusion: 微调时应尽量保持与预训练一致的优化器以保护预训练知识；Muon优化器虽在预训练中有效，但在数据量少的微调阶段不利于推理能力获取。

title: Attributions All the Way Down? The Metagame of Interpretability
summary: We introduce the metagame, a conceptual framework for quantifying second-order interaction effects of model explanations. For any first-order attribution $φ(f)$ explaining a model $f$, we measure the directional influence of feature $j$ on the attribution of feature $i$, denoted as meta-attribution $\varphi_{j \to i}(f)$, by treating the attribution method itself as a cooperative game and computing its Shapley value. Theoretically, we prove that attributions hierarchically decompose into meta-attributions, and establish these as directional extensions of existing interaction indices. Empirically, we demonstrate that the metagame delivers insights across diverse interpretability applications: (i) quantifying token interactions in instruction-tuned language models, (ii) explaining cross-modal similarity in vision-language encoders, and (iii) interpreting text-to-image concepts in multimodal diffusion transformers.

AI.tldr: 提出元博弈框架，通过将归因方法本身视为合作博弈并计算其Shapley值，量化模型解释的二阶交互效应（元归因），从理论上证明归因可分层分解为元归因，并在多个可解释性任务中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型归因方法主要关注一阶特征重要性，但忽略了特征之间的二阶交互对归因结果本身的影响。作者希望量化"一个特征的归因如何受另一个特征影响"这一元层次上的交互效应。
AI.method: 将归因方法本身视为一个合作博弈，计算其Shapley值作为元归因。具体而言，对于模型f的任意一阶归因φ(f)，定义特征j对特征i归因的方向性影响为元归因φ_{j→i}(f)。
AI.result: 理论上证明了归因可分层分解为元归因，并建立了其与现有交互指标的联系。实验在三个场景中验证：指令微调语言模型中的token交互量化、视觉语言编码器的跨模态相似性解释、多模态扩散Transformer中的文到图概念解释。
AI.conclusion: 元博弈框架为理解模型解释中的二阶交互效应提供了统一的理论基础和实用工具，能够揭示一阶归因无法捕捉的隐含交互关系。

title: Log-Likelihood, Simpson's Paradox, and the Detection of Machine-Generated Text
summary: The ability to reliably distinguish human-written text from that generated by large language models is of profound societal importance. The dominant approach to this problem exploits the likelihood hypothesis: that machine-generated text should appear more probable to a detector language model than human-written text. However, we demonstrate that the token-level signal distinguishing human and machine text is non-uniform across the hidden space of the detector model, and naively averaging likelihood-based token scores across regions with fundamentally different statistical structure, as most detectors do, causes a form of Simpson's paradox: a strong local signal is destroyed by inappropriate aggregation. To correct for this, we introduce a learned local calibration step grounded in Bayesian decision theory. Rather than aggregating raw token scores, we first learn lightweight predictors of the score distributions conditioned on position in hidden space, and aggregate calibrated log-likelihood ratios instead. This single intervention dramatically and consistently improves detection performance across all baseline detectors and all datasets we consider. For example, our calibrated variant of Fast-DetectGPT improves AUROC from $0.63$ to $0.85$ on GPT-5.4 text, and a locally-calibrated DMAP detector we introduce achieves state-of-the-art performance across the board. That said, our central contribution is not a new detector, but a precise diagnosis of a significant cause of under-performance of existing detectors and a principled, modular remedy compatible with any token-averaging pipeline. This will serve as a foundation for the community to build upon, with natural avenues including richer distributional models, improved calibration strategies, and principled ensembling with hidden-space geometry signals via the full Bayes-optimal decision rule.

AI.tldr: 现有基于似然假设的机器文本检测方法因忽略隐空间中token信号的非均匀分布而产生辛普森悖论，导致检测性能下降。本文通过贝叶斯决策理论引入局部校准步骤，在隐空间不同区域学习得分分布预测器并聚合校准后的对数似然比，显著提升了检测效果，例如Fast-DetectGPT在GPT-5.4文本上的AUROC从0.63提升至0.85。
AI.motivation: 现有机器文本检测方法普遍基于似然假设（机器生成文本对检测模型更可几），但简单平均token级别的似然得分会忽视隐空间中不同区域的统计结构差异，产生辛普森悖论，破坏了原本存在的强局部信号。作者旨在诊断并解决这一根本性问题。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯决策理论，引入局部校准步骤：首先学习轻量级预测器，估计隐空间中不同位置条件下的得分分布；然后在各区域分别计算校准后的对数似然比，替代原始的raw token得分聚合方式。该方法可作为模块插入任何基于token平均的检测流水线。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和基线检测器上，局部校准一致且显著提升检测性能。例如，Fast-DetectGPT在GPT-5.4文本上的AUROC从0.63提升至0.85；局部校准的DMAP检测器在所有测试场景下达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 本文的贡献不在于提出新检测器，而在于精确诊断了现有检测器性能不佳的重要原因（辛普森悖论），并提供了模块化、原则性的解决方案。该工作为后续研究奠定了基础，包括更丰富的分布模型、改进的校准策略，以及通过完全贝叶斯最优决策规则融合隐空间几何信号等方向。

title: Decodable but Not Corrected by Fixed Residual-Stream Linear Steering: Evidence from Medical LLM Failure Regimes
comment: 22 pages (14 main + 8 appendix), 5 figures, 7 tables. Under review
summary: Can linearly decodable failure signals in LLM hidden states be leveraged to correct those failures? We investigate this classification-correction gap via Overthinking (OT)--a stable behavioral regime (Jaccard >= 0.81, 94% inter-annotator agreement) in medical QA where models answer correctly under resampling yet fail in extended chain-of-thought. OT is linearly decodable at 71.6% balanced accuracy (p < 10^{-16}). Yet five families of fixed linear steering (29 configurations, n=1,273) all yield Delta ~= 0, with identical null results cross-architecture (Qwen2.5-7B) and cross-domain (MMLU-STEM). Three convergent lines of evidence suggest representational entanglement: the OT direction has 85-88% overlap with task-critical computation (specificity ratio <= 0.152); non-targeted shared-direction steering damages accuracy (-12.1pp); and LEACE concept erasure damages accuracy (-3.6pp, p=0.01), while 10 random erasures produce Delta=+0.3pp. The per-instance probe-steering correlation is r=-0.002 (p=0.97). Positively, the same probe enables selective abstention (held-out AUROC=0.610, exceeding all five uncertainty baselines, p=0.009): decodable failure structure supports post-generation reliability estimation even when the fixed linear steering family cannot exploit it for correction.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM隐藏状态中线性可解码的失败信号能否用于纠正错误。在医疗QA的"过度思考"(OT)行为中，模型在重采样时回答正确，但在长链思维中失败。OT以71.6%平衡准确率可线性解码，但五种固定线性干预均无效(Delta≈0)。证据表明存在"表征纠缠"：OT方向与任务关键计算高度重叠(85-88%)，干预会破坏准确率。最终发现，同一探针可用于选择性弃权（AUROC=0.610，优于所有不确定性基线），即解码失败结构可用于事后可靠性估计，但固定线性干预无法利用它进行纠正。
AI.motivation: 探究LLM隐藏状态中线性可解码的失败信号能否被用于纠正模型的错误行为，即验证"分类-纠正"之间的差距是否存在。
AI.method: 定义"过度思考"(Overthinking, OT)行为模式，使用线性探针检测OT状态（71.6%平衡准确率），然后尝试五种固定线性干预方法（29种配置，n=1,273）进行纠正，同时进行表征纠缠分析（重叠度、特异性比、概念擦除等），最后测试探针用于选择性弃权的效果。
AI.result: 五种固定线性干预均无效(Delta≈0)，跨架构和跨领域结果一致。OT方向与任务关键计算重叠85-88%（特异性比≤0.152）；非目标共享方向干预使准确率下降12.1pp；LEACE概念擦除使准确率下降3.6pp（p=0.01）；探针-干预相关性r=-0.002（p=0.97）。但探针用于选择性弃权时AUROC=0.610，优于所有五种不确定性基线（p=0.009）。
AI.conclusion: 线性可解码的失败信号不等同于可利用的纠正信号，存在"分类-纠正"差距，根本原因在于表征纠缠。但解码失败结构可用于事后可靠性估计（选择性弃权），提示LLM安全性研究应区分"分类"与"干预"两个层面的可行性。

title: OpenG2G: A Simulation Platform for AI Datacenter-Grid Runtime Coordination
summary:
AI's growing compute demand and new datacenter buildouts present major capacity and reliability challenges for the electricity grid, leading to multi-year interconnection delays for new datacenters and bottlenecking AI growth. To ease this strain, datacenters increasingly offer rapid power flexibility in response to grid signals, where the datacenter can increase or decrease its power consumption by adapting its workload in real time.
  In order to understand the impact of large datacenters on the grid and to facilitate the design of effective coordination strategies, we build OpenG2G, a simulation platform for AI datacenter-grid runtime coordination. We show that OpenG2G is capable of answering a wide range of coordination questions by allowing users to implement and compare various control paradigms (including classic, optimization, and learning-based controllers), and quantify how AI model and deployment choices affect datacenter flexibility and coordination outcomes. This versatility is enabled by OpenG2G's modular and extensible architecture: a datacenter backend driven by real measurements of production-grade AI services, a grid backend built on high-fidelity grid simulators, and a generic controller interface that closes the loop between them. We describe the design of OpenG2G and demonstrate its usefulness through realistic grid scenarios and AI workloads.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpenG2G，一个用于AI数据中心与电网运行时协调的仿真平台，通过模块化架构支持多种控制范式的实现与比较，帮助缓解AI算力增长带来的电网容量与可靠性挑战。
AI.motivation: AI计算需求的快速增长和新数据中心的大规模建设给电网带来了巨大的容量和可靠性挑战，导致新数据中心并网延迟长达数年，阻碍了AI发展。需要一种工具来理解大型数据中心对电网的影响，并设计有效的协调策略。
AI.method: 构建OpenG2G仿真平台，采用模块化可扩展架构：数据中心后端基于真实生产级AI服务的测量数据，电网后端基于高保真电网仿真器，通过通用控制器接口实现两者闭环协调。支持经典控制、优化控制、基于学习的控制器等多种范式。
AI.result: OpenG2G能够回答广泛的协调问题，允许用户实现和比较多种控制范式，量化AI模型和部署选择对数据中心灵活性和协调结果的影响。通过真实电网场景和AI工作负载验证了其实用性。
AI.conclusion: OpenG2G为解决AI数据中心与电网协调问题提供了有效仿真平台，其模块化设计使其具有广泛适用性，有助于缓解AI增长带来的电网压力。

title: Why Global LLM Leaderboards Are Misleading: Small Portfolios for Heterogeneous Supervised ML
summary:
Ranking LLMs via pairwise human feedback underpins current leaderboards for open-ended tasks, such as creative writing and problem-solving. We analyze ~89K comparisons in 116 languages from 52 LLMs from Arena, and show that the best-fit global Bradley-Terry (BT) ranking is misleading. Nearly 2/3 of the decisive votes cancel out, and even the top 50 models according to the global BT ranking are statistically indistinguishable (pairwise win probabilities are at most 0.53 within the top 50 models). We trace this failure to strong, structured heterogeneity of opinions across language, task, and time. Moreover, we find an important characteristic - *language* plays a key role. Grouping by language (and families) increases the agreement of votes massively, resulting in two orders of magnitude higher spread in the ELO scores (i.e., very consistent rankings). What appears as global noise is in fact a mixture of coherent but conflicting subpopulations.
  To address such heterogeneity in supervised machine learning, we introduce the framework of $(λ, ν)$-portfolios, which are small sets of models that achieve a prediction error at most $λ$, "covering" at least a $ν$ fraction of users. We formulate this as a variant of the set cover problem and provide guarantees using the VC dimension of the underlying set system. On the Arena data, our algorithms recover just 5 distinct BT rankings that cover over 96% of votes at a modest $λ$, compared to the 21% coverage by the global ranking. We also provide a portfolio of 6 LLMs that cover twice as many votes as the top-6 LLMs from a global ranking. We further construct portfolios for a classification problem on the COMPAS dataset using an ensemble of fairness-regularized classification models and show that these portfolios can be used to detect blind spots in the data, which might be of independent interest to policymakers.

AI.tldr: 本文分析Arena中116种语言、52个LLM的约8.9万对比较，发现全局Bradley-Terry排名具有误导性（前50名模型统计上无法区分）。根源在于语言、任务、时间维度的强异质性。作者提出(λ, ν)-portfolio框架，通过少量模型覆盖异质性用户群体，在Arena数据上用5个BT排名覆盖96%投票，6个LLM覆盖两倍于全局排名前6的投票。
AI.motivation: 现有通过成对人类反馈进行LLM排名的全局方法（如Bradley-Terry模型）忽略了用户意见的异质性，导致排名结果具有误导性。作者旨在揭示这种异质性的结构化特征，并提出能处理该问题的新框架。
AI.method: 1) 统计分析Arena的~89K对比较数据，验证全局BT排名的失效程度；2) 引入(λ, ν)-portfolio框架，将其建模为集合覆盖问题的变体，利用VC维提供理论保证；3) 在Arena和COMPAS数据集上构建portfolios进行实证验证。
AI.result: 全局BT排名中前50名模型胜率差不超过0.53，2/3的有效投票相互抵消。按语言分组后ELO分数分散度提高两个数量级。提出的portfolio方法用5个BT排名覆盖96%投票（全局仅21%），6个LLM模型覆盖两倍于全局前6的投票。
AI.conclusion: LLM排名中的全局噪声实质上是多个一致但冲突子群体的混合体。语言是导致异质性的关键因素。(λ, ν)-portfolio框架能有效处理监督学习中的异质性，可应用于公平性检测和盲点发现。

title: Topological Signatures of Grokking
summary: We study the grokking phenomenon through the lens of topology. Using persistent homology on point clouds derived from the embedding matrices of a range of models trained on modular arithmetic with varying primes, we identify a clear and consistent topological signature of grokking: a sharp increase in both the maximum and total persistence of first homology ($H_1$). Persistence diagrams reveal the emergence of a dominant long-lived topological feature together with increasingly structured secondary features, reflecting the underlying cyclic structure of the task. Compared to existing spectral and geometric diagnostics -- specifically, Fourier analysis and local intrinsic dimension -- persistent homology provides a unified geometric and topological characterization of representation learning, capturing both local and global multi-scale structure. Ablations across data regimes and control settings show that these topological transitions are tied to generalization rather than memorization. Our results suggest that persistent homology offers a principled and interpretable framework for analyzing how neural networks internalize latent structure during training.

AI.tldr: 本文通过持续同调（persistent homology）分析神经网络在模算术任务上的嵌入矩阵，发现grokking现象伴随第一同调群（H₁）最大持续性和总持续性的急剧增加，拓扑特征从局部到全局的多尺度结构变化与泛化能力紧密相关，而非记忆。
AI.motivation: 现有频谱分析和局部内蕴维度等方法无法统一刻画grokking中表征学习的几何与拓扑结构变化，缺乏对多尺度全局结构的理解。作者希望通过拓扑视角（持续同调）提供更全面、可解释的分析框架。
AI.method: 对不同素数模算术训练的多组模型，从嵌入矩阵构建点云，计算持续同调（特别是H₁），分析最大持续性、总持续性及持续性图谱（persistence diagrams）的变化，并与傅里叶分析、局部内蕴维度等基线方法对比，同时进行数据消融实验。
AI.result: Grokking发生时，H₁的最大持续性和总持续性急剧上升；持续性图谱中出现主导的长寿命拓扑特征及日益结构化的次要特征，反映任务的循环结构。拓扑转变仅与泛化相关，而非记忆。持续同调统一描述了局部和全局多尺度结构，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 持续同调为分析神经网络内化潜在结构的训练过程提供了原理性且可解释的框架，能有效区分泛化与记忆，是理解grokking现象的有力工具。

title: MultiLinguahah : A New Unsupervised Multilingual Acoustic Laughter Segmentation Method
summary: Laughter is a social non-vocalization that is universal across cultures and languages, and is crucial for human communication, including social bonding and communication signaling. However, detecting laughter in audio is a challenging task, and segmenting is even more difficult. Currently, Machine Learning methods generally rely on costly manual annotation, and their datasets are mostly based on English contexts. Thus, we propose an unsupervised multilingual method that sets up the laughter segmentation task as an anomaly detection of energy-based segmented audio sequences. Our method applies an Isolation Forest on audio representations learned from BYOL-A encoder. We compare our method with several state-of-the-art laughter detection algorithms on four datasets, including stand-up comedy, sitcoms, and general short audio from AudioSet. Our results show that state-of-the-art methods are not optimized for multilingual contexts, while our method outperforms them in non-English settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督的多语言笑声分割方法，将任务视为基于能量的音频序列异常检测，采用BYOL-A编码器和孤立森林算法，在非英语场景中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 笑声在跨文化交际中至关重要，但现有方法依赖昂贵的人工标注且数据集多基于英语语境，缺乏多语言场景下的有效解决方案。
AI.method: 将笑声分割任务转化为基于能量的音频序列异常检测问题，使用BYOL-A学习音频表征，再通过孤立森林（Isolation Forest）进行检测。
AI.result: 在包含脱口秀、情景喜剧和AudioSet短音频的四个数据集上，该方法在非英语场景中优于现有最先进的笑声检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 现有方法在多语言环境下表现不佳，而所提出的无监督方法在非英语上下文中具有显著优势。

title: More Is Not Always Better: Cross-Component Interference in LLM Agent Scaffolding
summary: LLM agent systems are built by stacking scaffolding components (planning, tools, memory, self-reflection, retrieval) assuming more is better. We study cross-component interference (CCI): degradation when components interact destructively. We run a full factorial experiment over all 2^5=32 subsets of five components on HotpotQA and GSM8K with Llama-3.1-8B/70B (96 conditions, up to 10 seeds). The All-In system is consistently suboptimal: on HotpotQA, a single-tool agent surpasses All-In by 32% (F1 0.233 vs 0.177, p=0.023); on GSM8K, a 3-component subset beats All-In by 79% (0.43 vs 0.24, p=0.010). Optimal component count is task-dependent (k*=1-4) and scale-sensitive: at 70B, combinations that hurt at 8B provide gains, though All-In still trails the best subset. We fit a main-effects regression (R^2=0.916, adj-R^2=0.899, LOOCV=0.872), compute exact Shapley values, and find 183/325 submodularity violations (56.3%), showing greedy selection is unreliable. A three-body synergy among Tool Use, Self-Reflection, and Retrieval (INT_3=+0.175, 95% CI [+0.003,+0.351]) is reported as exploratory. CCI replicates across model families (Qwen2.5) and is robust to prompt paraphrasing. Our findings suggest maximally-equipped agent defaults should be replaced by task-specific subset selection via interaction-aware analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了LLM Agent系统中多组件堆叠带来的跨组件干扰（CCI）问题，通过全因子实验发现：组件并非越多越好，All-In系统始终不是最优，最优组件数量依任务而定（1-4个），且存在大量子模性违反（56.3%），说明贪心选择不可靠。建议用任务特定的交互感知子集选择替代“组件越多越好”的默认配置。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM Agent系统默认堆叠越多组件（规划、工具、记忆、自反思、检索）效果越好，但本文发现组件间存在负面交互（跨组件干扰CCI），即组件组合使用反而会相互削弱性能。
AI.method: 对5个组件进行2^5=32个子集的全面析因实验，在HotpotQA和GSM8K上用Llama-3.1-8B/70B（共96个条件，最多10个种子）评估，并拟合主效应回归（R^2=0.916），计算Shapley值和子模性检验。
AI.result: All-In系统始终非最优：HotpotQA上单工具Agent超越All-In 32%（F1 0.233 vs 0.177），GSM8K上3组件子集超越All-In 79%（0.43 vs 0.24）。最优组件数1-4个，183/325子模性违反（56.3%）。发现工具使用、自反思和检索的三体协同效应。
AI.conclusion: 应抛弃"组件越多越好"的默认配置，转而通过交互感知分析进行任务特定的子集选择。

title: Order-Agnostic Autoregressive Modelling with Missing Data
summary: Order-Agnostic autoregressive models have demonstrated strong performance in deep generative modeling, yet their use in settings with incomplete data remains largely unexplored. In this work, we reinterpret them through the lens of missing data. First, we show that their standard training procedure on fully observed data implicitly performs imputation under a missing completely at random mechanism, resulting in robust out-of-sample imputation performance in settings with high missingness. Second, we introduce the first principled framework for training them directly on incomplete datasets under general missingness mechanisms. Third, we leverage their amortized conditional density estimation to perform active information acquisition, i.e., sequentially selecting the most informative missing variables for downstream prediction or inference. Across a suite of real-world benchmarks, our Missingness-Aware Order-Agnostic Autoregressive Model (MO-ARM) consistently outperforms established imputation baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出缺失感知的顺序无关自回归模型（MO-ARM），用于处理不完整数据下的生成建模、插补和主动信息获取任务，在多个基准上超越已有方法。
AI.motivation: 顺序无关自回归模型在深度生成建模中表现优异，但尚未被应用于不完整数据场景。作者希望填补这一空白。
AI.method: 1）重新将顺序无关自回归模型解释为在完全随机缺失机制下隐式进行插补；2）提出首个在一般缺失机制下直接训练此类模型的理论框架；3）利用其摊销条件密度估计，主动选择信息量最大的缺失变量进行下游预测。
AI.result: MO-ARM在多个真实世界基准上 consistently 优于已有的插补基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 顺序无关自回归模型可有效扩展到不完整数据场景，兼具插补和主动信息获取能力，为缺失数据下的生成建模提供了新思路。

title: Detecting Time Series Anomalies Like an Expert: A Multi-Agent LLM Framework with Specialized Analyzers
comment: Preprint. 9 pages main text, 29 pages total, 8 figures, 9 tables, with appendix
summary: Recent studies have explored large language models for time-series anomaly detection, yet existing approaches often rely on a single general-purpose model to directly infer anomaly indices or intervals, limiting controllability, interpretability, and reliability for complex anomaly patterns. We propose SAGE (Specialized Analyzer Group for Expert-like Detection), a multi-agent framework for structured anomaly diagnosis in univariate time series. It decomposes anomaly analysis into four specialized Analyzers for point, structural, seasonal, and pattern anomalies. Each Analyzer applies family-specific numerical tools and diagnostic visualizations to generate evidence, while an evidence-grounded Detector consolidates the evidence into confidence-scored anomaly records with intervals and candidate types. A Supervisor then converts these structured records into analyst-facing diagnostic reports. SAGE further constructs synthetic in-context examples from normal-reference training segments, without using real anomalous segments or anomaly-type labels as in-context examples. Across three benchmarks, SAGE achieves the best average performance among strong ML/DL and language-model-based baselines. Ablation studies and human evaluation further show that the proposed framework improves detection reliability and the practical usefulness of diagnostic outputs.

AI.tldr: 提出SAGE，一个多智能体框架用于单变量时间序列异常检测，通过分解异常分析为四个专门的分析器（点异常、结构异常、季节性异常、模式异常），每个分析器使用数值工具和诊断可视化生成证据，再由检测器整合证据生成带置信度评分的异常记录，最后由监督器生成面向分析师的诊断报告。框架使用正常参考训练段构建合成上下文示例。在三个基准测试中取得最佳平均性能。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型时间序列异常检测方法常依赖单一通用模型直接推断异常指标或区间，导致对复杂异常模式的可控性、可解释性和可靠性受限。
AI.method: SAGE框架将异常分析分解为四个专门分析器（点、结构、季节性、模式异常），每个分析器使用数值工具和诊断可视化生成证据；证据驱动的检测器整合证据生成带置信度评分的异常记录（含区间和候选类型）；监督器将结构化记录转换为诊断报告。使用正常参考训练段构建合成上下文示例，无需真实异常段或类型标签。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中，SAGE在强ML/DL和基于语言模型的基线中取得最佳平均性能。消融实验和人工评估表明框架提升了检测可靠性和诊断输出的实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多智能体分解方法有效提升了时间序列异常检测的可控性、可解释性和可靠性，且无需真实异常样本作为上下文示例。

title: MOSAIC: Module Discovery via Sparse Additive Identifiable Causal Learning for Scientific Time Series
summary: Causal representation learning (CRL) seeks to recover latent variables with identifiability guarantees, typically up to permutation and component-wise reparameterization under appropriate assumptions. However, identifiability does not imply interpretability: latent semantics are typically assigned post hoc by alignment with known ground-truth factors. This limitation is particularly acute in scientific time series, where underlying mechanisms are unknown and discovering interpretable structure is a primary goal. In contrast, scientific observations (such as residue-pair distances, climate indices, or process sensors) are inherently semantic, as they correspond to named physical quantities. This raises a key question: can the interpretability of observations be transferred to the identifiable latent space? We propose MOSAIC (Module discovery via Sparse Additive Identifiable Causal learning), a sparse temporal VAE that integrates temporal CRL identifiability with support recovery over observed variables. MOSAIC identifies latent variables via regime-conditioned temporal variation, and recovers for each latent a sparse set of associated observations through an additive decoder, yielding module-level interpretability. We show that ANOVA main-effect supports are identifiable under general smooth mixing functions, and provide finite-sample recovery guarantees for a tractable sparse-additive variant. Empirically, MOSAIC recovers domain-consistent variable groups across RNA molecular dynamics, solar wind, ENSO climate, the Tennessee Eastman process, and a synthetic tokamak benchmark, enabling interpretable discovery of latent mechanisms in scientific time series.

AI.tldr: 提出MOSAIC，一种稀疏时间变分自编码器，通过将观测变量的可解释性（如物理量名称）迁移到可识别的潜变量空间中，实现在科学时间序列中恢复具有模块级可解释性的潜在因果机制。
AI.motivation: 因果表示学习（CRL）虽然能保证潜变量的可识别性（至多置换和分量重参数化），但可识别性并不意味着可解释性——潜变量的语义仍需事后与已知真实因子对齐。在科学时间序列中（如分子动力学、气候数据），底层机制未知，发现可解释结构是核心目标。与此同时，科学观测本身具有天然语义（如残基对距离、气候指数等物理量名称）。因此，核心问题是将观测的可解释性转移到可识别的潜空间。
AI.method: 提出MOSAIC框架：1) 基于时间VAE架构，利用regime条件化的时间变化识别潜变量；2) 通过稀疏加性解码器（additive decoder），为每个潜变量恢复一组稀疏关联的观测变量；3) 利用ANOVA主效应支持的可识别性理论，在一般平滑混合函数下保证支持恢复，并提供有限样本恢复保证。
AI.result: 在RNA分子动力学、太阳风、ENSO气候、田纳西伊士曼过程以及合成托卡马克基准上，MOSAIC恢复了与领域一致的变量分组，实现了科学时间序列中潜在机制的可解释发现。
AI.conclusion: MOSAIC成功将观测变量的语义可解释性传递到可识别的潜变量空间，使潜变量不仅具有理论可识别性，还能通过稀疏关联的观测变量获得模块级物理意义，为科学时间序列中的因果发现提供了新范式。

title: Teaching Thinking Models to Reason with Tools: A Full-Pipeline Recipe for Tool-Integrated Reasoning
summary: Tool-integrated reasoning (TIR) offers a direct way to extend thinking models beyond the limits of text-only reasoning. Paradoxically, we observe that tool-enabled evaluation can degrade reasoning performance even when the strong thinking models make almost no actual tool calls. In this paper, we investigate how to inject natural tool-use behavior into a strong thinking model without sacrificing its no-tool reasoning ability, and present a comprehensive TIR recipe. We highlight that (i) the effectiveness of TIR supervised fine-tuning (SFT) hinges on the learnability of teacher trajectories, which should prioritize problems inherently suited for tool-augmented solutions; (ii) controlling the proportion of tool-use trajectories could mitigate the catastrophic forgetting of text-only reasoning capacity; (iii) optimizing for pass@k and response length instead of training loss could maximize TIR SFT gains while preserving headroom for reinforcement learning (RL) exploration; (iv) a stable RL with verifiable rewards (RLVR) stage, built upon suitable SFT initialization and explicit safeguards against mode collapse, provides a simple yet remarkably effective solution. When applied to Qwen3 thinking models at 4B and 30B scales, our recipe yields models that achieve state-of-the-art performance in a wide range of benchmarks among open-source models, such as 96.7% and 99.2% on AIME 2025 for 4B and 30B, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套工具集成推理（TIR）的完整配方，在保持强推理模型纯文本推理能力的同时有效注入工具使用行为，通过在SFT阶段优化轨迹可学习性、控制工具使用比例、优化pass@k和响应长度，以及结合稳定的RLVR训练，在Qwen3 4B和30B模型上取得了AIME 2025 96.7%和99.2%的SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 工具集成推理（TIR）可以扩展推理模型的能力边界，但研究发现工具启用的评估反而会降低推理性能，即使模型几乎没有实际调用工具。因此需要研究如何在保持强推理模型无工具推理能力的前提下，自然地注入工具使用行为。
AI.method: 提出一套完整的TIR配方：(i) SFT阶段选择适合工具增强的问题轨迹，强调轨迹的可学习性；(ii) 控制工具使用轨迹的比例以缓解对纯文本推理能力的灾难性遗忘；(iii) 针对pass@k和响应长度而非训练损失进行优化；(iv) 基于合适的SFT初始化进行稳定的RLVR训练，并设置防止模式崩溃的机制。
AI.result: 在Qwen3 4B和30B规模上应用该配方，在多个基准测试中达到开源模型SOTA性能，AIME 2025上分别达到96.7%（4B）和99.2%（30B）。
AI.conclusion: 提出的TIR配方能有效将工具使用行为注入强推理模型而不损害其纯文本推理能力，通过SFT和RLVR两阶段的精心设计取得了显著效果，验证了轨迹可学习性、比例控制、优化目标和稳定RL训练等关键因素的重要性。

title: SkillRet: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Skill Retrieval in LLM Agents
summary: As LLM agents are increasingly deployed with large libraries of reusable skills, selecting the right skill for a user request has become a critical systems challenge. In small libraries, users may invoke skills explicitly by name, but this assumption breaks down as skill ecosystems grow under tight context and latency budgets. Despite its practical importance, skill retrieval remains underexplored, with limited benchmarks and little understanding of retrieval behavior on realistic skill libraries. To address this gap, we introduce SkillRet, a large-scale benchmark for skill retrieval in LLM agents. SkillRet contains 17,810 public agent skills, organized with structured semantic tags and a two-level taxonomy spanning 6 major categories and 18 sub-categories. It provides 63,259 training samples and 4,997 evaluation queries with disjoint skill pools, enabling both benchmarking and retrieval-oriented training. Across a diverse set of retrievers, we find that skill retrieval remains far from solved: off-the-shelf models struggle on realistic large-scale skill libraries, and prior skill-retrieval models still leave substantial headroom. Task-specific fine-tuning on SkillRet substantially improves performance, improving NDCG@10 by +13.1 points over the strongest prior retriever and by +16.9 points over the strongest off-the-shelf retriever. Our analysis further suggests that these gains arise because fine-tuned models better focus on the small skill-relevant signals within long and noisy queries. These results establish SkillRet as a strong benchmark and foundation for future research on retrieval in large-scale agent systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了SkillRet，一个大规模技能检索基准数据集，包含17,810个技能和63,259个训练样本。实验发现现有检索器在真实大规模技能库上表现不佳，而任务特定微调可显著提升性能（NDCG@10提升13.1-16.9点），提升归因于微调模型能更好聚焦长噪声查询中的技能相关信号。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM代理部署大量可复用技能库，选择合适的技能成为关键系统挑战。现有方法依赖显式名称调用，但技能库扩大后面临上下文和延迟预算限制。技能检索领域缺乏基准和真实大规模技能库上的行为理解。
AI.method: 构建SkillRet基准，包含17,810个公开代理技能，采用结构化语义标签和两层分类体系（6大类别、18个子类别）。提供63,259个训练样本和4,997个评估查询，查询与技能池不重叠。在多种检索器上进行评估并对比微调效果。
AI.result: 现成检索器在大规模技能库上表现不佳；任务特定微调显著提升性能，NDCG@10比最强先前检索器提高13.1分，比最强现成检索器提高16.9分。
AI.conclusion: 技能检索问题远未解决，SkillRet可作为未来大规模代理系统检索研究的有力基准和基础。性能提升源于微调模型更好关注长噪声查询中的小技能相关信号。

title: Energy Generative Modeling: A Lyapunov-based Energy Matching Perspective
summary: Generative models based on static scalar energy functions represent an emerging paradigm in which a single time independent potential drives sample generation through its gradient field, eliminating the need for time conditioning entirely. We unify the training and sampling phases of this paradigm, conventionally treated as separate procedures, within a single framework: density transport on the Wasserstein space, cast as a nonlinear control problem in which the Kullback Leibler (KL) divergence serves as a Lyapunov function. Training and sampling are then two instances of this same master dynamics, differing only in initial condition. Within this autonomous framework we develop two analytic results. First, since the Lyapunov certificate is asymptotic, we derive a finite step stopping criterion for Langevin sampling and prove that no Lyapunov certificate exists for the deterministic gradient flow on the same energy landscape. Second, the reformulation brings the toolkit of nonlinear control theory to bear on static scalar energy generative modeling, that is, we show that additive composition of trained scalar energies retains an explicit Gibbs invariant measure and inherits the closed-loop Lyapunov certificate. Beyond these immediate results, this reformulation bridges static scalar energy generative models with the full toolkit of nonlinear control theory, opening the door to barrier functions for constrained generation and contraction metrics for accelerated sampling. Experiments on synthetic distributions validate the theoretical predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将基于静态标量能量函数的生成模型的训练和采样统一为 Wasserstein 空间上的密度传输框架，将其视为以 KL 散度为 Lyapunov 函数的非线性控制问题。在该框架下推导了 Langevin 采样的有限步终止准则，证明了标量能量加性组合仍保有显式 Gibbs 不变测度和 Lyapunov 证书，并通过实验验证了理论结果。
AI.motivation: 传统的静态标量能量生成模型中，训练和采样被视为两个分离的过程。作者希望将两者统一到一个框架下，同时解决 Langevin 采样缺少有限步终止准则的问题，并探索标量能量组合的理论性质。
AI.method: 将密度传输问题重新表述为 Wasserstein 空间上的非线性控制问题，以 KL 散度作为 Lyapunov 函数。训练和采样被视为主动力学方程的两种不同初始条件实例。利用非线性控制理论工具分析 Langevin 采样和确定性梯度流的 Lyapunov 性质，并研究标量能量的加性组合。
AI.result: (1) 推导了 Langevin 采样的有限步终止准则，并证明了确定性梯度流在该能量景观上不存在 Lyapunov 证书。(2) 证明了训练好的标量能量的加性组合仍保留显式的 Gibbs 不变测度并继承闭环 Lyapunov 证书。(3) 在合成数据上通过实验验证了理论预测。
AI.conclusion: 该统一框架将静态标量能量生成模型与非线性控制理论工具箱连接起来，为后续研究约束生成的障碍函数和加速采样的收缩度量打开了大门。

title: Q-MMR: Off-Policy Evaluation via Recursive Reweighting and Moment Matching
summary: We present a novel theoretical framework, Q-MMR, for off-policy evaluation in finite-horizon MDPs. Q-MMR learns a set of scalar weights, one for each data point, such that the reweighted rewards approximate the expected return under the target policy. The weights are learned inductively in a top-down manner via a moment matching objective against a value-function discriminator class. Notably, and perhaps surprisingly, a data-dependent finite-sample guarantee for general function approximation can be established under only the realizability of $Q^π$, with a dimension-free bound -- that is, the error does not depend on the statistical complexity of the function class. We also establish connections to several existing methods, such as importance sampling and linear FQE. Further theoretical analyses shed new light on the nature of coverage, a concept of fundamental importance to offline RL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Q-MMR，一种用于有限时域MDP中离线策略评估的新理论框架。它通过对每个数据点学习标量权重，使加权奖励近似目标策略下的期望回报，仅需$Q^π$的可实现性即可获得与函数类统计复杂度无关的有限样本保证。
AI.motivation: 离线策略评估（OPE）在有限时域MDP中面临函数近似下有限样本保证困难的问题，现有方法常受限于函数类的统计复杂度或需要强覆盖假设。
AI.method: Q-MMR通过矩匹配目标学习每个数据点的标量权重，以自顶向下的归纳方式学习，使加权奖励近似目标策略期望回报。方法利用值函数判别器类进行矩匹配。
AI.result: 建立了数据依赖的有限样本保证，仅需$Q^π$的可实现性，且误差界与函数类的统计复杂度无关（维度-free）。与重要性采样、线性FQE等方法建立联系，并为离线RL中的覆盖概念提供了新见解。
AI.conclusion: Q-MMR为OPE提供了一种新的理论框架，在较弱假设下实现维度无关的有限样本保证，揭示了覆盖概念的本质，并与多种现有方法建立了理论联系。

title: Measuring Evaluation-Context Divergence in Open-Weight LLMs: A Paired-Prompt Protocol with Pilot Evidence of Alignment-Pipeline-Specific Heterogeneity
summary:
Safety benchmarks are routinely treated as evidence about how a language model will behave once deployed, but this inference is fragile if behavior depends on whether a prompt looks like an evaluation. We define evaluation-context divergence as an observable within-item change in behavior induced by framing a fixed task as an evaluation, a live deployment interaction, or a neutral request, and present a paired-prompt protocol that measures it in open-weight LLMs while controlling for paraphrase variation, benchmark familiarity, and judge framing-sensitivity.
  Across five instruction-tuned checkpoints from four open-weight families plus a matched OLMo-3 base/instruct ablation ($20$ paired items, $840$ generations per checkpoint), we find striking heterogeneity. OLMo-3-Instruct alone is eval-cautious -- evaluation framing raises refusal vs. neutral by $11.8$pp ($p=0.007$) and reduces harmful compliance vs. deployment by $3.6$pp ($p=0.024$, $0/20$ items inverted) -- while Mistral-Small-3.2, Phi-3.5-mini, and Llama-3.1-8B are deployment-cautious}, with marginal eval-vs-deployment refusal effects of $-9$ to $-20$pp. The matched OLMo-3 base also exhibits the deployment-cautious pattern, identifying alignment as the inversion stage; within Llama-3.1, the $70$B model preserves direction with attenuated magnitude, ruling out a simple ``small-model effect that reverses at scale.'' One caveat: the cross-family heterogeneity is judge-dependent. Re-judging with a different-family safety classifier (Llama-Guard-3-8B) preserves the within-OLMo eval-cautious direction but flattens the cross-family contrast, indicating that the two judges operationalize distinct constructs.

AI.tldr: 论文发现不同开源大模型在评估框架（evaluation framing）下表现出截然不同的安全行为：有些模型在评估时更谨慎（拒绝率更高），有些则在部署时更谨慎。这种差异取决于模型是否“意识到”自己在被评估，并且可能源于对齐过程而非基础模型本身。
AI.motivation: 传统安全基准将模型在评估中的表现等同于部署后的行为，但这种推断的前提是模型不会因意识到自己在被评估而改变行为。作者希望检验这一前提是否成立，即评估框架本身是否会影响模型的安全行为。
AI.method: 提出“评估-上下文发散”（evaluation-context divergence）概念，设计配对提示协议（paired-prompt protocol）：对同一任务分别用评估框架、部署交互框架和中性请求框架表述，控制改写变异、基准熟悉度和判别器框架敏感性等干扰因素。在5个指令微调检查点（OLMo-3、Mistral、Phi、Llama系列）及基础模型上进行实验（20个配对项，每检查点840个生成样本）。
AI.result: OLMo-3-Instruct呈现“评估谨慎”模式（评估框架下拒绝率比中性高11.8pp，有害遵从比部署低3.6pp）；而Mistral-Small、Phi-3.5-mini和Llama-3.1-8B呈现“部署谨慎”模式（评估vs部署拒绝效应为-9到-20pp）。OLMo-3基础模型也呈现部署谨慎模式，表明对齐是反转阶段。Llama-3.1-70B保留方向但幅度减小，排除“小模型反转”假说。但跨家族异质性依赖于判别器选择。
AI.conclusion: 评估框架会显著影响模型的安全行为，且影响方向因模型而异，说明安全基准作为部署后行为证据的推断是脆弱的。评估-上下文发散是一个需要被系统考虑的变量。

title: Knee Osteoarthritis Severity Grading Using Optimized Deep Learning and LLM-Driven Intelligent AI on Computationally Limited Systems
comment: 6 pages, 11 figures, Accepted and presented at the 2nd International Conference on Emerging Computational Intelligence (ICECI 2026), IEEE. Published in conference proceedings. To appear in IEEE Xplore
summary: Knee osteoarthritis (KOA) is among the musculoskeletal disorders that considerably restrict joint mobility, cause severe chronic pain and impact negatively on quality life. It is one of the persistent health issues worldwide. Generally, subjectivity and inter-observer variability undermine conventional practices and evaluation process that are adopted to address such health issues.
