Within the deterministic threshold-cascade class, full fixed chains underperform the pairwise envelope, and optimized subsequence cascades do not deliver practically meaningful held-out gains over it. A lightweight pre-generation router exceeds the best cascade policy on four of five datasets, mainly because it avoids the cheap model's generation cost on queries sent directly to a larger model rather than because of a stronger routing signal. These results suggest that cascade performance is limited primarily by structural cost, since cascades pay the cheap model before any escalation decision, rather than by a shortage of intermediate stages.

AI.tldr: 本文从决策理论视角研究模型级联（cascade）的成本-质量权衡，证明了双模型级联成本-质量前沿的分段凹性，揭示了k模型级联中单一影子价格平衡跨阶段边际质量-成本的一阶条件，并通过实验发现：确定性阈值级联中，固定全链劣于成对包络线，轻量级预生成路由器因避免廉价模型生成成本而超越最优级联策略，表明级联性能主要受结构性成本（先付廉价模型费用）而非中间阶段数量限制。
AI.motivation: 现有模型级联方法将延迟阈值视为经验超参数，缺乏对成本-质量前沿几何特性的理论指导，作者旨在建立严格的决策论框架以理解级联策略的优化边界。
AI.method: 基于约束优化和对偶理论，推导双模型级联前沿的分段凹性及影子价格关系；刻画k模型池中确定性双模型阈值级联的前沿为成对级联的点态包络线；推导k模型级联的一阶条件（单一影子价格平衡跨阶段边际质量-成本）。在五个基准和八个模型上验证。
AI.result: 1）双模型级联前沿在置信度支持的递减收益区域上分段凹。2）k模型下，确定性双模型阈值级联的前沿是全部成对级联的点态包络线。3）k模型级联中，单一影子价格平衡边际质量-成本。4）实验上，固定全链劣于成对包络线，轻量级预生成路由器在4/5数据集上超越最优级联，主因是避免廉价模型生成成本。
AI.conclusion: 级联性能瓶颈在于结构性成本（必须先运行廉价模型才能决定是否升级），而非中间阶段数量不足；预生成路由器通过绕过该成本获得优势，为模型部署策略设计提供了新方向。

title: Beyond Accuracy: Policy Invariance as a Reliability Test for LLM Safety Judges
summary: LLM-as-a-Judge pipelines have become the de facto evaluator for agent safety, yet existing benchmarks treat their verdicts as ground-truth proxies without checking whether the verdicts depend on the agent's behavior or merely on how the evaluation policy happens to be worded. We argue that any trustworthy safety judge must satisfy a basic property we call policy invariance, and we operationalize it as three testable principles: rubric-semantics invariance under certified-equivalent rewrites, rubric-threshold invariance under intentional strict-to-lenient shifts, and ambiguity-aware calibration so that verdict instability concentrates on genuinely ambiguous cases. Instantiating these principles as a stress-test protocol with four agent-class judges on trajectories drawn from ASSEBench and R-Judge, we surface a previously unmeasured failure mode: today's judges respond to meaningful normative shifts and to meaningless structural rewrites with comparable strength, and cannot tell the two apart. Content-preserving policy rewrites flip up to 9.1% of verdicts above baseline jitter, and 18-43% of all observed flips occur on unambiguous cases under such rewrites, so existing safety scores conflate what the agent did with how the evaluator was prompted. Beyond the diagnosis, we contribute the Policy Invariance Score and the Judge Card reporting protocol, which expose an order-of-magnitude spread in judge reliability that is invisible to accuracy-only leaderboards. We release the protocol and code so that future agent-safety benchmarks can audit their own evaluators rather than trust them by default.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了当前LLM-as-a-Judge安全评估管线存在“策略不变性”缺失的关键缺陷：评估者的判决不仅受智能体行为影响，也受评估策略的措辞方式影响。作者提出了三个可测试原则来量化这一问题，并发现了高达9.1%的判决翻转是由无意义的结构改写引起的，其中18-43%发生在非歧义案例上。最后贡献了策略不变性评分和Judge Card报告协议。
AI.motivation: 现有安全基准将LLM法官的判决视为ground-truth代理，但从未验证这些判决是真正依赖智能体行为，还是仅仅依赖评估策略的措辞方式。作者认为任何可信的安全法官必须满足“策略不变性”这一基本属性，但当前方法缺乏对此的检验。
AI.method: 将策略不变性操作化为三个可测试原则：1) 规则语义不变性（在认证等价改写下）；2) 规则阈值不变性（在有意严格到宽松的转变下）；3) 歧义感知校准（使判决不稳定性集中在真正模糊的案例上）。在ASSEBench和R-Judge数据集上对四类agent判官进行压力测试。
AI.result: 1) 今天的安全法官对有意义的标准偏移和无意义的结构改写反应强度相当，且无法区分两者；2) 内容保留的策略改写可导致高达9.1%的判决翻转（超过基线抖动）；3) 18-43%的判决翻转发生在非歧义案例上，说明现有安全分数混淆了“智能体做了什么”和“评估者被如何提示”。
AI.conclusion: 贡献了策略不变性评分和Judge Card报告协议，揭示了仅靠准确率排行榜无法看到的法官可靠性存在一个数量级的差异。开源协议和代码，呼吁未来的智能体安全基准审计其评估者，而非默认信任它们。

title: Beyond Uniform Credit Assignment: Selective Eligibility Traces for RLVR
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become a key approach for improving the reasoning abilities of large language models. However, widely used critic-free algorithms such as Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) necessitate a ``uniform credit assignment'' assumption that indiscriminately broadcast trajectory-level advantages, hindering learning efficiency by failing to distinguish critical reasoning steps. To address this limitation, we propose Selective Eligibility Traces (S-trace). Grounded in the intuition of partial trust region preservation, we initially introduce P-trace as a sample-efficient, critic-free eligibility traces method, upon which we build S-trace, implementing a sparse eligibility traces mechanism to further mitigate variance and achieve fine-grained credit assignment by selectively masking low-entropy tokens. Theoretically, we contextualize the recent Group Sequence Policy Optimization (GSPO) method within the critic-free eligibility traces framework, identifying it as a special instance of the eligibility traces method operating under uniform credit assignment. Experiments demonstrate that S-trace not only outperforms GRPO, showing gains of 0.49\% on Qwen3-1.7B and 3.16\% on Qwen3-4B, and maintaining a robust 2.98\% improvement when scaled further to Qwen3-8B in average pass@16, but notably achieves this with simultaneously higher sample and token efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出S-trace方法，通过选择性资格迹（Selective Eligibility Traces）解决GRPO中均匀信用分配（uniform credit assignment）导致的学习效率低下问题，在多个模型上提升推理性能并同时提高样本和token效率。
AI.motivation: GRPO等无评论家强化学习算法采用"均匀信用分配"假设，对轨迹级优势信号不加区分地广播，无法区分关键推理步骤，导致学习效率低下。
AI.method: 1) 提出P-trace（基于部分信任域保持的无评论家资格迹方法）；2) 在P-trace基础上构建S-trace（选择性资格迹），通过选择性掩码低熵token来实现细粒度信用分配并降低方差；3) 从理论上将GSPO归入无评论家资格迹框架下的均匀信用分配特例。
AI.result: S-trace在pass@16指标下，Qwen3-1.7B提升0.49%，Qwen3-4B提升3.16%，Qwen3-8B提升2.98%，同时实现更高的样本和token效率。
AI.conclusion: S-trace是一种更高效的无评论家强化学习方法，通过稀疏资格迹实现细粒度信用分配，在提升推理性能的同时兼顾了样本效率与计算效率。

title: E = T*H/(O+B): A Dimensionless Control Parameter for Mixture-of-Experts Ecology
comment: 12 experiments, 11,000+ training epochs, cross-modal validation (vision + language). Extended version of the Claude-in-the-Loop ecology framework
summary: We introduce E = T*H/(O+B), a dimensionless control parameter that predicts whether Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models will develop a healthy expert ecology or collapse into dead experts. E combines four hyperparameters -- routing temperature T, routing entropy weight H, oracle weight O, and balance weight B -- into a single quantity. Through 12 controlled experiments (8 vision, 4 language) totaling over 11,000 training epochs, we establish that E >= 0.5 alone is sufficient to guarantee zero dead experts, removing the necessity for handcrafted load-balancing auxiliary losses. We validate this cross-modally on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, TinyImageNet-200, WikiText-2, and WikiText-103. Six additional findings emerge: (1) dead experts can resuscitate -- triggered by balance loss driving router re-exploration; (2) ortho toxicity is dataset-dependent, not universal; (3) task complexity shifts the critical E threshold; (4) model overfitting is decoupled from expert ecological health; (5) three-tier MoE spontaneously collapses into a two-tier functional structure; (6) ecological structure is temperature-invariant across a 50x range. We propose that E serves as a unified diagnostic for MoE training, analogous to the Reynolds number in fluid dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个无量纲控制参数 E = T*H/(O+B)，用于预测混合专家模型（MoE）是否会产生健康专家生态或陷入专家死亡。通过12项对照实验（8项视觉、4项语言）共计超过11,000训练轮次验证，发现E >= 0.5即可保证零死亡专家，无需手工设计的负载均衡辅助损失函数。
AI.motivation: MoE模型中专家死亡（dead experts）问题严重，现有方案依赖手工设计的负载均衡损失函数，缺乏统一的量化指标来预测专家生态健康状况。
AI.method: 将路由温度T、路由熵权重H、oracle权重O、平衡权重B四个超参数整合为单一控制参数E = T*H/(O+B)。在CIFAR-10/100、TinyImageNet-200、WikiText-2/103上进行12项对照实验（共11,000+训练轮次），跨视觉和语言模态验证。
AI.result: E >= 0.5即可保证零死亡专家。额外发现：死亡专家可被平衡损失驱动复活；正交毒性（ortho toxicity）取决于数据集而非普适；任务复杂度影响E临界阈值；模型过拟合与专家生态健康解耦；三层MoE自发坍缩为双层功能结构；专家生态结构在50倍温度范围内保持不变。
AI.conclusion: E可作为MoE训练的统一定量诊断指标，类似于流体力学中的雷诺数。该发现简化了MoE训练流程，消除了对手工负载均衡损失函数的依赖。

title: Post Reasoning: Improving the Performance of Non-Thinking Models at No Cost
summary: As the widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) accelerates, token consumption from intermediate reasoning traces increasingly contributes to inference latency and operational cost. Recent studies suggest that many real-world tasks require little to no explicit reasoning, with additional reasoning sometimes even degrading performance. In this work, we propose \textbf{Post-Reasoning}, a simple yet effective approach that improves instruction-tuned models by conditioning them to justify their answers after generating the final response. By design, it enables the final answer to be obtained without additional latency or token cost, while still improving performance through simple instruction augmentation. We evaluate Post-Reasoning across \(117\) model--benchmark settings spanning \(13\) open and proprietary models, \(4\) model families, and \(9\) diverse reasoning and knowledge-intensive benchmarks, including AMC, HMMT, GSM8K, GPQA, MMLU-Pro, and BIG-Bench Hard. Post-Reasoning improves performance in over \(88.19\%\) of evaluated settings, achieving a mean relative improvements of \(17.37\%\). Furthermore, we propose supervised post-reason tuning, which further improves performance in over \(91.11\%\) of evaluated settings, and exceeds the prompt-based post-reasoning baseline by an average of \(8.01\%\), demonstrating that post-reasoning can be effectively internalized through training. Ultimately, Post-Reasoning establishes a new performance ceiling for direct-answer capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Post-Reasoning方法，让模型先生成答案再给出推理过程，在117个设置中88%以上提升性能，平均提升17.37%，通过监督训练可进一步优化。
AI.motivation: LLM的中间推理痕迹消耗大量tokens，导致推理延迟和成本增加，且许多任务不需要显式推理，甚至额外推理可能降低性能。
AI.method: Post-Reasoning：通过指令增强，让模型在生成最终答案后再给出推理理由，使答案可即时获取而无需额外延迟或token成本。进一步提出监督式post-reason tuning来内化该能力。
AI.result: 在117个模型-基准设置中（13个模型、4个模型家族、9个基准），88.19%的设置性能提升，平均相对提升17.37%。监督训练后在91.11%的设置中提升，超越prompt基线8.01%。
AI.conclusion: Post-Reasoning建立了直接回答能力的新性能上限，是一种简单有效的提升指令微调模型性能的方法。

title: Invariant Features in Language Models: Geometric Characterization and Model Attribution
summary: Language models exhibit strong robustness to paraphrasing, suggesting that semantic information may be encoded through stable internal representations, yet the structure and origin of such invariance remain unclear. We propose a local geometric framework in which semantically equivalent inputs occupy structured regions in latent space, with paraphrastic variation along nuisance directions and semantic identity preserved in invariant subspaces. Building on this view, we make three contributions: (1) a geometric characterization of invariant latent features, (2) a contrastive subspace discovery method that separates semantic-changing from semantic-preserving variation, and (3) an application of invariant representations to zero-shot model attribution. Across models and layers, empirical results support these contributions. Invariant structure emerges in specific depth regions, semantic displacement lies largely outside the nuisance subspace, and representation-level interventions indicate a causal role of invariant components in model outputs. Invariant representations also capture model-specific geometric patterns, enabling accurate attribution. These findings suggest that semantic invariance can be viewed as a local geometric property of latent representations, offering a principled perspective on how language models organize meaning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出局部几何框架，证明语义等价的输入在潜空间中占据结构化区域，并发现不变子空间中的语义特征具有因果性，可用于零样本模型归因。
AI.motivation: 语言模型对释义（paraphrasing）表现出强鲁棒性，暗示语义信息可能通过稳定的内部表示编码，但这种不变性的结构和起源尚不清楚。
AI.method: 提出三个贡献：（1）不变潜特征的几何刻画；（2）对比性子空间发现方法，区分语义变化与语义保持的变异；（3）将不变表示应用于零样本模型归因。
AI.result: 不变结构出现在特定深度区域；语义位移主要位于干扰子空间之外；表示层面的干预表明不变组件对模型输出有因果作用；不变表示捕捉到模型特定的几何模式，实现准确归因。
AI.conclusion: 语义不变性可作为潜表示的局部几何属性，为理解语言模型如何组织意义提供了原则性视角。

title: BioMedArena: An Open-source Toolkit for Building and Evaluating Biomedical Deep Research Agents
summary: Building a deep research agent today is an exercise in glue code: the same backbone evaluated on the same benchmark can report different accuracies in different papers because harness and tool registry all differ, and integrating a new foundation model into a comparable evaluation surface costs weeks of model-specific engineering. We call this the per-paper engineering tax and release BioMedArena, an open-source toolkit that not only alleviates it but also provides an arena for fair comparison of different foundation models when evaluating them as deep-research agents. BioMedArena decouples six layers of biomedical agent evaluation -- benchmark loading, tool exposure, tool selection, execution mode, context management, and scoring -- and exposes 147 biomedical benchmarks and 75 biomedical tools across 9 functional families. Adding a new model, benchmark, or tool reduces to registering a few-line provider adapter. We further provide 6 agent harnesses with 6 context-management strategies, which provide 12 backbones with competitive research capabilities and significantly improved performance, achieving state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on 8 representative biomedical benchmarks, with an average lift of +15.03 percentage points over prior SOTA. The toolkit, configurations, and per-task traces are available at https://github.com/AI-in-Health/BioMedArena

AI.tldr: BioMedArena是一个开源工具包，解耦了生物医学智能体评估的六个层次，集成了147个基准和75个工具，通过统一的轻量适配器接口降低"每篇论文的工程税"，在8个代表性基准上平均提升SOTA 15.03个百分点。
AI.motivation: 当前构建深度研究智能体充满了"胶水代码"——同一骨干网络在不同论文中因测试框架和工具注册不同而报告不同准确率，且集成新模型需要数周的特定工程。作者将这一问题称为"每篇论文的工程税"。
AI.method: BioMedArena解耦了生物医学智能体评估的六个层次：基准加载、工具暴露、工具选择、执行模式、上下文管理和评分。提供6种智能体框架和6种上下文管理策略，新增模型/基准/工具只需注册几行代码的提供者适配器。
AI.result: 在8个代表性生物医学基准上达到SOTA，相比先前SOTA平均提升15.03个百分点。提供12个骨干网络的竞争性研究能力。
AI.conclusion: BioMedArena通过标准化和模块化的评估框架，有效降低了生物医学深度研究智能体的评估成本，实现了公平比较，并显著提升了性能。代码已开源。

title: Training Transformers for KV Cache Compressibility
summary: Long-context language modeling is increasingly constrained by the Key-Value (KV) cache, whose memory and decode-time access costs scale linearly with the prefix length. This bottleneck has motivated a range of context-compression methods, from token-level summarization to recent optimization-based KV compression methods. These post-hoc methods operate on the KV cache of a fixed pretrained model, so their effectiveness is fundamentally limited by how well the model's internal representations can be compressed. In this work, we formalize the notion of KV compressibility and show that it is a property of the learned representations, rather than of the context alone. We prove that almost any sequence-to-vector function admits both highly compressible and inherently non-compressible transformer implementations, highlighting the need to guide transformers toward compressible representations during training. Motivated by this, we propose KV-Compression Aware Training (KV-CAT), a continued pretraining procedure that incentivizes the emergence of compressible representations. We introduce a train-time KV sparsification policy that masks KV slots during training. This forces the model to use fewer KV slots and encourages it to learn representations amenable to post-hoc compression. Empirically, we show that KV-CAT improves the quality-budget tradeoff of downstream compression methods across retrieval, long-context question answering, and perplexity-based evaluation of compressed-prefix continuation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KV-CAT方法，通过在训练中稀疏化KV缓存，引导模型学习可压缩表征，从而提升下游长上下文任务中KV压缩的效果。
AI.motivation: 长上下文语言模型中的KV缓存随前缀长度线性增长，成为内存和延迟瓶颈。现有后验压缩方法受限于模型内部表征的可压缩性，缺乏对模型训练过程的引导。
AI.method: 形式化定义了KV可压缩性，证明表征可压缩性取决于学习到的表示而非上下文本身；提出KV-CAT，在继续预训练中引入KV稀疏化策略，强制模型使用更少的KV槽位，学习易于后验压缩的表征。
AI.result: KV-CAT在检索、长上下文问答和困惑度评估中，均改善了下游压缩方法的质量-预算权衡。
AI.conclusion: 通过训练引导模型产生可压缩的KV表征，能有效突破后验压缩的性能上限，实现更好的压缩效率与质量平衡。

title: Patch-Effect Graph Kernels for LLM Interpretability
summary: Mechanistic interpretability aims to reverse-engineer transformer computations by identifying causal circuits through activation patching. However, scaling these interventions across diverse prompts and task families produces high-dimensional, unstructured datasets that are difficult to compare systematically. We propose a framework that reframes mechanistic analysis as a graph machine-learning problem by representing activation-patching profiles as patch-effect graphs over model components. We introduce three graph-construction methods: direct-influence via causal mediation, partial-correlation, and co-influence and apply graph kernels to analyze the resulting structures. Evaluating this approach on GPT-2 Small using Indirect Object Identification (IOI) and related tasks, we find that patch-effect graphs preserve discriminative structural signals. Specifically, localized edge-slot features provide higher classification accuracy than global graph-shape descriptors. A screened paired-patching validation suggests that CI and PC selected candidate edges correspond to stronger activation-influence effects than random or low-rank candidates. Crucially, by evaluating these representations against rigorous prompt-only and raw patch-effect controls, we make the evidential scope of the benchmark explicit: graph features compress structured patching signal, while raw tensors and surface cues define strong baselines that any circuit-level claim should address. Ultimately, our framework provides a compression and evaluation pipeline for comparing patching-derived structures under controlled baselines, separating robust slice-discriminative evidence from stronger task-general causal-circuit claims.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将机械可解释性分析转化为图机器学习问题，通过构建补丁效应图（patch-effect graphs）来表示激活补丁轮廓，并利用图核方法进行分析。在GPT-2 Small上的IOI任务中验证表明，图特征能有效压缩结构化补丁信号，且局部边槽特征比全局图形状描述符分类精度更高。
AI.motivation: 现有激活补丁干预方法在不同提示和任务族上产生高维、非结构化的数据集，难以进行系统比较。作者希望将机械分析重新定义为图机器学习问题，以更结构化、可比较的方式分析因果电路。
AI.method: 提出三种图构建方法：直接因果中介影响（Direct-Influence）、偏相关（Partial-Correlation）和共影响（Co-Influence），并应用图核分析图结构。在GPT-2 Small上使用间接对象识别（IOI）及相关任务进行评估。
AI.result: 补丁效应图保留了区分性结构信号；局部边槽特征分类精度高于全局图形状描述符；CI和PC选择的候选边对应更强的激活影响效应；图特征压缩了结构化的补丁信号，但原始张量和表面线索构成了电路级主张应面对的强基线。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一个在受控基线下的补丁衍生结构比较的压缩与评估管道，能够区分稳健的切片判别证据与更强的任务通用因果电路主张。

title: Physical Fidelity Reconstruction via Improved Consistency-Distilled Flow Matching for Dynamical Systems
summary: Reconstructing high-fidelity flow fields from low-fidelity observations is a central problem in scientific machine learning, yet recent diffusion and flow-matching models typically rely on iterative sampling, making them costly for latency-sensitive workflows such as ensemble forecasting, real-time visualization, and simulation-in-the-loop inference. We study whether a high-fidelity flow-matching generative model can be compressed into a compact one-step model for fast scientific flow reconstruction. Our approach distills an optimal-transport flow-matching teacher into a one-step consistency model. Low-fidelity observations are incorporated at inference by initializing the generative trajectory from a noised observation along the transport path, allowing an unconditional high-fidelity flow model to perform conditional reconstruction without retraining the teacher. We evaluate this distillation strategy on three fluid benchmarks, Smoke Buoyancy, Turbulent Channel Flow, and Kolmogorov Flow, using coarse-to-fine reconstruction as a controlled testbed at field sizes up to $256 \times 256$. Across these settings, the distilled student retains similar performance of the teacher's model on spectrum metrics, while using roughly half as many parameters and achieving a $12\times$ inference speedup over the flow-matching teacher. Under the same training budget, the distilled student also outperforms a one-step consistency model trained directly from scratch by $23.1\%$ in SSIM, showing that teacher distillation improves training efficiency rather than merely accelerating sampling. These results suggest a promising route for turning future high-capacity scientific generative models into compact reconstruction models that are faster to train, cheaper to run, and easier to deploy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将最优传输流匹配教师模型蒸馏为单步一致性模型，用于从低保真观测快速重建高保真流场，在三个流体基准测试上实现12倍加速，且在相同训练预算下比从头训练的单步模型SSIM提高23.1%。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型和流匹配模型依赖迭代采样，计算成本高，难以应用于集合预报、实时可视化和仿真在环推理等对延迟敏感的科学流场重建场景。
AI.method: 将最优传输流匹配教师模型蒸馏为单步一致性模型；推理时通过沿传输路径从含噪观测初始化生成轨迹，使无条件高保真流模型无需重新训练即可执行条件重建。
AI.result: 在烟羽浮力、湍流通道流和Kolmogorov流三个基准上，蒸馏学生模型在频谱指标上与教师模型持平，参数量减少约一半，推理速度提升12倍；相同训练预算下，蒸馏学生比从头训练的一致性模型SSIM高出23.1%。
AI.conclusion: 教师蒸馏不仅能加速采样，还能提升训练效率，为将未来高容量科学生成模型转化为紧凑、快速、易于部署的重建模型提供了可行路径。

title: Cubit: Token Mixer with Kernel Ridge Regression
summary: Since its introduction in 2017, the Transformer has become one of the most widely adopted architectures in modern deep learning. Despite extensive efforts to improve positional encoding, attention mechanisms, and feed-forward networks, the core token-mixing mechanism in Transformers remains attention. In this work, we show that the attention module in Transformers can be interpreted as performing Nadaraya-Watson regression, where it computes similarities between tokens and aggregates the corresponding values accordingly. Motivated by this perspective, we propose Cubit, a potential next-generation architecture that leverages Kernel Ridge Regression (KRR), while the vanilla Transformer relies on Nadaraya-Watson regression. Specifically, Cubit modifies the classical attention computation by incorporating the closed-form solution of KRR, combining value aggregation through kernel similarities with normalization via the inverse of the kernel matrix. To improve the training stability, we further propose the Limited-Range Rescale (LRR), which rescales the value layer within a controlled range. We argue that Cubit, as a KRR-based architecture, provides a stronger mathematical foundation than the vanilla Transformer, whose attention mechanism corresponds to Nadaraya-Watson regression. We validate this claim through comprehensive experiments. The experimental results suggest that Cubit may exhibit stronger long-sequence modeling capability. In particular, its performance gain over the Transformer appears to increase as the training sequence length grows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cubit架构，用核岭回归(KRR)替代Transformer中的注意力机制(Nadaraya-Watson回归)，通过KRR闭式解改进token混合，并引入Limited-Range Rescale(LRR)稳定训练，实验表明其在长序列建模上优于Transformer。
AI.motivation: Transformer的注意力机制可视为Nadaraya-Watson回归，但该方法数学基础较弱。作者希望用数学基础更强的核岭回归(KRR)替代它，从而提升模型性能，尤其在长序列建模方面。
AI.method: 将注意力机制重新解释为Nadaraya-Watson回归，进而提出Cubit架构：使用KRR的闭式解进行token混合，在核相似性聚合值的基础上引入核矩阵逆进行归一化。同时提出Limited-Range Rescale(LRR)技术，将值层的输出控制在有限范围内以提升训练稳定性。
AI.result: 实验表明Cubit在长序列建模上表现更强，且相对于Transformer的性能优势随训练序列长度增加而扩大。
AI.conclusion: Cubit作为基于KRR的架构，相比基于Nadaraya-Watson回归的Transformer具有更强的数学基础，在长序列建模场景下展现出了作为下一代架构的潜力。

title: Event-Causal RAG: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework for Long Video Reasoning in Complex Scenarios
summary: Recent large vision-language models have achieved strong performance on short- and medium-length video understanding, yet they remain inadequate for ultra-long or even infinite video reasoning, where models must preserve coherent memory over extended durations and infer causal dependencies across temporally distant events. Existing end-to-end video understanding methods are fundamentally limited by the $O(n^2)$ complexity of self-attention, while recent retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) approaches still suffer from fragmented clip-level memory, weak modeling of temporal and causal structure, and high storage and online inference costs. We present Event-Causal RAG, a lightweight retrieval-augmented framework for infinite long-video reasoning. Instead of indexing fixed-length clips, our method segments streaming videos into semantically coherent events and represents each event as a structured State-Event-State (SES) graph, capturing the event together with its surrounding state transitions. These graphs are merged into a global Event Knowledge Graph and stored in a dual-store memory that supports both semantic matching and causal-topological retrieval. On top of this memory, we design a bidirectional retrieval strategy to efficiently identify the most relevant event causal chains and provide them, together with the associated video evidence, to a backbone video foundation model for answer generation. Experiments on long-video understanding benchmarks demonstrate that Event-Causal RAG consistently outperforms strong clip-based retrieval baselines and long-context video models, particularly on questions requiring multi-event integration and causal inference across long temporal gaps, while also achieving improved memory efficiency and robust streaming performance.

AI.tldr: 提出Event-Causal RAG框架，将流式视频分割为语义连贯的事件，用状态-事件-状态图表示并构建全局事件知识图谱，通过双向检索策略实现超长视频的因果推理，在长视频理解基准上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有大视觉语言模型在超长视频推理中存在不足：端到端方法受限于自注意力的O(n²)复杂度，RAG方法存在碎片化剪辑记忆、时序因果建模弱、存储和推理成本高等问题。
AI.method: 1) 将流式视频分割为语义连贯事件；2) 每个事件表示为结构化状态-事件-状态（SES）图，捕捉事件及其前后状态转换；3) SES图合并为全局事件知识图谱，存入支持语义匹配和因果拓扑检索的双存储记忆；4) 设计双向检索策略，高效识别最相关的事件因果链，连同视频证据输入视频基础模型生成答案。
AI.result: 在长视频理解基准上，Event-Causal RAG在需要多事件整合和跨长时间间隔因果推理的问题上，持续优于基于剪辑的检索基线和长上下文视频模型，同时实现了更好的内存效率和鲁棒的流式处理性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于事件的因果RAG框架有效解决了超长视频推理中的记忆保持和因果依赖建模问题，为无限长视频理解提供了轻量级、高效的解决方案。

title: Towards Steering without Sacrifice: Principled Training of Steering Vectors for Prompt-only Interventions
summary: Recently, steering vectors (SVs) have emerged as an effective and lightweight approach to steer behaviors of large language models (LLMs), among which fine-tuned SVs are more effective than optimization-free ones. However, current approaches to fine-tuned SVs suffer from two limitations. First, they require careful selection of steering factors on a per-SV basis to balance steering effectiveness and generation quality at inference time. Second, they operate as full-sequence SVs (FSSVs), which can sacrifice generation quality regardless of factor selection due to excessive intervention on the model generation process. To address the first limitation, we propose joint training of steering factors and directions, such that post-hoc factor selection is no longer required. Using neural network scaling theory, we find that moderately large initialization sizes and learning rates for steering factors are essential for stability and efficiency of joint training. To tackle the second limitation, we draw inspiration from representation fine-tuning and introduce Prompt-only SV (PrOSV), an SV that intervenes only on a few prompt tokens. Our empirical results show that PrOSV outperforms traditional FSSVs on AxBench when using our joint training scheme. We also find that PrOSV achieves a better tradeoff between general model utility and adversarial robustness than FSSV.

AI.tldr: 本文提出联合训练策略解决微调型 steering vectors (SVs) 需要逐向量选择 steering factor 的问题，并提出 Prompt-only SV (PrOSV) 仅干预少量 prompt token，相比传统 full-sequence SV (FSSV) 在 AxBench 上表现更优，且在通用性与对抗鲁棒性之间取得更好平衡。
AI.motivation: 当前微调型 steering vectors 存在两个局限：一是推理时需逐向量仔细选择 steering factor 以平衡引导效果与生成质量；二是全序列 SV (FSSV) 即使选择了合适的 factor，仍因过度干预生成过程而牺牲生成质量。本文旨在解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 1) 提出联合训练 steering factors 和 directions，无需事后选择 factor；基于神经网络缩放理论，发现适中的初始化大小和学习率对联合训练的稳定性和效率至关重要。2) 受表示微调启发，提出 Prompt-only SV (PrOSV)，仅对少量 prompt token 进行干预，减少对生成过程的过度影响。
AI.result: 在 AxBench 上，PrOSV 结合联合训练方案优于传统 FSSV；PrOSV 在通用模型效用与对抗鲁棒性之间取得了比 FSSV 更好的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 联合训练消除了对 steering factor 的手动后验选择需求，PrOSV 通过限制干预范围在 prompt token 上，有效缓解了全序列干预带来的生成质量下降问题，实现了更优的性能与鲁棒性平衡。

title: PairAlign: A Framework for Sequence Tokenization via Self-Alignment with Applications to Audio Tokenization
summary:
Many operations on sensory data -- comparison, memory, retrieval, and reasoning -- are naturally expressed over discrete symbolic structures. In language this interface is given by tokens; in audio, it must be learned. Existing audio tokenizers rely on quantization, clustering, or codec reconstruction, assigning tokens locally, so sequence consistency, compactness, length control, termination, and edit similarity are rarely optimized directly.
  We introduce PairAlign, a framework for compact audio tokenization through sequence-level self-alignment. PairAlign treats tokenization as conditional sequence generation: an encoder maps speech to a continuous condition, and an autoregressive decoder generates tokens from BOS, learning token identity, order, length, and EOS placement. Given two content-preserving views, each view's sequence is trained to be likely under the other's representation, while unrelated examples provide competing sequences. This gives a scalable surrogate for edit-distance preservation while discouraging many-to-one collapse.
  PairAlign starts from VQ-style tokenization and refines it with EMA-teacher targets, cross-paired teacher forcing, prefix corruption, likelihood contrast, and length control.
  On 3-second speech, PairAlign learns compact, non-degenerate sequences with broad vocabulary usage and strong cross-view consistency. On TIMIT retrieval, it preserves edit-distance search while reducing archive token count by 55%. A continuous-sweep probe shows lower local overlap than a dense geometric tokenizer, but stronger length control and bounded edit trajectories under 100 ms shifts. PairAlign is a sequence-symbolic predictive learner: like JEPA-style objectives, it predicts an abstract target from another view as a learned variable-length symbolic sequence, not a continuous latent.

AI.tldr: PairAlign 提出了一种通过序列级自对齐实现紧凑音频标记化的框架，将标记化视为条件序列生成，通过交叉视图训练和对比学习实现紧凑、非退化的符号序列，在 TIMIT 检索任务中减少55%的存档标记数，并保持编辑距离搜索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有音频标记化方法（如量化、聚类、编解码重建）均基于局部标记分配，难以直接优化序列一致性、紧凑性、长度控制、终止符放置和编辑相似性等序列级属性。
AI.method: 将标记化建模为条件序列生成：编码器将语音映射为连续条件，自回归解码器从BOS生成标记序列，学习标记身份、顺序、长度和EOS放置。利用内容保留的双视角，每个视角的序列在另一视角表示下保持高似然，无关样本提供竞争序列。结合EMA教师目标、交叉配对教师强制、前缀破坏、似然对比和长度控制等技术。
AI.result: 在3秒语音上学习紧凑、非退化序列，词汇使用广泛且跨视角一致性强。TIMIT检索中保持编辑距离搜索性能，同时存档标记数减少55%。连续扫描探针显示局部重叠低于密集几何标记器，但在100ms偏移下具有更强的长度控制和有界编辑轨迹。
AI.conclusion: PairAlign 是一种序列符号预测学习器，类似于JEPA风格目标：从一个视角预测另一视角的抽象目标，输出的是可学习的变长符号序列，而非连续潜变量。

title: DiBA: Diagonal and Binary Matrix Approximation for Neural Network Weight Compression
summary: In this paper, we propose DiBA (Diagonal and Binary Matrix Approximation), a compact matrix factorization for neural network weight compression. Many components of modern networks, including linear layers, $1\times1$ convolutions, attention projections, and embedding layers, have dense matrix weights. DiBA approximates $A\in\mathbb{R}^{m\times n}$ by $\widehat A=D_1B_1D_2B_2D_3$, where $D_1,D_2,D_3$ are diagonal matrices and $B_1,B_2$ are $0/1$ binary matrices. The intermediate dimension $k$ controls the trade-off between theoretical storage and approximation accuracy. For matrix-vector products, DiBA decomposes dense multiplication into three element-wise scaling operations and two binary mixing operations, reducing the floating-point multiplication count from $mn$ to $m+k+n$. For optimization, we introduce DiBA-Greedy, an alternating solver that combines closed-form least-squares updates for the diagonal factors with exact one-bit improvement tests for the binary factors. We also introduce DiBARD (DiBA with Retuning only Diagonal factors), which replaces dense-matrix layers by DiBA factors, freezes the binary matrices, and retunes only the diagonal entries on downstream data. This preserves compact binary mixing without discrete search during adaptation. On 40 dense weight matrices extracted from public pretrained models, DiBA-Greedy yields consistent SNR improvements as the theoretical storage ratio increases. After DiBA replacement in two component-replacement studies, DiBARD improves DistilBERT/WikiText masked-token accuracy from 0.4447 to 0.5210 and Speech Commands test accuracy for an Audio Spectrogram Transformer from 0.7684 to 0.9781 without reoptimizing the binary factors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiBA（对角与二进制矩阵近似）方法，将神经网络中的稠密权重矩阵分解为三个对角矩阵和两个0/1二进制矩阵的乘积，显著降低计算复杂度（浮点乘法从mn降至m+k+n），并配合DiBA-Greedy优化算法和DiBARD微调策略，在多个预训练模型上取得显著的精度提升。
AI.motivation: 现代神经网络中大量使用稠密矩阵权重（如线性层、1×1卷积、注意力投影、嵌入层等），计算和存储开销巨大。现有压缩方法往往在精度和效率之间难以取得良好平衡，亟需一种既保持表达能力又降低计算复杂度的矩阵分解方法。
AI.method: 提出DiBA分解：A ≈ D₁B₁D₂B₂D₃，其中D为对角矩阵，B为0/1二值矩阵。矩阵-向量乘法分解为三次逐元素缩放和两次二值混合操作，将浮点乘法数从mn降至m+k+n。优化上提出DiBA-Greedy交替求解器（对角因子用闭式最小二乘更新，二值因子用精确单比特改进测试），以及DiBARD微调策略（冻结二值矩阵，仅微调对角因子）。
AI.result: 在40个预训练模型的稠密权重矩阵上，DiBA-Greedy随着理论存储比增加产生一致的SNR改善。在组件替换实验中，DiBARD将DistilBERT/WikiText掩码标记准确率从0.4447提升至0.5210，将Audio Spectrogram Transformer在Speech Commands上的测试准确率从0.7684提升至0.9781，且无需重新优化二值因子。
AI.conclusion: DiBA是一种高效且有效的神经网络权重压缩方法，通过结合对角矩阵与二值矩阵的分解结构，在显著降低计算复杂度的同时保持了良好的近似精度。DiBARD策略进一步验证了该方法在下游任务中的实用性和灵活性。

title: SkillOS: Learning Skill Curation for Self-Evolving Agents
summary: LLM-based agents are increasingly deployed to handle streaming tasks, yet they often remain one-off problem solvers that fail to learn from past interactions. Reusable skills distilled from experience provide a natural substrate for self-evolution, where high-quality skill curation serves as the key bottleneck. Existing approaches either rely on manual skill curation, prescribe heuristic skill operations, or train for short-horizon skill operations. However, they still struggle to learn complex long-term curation policies from indirect and delayed feedback. To tackle this challenge, we propose SkillOS, an experience-driven RL training recipe for learning skill curation in self-evolving agents. SkillOS pairs a frozen agent executor that retrieves and applies skills with a trainable skill curator that updates an external SkillRepo from accumulated experience. To provide learning signals for curation, we design composite rewards and train on grouped task streams based on skill-relevant task dependencies, where earlier trajectories update the SkillRepo, and later related tasks evaluate these updates. Across multi-turn agentic tasks and single-turn reasoning tasks, SkillOS consistently outperforms memory-free and strong memory-based baselines in both effectiveness and efficiency, with the learned skill curator generalizing across different executor backbones and task domains. Further analyses show that the learned curator produces more targeted skill use, while the skills in SkillRepo evolve into more richly structured Markdown files that encode higher-level meta-skills over time.

AI.tldr: SkillOS提出了一种基于强化学习的经验驱动训练方法，让智能体能够从过往经验中学习技能策展（skill curation），从而实现自我进化。该方法通过可训练的策展器（curator）动态更新外部技能库，在分组任务流中用复合奖励信号来指导长程技能策展策略的学习，在多项任务上优于无记忆和强记忆基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM智能体在处理流式任务时，往往只是"一次性"解决问题，无法从过去的交互中学习。尽管从经验中提炼可复用的技能是实现自我进化的自然方式，但高质量的技能策展是关键瓶颈。现有方法要么依赖手动策展，要么使用启发式操作或短视训练，难以从延迟且间接的反馈中学习复杂的长期策展策略。
AI.method: SkillOS包含两个核心组件：(1) 冻结的智能体执行器（executor），负责检索和应用技能；(2) 可训练的技能策展器（curator），负责根据积累的经验更新外部技能库（SkillRepo）。为了提供学习信号，设计了复合奖励，并在基于技能相关任务依赖性的分组任务流上进行训练：早期轨迹用于更新SkillRepo，后续相关任务用于评估这些更新的效果。
AI.result: 在多轮智能体任务和单轮推理任务上，SkillOS在效果和效率上均一致优于无记忆和强记忆基线方法。学到的策展策略能够泛化到不同的执行器骨架和任务领域。进一步分析表明，策展器能产生更具针对性的技能使用，而SkillRepo中的技能随着时间推移演化为结构更丰富的Markdown文件，编码了更高层次的元技能。
AI.conclusion: SkillOS通过经验驱动的强化学习训练框架，成功解决了智能体自我进化中技能策展的长程学习问题。该方法不仅提升了任务表现和效率，还展现了良好的泛化能力，为构建能从经验中持续学习的LLM智能体提供了有效方案。

title: Systematic Evaluation of Large Language Models for Post-Discharge Clinical Action Extraction
summary: The work in this paper evaluates zero-shot and few-shot large language models (LLMs) for safety-critical clinical action extraction using the CLIP discharge-note dataset, with particular emphasis on transitions of care and post-discharge patient safety. To manage the complexity of clinical documentation, we introduce a two-stage extraction framework that decomposes discharge notes, that are written in narrative form, into fine-grained, explicitly actionable clinical tasks through a staged prompting strategy. Our contributions include a systematic assessment of generative LLMs for clinical action extraction, a detailed comparison between general-purpose LLMs and task-specific supervised BERT-based models, and an analysis of annotation inconsistencies across different action categories. We show that contemporary LLMs achieve performance comparable to or exceeding supervised models on binary actionability detection, while supervised baselines retain a meaningful advantage on fine-grained multi-label category classification, despite the absence of task-specific fine-tuning and under strict data-privacy constraints. Qualitative error analysis reveals that many failures stem from misalignment between model reasoning and dataset annotation conventions, particularly in cases involving implicit clinical actions and rigid structural labeling rules. These results indicate that reported performance reflects model limitations due to lack of clinical reasoning, that is not captured by plain annotations. Labels without rationales make it impossible to distinguish clinical reasoning failures from annotation convention mismatches. Advancing clinical NLP requires reasoning-annotated datasets that document why specific spans are actionable, not merely which spans were labeled, enabling proper evaluation of model clinical understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了零样本和少样本大语言模型（LLMs）在安全关键型临床行动提取任务上的表现，提出了一种两阶段提取框架，并发现LLMs在二分类可操作性检测上媲美监督模型，但在细粒度多标签分类上仍不及监督基线。错误分析表明，许多失败源于模型推理与数据集标注惯例之间的错配，呼吁构建带有推理标注的数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有临床行动提取主要依赖监督式BERT模型，但大规模通用LLMs在临床任务上的适用性、特别是在安全关键场景下的零样本/少样本能力尚未被系统评估。同时，临床文档（如出院小结）以叙事形式书写，隐含大量行动信息，现有标注体系难以区分模型临床推理失败与标注惯例不匹配的问题。
AI.method: 使用CLIP出院小结数据集，采用两阶段提取框架：第一阶段对叙事式出院小结进行分解与结构化提示；第二阶段对细粒度临床行动进行提取。对比零样本/少样本LLMs（通用型）与任务特定监督式BERT模型在二分类可操作性检测和细粒度多标签分类上的表现，并进行定性错误分析。
AI.result: 当代LLMs在二分类可操作性检测上达到或超过监督模型；但在细粒度多标签类别分类上，监督式基线仍保持显著优势。错误分析发现，许多失败源于模型推理与数据集标注惯例之间的错配，尤其体现在隐含临床行动和刚性的结构性标注规则上。
AI.conclusion: 当前性能反映的是模型因缺乏临床推理而表现出的局限，而非简单的标注差异。现有标签缺乏推理过程，无法区分临床推理失败与标注惯例不匹配。推进临床NLP需要构建带有推理标注的数据集，记录为何特定文本段是可操作的，而不仅仅是哪些文本段被标注。

title: A Fine-Grained Understanding of Uniform Convergence for Halfspaces
summary: We study the fine-grained uniform convergence behavior of halfspaces beyond worst-case VC bounds. For inhomogeneous halfspaces in $\mathbb{R}^d$ with $d\ge 2$, we show that standard first-order VC bounds are essentially tight: even consistent hypotheses can incur population error $Θ(d\ln(n/d)/n)$, and in the agnostic setting the deviation scales as $\sqrt{τ\ln(1/τ)}$ at true error $τ$. In contrast, homogeneous halfspaces in $\mathbb{R}^2$ exhibit a markedly different behavior. In the realizable case, every hypothesis consistent with the sample has error $O(1/n)$. In the agnostic case, we prove a bandwise, log-free deviation bound on each dyadic risk band via a critical-wedge localization argument. Unioning over bands incurs only a $\ln\ln n$ overhead, and we establish a matching lower bound showing this overhead is unavoidable. Together, these results give a fine-grained and nearly complete picture of uniform convergence for halfspaces, revealing sharp dimensional and structural thresholds.

AI.tldr: 本文精细分析了半空间（halfspaces）的均匀收敛行为。对于非齐次半空间，标准VC界本质上紧致；而对于二维齐次半空间，误差率可降至O(1/n)，并通过临界楔形局部化论证得到了无对数的偏差界，仅付出ln ln n的代价，并证明该代价不可避免。
AI.motivation: 标准VC界对半空间的泛化误差估计较为宽松（worst-case），本文旨在揭示不同维度和结构下半空间的精细均匀收敛行为，探究是否存在比VC界更紧的界。
AI.method: 1) 对于非齐次半空间，通过构造证明标准一阶VC界本质上紧致；2) 对于二维齐次半空间，利用临界楔形局部化（critical-wedge localization）论证，在可学习情形下证明一致性假设的误差为O(1/n)，在agnostic情形下证明每个dyadic风险带上的无对数偏差界，并通过并集界获得仅ln ln n的开销。
AI.result: 1) 非齐次半空间（d≥2）：可实现情形下误差Θ(d ln(n/d)/n)，agnostic情形下偏差√(τ ln(1/τ))；2) 二维齐次半空间：可实现情形下误差O(1/n)，agnostic情形下得到带ln ln n开销的紧致界，且下界证明该开销不可避免。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了半空间均匀收敛行为中清晰的维度和结构阈值：非齐次半空间与齐次半空间在低维时呈现本质不同的收敛速率，为半空间的泛化理论提供了近乎完整的精细刻画。

title: Quantizing With Randomized Hadamard Transforms: Efficient Heuristic Now Proven
summary:
Uniform random rotations (URRs) are a common preprocessing step in modern quantization approaches used for gradient compression, inference acceleration, KV-cache compression, model weight quantization, and approximate nearest-neighbor search in vector databases. In practice, URRs are often replaced by randomized Hadamard transforms (RHTs), which preserve orthogonality while admitting fast implementations. The remaining issue is the performance for worst-case inputs. With a URR, each coordinate is individually distributed as a shifted beta distribution, which converges to a Gaussian distribution in high dimensions. Generally, one RHT is not suitable in the worst case, as individual coordinates can be far from these distributions. We show that after composing two RHTs on any $d$-sized input vector, the marginal distribution of every fixed coordinate of the normalized rotated vector is within $O(d^{-1/2})$ of a standard Gaussian both in Kolmogorov distance and in $1$-Wasserstein distance. We then plug these bounds into the analyses of modern compression schemes, namely DRIVE and QUIC-FL, and show that two RHTs achieve performance that asymptotically matches URRs.
  However, we show that two RHTs may not be sufficient for Vector Quantization (VQ), which often requires weak correlation across fixed-size blocks of coordinates (as opposed to only marginal distribution convergence for single coordinates). We prove that a composition of three RHTs leads to decaying coordinate covariance. This ensures that any fixed, bounded, multi-dimensional VQ codebook optimized for URRs has the same expected error when using three RHTs, up to an additive term that vanishes with the dimension.
  Finally, because practical inputs are rarely adversarial, we propose a linear-time ${O}(d)$ check on the input's moments to dynamically adapt the number of RHTs used at runtime to improve performance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了随机化哈达玛变换(RHT)的复合次数对高维向量旋转效果的影响，证明两次RHT即可使边际分布逼近高斯，三次RHT能保证向量量化的协方差衰减，并提出一种线性时间检查方法动态调整RHT使用次数。
AI.motivation: 均匀随机旋转(URR)是现代量化方法（如梯度压缩、KV缓存压缩、模型权重量化等）中的常见预处理步骤，实践中常用快速哈达玛变换(RHT)替代URR。但单个RHT在最坏情况下表现不佳（坐标分布远偏离高斯），作者希望探究需要多少次RHT复合才能达到与URR相当的性能。
AI.method: 理论分析：证明两次RHT后，任意固定坐标的边际分布与标准高斯在Kolmogorov距离和1-Wasserstein距离上的误差为O(d^{-1/2})；证明三次RHT后坐标协方差衰减，保证向量量化(VQ)的期望误差。实践方法：提出线性时间O(d)的输入矩检查方法，动态调整RHT使用次数。
AI.result: 两次RHT在DRIVE和QUIC-FL等压缩方案中渐近匹配URR性能；三次RHT可保证VQ码本的期望误差与URR相差O(d^{-1/2})的附加项；动态检查方法可根据输入自适应调整RHT次数提高性能。
AI.conclusion: 复合两次RHT足以满足大多数量化场景需求，三次RHT满足向量量化需求，动态检查方法有助于应对实际非对抗性输入。

title: MASPO: Joint Prompt Optimization for LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based Multi-agent systems (MAS) have shown promise in tackling complex collaborative tasks, where agents are typically orchestrated via role-specific prompts. While the quality of these prompts is pivotal, jointly optimizing them across interacting agents remains a non-trivial challenge, primarily due to the misalignment between local agent objectives and holistic system goals. To address this, we introduce MASPO, a novel framework designed to automatically and iteratively refine prompts across the entire system. A core innovation of MASPO is its joint evaluation mechanism, which assesses prompts not merely by their local validity, but by their capacity to facilitate downstream success for successor agents. This effectively bridges the gap between local interactions and global outcomes without relying on ground-truth labels. Furthermore, MASPO employs a data-driven evolutionary beam search to efficiently navigate the high-dimensional prompt space. Extensive empirical evaluations across 6 diverse tasks demonstrate that MASPO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art prompt optimization methods, achieving an average accuracy improvement of 2.9. We release our code at https://github.com/wangzx1219/MASPO.

AI.tldr: 提出MASPO框架，通过联合评估机制和数据驱动进化波束搜索，自动迭代优化多智能体系统中的提示词，实现局部目标与全局目标的对齐，在6个任务上平均提升2.9%准确率。
AI.motivation: 基于LLM的多智能体系统依赖角色特定提示词来协调协作，但现有方法中提示词质量参差不齐，且局部智能体目标与全局系统目标存在错位，缺乏自动联合优化提示词的方法。
AI.method: 提出MASPO框架，核心包括：(1) 联合评估机制——评估提示词时不仅看局部有效性，更关注其对下游智能体成功完成任务的能力，弥合局部交互与全局结果之间的鸿沟；(2) 数据驱动进化波束搜索——高效探索高维提示词空间。
AI.result: 在6个多样化任务上的实验表明，MASPO consistently 优于最先进的提示优化方法，平均准确率提升2.9%。
AI.conclusion: MASPO有效解决了多智能体系统中提示词联合优化的难题，通过局部与全局目标的自动对齐，显著提升系统整体性能。

title: Towards Annotation-Free Validation of MLLMs: A Vision-Language Logical Consistency Metric
summary: Dominant accuracy evaluation might reward unwarranted guessing of Large Language Models, and it might not be applicable to novel tasks for model validation without ground-truth (gt) annotation. Based on basic logic principle, we propose a novel framework to evaluate the vision-language logical consistency of MLLMs on both sufficient and necessary cause-effect relations. We define Vision-Language Logical Consistency Metric (VL-LCM) on traditional MC-VQA tests, and recent NaturalBench tests without the need for gt annotation. Through systematic experiments on representative VL benchmark MMMU and recent VL challenges like NaturalBench, we evaluated 11 recent open-source MLLMs from 4 frontier families. Our findings reveal that, despite significant progress of recent MLLMs on accuracy, logical consistency lags behind significantly. Extensive evaluations on the correlations of VL-LCM with metrics on gt, the reliability of LCM, and the relation of VL-LCM with response distribution justify the validity and applicability of VL-LCM even without gt annotation. Our findings suggest that, beyond accuracy, logical consistency could be employed for both accuracy and reliability. VL-LCM can also be employed for MLLM selection, validation, and reliable answer justification in novel tasks without gt annotation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需真实标注的视觉-语言逻辑一致性评估指标VL-LCM，用于衡量多模态大模型在充分和必要因果关系上的逻辑一致性，实验发现当前模型在准确性提升的同时逻辑一致性显著滞后。
AI.motivation: 传统的准确率评估会奖励大模型的盲目猜测，且在没有真实标注的新任务上无法适用，因此需要一种不依赖真实标注、基于逻辑原则的评估方法。
AI.method: 基于基本逻辑原则，定义视觉-语言逻辑一致性指标VL-LCM，分别在传统MC-VQA测试和无需标注的NaturalBench测试上评估模型在充分和必要条件因果关系上的一致性。
AI.result: 对11个前沿开源MLLM在MMMU和NaturalBench等基准上的实验表明，尽管模型准确率显著提升，但逻辑一致性明显落后；VL-LCM与真实标注指标的相关性、可靠性以及响应分布关系验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 逻辑一致性可作为准确率之外的补充评估维度，用于模型选择、验证以及新任务中的可靠答案证明，尤其在没有真实标注的场景下具有应用价值。

title: Matrix-Decoupled Concentration for Autoregressive Sequences: Dimension-Free Guarantees for Sparse Long-Context Rewards
summary: Sequence-level evaluations in autoregressive Large Language Models (LLMs) rely on highly dependent token generation. Establishing tight concentration bounds for these processes remains a challenge due to two fundamental bottlenecks in existing frameworks: (i) classical inequalities typically separate dependency structures from target sensitivities, leading to a scalar collapse that inflates the variance proxy to a suboptimal $\mathcal{O}(N)$ for sparse terminal rewards; (ii) conversely, while certain spatial methods achieve tighter bounds, they lack the strictly causal filtration required by sequential generation, rendering them inapplicable to the autoregressive setting. To resolve both bottlenecks, we establish a sharp McDiarmid-type inequality for dependent sequences, governed strictly by the exact matrix-vector multiplication of the causal dependency resolvent and the target sensitivity vector. This Matrix-Decoupled Concentration (MDC) framework natively recovers optimal constants for Markov chains and exploits directed $d$-separation to yield order-optimal bounds for causal trees. Crucially, by exactly preserving the coordinate-wise sparsity of rewards within a strictly causal framework, MDC mathematically prevents scalar collapse, guaranteeing a dimension-free $\mathcal{O}(1)$ variance proxy and providing a rigorous mathematical justification for the stability of long-context reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出矩阵解耦浓度（MDC）框架，通过建立适用于因果依赖序列的尖锐McDiarmid型不等式，解决了自回归大语言模型中序列级评估的浓度界估计问题。MDC通过精确保留奖励的坐标稀疏性，实现了维度无关的𝒪(1)方差代理，为长上下文推理的稳定性提供了严格数学证明。
AI.motivation: 现有框架存在两个瓶颈：(i)经典不等式将依赖结构与目标灵敏度分离，导致对稀疏终端奖励产生次优的𝒪(N)方差代理；(ii)某些空间方法虽能获得更紧的界，但缺乏严格因果过滤，不适用于自回归设置。
AI.method: 建立了一种适用于依赖序列的尖锐McDiarmid型不等式，其核心是通过因果依赖解算器与目标灵敏度向量的精确矩阵-向量乘法来控制浓度界。该MDC框架天然恢复马尔可夫链的最优常数，并利用有向d-分离为因果树生成阶最优界。
AI.result: MDC框架在严格因果框架内精确保留奖励的坐标稀疏性，数学上阻止了标量坍缩，保证了维度无关的𝒪(1)方差代理，为长上下文推理的稳定性提供了严格数学证明。
AI.conclusion: MDC框架同时解决了两个瓶颈，为自回归LLM的序列级评估提供了理论上紧的浓度界，并解释了长上下文推理的稳定性。

title: Can RL Teach Long-Horizon Reasoning to LLMs? Expressiveness Is Key
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has been applied to improve large language model (LLM) reasoning, yet the systematic study of how training scales with task difficulty has been hampered by the lack of controlled, scalable environments. We introduce ScaleLogic, a synthetic logical reasoning framework that offers independent control over two axes of difficulty: the depth of the required proof planning (i.e., the horizon) and the expressiveness of the underlying logic. Our proposed framework supports a wide range of logics: from simple implication-only logic ("if-then") towards more expressive first-order reasoning with conjunction ("and"), disjunction ("or"), negation ("not"), and universal quantification ("for all"). Using this framework, we show that the RL training compute $T$ follows a power law with respect to reasoning depth $D$ ($T \propto D^γ$, $R^{2} > 0.99$), and that the scaling exponent $γ$ increases monotonically with logical expressiveness, from $1.04$ to $2.60$. On downstream mathematics and general reasoning benchmarks, more expressive training settings yield both larger performance gains (up to $+10.66$ points) and more compute-efficient transfer compared to less expressive settings, demonstrating that what a model is trained on, not just how much it is trained, shapes downstream transfer. We further show that the power-law relationship holds across multiple RL methods, and curriculum-based training substantially improves scaling efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ScaleLogic框架，用于系统研究强化学习训练大语言模型推理时，任务难度（推理深度和逻辑表达力）如何影响训练计算量。发现训练计算量与推理深度呈幂律关系，且指数随逻辑表达力单调递增（从1.04到2.60）。更富表达力的训练设置在下游任务上带来更大性能提升（最高+10.66分）和更高计算效率。幂律关系在多种RL方法中成立，基于课程的学习可显著提升扩展效率。
AI.motivation: 此前缺乏可控、可扩展的环境来系统研究RL训练如何随任务难度扩展，作者希望填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出ScaleLogic合成逻辑推理框架，可独立控制推理深度和逻辑表达力两个难度维度，支持从简单蕴含逻辑到一阶推理的多种逻辑系统。
AI.result: 训练计算量与推理深度呈幂律关系（R²>0.99），指数从1.04到2.60单调递增。下游数学和推理基准上，更富表达力训练带来最多+10.66分提升，且计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 模型训练的内容（逻辑表达力）而非仅训练量，对下游迁移效果有决定性影响；课程学习可进一步提升扩展效率。

title: Beyond Fixed Benchmarks and Worst-Case Attacks: Dynamic Boundary Evaluation for Language Models
summary: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) today rests on fixed benchmarks that apply the same set of items to any model, producing ceiling and floor effects that mask capability gaps. We argue that the most informative evaluation signal lies at the boundary, where the per-prompt pass probability is near $0.5$ under random-sampling decoding, and propose Dynamic Boundary Evaluation (DBE), which actively locates each model's boundary and places it on a globally comparable difficulty scale. DBE delivers three artifacts: (i) a calibrated item bank covering safety, capability, and truthfulness, with per-item difficulty labels validated across $9$ reference LLMs; (ii) Skill-Guided Boundary Search (SGBS), a search algorithm that finds boundary items for a given target LLM using only API-level query access; and (iii) an evaluation protocol that places a new LLM on a unified ability scale and grows the evaluation set adaptively when the target falls outside the bank's coverage. We instantiate DBE on four categories spanning safety (harmful request refusal and over-refusal), capability (constrained instruction following), and truthfulness (multi-turn sycophancy resistance). The resulting evaluation covers a broader model spectrum without saturation while remaining compatible with existing datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出动态边界评估（DBE），通过定位每个LLM的边界（通过概率约0.5）并放置在全球可比的难度尺度上，解决固定基准的天花板/地板效应问题，包含校准题库、搜索算法和评估协议。
AI.motivation: 现有固定基准对所有模型使用相同测试项，导致天花板效应和地板效应，掩盖了模型之间的能力差距。
AI.method: 提出DBE框架，包含：(i) 校准题库（覆盖安全、能力和真实性，有难度标签）；(ii) 技能引导边界搜索（SGBS），仅通过API查询找到目标模型的边界项；(iii) 统一能力尺度的评估协议，可自适应扩展。
AI.result: 在安全（拒绝有害请求/过度拒绝）、能力（约束指令遵循）和真实性（多轮谄媚抵抗）四个类别上实例化，覆盖更广模型谱系且无饱和，与现有数据集兼容。
AI.conclusion: DBE通过动态定位边界提供更信息量的评估信号，有效避免固定基准的局限性，实现更公平、更精细的LLM能力比较。

title: Multi-agent decision making: A Blackwell's informativeness approach
summary: The rapid development of large language models (LLMs) has motivated research on decision-making in multi-agent systems, where multiple agents collaborate to achieve shared objectives. Existing aggregation approaches, such as voting and debate, are largely ad-hoc and lack formal guarantees regarding the informativeness of the resulting decisions. In this paper, we provide a principled approach to analyse decisions made in the multi-LLM setting using Blackwell's informativeness framework. Within the Blackwell information-structure abstraction, we show that voting and debate induce information structures that are no more informative than the pooled private information of all agents. This result identifies Bayesian pooled posterior maximisation as an information-theoretic upper-bound decision rule under the Blackwell ordering. Motivated by this theoretical analysis, we introduce a practical method for LLM-based question-answering (QA) tasks that estimates each agent's posterior and approximates the pooled posterior using a product-of-posteriors estimator. Extensive experiments on six QA benchmarks demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art multi-LLM debate and voting methods.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Blackwell信息框架理论分析多LLM系统中的决策问题，证明投票和辩论方法的信息量不超过所有智能体私有信息的集合，提出基于贝叶斯池化后验最大化的理论最优决策规则，并设计了一种实用方法——通过乘积后验估计器近似池化后验，在六个QA基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的多LLM聚合方法（如投票、辩论）缺乏理论基础，无法保证决策的信息量（informativeness）。作者希望建立一种原则性框架来分析多LLM决策，并找到信息论意义上的最优决策方式。
AI.method: 1) 引入Blackwell信息结构抽象，将多LLM决策问题建模为信息结构比较问题。2) 理论上证明投票和辩论的信息结构不会超过所有智能体私有信息的池化结果，并指出贝叶斯池化后验最大化是Blackwell序下的上界决策规则。3) 提出实用方法：估计每个智能体的后验分布，用乘积后验估计器（product-of-posteriors estimator）近似池化后验，用于QA任务。
AI.result: 在六个QA基准数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法显著优于现有的多LLM辩论和投票方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文从信息理论视角为多LLM决策提供了理论基础，证明了池化后验最大化的最优性，并验证了其实用方法的有效性。

title: Recursive Agent Optimization
summary: We introduce Recursive Agent Optimization (RAO), a reinforcement learning approach for training recursive agents: agents that can spawn and delegate sub-tasks to new instantiations of themselves recursively. Recursive agents implement an inference-time scaling algorithm that naturally allows agents to scale to longer contexts and generalize to more difficult problems via divide-and-conquer. RAO provides a method to train models to best take advantage of such recursive inference, teaching agents when and how to delegate and communicate. We find that recursive agents trained in this way enjoy better training efficiency, can scale to tasks that go beyond the model's context window, generalize to tasks much harder than the ones the agent was trained on, and can enjoy reduced wall-clock time compared to single-agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出递归智能体优化（RAO），一种训练能递归生成子智能体并委派任务的强化学习方法，使模型在推理时通过分治策略自然扩展上下文长度并泛化到更难问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单智能体系统在处理超长上下文和高难度任务时存在瓶颈，需要一种能让智能体在推理时动态扩展能力的方法。
AI.method: RAO通过强化学习训练递归智能体，使其学会何时委派子任务以及如何进行智能体间的通信协作。
AI.result: 递归智能体在训练效率、超上下文窗口任务扩展、困难任务泛化以及推理时间缩短方面均优于单智能体系统。
AI.conclusion: RAO是一种有效的推理时扩展算法，赋予模型通过分治递归自主应对复杂问题的能力。

title: Joint Consistency: A Unified Test-Time Aggregation Framework via Energy Minimization
summary: This paper studies test-time aggregation, an approach that generates multiple reasoning traces and aggregates them into a final answer. Most existing methods rely on evaluation signals collected from candidate traces in isolation or answer frequencies, while ignoring comparative interactions among candidates. We propose Joint Consistency (JC), formulated as a constrained Ising-type energy minimization problem, where independent evaluation signals act as external fields and pairwise comparisons act as interactions. JC provides a unified framework for test-time aggregation that subsumes existing voting and weighted aggregation methods as special cases. Our construction of the interaction matrix leverages LLM-as-a-judge comparisons, and admits a theoretical interpretation under answer-level homogeneity assumptions. Moreover, we develop an efficient approximation strategy that makes interaction modeling practical for large-scale test-time aggregation. Experiments on math and code reasoning benchmarks show that JC consistently outperforms existing baselines across tasks, judge models, trace budgets, and trace-generation settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出联合一致性（JC）方法，将测试时聚合建模为约束伊辛型能量最小化问题，通过引入成对比较交互信号，统一了投票和加权聚合方法，在数学与代码推理任务上持续超越现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时聚合方法仅依赖候选轨迹的孤立评估信号或答案频率，忽略了候选之间的比较交互信息，导致聚合效果受限。
AI.method: 将聚合问题形式化为约束伊辛型能量最小化，独立评估信号作为外部场，成对比较（基于LLM评判）作为交互项，并提出高效近似策略。
AI.result: 在数学与代码推理基准上，JC在多个任务、评判模型、轨迹预算和轨迹生成设置下一致优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: JC提供了一个统一的测试时聚合框架，通过引入比较交互信号显著提升聚合质量，且理论上可解释、实践中可扩展。

title: Does Synthetic Data Help? Empirical Evidence from Deep Learning Time Series Forecasters
summary: Synthetic data has transformed language model training, yet its role in time series forecasting remains poorly understood. We present a large-scale empirical study: nine experiment groups, 4,218 runs systematically evaluating synthetic time series augmentation across five architectures, four synthetic signals and seven datasets. The effect is sharply architecture-conditional: channel-mixing models (TimesNet, iTransformer) benefit in the majority of trials, while channel-independent models (DLinear, PatchTST) are consistently degraded. In selected low-resource settings the gains are striking: TimesNet trained on only 10\% of Weather data with synthetic augmentation surpasses the full-data baseline (4 of 16 sparsity-dataset combinations). Averaged across all architectures, augmentation hurts in 67\% of trials. We further find that only the Seasonal-Trend generator reliably helps across the tested benchmarks, and that hard curriculum switching is actively harmful (+24\% MSE degradation). These results provide concrete, actionable guidelines on how to use synthetic data: use synthetic augmentation with channel-mixing architectures, use gradual annealing schedules, and treat low-resource augmentation as architecture- and dataset-dependent. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/hugoiscracked/synthetic-ts/tree/main}

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模实证研究（9个实验组、4218次运行）系统评估了合成数据在时间序列预测中的作用。关键发现：合成数据的效果高度依赖架构——通道混合模型（TimesNet, iTransformer）多数情况下受益，而通道独立模型（DLinear, PatchTST）持续受损；仅Seasonal-Trend生成器可靠有效；硬课程切换策略有害（MSE恶化24%）。平均来看，67%的试验中数据增强反而有害。
AI.motivation: 合成数据在语言模型训练中已显示出变革性作用，但其在时间序列预测中的效果和适用条件尚不明确，缺乏系统性的理解与指导原则。
AI.method: 大规模实证研究：涵盖9个实验组、4218次运行，系统评估5种架构（TimesNet, iTransformer, DLinear, PatchTST等）、4种合成信号和7个数据集，在不同资源设置下进行对照实验。
AI.result: 1) 通道混合模型（TimesNet, iTransformer）在多数试验中受益，通道独立模型（DLinear, PatchTST）持续受损；2) 低资源场景下提升显著（如TimesNet用10%数据+合成增强超越全量基线）；3) 仅Seasonal-Trend生成器可靠有效；4) 硬课程切换导致MSE恶化24%；5) 平均67%试验中增强有害。
AI.conclusion: 提供了可操作的实践指南：合成数据增强应配合通道混合架构使用；应采用渐进退火调度策略；低资源增强需根据架构和数据集具体考量，不可一刀切。

title: When No Benchmark Exists: Validating Comparative LLM Safety Scoring Without Ground-Truth Labels
summary:
Many deployments must compare candidate language models for safety before a labeled benchmark exists for the relevant language, sector, or regulatory regime. We formalize this setting as benchmarkless comparative safety scoring and specify the contract under which a scenario-based audit can be interpreted as deployment evidence. Scores are valid only under a fixed scenario pack, rubric, auditor, judge, sampling configuration, and rerun budget. Because no labels are available, we replace ground-truth agreement with an instrumental-validity chain: responsiveness to a controlled safe-versus-abliterated contrast, dominance of target-driven variance over auditor and judge artifacts, and stability across reruns.
  We instantiate the chain in SimpleAudit, a local-first scoring instrument, and validate it on a Norwegian safety pack. Safe and abliterated targets separate with AUROC values between 0.89 and 1.00, target identity is the dominant variance component ($η^2 \approx 0.52$), and severity profiles stabilize by ten reruns. Applying the same chain to Petri shows that it admits both tools. The substantial differences arise upstream of the chain, in claim-contract enforcement and deployment fit. A Norwegian public-sector procurement case comparing Borealis and Gemma 3 demonstrates the resulting evidence in practice: the safer model depends on scenario category and risk measure. Consequently, scores, matched deltas, critical rates, uncertainty, and the auditor and judge used must be reported together rather than collapsed into a single ranking.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在无标注基准情况下，通过场景化审计和工具效度链（安全vs消融对比、方差分解、稳定性检验）对语言模型进行安全评分，并在挪威语安全包和实际采购案例中验证了该方法。
AI.motivation: 许多部署场景需要在缺乏标注基准的情况下比较语言模型的安全性（如特定语言、行业或监管环境），因此需要形式化一种无基准的对比安全评分方法。
AI.method: 定义无基准对比安全评分的契约框架，通过场景包、评分标准、审计者、法官、采样配置和重跑预算实施审计。提出工具效度链：控制安全vs消融对比的响应性、目标驱动方差主导审计者和法官伪迹、重跑稳定性。实例化为SimpleAudit工具，并在挪威安全包和Petri上验证。
AI.result: 安全与消融目标AUROC在0.89-1.00之间分离，目标身份主导方差（η²≈0.52），严重性分布10次重跑后稳定。挪威公共采购案例（Borealis vs Gemma 3）显示较安全模型取决于场景类别和风险度量。
AI.conclusion: 评分、匹配差异、临界率、不确定性以及所用审计者和法官必须一并报告，不能简化为单一排序；方法差异主要出现在效度链上游（主张-契约执行和部署适配）。

title: Proactive Instance Navigation with Comparative Judgment for Ambiguous User Queries
summary: Natural-language instance navigation becomes challenging when the initial user request does not uniquely specify the target instance. A practical agent should reduce the user's burden by actively asking only the information needed to distinguish the target from similar distractors, rather than requiring a detailed description upfront. Existing approaches often fall short of this goal: they may stop at the first plausible candidate before sufficiently exploring alternatives, or, even after collecting multiple candidates, ask about the target's attributes derived from individual candidates rather than questions selected to distinguish candidates in the pool. As a result, despite the dialogue, the agent may still fail to distinguish the target from distractors, leading to premature decisions and lengthy user responses. We propose Proactive Instance Navigation with Comparative Judgment (ProCompNav), a two-stage framework that first constructs a candidate pool and then identifies the target through comparative judgment. At each round, ProCompNav extracts an attribute-value pair that splits the current pool, asks a binary yes/no question, and prunes all inconsistent candidates at once. This reframes disambiguation from open-ended target description to pool-level discriminative questioning, where each question is chosen to narrow the candidate set. On CoIN-Bench, ProCompNav improves Success Rate over interactive baselines with the same minimal input and non-interactive baselines with detailed descriptions, while substantially reducing Response Length. ProCompNav also achieves state-of-the-art Success Rate on TextNav, suggesting that comparative judgment is broadly useful for instance-level navigation among similar distractors.

AI.tldr: 提出ProCompNav框架，通过构建候选池并基于比较判断主动提问区分目标，在实例导航中提升成功率并减少用户响应长度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在初始用户请求不唯一指定目标时，要么过早停在第一个候选，要么提问基于单个候选属性而非区分性信息，导致无法有效区分目标和干扰项。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：先构建候选池，再通过比较判断识别目标。每轮提取可分割当前池的属性-值对，提出二元是/否问题，一次性剪枝所有不一致候选。
AI.result: 在CoIN-Bench上，ProCompNav比交互式基线和详细描述的非交互式基线成功率更高，同时大幅减少响应长度；在TextNav上达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 将消歧从开放式目标描述重构为池级别的区分性提问，比较判断在实例级导航中对相似干扰项具有广泛适用性。

title: Optimal Transport for LLM Reward Modeling from Noisy Preference
summary: Reward models are fundamental to Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF), yet real-world datasets are inevitably corrupted by noisy preference. Conventional training objectives tend to overfit these errors, while existing denoising approaches often rely on homogeneous noise assumptions that fail to capture the complexity of linguistic preferences. To handle these challenges, we propose SelectiveRM, a framework grounded in optimal transport. We first devise a Joint Consistency Discrepancy to align the distribution of model predictions with preference data. Furthermore, to address the limitation of strict mass conservation which compels the model to fit outliers, we incorporate a Mass Relaxation mechanism via partial transport. This enables the autonomous exclusion of samples with noisy preference that contradict semantic consistency. Theoretically, we demonstrate that SelectiveRM optimizes a tighter upper bound on the unobserved clean risk. Extensive experiments validate that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across diverse benchmarks.

AI.tldr: SelectiveRM 提出基于最优传输的框架，通过联合一致性差异和部分传输的质量松弛机制，自动排除含噪偏好样本，有效解决 RLHF 中奖励模型训练时的噪声偏好问题。
AI.motivation: 真实世界的偏好数据不可避免地包含噪声，传统训练目标会过拟合这些错误，而现有去噪方法多基于同质性噪声假设，无法捕捉语言偏好的复杂性。
AI.method: 提出选择性奖励模型框架：1) 联合一致性差异来对齐模型预测与偏好数据的分布；2) 通过部分传输实现质量松弛机制，自动排除违反语义一致性的含噪样本。
AI.result: 理论上证明 SelectiveRM 优化了未观测干净风险的一个更紧的上界；实验上在各个基准测试中显著超越当前最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于最优传输的去噪框架能有效处理 RLHF 中的复杂偏好噪声，为奖励模型的鲁棒训练提供了新思路。

title: Verifier-Backed Hard Problem Generation for Mathematical Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate strong capabilities for solving scientific and mathematical problems, yet they struggle to produce valid, challenging, and novel problems - an essential component for advancing LLM training and enabling autonomous scientific research. Existing problem generation approaches either depend on expensive human expert involvement or adopt naive self-play paradigms, which frequently yield invalid problems due to reward hacking. This work introduces VHG, a verifier-enhanced hard problem generation framework built upon three-party self-play. By integrating an independent verifier into the conventional setter-solver duality, our design constrains the setter's reward to be jointly determined by problem validity (evaluated by the verifier) and difficulty (assessed by the solver). We instantiate two verifier variants: a Hard symbolic verifier and a Soft LLM-based verifier, with evaluations conducted on indefinite integral tasks and general mathematical reasoning tasks. Experimental results show that VHG substantially outperforms all baseline methods by a clear margin.

AI.tldr: 论文提出VHG框架，通过三方自博弈（设定者-求解者-验证者）生成有效且困难的新问题，在积分和数学推理任务上显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有问题生成方法要么依赖昂贵的人类专家，要么采用朴素自博弈导致奖励破解而产生无效问题，亟需一种能自动生成有效、有挑战性且新颖问题的方法。
AI.method: 提出VHG（Verifier-enhanced Hard problem Generation）框架，在传统的设定者-求解者二元关系中加入独立验证者，使设定者的奖励由验证者评估的问题有效性和求解者评估的问题难度共同决定。实例化了Hard符号验证器和Soft基于LLM的验证器两种变体。
AI.result: 在不定积分任务和一般数学推理任务上，VHG显著优于所有基线方法，消融实验验证了各组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: 引入独立验证者的三方自博弈框架能有效约束设定者行为，避免奖励破解，生成既有效又有难度的高质量问题。

title: A Versatile AI Agent for Rare Disease Diagnosis and Risk Gene Prioritization
summary: Accurate and timely diagnosis is essential for effective treatment, particularly in the context of rare diseases. However, current diagnostic workflows often lead to prolonged assessment times and low accuracy. To address these limitations, we introduce Hygieia, a multi-modal AI agent system designed to support precision disease diagnosis by integrating diverse data sources, including phenotypic features, genetic profiles, and clinical records. Hygieia features a router-based and knowledge-enhanced framework that mitigates hallucination and tailors diagnostic strategies to different disease categories. Notably, it prioritizes risk-related genomic factors for rare diseases and provides confidence scores to assist clinical decision-making. We conducted a comprehensive evaluation demonstrating that Hygieia achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple diagnostic benchmarks. In collaboration with clinical experts from Yale School of Medicine and Duke-NUS Medical School, we further validated its practical utility by showing (1) Hygieia's superior diagnostic performance compared to physicians with an improvement from 12%-60% and (2) its effectiveness in assisting clinicians with medical records for handling real-world cases. Our findings indicate that Hygieia not only enhances diagnostic accuracy and interpretability but also significantly reduces clinician workload, highlighting its potential as a valuable tool in clinical decision support systems.

AI.tldr: Hygieia是一个多模态AI智能体系统，通过整合表型特征、遗传数据和临床记录，并采用基于路由器和知识增强的框架来减少幻觉，在罕见病诊断中实现12%-60%的性能提升，优于临床医生，同时减轻其工作负担。
AI.motivation: 当前罕见病诊断流程耗时长、准确性低，亟需一种能够整合多源数据、提升诊断效率和准确性的智能辅助系统。
AI.method: 提出Hygieia系统，采用基于路由器和知识增强的多模态AI框架，集成表型、遗传和临床数据，优先处理与风险相关的基因组因素，并生成置信度评分以辅助临床决策。
AI.result: 在多个诊断基准上达到最先进性能；与耶鲁大学和杜克-新加坡国立大学医学院合作验证，诊断表现比医生提升12%-60%，并能有效辅助临床医生处理真实病例。
AI.conclusion: Hygieia不仅提高了诊断准确性和可解释性，还显著减轻了临床医生的工作负担，展示了作为临床决策支持系统的巨大潜力。

title: Requests of a Feather Must Flock Together: Batch Size vs. Prefix Homogeneity in LLM Inference
summary: Auto-regressive token generation in large language models is memory-bound because it requires "attending to" key and value tensors (KV cache) of all previous tokens. Prior work aims to improve the efficiency of this decode process by batching multiple requests together, and maximizing batch size subject to GPU memory constraints. The key observation of our work is that with prefix-sharing workloads, smaller, prefix-homogeneous batches -- where all requests share a common prefix -- can achieve higher decode throughput than larger, heterogeneous batches, due to better spatial and temporal locality during KV cache accesses. However, prefix-aware schedulers in state-of-the-art inference engines maximize prefix reuse within a batch only to reduce KV cache memory footprint, but do not stop batch formation at smaller homogeneous batches that could have performed better. Further, we show that shared prefix detection in existing schedulers relies on radix-tree traversals, incurring substantial CPU overhead that is often comparable to GPU execution time. This paper presents Feather, a prefix-aware scheduler that uses reinforcement learning (RL) to learn the optimal tradeoff between batch size and prefix homogeneity. We also introduce Chunked Hash Tree (CHT), a lightweight data structure that enables fast prefix detection and efficient request selection for the RL scheduler, avoiding expensive tree traversals. We integrate Feather into vLLM and SGLang, and our evaluation shows that Feather achieves 2--10$\times$ higher end-to-end throughput as compared to existing schedulers, while doing no worse than the status quo when the workload does not have enough prefix sharing. Feather achieves these gains by reducing the total number of KV cache accesses, surpassing the performance of prefix-aware attention kernels that have the same goal.

AI.tldr: Feather 是一个基于强化学习的 prefix-aware 调度器，通过 Chunked Hash Tree 快速检测共享前缀，在 batch size 和 prefix homogeneity 之间做出最优权衡，相比现有调度器实现 2-10 倍的端到端吞吐量提升。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型的自回归解码受限于 KV cache 的内存访问瓶颈。现有推理引擎在调度时只注重最大化 batch 内部的 prefix 复用以减少 KV cache 内存占用，但没有意识到更小但 prefix 更一致的 batch 反而能获得更高的解码吞吐量。同时，现有的 radix-tree 前缀检测方法带来了大量的 CPU 开销。
AI.method: 提出 Feather，一个基于强化学习的 prefix-aware 调度器，学习 batch size 和 prefix homogeneity 之间的最优权衡。同时设计 Chunked Hash Tree (CHT)，一种轻量级数据结构，用于快速前缀检测和高效请求选择，避免昂贵的树遍历开销。
AI.result: 集成到 vLLM 和 SGLang 后，Feather 相比现有调度器实现 2-10 倍端到端吞吐量提升；在 prefix 共享不足的工作负载下性能不低于现状；通过减少总 KV cache 访问次数，超越了相同目标的 prefix-aware attention kernel 性能。
AI.conclusion: 对于 prefix-sharing 工作负载，小而 prefix-homogeneous 的 batch 比大而异构的 batch 能获得更高解码吞吐量。Feather 通过 RL 学习最优调度策略，结合 CHT 高效前缀检测，在保持低开销的同时显著提升了推理系统的吞吐性能。

title: Price of Fairness in Short-Term and Long-Term Algorithmic Selections
comment: The short version of this paper appears in the proceedings of IJCAI-26
summary: Algorithmic decision-making in high-stakes settings can have profound impacts on individuals and populations. While much prior work studies fairness in static settings, recent results show that enforcing static fairness constraints may exacerbate long-run disparities. Motivated by this tension, we study a stylized sequential selection problem in which a decision-maker repeatedly selects individuals, affecting both immediate utility and the population distribution over time. We introduce notions of group fairness for both the short and long term and theoretically analyze the trade-off between fairness and utility via the Price of Fairness (PoF). We characterize optimal and fair policies in the short term and show that the PoF can be large even when group distributions are nearly identical. In contrast, we show that long-term disparities can vanish under simple investment policies that achieve a low PoF. We also empirically validate these theoretical observations using both synthetic and real datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文研究高風險場景中演算法決策的公平性問題，特別關注短期公平約束可能導致長期族群差距擴大的矛盾。通過序列選擇問題的形式化建模，分析了短期與長期公平性之間的權衡，並引入公平代價（PoF）進行理論刻畫。
AI.motivation: 現有靜態公平性研究忽視了時間動態性，近期結果顯示靜態公平約束可能惡化長期族群不平等。為解決此矛盾，需理解短期公平與長期公平間的權衡關係。
AI.method: 建立序列選擇問題模型，定義短期與長期族群公平性指標，通過公平代價（PoF）理論分析最優策略，並結合合成數據與真實數據進行實驗驗證。
AI.result: 短期最優公平策略下，即使族群分布近乎相同，PoF仍可能很大；而長期視角下，簡單投資策略能有效消除族群差距並實現低PoF。
AI.conclusion: 長期公平性能通過合理的投資策略以較低的公平代價實現，但短期公平約束可能代價高昂，凸顯了在序列決策中考慮動態公平的重要性。

title: TFM-Retouche: A Lightweight Input-Space Adapter for Tabular Foundation Models
summary: Tabular foundation models (TFMs), such as TabPFN-2.6, TabICLv2, ConTextTab, Mitra, LimiX, and TabDPT, achieve strong zero-shot performance through in-context learning, but their inductive biases remain fixed at inference time. Adapting a pretrained TFM to a specific dataset or task typically requires either full fine-tuning, which is computationally expensive, or parameter-efficient tuning methods (PEFT) such as LoRA, which must be tailored to the internal architecture of each TFM. Furthermore, the evidence on whether weight-space fine-tuning improves accuracy or calibration is mixed \citep{tanna_exploring_2026,rubachev_finetuning_2025}. We introduce TFM-Retouche, a lightweight input-space residual adapter that is architecture-agnostic by design with respect to the frozen TFM backbone. TFM-Retouche learns a small residual correction in the input space to align the input data with the inductive biases of the pretrained model. The adapter is trained end-to-end through the frozen TFM, with a post-training identity guard that falls back to the unmodified TFM whenever adaptation does not help on held-out validation. On TabArena-Lite (51 datasets spanning binary classification, multiclass classification, and regression), TabICLv2-Retouche -- the framework instantiated on TabICLv2 -- is the top-ranked method on the leaderboard with light per-task tuning and ensembling, lifting aggregate Elo by +56 over the frozen TabICLv2 base and sitting on the Pareto front of predictive quality versus both training and inference time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TFM-Retouche，一种轻量级、架构无关的输入空间残差适配器，用于适配预训练的表格基础模型（TFM）。该方法在不修改TFM内部结构的前提下，通过端到端学习输入残差来对齐数据与模型归纳偏置，并包含后训练恒等守卫机制在适配无益时回退到原始模型。在TabArena-Lite的51个数据集上，TabICLv2-Retouche在排行榜上排名第一，Elo分数提升+56，并在预测质量与训练/推理时间之间处于帕累托前沿。
AI.motivation: 现存的表格基础模型（TFM）在零样本场景下通过上下文学习表现优异，但其归纳偏置在推理时固定不变。对特定数据集或任务进行适配时，全参数微调计算成本高昂，参数高效微调（PEFT）方法如LoRA又需针对每个TFM的内部架构进行定制设计。此外，关于权重空间微调是否能提升准确率或校准效果的证据尚不明确。因此，需要一种轻量级、架构无关且能有效适配TFM的方法。
AI.method: TFM-Retouche学习一个轻量级的输入空间残差适配器。该适配器在输入空间学习小规模残差修正，以对齐输入数据与预训练模型的归纳偏置。适配器通过冻结的TFM进行端到端训练，并配备后训练恒等守卫机制：当适配在留出验证集上无益时，回退到未修改的原始TFM。该方法架构无关，不依赖TFM内部结构。
AI.result: 在TabArena-Lite的51个数据集（涵盖二分类、多分类和回归任务）上，以TabICLv2为骨干的TFM-Retouche框架（TabICLv2-Retouche）在排行榜上排名第一，Elo分数相比冻结的TabICLv2基线提升+56。该方法处于预测质量与训练、推理时间的帕累托前沿，实现了轻量级每任务调优与集成的优异效果。
AI.conclusion: TFM-Retouche是一种有效的轻量级TFM适配方案，兼具架构无关性、计算高效性和性能提升能力。输入空间的残差适配加上恒等守卫机制，实现了"有帮助则适配，无帮助则回退"的灵活策略，为表格基础模型的适配提供了新范式。

title: Safactory: A Scalable Agent Factory for Trustworthy Autonomous Intelligence
summary: As large models evolve from conversational assistants into autonomous agents, challenges increasingly arise from long-horizon decision making, tool use, and real environment interaction. Existing agenticinfrastructure remain fragmented across evaluation, data management, and agent evolution, making it difficult to discover risks systematically and improve models in a continuous closed loop. In this report, we present \textbf{Safactory}, a scalable agent factory for trustworthy autonomous intelligence. Safactory integrates three tightly coupled platforms: a \textbf{Parallel Simulation Platform} for trajectory generation, a \textbf{Trustworthy Data Platform} for trajectory storage and experience extraction, and an \textbf{Autonomous Evolution Platform} for asynchronous reinforcement learning and on-policy distillation. As far as we know, Safactory is the first framework to propose a unified evolutionary pipeline for next-generation trustworthy autonomous intelligence.

AI.tldr: Safactory 是一个可扩展的智能体工厂，通过并行仿真、可信数据管理和自主进化三大平台协同，为大模型提供从轨迹生成到策略优化的闭环可信进化框架。
AI.motivation: 大模型从对话助手进化为自主智能体时，面临长程决策、工具使用和真实环境交互等挑战。现有智能体基础设施在评估、数据管理和智能体进化方面碎片化严重，缺乏系统性的风险发现和持续闭环优化机制。
AI.method: 提出Safactory框架，包含三个紧密耦合的平台：1) 并行仿真平台，用于轨迹生成；2) 可信数据平台，用于轨迹存储与经验提取；3) 自主进化平台，通过异步强化学习和on-policy蒸馏实现策略优化。
AI.result: Safactory是首个提出统一进化管线的框架，旨在实现下一代可信自主智能体。
AI.conclusion: Safactory通过集成仿真、数据管理和进化三大平台，为构建可信自主智能体提供了系统性的闭环解决方案，填补了现有智能体基础设施碎片化的空白。

title: When Brain Networks Travel: Learning Beyond Site
summary: Graph-based learning on functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) has shown strong potential for brain network analysis. However, existing methods degrade under cross-site out-of-distribution (OOD) settings because site-conditioned confounders induce non-pathological shortcuts, while functional connectivity constructed by temporal averaging obscures transient neurodynamics, limiting generalization to unseen sites. In this paper, we propose Cross-site OOD Robust brain nEtwork (CORE), a unified framework for brain network learning across unseen sites. CORE first performs site-aware confounder decoupling to mitigate site-conditioned bias and extract a cross-site population scaffold of reproducible diagnostic connectivity edges. It then profiles transient pathway dynamics over this scaffold using lightweight temporal descriptors and organizes scaffold edges into a line graph for transferable pathway-level modeling. Finally, CORE introduces a prior-guided subject-adaptive gating mechanism that leverages scaffold-derived population priors while preserving subject-specific connectivity variability. Extensive experiments under leave-one-site-out evaluation on real-world datasets (ABIDE, REST-meta-MDD, SRPBS, and ABCD) show that CORE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, with up to 6.7% relative gain. Furthermore, CORE remains robust to atlas variations, maintaining performance gains across different brain parcellation schemes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CORE框架，通过站点感知混淆解耦、瞬态路径动态建模和先验引导的自适应门控机制，解决跨站点fMRI脑网络学习中的分布外泛化问题，在四个真实数据集上取得优于基线方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图的fMRI分析方法在跨站点分布外场景下性能下降，原因是站点条件混杂因素引入非病理捷径，且基于时间平均的功能连接掩盖了瞬态神经动力学，限制了模型在未见站点上的泛化能力。
AI.method: CORE包含三个核心模块：1) 站点感知混淆解耦，缓解站点偏置并提取跨站点可重复诊断连接边（群体支架）；2) 使用轻量级时间描述符在该支架上刻画瞬态路径动态，并将支架边组织为线图进行可迁移路径级建模；3) 先验引导的subject自适应门控机制，融合群体先验与个体连接变异性。
AI.result: 在ABIDE、REST-meta-MDD、SRPBS和ABCD四个数据集上的留一站点评估中，CORE一致优于现有方法，相对提升最高达6.7%，且在不同脑图谱划分方案下保持性能优势。
AI.conclusion: CORE有效解决了跨站点fMRI脑网络学习的OOD泛化问题，对站点混淆因素和瞬态动力学缺失具有鲁棒性，为大规模多站点神经影像分析提供了可行方案。

title: Data Language Models: A New Foundation Model Class for Tabular Data
summary: Every major data modality now has a foundation model that understands it natively: text has language models, images have vision models, audio has audio models. Tabular data, the modality on which many consequential real-world AI decisions are made, does not. Every approach to tabular AI today, from gradient-boosted trees to the latest tabular foundation models, requires a preprocessing pipeline before any model can consume the data. None of them understand tabular data as a modality. We introduce the Data Language Model (DLM), the missing foundation model for tabular data. A DLM understands tables the way a language model understands sentences: natively, without serialization or preprocessing, directly from raw cell values. It is the tabular data layer on which AI models, agents, and vertical AI applications can be built, eliminating the preprocessing pipelines that currently stand between raw data and every AI system that consumes it. We present Schema-1, the first DLM: a 140M parameter model trained on more than 2.3M synthetic and real-world tabular datasets. Schema-1 outperforms gradient-boosted ensembles, AutoML stacks, and the tabular foundation models we evaluate on established row-level prediction benchmarks.
