[2018], we propose a simple and modular framework that leverages online regression oracles to reduce the constrained problem to a standard unconstrained contextual bandit problem with adaptively defined surrogate reward functions. In contrast to prior works, which focus on stochastic contexts, our reduction yields improved guarantees for more general adversarial contexts, together with an efficient algorithm with a compact and transparent analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文研究预算约束下的上下文赌博机问题（对抗性上下文），基于SquareCB框架提出了一种模块化简化方法，通过在线回归预言机将约束问题转化为无约束问题，在对抗性上下文中实现了更优的保证和高效的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要针对随机上下文场景，缺乏对更一般的对抗性上下文的有效处理；同时在预算约束下同时控制遗憾和约束违反的需求尚未得到充分满足。
AI.method: 基于SquareCB框架，利用在线回归预言机（online regression oracles），通过自适应定义的代理奖励函数（surrogate reward functions），将带预算约束的上下文赌博机问题简化为标准的无约束上下文赌博机问题。
AI.result: 在对抗性上下文设定下，相比以往工作获得了更优的保证，并提出了一个分析简洁高效的算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一个简洁、模块化且透明的框架，能够有效处理对抗性上下文下的预算约束问题，同时控制遗憾和约束违反。

title: Market-Alignment Risk in Pricing Agents: Trace Diagnostics and Trace-Prior RL under Hidden Competitor State
summary: Outcome metrics can certify the wrong behavior. We study this failure in a two-hotel revenue-management simulator where Hotel A trains an agent against a fixed rule-based revenue-management competitor, Hotel B. A standard learning agent can obtain near-reference revenue per available room (RevPAR) while failing to learn market-like yield management: it sells too aggressively, undercuts, or collapses to modal price buckets. We diagnose this as a Goodhart-style failure under partial observability. Hotel A cannot observe the competitor's remaining inventory, booking curve, or pricing rule, so the same Hotel A-visible state maps to multiple plausible Hotel B prices. Deterministic value-based RL and deterministic copying collapse this unresolved uncertainty into shortcut behavior. We introduce a trace-level diagnostic protocol using RevPAR, occupancy, ADR, full price-bucket distributions, L1/JS distances, and seed-level confidence intervals. The verified repair is Trace-Prior RL: learn a distributional market prior from lagged market traces, then train a stochastic pricing policy with a RevPAR reward and a KL penalty to the learned prior. The final policy matches Hotel B's RevPAR, occupancy, ADR, and price distribution within seed-level uncertainty, while still optimizing Hotel A's own reward. We argue that the contribution is not a new optimizer and not a hotel-pricing leaderboard, but a reproducible failure-and-repair recipe for agentic systems where scalar rewards are easy to game and the intended behavior is only visible in traces. A key finding is that higher exact action accuracy can worsen aggregate trace alignment when the target is distributional.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了两酒店收益管理模拟器中，标准RL智能体在部分可观测环境下因Goodhart效应学习到次优定价行为的问题，并提出Trace-Prior RL修复方法：从滞后市场轨迹中学习分布先验，再以KL散度惩罚训练随机定价策略，最终在种子级不确定性内匹配目标酒店的RevPAR、入住率、ADR和价格分布。
AI.motivation: 标准RL智能体在部分可观测环境中会因Goodhart效应学习到次优行为（如过度低价销售），原因是标量奖励指标（如RevPAR）容易被"钻空子"，而真正的期望行为（市场化收益管理）只体现在轨迹分布中。
AI.method: 提出Trace-Prior RL：1）从滞后市场轨迹中学习一个分布性市场先验；2）以RevPAR为奖励、以KL散度惩罚偏离先验的方式训练随机定价策略。同时引入轨迹级诊断协议，使用RevPAR、入住率、ADR、全价格桶分布、L1/JS距离和种子级置信区间。
AI.result: 修复后的策略在种子级不确定性内匹配了Hotel B的RevPAR、入住率、ADR和价格分布，同时仍优化Hotel A自身的奖励。研究发现更高的精确动作准确率反而会恶化整体轨迹对齐效果。
AI.conclusion: 本文的贡献不是新优化器或酒店定价排行榜，而是一个可复现的失败-修复配方，适用于标量奖励容易被"钻空子"、期望行为仅体现在轨迹中的智能体系统。

title: SpatialEpiBench: Benchmarking Spatial Information and Epidemic Priors in Forecasting
summary: Accurate epidemic forecasting is crucial for public health response, resource allocation, and outbreak intervention, but remains difficult with sparse, noisy, and highly non-stationary data. Because epidemics unfold across interacting regions, spatiotemporal methods are natural candidates for improving forecasts. Despite growing interest in spatial information, no standardized benchmark exists, and current evaluations often use simple chronological train-test splits that do not reflect real-time forecasting practice. We address this gap with SpatialEpiBench, a challenging benchmark for spatiotemporal epidemic forecasting in realistic public-health settings. SpatialEpiBench includes 11 epidemic datasets with standardized rolling evaluations and outbreak-specific metrics. We evaluate adjacency-informed forecasting models with widely used epidemic priors that adapt general models to epidemiology, but find that most methods underperform a simple last-value baseline from 1 day to 1 month ahead, even during outbreaks and with these priors. We identify three major failure modes: (1) poor outbreak anticipation, (2) difficulty handling sparsity and noise, and (3) limited utility of common geographic adjacency for epidemiological spatial information. We release benchmark data, code, and instructions at https://github.com/Rachel-Lyu/SpatialEpiBench to support development of operationally useful epidemic forecasting models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SpatialEpiBench基准，用于评估时空流行病预测模型。该基准包含11个流行病数据集、标准化滚动评估和爆发特定指标。研究发现，即使结合流行病学先验知识，大多数基于邻接信息的预测模型在1天到1个月的时间范围内仍不如简单的last-value基线，并指出了三个主要失败模式。
AI.motivation: 流行病预测对公共卫生响应至关重要，但面临数据稀疏、噪声大且高度非平稳的挑战。尽管时空方法有潜力，但缺乏标准化基准，现有评估使用简单的时间序列划分方式不能反映实际预测场景。
AI.method: 构建包含11个流行病数据集的SpatialEpiBench基准，采用标准化滚动评估和爆发特定指标，评估基于邻接信息的预测模型及流行病学先验知识。
AI.result: 大多数方法在1天到1个月预测范围内不如简单的last-value基线，即使结合流行病学先验知识。识别出三个主要失败模式：爆发预测能力差、难以处理稀疏和噪声数据、地理邻接信息在流行病空间信息中的效用有限。
AI.conclusion: 现有时空流行病预测模型在实际场景中表现不佳，需要针对上述三个失败模式开发更具操作价值的预测模型。

title: Federation of Experts: Communication Efficient Distributed Inference for Large Language Models
summary:
Mixture of experts has emerged as the primary mechanism for making Large Language Models (LLMs) computationally efficient. However, in distributed settings, communicating token embeddings between experts is a significant bottleneck.
  We present the novel Federation of Experts (FoE) architecture. FoE restructures the MoE block of a transformer layer into multiple MoE clusters. Each cluster is responsible for only one of the KV heads and expert parallelism is applied between those experts. Between clusters, a sum synchronizes the post-attention residuals, which then drives routing and dispatch for the next MoE block. In a single-node setting, FoE completely eliminates all-to-all communication as all experts within a group are contained on the same GPU. In multi-node settings, FoE confines all-to-all communication to the intra-node fabric, thus significantly reducing communication overhead.
  An implementation of FoE finds that on LongBench, FoE significantly improves inference throughput and latency in both single-node and multi-node settings, reducing the end-to-end forward-pass latency by up to 5.2x, TTFT by 3.62x, and TBT by 1.95x. It does so while achieving comparable generation quality to a mixture of experts model of the same size and training configuration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Federation of Experts (FoE) 架构，通过将 MoE 层重组为多个专家集群（每个集群负责一个 KV 头），在单节点中完全消除 all-to-all 通信，在多节点中将其限制在节点内网络，从而显著提升 LLM 推理效率（前向延迟降低 5.2 倍，TTFT 降低 3.62 倍，TBT 降低 1.95 倍），同时保持与原始 MoE 相当的生成质量。
AI.motivation: 在分布式环境中，MoE 模型在专家间传递 token 嵌入向量的 all-to-all 通信是显著的性能瓶颈，亟需一种减少通信开销的架构设计。
AI.method: 将 Transformer 层的 MoE 块重组为多个 MoE 集群，每个集群仅负责一个 KV 头，并在集群内应用专家并行；集群间通过求和操作同步注意力后的残差，用于驱动下一个 MoE 块的路由和分发。单节点中集群内专家在同一 GPU 上，完全消除 all-to-all；多节点中将其限制在节点内网络。
AI.result: 在 LongBench 上，单节点和多节点设置下均显著提升推理吞吐量和延迟：端到端前向传播延迟降低最多 5.2 倍，TTFT 降低 3.62 倍，TBT 降低 1.95 倍。
AI.conclusion: FoE 在保持与原始 MoE 模型相当的生成质量的同时，大幅降低了分布式通信开销，是一种高效的 LLM 推理加速架构。

title: Ex Ante Evaluation of AI-Induced Idea Diversity Collapse
summary: Creative AI systems are typically evaluated at the level of individual utility, yet creative outputs are consumed in populations: an idea loses value when many others produce similar ones. This creates an evaluation blind spot, as AI can improve individual outputs while increasing population-level crowding. We introduce a human-relative framework for benchmarking AI-induced human diversity collapse without requiring human-AI interaction data, providing an ex ante protocol to estimate crowding risk from model-only generations and matched unaided human baselines. By modeling ideas as congestible resources, we show that source-level crowding is identifiable from within-distribution comparisons, yielding an excess-crowding coefficient $Δ$ and a human-relative diversity ratio $ρ$. We show that $ρ\ge1$ is the no-excess-crowding parity condition and connect $Δ$ to an adoption game with exposure-dependent redundancy costs. Across short stories, marketing slogans, and alternative-uses tasks, three frontier LLMs fall below parity across crowding kernels. Estimates stabilize with feasible model-only sample sizes. Importantly, generation-protocol variants show that crowding can be reduced through targeted design, making diversity collapse an actionable, development-time evaluation target for population-aware creative AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种评估AI创意系统的新框架，聚焦于AI输出在群体层面导致的人类多样性坍塌问题。通过引入拥挤系数Δ和人类相对多样性比ρ，证明前沿LLM在多个创意任务中均低于多样性平价水平，但通过针对性设计可缓解这一问题。
AI.motivation: 现有AI创意系统评估仅关注个体效用，忽略了创意输出在群体消费中因相似性导致的多样性损失。AI可能提升单个输出质量，却加剧了群体层面的同质化，存在评估盲点。
AI.method: 将创意视为"可拥挤资源"，通过模型生成与人类基线数据的分布内比较，提出超额拥挤系数Δ和人类相对多样性比ρ两个指标。建立ρ≥1的无超额拥挤平价条件，并将Δ与采纳博弈中的暴露依赖性冗余成本关联。
AI.result: 在短故事、营销标语和替代用途任务中，三个前沿LLM在所有拥挤核函数下均低于多样性平价（ρ<1）。估计量在仅使用模型样本的可行规模下保持稳定。生成协议变体实验表明，通过针对性设计可以降低拥挤度。
AI.conclusion: 多样性坍塌是可操作、可在开发阶段评估的AI创意系统目标。该框架无需人机交互数据即可事前估计拥挤风险，为群体感知的AI创意系统设计提供了评估工具。

title: Improved techniques for fine-tuning flow models via adjoint matching: a deterministic control pipeline
summary: We propose a deterministic adjoint matching framework that formulates human preference alignment for flow-based generative models as an optimal control problem over velocity fields. One can directly regress the control toward a value-gradient-induced target under the current policy, leading to a simple and stable training objective. Building on this perspective, we introduce a truncated adjoint scheme that focuses computation on the terminal portion of the trajectory, where reward-relevant signals concentrate, which yields substantial computational savings while preserving alignment quality. We further generalize the framework beyond standard KL-based regularization, allowing more flexible trade-offs between alignment strength and distributional preservation. Experiments on SiT-XL/2 and FLUX.2-Klein-4B demonstrate consistent gains across multiple alignment metrics, along with substantially improved diversity and mode preservation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种确定性伴随匹配框架，将流式生成模型的人类偏好对齐形式化为速度场上的最优控制问题，通过截断伴随方案实现高效对齐，并在多个指标上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型偏好对齐方法（如RLHF）存在训练不稳定、计算成本高的问题，且对基于流的生成模型缺乏专门的理论框架。
AI.method: 1) 将偏好对齐建模为速度场上的最优控制问题；2) 通过值梯度诱导目标直接回归；3) 提出截断伴随方案，聚焦轨迹末端计算；4) 推广到非KL正则化的灵活对齐框架。
AI.result: 在SiT-XL/2和FLUX.2-Klein-4B上，多个对齐指标一致提升，同时显著改善了生成多样性和模式覆盖。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架在保持对齐质量的同时大幅降低计算开销，且通过灵活的正则化设计实现了更好的分布保持与多样性权衡。

title: Playing the network backward: A Game Theoretic Attribution Framework
summary: Attribution methods explain which input features drive a model's prediction, making them central to model debugging and mechanistic interpretability. Yet backward attribution methods, including gradients, LRP, and transformer-specific rules, lack a shared framework in which to compare the underlying backward calculations. We introduce such a framework by recasting backward attribution as a two-player game on an extended network graph, building on Gaubert and Vlassopoulos' ReLU Net Game. Gradients and the full alpha-beta-LRP family arise as integrals over game trajectories under specific equilibria, so attribution maps become projections of trajectory distributions rather than the primary object. Desired explanation properties, such as localisation focus, robustness to input noise, or stable attention routing, can be specified as game-theoretic concepts, including policy regularization, risk aversion, and extended action sets, and translate directly into novel adaptations of the well-known backward rules. On ViT-B/16, one such selected adaptation of alpha-beta-LRP outperforms prior transformer-specific backward methods across all considered localisation metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将归因方法重述为扩展网络图上的双人博弈，梯度与alpha-beta-LRP族成为博弈轨迹的积分，并基于博弈论概念设计新归因规则，在ViT-B/16上优于此前方法。
AI.motivation: 现有反向归因方法（梯度、LRP、Transformer专用规则）缺乏统一的比较框架，无法深入理解其背后的计算机制。
AI.method: 将反向归因重述为扩展网络图上的双人博弈，建立在Gaubert和Vlassopoulos的ReLU Net Game基础上。梯度与完整alpha-beta-LRP族被推导为特定均衡下博弈轨迹的积分。期望的解释属性（如局部聚焦、噪声鲁棒性、稳定注意力路由）可被指定为博弈论概念（策略正则化、风险规避、扩展动作集），并转化为新归因规则。
AI.result: 在ViT-B/16上，基于该方法选择的alpha-beta-LRP变体在所有局部化指标上均优于先前的Transformer专用反向方法。
AI.conclusion: 博弈论框架统一了多种反向归因方法，并支持将解释属性直接翻译为新规则，为模型调试与可解释性提供了新视角。

title: NeuroAgent: LLM Agents for Multimodal Neuroimaging Analysis and Research
summary: Multimodal neuroimaging analysis often involves complex, modality-specific preprocessing workflows that require careful configuration, quality control, and coordination across heterogeneous toolchains. Beyond preprocessing, downstream statistical analysis and disease classification commonly require task-specific code, evaluation protocols, and data-format conventions, creating additional barriers between raw acquisitions and reproducible scientific analysis. We present NeuroAgent, an LLM-driven agentic framework that automates key preprocessing and analysis steps for heterogeneous neuroimaging data, including sMRI, fMRI, dMRI, and PET, and supports interactive downstream analysis through natural-language queries. NeuroAgent employs a hierarchical multi-agent architecture with a feedback-driven Generate-Execute-Validate engine: agents autonomously generate executable preprocessing code, detect and recover from runtime errors, and validate output integrity. We evaluate the system on 1,470 subjects pooled across all ADNI phases (CN=1,000, AD=470), where all subjects have sMRI and tabular data, with subsets also having Tau-PET (n=469), fMRI (n=278), and DTI ($n=620$). Pipeline ablation studies across multiple LLM backends show that capable models reach up to 100% intent-parsing accuracy, with the strongest backend (Qwen3.5-27B) reaching 84.8% end-to-end preprocessing step correctness. Automated recovery limits manual intervention to edge cases where human review is required via the Human-In-The-Loop interface. For Alzheimer's Disease classification using automatically preprocessed multimodal data, our agent ensemble achieves an AUC of 0.9518 with four modalities, outperforming all single-modality baselines. These results show that NeuroAgent can reduce the manual effort required for neuroimaging preprocessing and enable end-to-end automated analysis pipelines for neuroimaging research.

AI.tldr: NeuroAgent是一个基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，可自动完成sMRI、fMRI、dMRI和PET等多模态神经影像数据的预处理与下游分析，在ADNI数据集（1,470名受试者）上实现了84.8%的端到端预处理正确率，并在阿尔茨海默病四模态分类中达到0.9518的AUC。
AI.motivation: 传统神经影像分析涉及复杂、模态特异的预处理流程，需要精细配置、质量控制和跨异构工具链的协调；此外，下游统计分析和疾病分类还需要任务特定代码、评估协议和数据格式约定，在原始采集数据与可复现科学分析之间造成了额外障碍。作者旨在减少手动工作量，实现端到端的自动化分析流水线。
AI.method: 提出NeuroAgent框架，采用分层多智能体架构和反馈驱动的生成-执行-验证引擎：智能体自主生成可执行预处理代码，检测并恢复运行时错误，验证输出完整性。系统支持sMRI、fMRI、dMRI和PET四种模态，通过自然语言查询进行交互式下游分析，并设计了人在回路（Human-In-The-Loop）接口处理边缘情况。
AI.result: 在ADNI全部阶段1,470名受试者（CN=1,000，AD=470）上评估，所有受试者均有sMRI和表格数据，子集有Tau-PET（n=469）、fMRI（n=278）和DTI（n=620）。最强后端Qwen3.5-27B达到84.8%端到端预处理步骤正确率，意图解析准确率最高达100%。在阿尔茨海默病四模态分类中，AUC达0.9518，优于所有单模态基线。
AI.conclusion: NeuroAgent能够显著减少神经影像预处理的人工工作量，支持面向神经影像研究的端到端自动化分析流水线。

title: AffineLens: Capturing the Continuous Piecewise Affine Functions of Neural Networks
summary: Piecewise affine neural networks (PANNs) provide a principled geometric perspective on neural network expressivity by characterizing the input--output map as a continuous piecewise affine (CPA) function whose complexity is governed by the number, arrangement, and shapes of its affine regions. However, existing interpretability and expressivity analyses often rely on indirect proxies (e.g., activation statistics or theoretical upper bounds) and rarely offer practical, accurate tools for enumerating and visualizing the induced region partition under realistic architectures and bounded input domains. In this work, we present AffineLens, a unified framework for computing the hyperplane arrangements and polyhedral structures underlying PANNs. Given a calibrated (bounded) input polytope, AffineLens identifies the subset of neuron-induced hyperplanes that intersect the domain, enumerates the resulting affine sub-regions in a layer-wise manner, and returns provably non-empty maximal CPA regions together with interior representatives. The framework further provides visualizations of region partitioning and decision boundaries, enabling qualitative inspection alongside quantitative region counts. By exploiting the affine restriction property of CPA networks under fixed activation patterns, AffineLens supports a broad class of modern components, including batch normalization, pooling, residual connections, multilayer perceptrons, and convolutional layers. Finally, we use AffineLens to perform a systematic empirical study of architectural expressivity, comparing networks through region complexity metrics and revealing how design choices influence the geometry of learned functions.

AI.tldr: 提出AffineLens框架，能够计算和可视化分段仿射神经网络（PANNs）在给定有界输入域中的仿射区域划分，并用于系统性地研究架构表达性。
AI.motivation: 现有对PANNs的可解释性和表达性分析依赖间接代理指标（如激活统计或理论上界），缺乏实用、准确的工具来枚举和可视化实际架构下的区域划分。
AI.method: AffineLens框架：在标定有界输入多面体内识别与域相交的神经元诱导超平面，逐层枚举仿射子区域，返回可证明非空的最大CPA区域及其内部代表点，并提供可视化。
AI.result: 支持批归一化、池化、残差连接、MLP和卷积层等现代组件；通过区域复杂度指标进行系统性的架构表达性实证研究，揭示设计选择如何影响学习函数的几何结构。
AI.conclusion: AffineLens为PANNs的区域划分计算提供了统一实用框架，弥补了理论分析与实际可解释性之间的差距，可用于定量和定性分析网络表达性。

title: Memory Inception: Latent-Space KV Cache Manipulation for Steering LLMs
summary: Steering large language models (LLMs) is usually done by either instruction prompting or activation steering. Prompting often gives strong control, but caches guidance tokens at every layer and can clutter long interactions; activation steering is compact but typically weaker and does not support large structured reminders. We introduce memory inception (MI), a training-free method that steers in latent attention space by inserting text-derived key-value (KV) banks only at selected layers. Rather than materializing reminder content throughout the prompt cache, MI treats steering as selective KV allocation, injecting latent slots only where the model routes to them. On matched personality-steering tasks, MI gives the best overall control--drift trade-off, remaining competitive with prompting while consistently outperforming CAA. On updateable guidance, MI supports mid-conversation behavior shifts without rewriting the visible transcript, achieving the highest post-shift alignment on Qwen3. On structured reasoning, MI outperforms visible prompting on HARDMath and PHYSICS (10/12 subject$\times$mode cells), serving as proxies for structured reasoning in verifiable domains, while cutting content-matched KV storage by up to 118$\times$. These results position MI as a powerful steering method when guidance is persistent, structured, or expensive to keep in the visible transcript.

AI.tldr: 本文提出记忆注入（Memory Inception, MI），一种无需训练的大模型控制方法，通过在选定层插入文本派生的KV对实现潜注意力空间中的引导，在保持控制力的同时大幅降低KV缓存开销（最高118倍），在人格引导、动态行为切换和结构化推理任务上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型引导方法存在两难：指令提示控制力强但缓存冗余、长交互易混乱；激活引导（如CAA）虽紧凑但控制力弱，且不支持结构化的大段提醒。作者希望找到一种兼具控制力与高效性的免训练引导方法。
AI.method: 记忆注入（MI）是一种免训练方法，在潜注意力空间中通过仅在选定层插入文本派生的键值（KV）存储来实现引导。与将提醒内容缓存在所有层不同，MI将引导视为选择性KV分配，只将潜记忆槽注入模型实际路由到的层。
AI.result: 在人格引导任务上，MI在控制-漂移权衡中取得最佳平衡，与提示相当且持续优于CAA；在可更新引导中支持对话中途行为切换，在Qwen3上取得最高对齐度；在结构化推理（HARDMath和PHYSICS）上，MI在10/12个科目×模式单元格中优于可见提示，同时将KV存储降低最高118倍。
AI.conclusion: MI是一种强大的引导方法，尤其适用于引导具有持久性、结构性或需要保持在可见对话之外（昂贵）的场景，为高效、灵活的大模型控制提供了新范式。

title: Soft Deterministic Policy Gradient with Gaussian Smoothing
summary: Deterministic policy gradient (DPG) is widely utilized for continuous control; however, it inherently relies on the differentiability of the critic with respect to the action during policy updates. This assumption is violated in practical control problems involving sparse or discrete rewards, leading to ill-defined policy gradients and unstable learning. To address these challenges, we propose a principled alternative based on a smoothed Bellman equation formulated via Gaussian smoothing. Specifically, we define a novel action-value function based on a smoothed Bellman equation and derive the soft deterministic policy gradient (Soft-DPG). Our formulation eliminates explicit dependence on critic action-gradients and ensures that the gradient remains well-defined even for non-smooth Q-functions. We instantiate this framework into a deep reinforcement learning algorithm, which we call soft deep deterministic policy gradient (Soft DDPG). Empirical evaluations on standard continuous control benchmarks and their discretized-reward variants show that Soft DDPG remains competitive in dense-reward settings and provides clear gains in most discretized-reward environments, where standard DDPG is more sensitive to irregular critic landscapes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Soft-DPG和Soft DDPG算法，通过高斯平滑的贝尔曼方程消除对评论家动作梯度的依赖，使策略梯度在非光滑Q函数下依然良好定义，在离散奖励场景中显著优于标准DDPG。
AI.motivation: 标准确定性策略梯度（DPG）依赖评论家对动作的可微性，但在稀疏或离散奖励的连续控制问题中，这一假设被违反，导致策略梯度定义不良、学习不稳定。
AI.method: 基于高斯平滑构建平滑贝尔曼方程，定义新的动作价值函数，推导软确定性策略梯度（Soft-DPG），消除对评论家动作梯度的显式依赖；将该框架实例化为Soft DDPG深度强化学习算法。
AI.result: 在标准连续控制基准及其离散化奖励变体上，Soft DDPG在稠密奖励场景下与DDPG竞争力相当，在大多数离散奖励环境中性能显著提升，而标准DDPG对不规则的评论家景观更敏感。
AI.conclusion: Soft-DPG为处理非光滑Q函数提供了一种原理性替代方案，有效解决了DPG在非可微奖励场景下的核心缺陷。

title: Band Together: Untargeted Adversarial Training with Multimodal Coordination against Evasion-based Promotion Attacks
summary: Multimodal recommender systems exploit visual and textual signals to alleviate data sparsity, but this also makes them more vulnerable to evasion-based promotion attacks. Existing defenses are largely limited to single-modal settings and mainly focus on poisoning-based threats, leaving evasion-based threats underexplored. In this work, we first identify a cross-modal gradient mismatch under the multi-user promotion setting, where visual and textual perturbations are optimized in inconsistent directions due to the dominance of distinct user groups. This phenomenon dilutes the attack effectiveness and leads robust training to underestimate worst-case risks. To address this issue, we propose Untargeted Adversarial Training with Multimodal Coordination (UAT-MC). UAT-MC tackles the challenge of unknown targeted items in evasion-based attacks (as opposed to poisoning-based attacks) by treating all items as potential targets, and introduces a gradient alignment mechanism to explicitly correct this mismatch. This design ensures synchronized perturbations across modalities, thereby maximizing adversarial strength for robust training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UAT-MC significantly improves robustness against promotion attacks while maintaining acceptable recommendation performance under the defense-accuracy trade-off. Code is available at https://github.com/gmXian/UAT-MC.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多模态推荐系统中的逃避型推广攻击，提出了一种具有多模态协调的无目标对抗训练方法（UAT-MC），通过梯度对齐机制解决跨模态梯度不匹配问题，有效提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 多模态推荐系统在缓解数据稀疏性的同时，更容易受到逃避型推广攻击。现有防御主要针对单模态和投毒攻击，对逃避型攻击研究不足，且存在跨模态梯度不匹配导致的鲁棒性下降问题。
AI.method: 提出UAT-MC方法：(1) 将所有物品视为潜在目标以应对未知目标物品的逃避型攻击；(2) 引入梯度对齐机制显式修正跨模态梯度不匹配，确保多模态扰动同步，最大化对抗强度。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，UAT-MC在防御-准确率权衡下，显著提升了对推广攻击的鲁棒性，同时保持了可接受的推荐性能。
AI.conclusion: UAT-MC有效解决了多模态推荐系统中逃避型攻击的防御难题，为提升推荐系统安全性提供了新思路。

title: GlazyBench: A Benchmark for Ceramic Glaze Property Prediction and Image Generation
summary: Developing ceramic glazes is a costly, time-consuming process of trial and error due to complex chemistry, placing a significant burden on independent artists. While recent advances in multimodal AI offer a modern solution, the field lacks the large-scale datasets required to train these models. We propose GlazyBench, the first dataset for AI-assisted glaze design. Comprising 23,148 real glaze formulations, GlazyBench supports two primary tasks: predicting post-firing surface properties, such as color and transparency, from raw materials, and generating accurate visual representations of the glaze based on these properties. We establish comprehensive baselines for property prediction using traditional machine learning and large language models, alongside image generation benchmarks using deep generative and large multimodal models. Our experiments demonstrate promising yet challenging results. GlazyBench pioneers a new research direction in AI-assisted material design, providing a standardized benchmark for systematic evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出了GlazyBench，首个用于AI辅助陶瓷釉料设计的数据集，包含23,148个真实配方，支持釉料表面特性预测和视觉生成两个任务，并建立了传统ML、LLM和生成模型的基准。
AI.motivation: 陶瓷釉料开发依赖昂贵耗时的试错过程，对独立艺术家负担沉重；现有多模态AI虽有潜力，但缺乏大规模数据集来训练相关模型。
AI.method: 构建包含23,148个真实釉料配方的GlazyBench数据集，定义两个核心任务：1）从原材料预测烧后表面特性（颜色、透明度）；2）基于这些特性生成釉料的视觉表示。使用传统机器学习、大语言模型进行特性预测，并用深度生成模型和多模态大模型进行图像生成。
AI.result: 实验展示了有前景但仍具挑战性的结果，表明该任务并非易事，为后续研究提供了基准参考。
AI.conclusion: GlazyBench开创了AI辅助材料设计的新研究方向，为系统评估提供了标准化基准，填补了陶瓷釉料领域AI数据集的空白。

title: When Graph Language Models Go Beyond Memorization
summary: It remains unclear whether graph language models learn structural regularities or merely memorize training graphs; this cannot be resolved by current aggregate fidelity metrics alone. We develop a calibrated diagnostic protocol that combines frequent subgraph mining, a graph-level bootstrap baseline, and three-level frequency stratification to disentangle memorization from structural alignment. Using this framework, we show that graph language models can acquire structural regularities beyond memorization at scale, primarily in the high-frequency regime. This is supported by the following empirical evidence: On five TU benchmarks, LLaMA-style graph language models reach high subgraph-rank correlation, yet their alignment is matched or exceeded by the memorization bootstrap in most cases. At small scale, under our bootstrap diagnostic, fidelity is largely indistinguishable from verbatim recall. In contrast, at large scale with 3.75M graphs, verbatim memorization drops sharply while rank correlation remains near ceiling. Crucially, in a separate fixed-subsample analysis, frequent subgraph mining restricted to the novel-only subset closely tracks the corresponding all-generation Spearman correlation, providing evidence that the alignment is not driven solely by verbatim recall. Across all scales, high-frequency patterns are well reproduced, while rare patterns remain poorly covered, and this deficit narrows only marginally as capacity increases. We observe the same scale-dependent crossover under two distinct graph serializations (canonical DFS code and action sequences), providing evidence of robustness in our analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合频繁子图挖掘、图级bootstrap基线和三级频率分层的校准诊断协议，用于区分图语言模型的结构对齐与记忆行为。研究发现，图语言模型在规模较大时能在高频区域习得结构规律性，而非单纯记忆训练图，但在低频区域覆盖不足。
AI.motivation: 现有聚合保真度指标无法区分图语言模型是真正学到了图的底层结构规律，还是仅仅记住了训练图，因此需要一种能够解耦记忆与结构对齐的诊断方法。
AI.method: 开发了一种校准诊断协议，包含：(1) 频繁子图挖掘；(2) 图级bootstrap基线（作为纯记忆基准）；(3) 三级频率分层策略。在不同规模（包括375万图的大规模）下比较模型生成的子图与记忆基线的对齐程度。
AI.result: (1) 小规模下，模型行为与记忆基线难以区分；(2) 大规模下，逐字记忆大幅下降，但子图排序相关性仍接近上限；(3) 仅分析新生成子图时，排序相关性几乎与全集一致，说明对齐不依赖逐字回忆；(4) 高频模式重现良好，但低频模式覆盖差，且随容量增加改善微弱；(5) 两种图序列化方式下结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 图语言模型在足够大规模下能够获得超越记忆的结构规律性，主要集中体现在高频子图区域；低频子图的学习仍是挑战，且单纯增大模型容量对其改善有限。

title: AI Co-Mathematician: Accelerating Mathematicians with Agentic AI
summary: We introduce the AI co-mathematician, a workbench for mathematicians to interactively leverage AI agents to pursue open-ended research. The AI co-mathematician is optimized to provide holistic support for the exploratory and iterative reality of mathematical workflows, including ideation, literature search, computational exploration, theorem proving and theory building. By providing an asynchronous, stateful workspace that manages uncertainty, refines user intent, tracks failed hypotheses, and outputs native mathematical artifacts, the system mirrors human collaborative workflows. In early tests, the AI co-mathematician helped researchers solve open problems, identify new research directions, and uncover overlooked literature references. Besides demonstrating a highly interactive paradigm for AI-assisted mathematical discovery, the AI co-mathematician also achieves state of the art results on hard problem-solving benchmarks, including scoring 48% on FrontierMath Tier 4, a new high score among all AI systems evaluated.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了AI co-mathematician，一个为数学家提供交互式AI辅助的工作台，支持开放式研究的全流程，包括构思、文献搜索、计算探索、定理证明和理论构建。该系统通过异步、有状态的工作空间管理不确定性、细化用户意图、追踪失败假设，并输出原生数学产物。早期测试中，它帮助研究人员解决开放问题、发现新方向、挖掘被忽略的文献，并在FrontierMath Tier 4基准上取得48%的新高。
AI.motivation: 数学研究工作流程具有探索性、迭代性和高不确定性，现有AI工具缺乏对数学发现全流程的整合支持，数学家需要一种能够管理不确定性、追踪失败假设并支持异步协作的综合性AI系统。
AI.method: 设计了一个异步、有状态的交互式工作台，整合了构思、文献搜索、计算探索、定理证明和理论构建等模块；系统能够管理不确定性、细化用户意图、追踪失败假设，并输出原生数学产物（如定理、证明、猜想）。
AI.result: 早期测试中帮助研究人员解决开放问题、识别新研究方向、发现被忽略的文献；在FrontierMath Tier 4基准上达到48%的准确率，创下所有AI系统的新高。
AI.conclusion: 该工作台展示了AI辅助数学发现的高度交互范式，证明通过支持数学家的全流程协作，AI能够在开放数学研究中发挥实质性作用，并在硬性基准上达到领先水平。

title: Cumulative-Goodness Free-Riding in Forward-Forward Networks: Real, Repairable, but Not Accuracy-Dominant
summary: Forward-Forward (FF) training allows each layer to learn from a local goodness criterion. In cumulative-goodness variants, however, later layers can inherit a task that earlier layers have already partially separated. We formalize this phenomenon as layer free-riding: under the softplus FF criterion, the class-discrimination gradient reaching block $d$ decays exponentially with the positive margin accumulated by preceding blocks. We then study three local remedies -- per-block, hardness-gated, and depth-scaled -- that recover current-layer separation measures without relying on backpropagated gradients. On CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, these remedies dramatically improve layer-separation statistics, with $4\times$--$45\times$ gains in deeper layers, while changing accuracy by less than one percentage point for non-degenerate training procedures. Tiny ImageNet provides a tougher cross-dataset check for our selected block-wise configuration and reveals the same qualitative gap between layer-health diagnostics and final accuracy. Calibration experiments further show that architecture and augmentation choices have a larger effect on final accuracy than the training-rule modifications studied here. Cumulative free-riding is therefore a real and repairable optimization pathology. Nonetheless, for the FF training rules, architectures, and datasets we study, it is not the dominant factor limiting achievable accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文发现Forward-Forward训练中存在的"层搭便车"问题：后层会继承前层已部分分离的任务。提出了三种局部改进方法，在CIFAR-10/100上显著改善层分离统计（深层提升4-45倍），但准确率变化不到1%。最终结论是该问题虽是真实且可修复的优化病态，但并非限制精度的主导因素。
AI.motivation: Forward-Forward训练的累积优良度变体中，后层会搭便车继承前层已部分完成的任务，导致层间分工不明确。作者希望形式化这一现象并探索局部修复方法。
AI.method: 1) 形式化层搭便车现象：在softplus FF准则下，前层积累的正边距会导致后层的类别判别梯度呈指数衰减。2) 提出三种局部修复方法：per-block（逐块）、hardness-gated（硬度门控）、depth-scaled（深度缩放），在不依赖反向传播梯度的情况下恢复当前层的分离度量。
AI.result: CIFAR-10/100上，改进方法使深层分离统计提升4-45倍，但准确率变化小于1个百分点。Tiny ImageNet交叉验证显示相同的层健康诊断与最终精度之间的定性差距。校准实验表明架构和数据增强对精度的影响远大于训练规则修改。
AI.conclusion: 层搭便车是Forward-Forward训练中真实存在且可修复的优化病态，但在所研究的训练规则、架构和数据集上，它并非限制可达到精度的主导因素。

title: A Note on TurboQuant and the Earlier DRIVE/EDEN Line of Work
summary:
This note clarifies the relationship between the recent TurboQuant work and the earlier DRIVE (NeurIPS 2021) and EDEN (ICML 2022) schemes. DRIVE is a 1-bit quantizer that EDEN extended to any $b>0$ bits per coordinate; we refer to them collectively as EDEN.
  First, TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$ is a special case of EDEN obtained by fixing EDEN's scalar scale parameter to $S=1$. EDEN supports both biased and unbiased quantization, each optimized by a different $S$ (chosen via methods described in the EDEN works). The fixed choice $S=1$ used by TurboQuant is generally suboptimal, although the optimal $S$ for biased EDEN converges to $1$ as the dimension grows; accordingly TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$ approaches EDEN's behavior for large $d$.
  Second, TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$ combines a biased $(b-1)$-bit EDEN step with an unbiased 1-bit QJL quantization of the residual. It is suboptimal in three ways: (1) its $(b-1)$-bit step uses the suboptimal $S=1$; (2) its 1-bit unbiased residual quantization has worse MSE than (unbiased) 1-bit EDEN; (3) chaining a biased $(b-1)$-bit step with a 1-bit unbiased residual step is inferior to unbiasedly quantizing the input directly with $b$-bit EDEN.
  Third, some of the analysis in the TurboQuant work mirrors that of the EDEN works: both exploit the connection between random rotations and the shifted Beta distribution, use the Lloyd-Max algorithm, and note that Randomized Hadamard Transforms can replace uniform random rotations.
  Experiments support these claims: biased EDEN (with optimized $S$) is more accurate than TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$, and unbiased EDEN is markedly more accurate than TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$, often by more than a bit (e.g., 2-bit EDEN beats 3-bit TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$). We also repeat all accuracy experiments from the TurboQuant paper, showing that EDEN outperforms it in every setup we have tried.

AI.tldr: 本文澄清了 TurboQuant 与更早的 DRIVE (NeurIPS 2021) 和 EDEN (ICML 2022) 之间的关系，指出 TurboQuant 实际上是 EDEN 的特例或次优变体，实验表明 EDEN 在所有设置下均优于 TurboQuant。
AI.motivation: 澄清 TurboQuant 与已有的 EDEN/DRIVE 方案之间的关系，指出 TurboQuant 声称的贡献实际上在早期工作中已被提出，并纠正其潜在的错误认知。
AI.method: 通过理论分析指出：(1) TurboQuant_mse 是 EDEN 在 S=1 时的特例；(2) TurboQuant_prod 在三个层面上次优于 EDEN。同时通过实验验证 EDEN 的优越性。
AI.result: 有偏 EDEN（优化 S）精度优于 TurboQuant_mse；无偏 EDEN 显著优于 TurboQuant_prod，例如 2-bit EDEN 超过 3-bit TurboQuant_prod。在所有实验中 EDEN 均优于 TurboQuant。
AI.conclusion: TurboQuant 并未超越已有工作，EDEN/DRIVE 是更优且更早提出的量化方案。

title: Structure-Preserving Gaussian Processes Via Discrete Euler-Lagrange Equations
summary: In this paper, we propose Lagrangian Gaussian Processes (LGPs) for probabilistic and data-efficient learning of dynamics via discrete forced Euler-Lagrange equations. Importantly, the geometric structure of the Lagrange-d'Alembert principle, which governs the motion of dynamical systems, is preserved by construction in the absence of external forces. This allows learning physically consistent models that overcome erroneous drift in the system's energy, thereby providing stable long-term predictions. At the core of our approach lie linear operators for Gaussian process conditioning, constructed from discrete forced Euler-Lagrange equations and variational discretization schemes. Thereby and unlike prior work, the method enables learning dynamics from discrete position snapshots, i.e., without access to a system's velocities or momenta. This is particularly relevant for a large class of practical scenarios where only position measurements are available, for instance, in motion capture or visual servoing applications. We demonstrate the data-efficiency and generalization capabilities of the LGPs in various synthetic and real-world case studies, including a real-world soft robot with hysteresis. The experimental results underscore that the LGPs learn physically consistent dynamics with uncertainty quantification solely from sparse positional data and enable stable long-term predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出拉格朗日高斯过程（LGPs），通过离散受控欧拉-拉格朗日方程实现概率化、数据高效的动力学学习。该方法在无外力时保持拉格朗日-达朗贝尔原理的几何结构，从而学习物理一致的模型，避免能量漂移，实现稳定的长期预测。核心创新在于利用离散变分格式构建高斯过程条件化的线性算子，使得仅凭离散位置快照（无需速度或动量）即可学习动力学。实验证明该方法在稀疏位置数据下具有数据高效性、泛化能力和不确定性量化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法学习动力学系统时通常需要速度或动量数据，而在实际场景（如运动捕捉、视觉伺服）中往往只能获取位置测量值。此外，传统方法容易产生能量漂移导致长期预测不稳定。因此需要一种仅利用稀疏位置数据、同时保持物理一致性的概率动力学学习方法。
AI.method: 基于离散受控欧拉-拉格朗日方程和变分离散化方案，构建高斯过程条件化的线性算子，提出拉格朗日高斯过程（LGPs）。该方法无需显式访问速度或动量，仅需离散位置快照即可学习动力学。通过保持拉格朗日-达朗贝尔原理的几何结构，确保无外力时系统能量守恒。
AI.result: 在多个合成和真实世界的案例研究（包括具有迟滞效应的真实软体机器人）中，LGPs仅凭稀疏位置数据即可学习物理一致的动力学，提供不确定性量化，并实现稳定的长期预测，展现出数据高效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LGPs通过结合拉格朗日力学几何结构与高斯过程概率框架，有效解决了仅含位置数据的动力学学习问题，在保持物理一致性的同时提供了稳定的长期预测和不确定性估计，对实际应用具有重要意义。

title: The Role of Node Features in Graph Pooling
summary: Graph pooling is commonly applied in graph classification, yet its empirical gains over standard WL-1 expressive GNNs are often marginal or inconsistent. We study this gap by analysing the interaction between node features and graph topology and their effect on pooling objectives. Our analysis reveals that pooling operators require node features that are well-aligned with the graph's topology -- a condition often overlooked and not guaranteed in empirical networks. We formalise fundamental requirements for node features to enable effective pooling, and introduce a quantitative measure of feature quality. Our empirical evaluation shows that, when these requirements are satisfied, pooling can be beneficial and improve performance on appropriate datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了图池化在图分类中效果不稳定的问题，发现池化算子需要节点特征与图拓扑结构良好对齐才能有效发挥作用，并提出了形式化的特征质量要求和量化指标。
AI.motivation: 图池化在图分类中常被使用，但其相对于标准WL-1表达能力的GNN的提升往往微乎其微且不稳定。作者希望探究这一差距的原因。
AI.method: 分析了节点特征与图拓扑结构之间的交互作用及其对池化目标的影响，形式化了节点特征实现有效池化的基本要求，并引入了一种特征质量的量化度量。
AI.result: 当节点特征满足与图拓扑对齐的条件时，池化可以带来性能提升，在合适的数据集上表现出优势。
AI.conclusion: 池化算子需要节点特征与图拓扑良好对齐这一条件常被忽视，满足此条件后池化才能有效提升图分类性能。

title: The Weight Gram Matrix Captures Sequential Feature Linearization in Deep Networks
summary: Understanding how deep neural networks learn representations remains a central challenge in machine learning theory. In this work, we propose a feature-centric framework for analyzing neural network training by relating weight updates to feature evolution. We introduce a simple identity, the Feature Learning Equation, which identifies the weight Gram matrix as the key object capturing feature dynamics. This enables us to interpret gradient descent as implicitly inducing a hypothetical evolution of features, whose covariance structure - termed the Virtual Covariance - characterizes how representations evolve during training. Building on this perspective, we introduce Target Linearity, a measure quantifying the linear alignment between features and targets. By analyzing the training and layer-wise dynamics, we show that deep networks learn to sequentially transform representations toward target-linear structure. This linearization perspective provides a unified interpretation of several empirical phenomena, including Neural Collapse and linear interpolation in generative models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出特征学习方程和虚拟协方差概念，从特征演化的角度解释神经网络表示学习，揭示了网络训练中表示向目标线性结构逐层转化的机制。
AI.motivation: 理解深度神经网络如何学习表示是机器学习理论的核心挑战，当前缺乏从特征演化角度统一分析网络训练过程的框架。
AI.method: 提出特征学习方程（Feature Learning Equation），将权重Gram矩阵作为刻画特征动力学的关键对象；引入虚拟协方差（Virtual Covariance）和目标线性度（Target Linearity）来量化特征与目标的线性对齐程度。
AI.result: 深度网络在训练过程中逐层将表示转化为目标线性结构，该线性化视角统一解释了神经坍缩（Neural Collapse）和生成模型中的线性插值等实证现象。
AI.conclusion: 特征学习方程提供了一个统一的理论框架，能够从特征演化的角度解释深度网络训练过程中的多种关键现象。

title: Trade-off Functions for DP-SGD with Subsampling based on Random Shuffling: Tight Upper and Lower Bounds
summary: We derive a tight analysis of the trade-off function for Differentially Private Stochastic Gradient Descent (DP-SGD) with subsampling based on random shuffling within the $f$-DP framework. Our analysis covers the regime $σ\geq \sqrt{3/\ln M}$, where $σ$ is the noise multiplier and $M$ is the number of rounds within a single epoch. Unlike $f$-DP analyses for Poisson subsampling, which yield non-closed implicit formulas that can be machine computed but are non-transparent, random shuffling admits a tight analysis yielding transparent and interpretable closed-form bounds. Our concrete bounds, derived via the Berry-Esseen theorem, are tight up to constant factors within the proof framework. We demonstrate worked parameter settings for a single epoch ($E=1$) with a corresponding trade-off function $\geq 1-a-δ$, that is, only $δ$ below the ideal random guessing diagonal $1-a$: For $δ= 1/100$ and $σ= 1$, roughly $M \approx 1.14\times 10^6$ rounds and $N \approx 1.14\times 10^7$ training samples suffice to achieve meaningful differential privacy. This is in contrast to recent negative results for the regime $σ\leq 1/\sqrt{2 \ln M}$. Our concrete bounds can be composed over multiple epochs leading to $δ$ having a linear in $E$ dependency, which restricts $E=O(\sqrt{M})$. To go beyond Berry--Esseen, we introduce a new proof technique based on a generalization of the law of large numbers that yields an asymptotic random guessing diagonal-limit result: if $E=c_M^2M$ with $c_M\to 0$, then the $E$-fold composed trade-off function satisfies $f^{\otimes E}(a)\to 1-a$ uniformly in $a\in[0,1]$ with $δ$ having only an $O(\sqrt{E})$ dependency. We compare this asymptotic regime with the corresponding Poisson subsampling asymptotic, and highlight the characterization of explicit convergence rates as an open question.

AI.tldr: 本文在$f$-DP框架下，对基于随机洗牌子采样的DP-SGD的权衡函数进行了紧致分析，给出了闭合形式的可解释边界，并揭示了不同轮次和噪声参数下的隐私保证特性。
AI.motivation: 已有针对Poisson子采样的$f$-DP分析虽可机器计算但缺乏透明性；而随机洗牌子采样缺乏紧致的、可解释的闭合形式边界。本文旨在填补这一空白，提供透明且可解析分析的隐私保证。
AI.method: 利用Berry-Esseen定理推导随机洗牌下DP-SGD权衡函数的紧致闭合形式边界；进一步提出基于广义大数定律的新证明技术，得到渐近随机猜测对角线极限结果。
AI.result: 在σ≥√(3/ln M)条件下给出紧致边界；单轮次时M≈1.14×10^6轮、N≈1.14×10^7样本可达有意义的DP；多轮次组合后δ呈E线性依赖；使用新方法可降至O(√E)依赖。
AI.conclusion: 随机洗牌子采样在$f$-DP下可获得比Poisson子采样更透明、可解释的隐私分析边界，但显式收敛速率的刻画仍是开放问题。

title: Beyond Rigid Alignment: Graph Federated Learning via Dual Manifold Calibration
summary: Graph Federated Learning (GFL) enables collaborative representation learning across distributed subgraphs while preserving privacy. However, heterogeneity remains a critical challenge, as subgraphs across clients typically differ significantly in both semantics and structures. Existing methods address heterogeneity by enforcing the rigid alignment of model parameters or prototypes between clients and the server. However, these alignments implicitly rely on a restrictive global linearity assumption that summarizes local data distributions using a single and globally consistent representation space. This severely compresses the personalized representation space of clients and fails to preserve diverse local graph distributions. To overcome these limitations, we propose Federated Graph Manifold Calibration (FedGMC), a novel paradigm that tackles semantic heterogeneity and structural heterogeneity from a unified manifold perspective. Instead of enforcing rigid alignment, FedGMC introduces a dual manifold calibration mechanism that preserves global commonalities while maximizing the personalized representation space of local clients. Specifically, for semantic heterogeneity, the server constructs a geometrically optimal semantic manifold via equidistant semantic anchors, so as to guide the calibration of local semantic manifolds. For structural heterogeneity, the server constructs a global structural manifold by building global structural templates, so as to guide the calibration of local structural manifolds. Finally, the server dynamically refines both global semantic manifolds and structural manifolds by aggregating local manifolds. Extensive experiments on eleven homophilic and heterophilic graphs demonstrate that FedGMC effectively balances global commonality and local personalization, thereby significantly outperforming state-of-the-art baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出联邦图流形校准（FedGMC）框架，从统一流形视角解决图联邦学习中的语义与结构异质性挑战，通过双流形校准机制平衡全局共性与局部个性化，在11个图数据集上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图联邦学习方法通过强制对齐模型参数或原型来处理异质性，但隐含依赖全局线性假设，用一个全局一致的表示空间压缩了客户端的个性化表示空间，无法保留多样化的局部图分布。
AI.method: 提出FedGMC，包含双流形校准机制：(1) 语义异质性方面，服务端通过等距语义锚构建几何最优语义流形，指导局部语义流形校准；(2) 结构异质性方面，服务端通过全局结构模板构建全局结构流形，指导局部结构流形校准；(3) 服务端通过聚合局部流形动态优化全局语义和结构流形。
AI.result: 在11个同质性和异质性图数据集上的大量实验表明，FedGMC有效平衡了全局共性与局部个性化，显著优于现有最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 从统一流形视角处理图联邦学习中的语义和结构异质性，避免强制对齐，通过流形校准更好地保留客户端个性化，是一种更有效的异质性处理范式。

title: Inference-Time Refinement Closes the Synthetic-Real Gap in Tabular Diffusion
summary: Diffusion-based generators set the current state of the art for synthetic tabular data. These methods approach but rarely exceed real-data utility, and closing this synthetic-real gap has so far been pursued exclusively at training time, via architectural advances, scaling, and retraining of monolithic generators. The inference-time alternative, i.e., refining the outputs of a pre-trained backbone with parameters left untouched, has remained largely unexplored for tabular synthesis. We introduce TARDIS (Tabular generation through Refinement, Distillation, and Inference-time Sampling), an inference-time refinement framework that operates on a frozen pre-trained backbone, configured per dataset by a Tree-structured Parzen Estimator search over score-level guidance during reverse diffusion, with each trial's objective set by an inner grid search over post-hoc sample selectors and an optional soft-label distillation step. The search space encodes a single mathematical pattern we name Bidirectional Chamfer Refinement (BCR): the symmetric Chamfer functional between synthetic and real samples is minimized both continuously, via a score-level gradient, and discretely, via batch-ranking post-generation. The per-dataset search recovers BCR-aligned configurations on most datasets, evidence for BCR as the dominant refinement pattern. Across 15 binary, multiclass, and regression benchmarks TARDIS achieves a median +8.6% downstream-task improvement over models trained on real data (95% CI [+3.3, +16.4], Wilcoxon p=0.016, 11/15 strict wins) and improves over the TabDiff backbone on all 15 datasets (mean +12.9%, p<10^-4), matching the backbone on manifold fidelity, diversity, and sample-level privacy. Inference-time refinement of a pre-trained tabular diffusion backbone reaches and exceeds real-data utility in 1 to 80 minutes on a single consumer-grade GPU.

AI.tldr: 提出TARDIS，一种基于推理时优化的表格数据生成框架，通过冻结预训练扩散主干网络，在推理阶段利用双向Chamfer精炼（BCR）模式进行分数级引导和离散选择优化，在15个基准上实现中位数+8.6%的下游任务提升，首次让推理时优化在表格数据生成中超越真实数据效用。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散式表格生成器在训练阶段不断改进架构和规模，但合成数据与真实数据之间的效用差距始终难以弥合。推理时优化（不修改预训练模型参数）在表格生成领域尚未被探索，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: TARDIS框架包含三个核心组件：(1) Tree-structured Parzen Estimator (TPE) 搜索分数级引导强度；(2) 内部网格搜索选择后验样本选择器和软标签蒸馏步骤；(3) 双向Chamfer精炼（BCR）模式——在连续空间中通过分数级梯度最小化合成样本与真实样本之间的对称Chamfer距离，同时在离散空间中通过批量排序进行后生成优化。
AI.result: 在15个二分类、多分类和回归基准上，TARDIS相比在真实数据上训练的模型实现中位数+8.6%的下游任务提升（95% CI [+3.3, +16.4]，Wilcoxon p=0.016，11/15严格胜出），在全部15个数据集上超越TabDiff主干网络（平均+12.9%，p<10^-4），且在流形保真度、多样性和样本级隐私方面与主干网络持平。推理时间仅需1-80分钟，使用单块消费级GPU。
AI.conclusion: 推理时优化是一种有效且实用的表格数据生成范式，通过BCR模式对冻结的预训练扩散模型进行精炼，能够稳定地超越真实数据效用，为无需重新训练即可提升合成数据质量开辟了新路径。

title: Can Attribution Predict Risk? From Multi-View Attribution to Planning Risk Signals in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving models generate future trajectories from multi-view inputs, improving system integration but introducing opaque decisions and hard-to-localize risks. Existing methods either rely on auxiliary monitoring models or generate textual explanations, but are decoupled from the planning process and fail to reveal the visual evidence underlying trajectory generation. While attribution offers a direct alternative, planning differs from image classification by taking six-view camera images as input and predicting continuous multi-step trajectories, requiring attribution to capture both critical views and regions and their influence on outputs. Moreover, whether attribution maps can support risk identification remains underexplored. To address this, we propose a hierarchical attribution framework for end-to-end planning. Specifically, using L2 consistency with the original trajectory as the objective, we design a coarse-to-fine region attribution strategy that searches candidate regions across the full six-view input and refines attribution within them. We further extract three attribution statistics as predictive signals for planning risk, including attribution entropy to measure how concentrated the planner's reliance is over the joint visual space, within-camera spatial variance to characterize how spread out the attribution is within each view, and cross-camera Gini coefficient to quantify how unevenly attribution is distributed across the six cameras. Experiments on BridgeAD, UniAD, and GenAD show that these statistics correlate with planning risk, achieving Spearman correlations of $0.30 \pm 0.07$ with trajectory error and AUROC of $0.77 \pm 0.04$ for collision detection. The signal generalizes to held-out scenes with negligible degradation and remains stable under an alternative attribution baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出一种分层归因框架，通过粗到细的区域归因策略和三种归因统计指标（熵、空间方差、基尼系数），揭示端到端自动驾驶规划模型的视觉证据，并验证其与规划风险的相关性（轨迹误差Spearman 0.30，碰撞检测AUROC 0.77）。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶模型缺乏可解释性，辅助监控或文本解释方法脱离规划过程，无法揭示轨迹生成的视觉证据；归因方法在规划任务（多视角、连续轨迹）中的应用及风险识别能力尚待探索。
AI.method: 提出分层归因框架：(1) 以L2一致性为目标，设计从粗到细的区域归因策略，先在六视角输入中搜索候选区域，再精炼归因；(2) 提取三种归因统计量——归因熵（衡量注意力集中度）、相机内空间方差（表征归因分散程度）、跨相机基尼系数（量化归因分配不均匀性），作为规划风险预测信号。
AI.result: 在BridgeAD、UniAD、GenAD三个模型上验证：归因统计量与轨迹误差的Spearman相关达0.30±0.07，碰撞检测AUROC达0.77±0.04；跨场景泛化性能基本无衰减，且在替代归因基线下保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 所提分层归因框架能有效揭示端到端规划的视觉证据，归因统计量可作为可靠的规划风险预测信号，具有良好的泛化性和鲁棒性。

title: A Flow Matching Algorithm for Many-Shot Adaptation to Unseen Distributions
summary: While generative modeling has achieved remarkable success on tasks like natural language-conditioned image generation, enabling model adaptation from example data points remains a relatively underexplored and challenging problem. To this end, we propose Function Projection for Flow Matching (FP-FM), an algorithm that directly conditions generation on samples from the target distribution. FP-FM learns basis functions to span the velocity fields corresponding to a set of training distributions, and adapts to new distributions by computing a simple least-squares projection onto this basis. This enables efficient generation of samples from diverse target distributions without additional training at inference time. We further introduce multiple variants of FP-FM that provide a trade-off in expressivity and compute by enriching the coefficient calculation, e.g., by making the coefficients dependent on time. FP-FM achieves greatly improved precision and recall relative to baselines across synthetic and image-based datasets, with especially strong gains on unseen distributions.

AI.tldr: 提出FP-FM方法，通过学习基函数对速度场进行投影，实现无需额外训练即可从样本数据点直接生成新分布样本。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型在自然语言条件生成上表现优异，但从示例数据点实现模型适配仍是一个相对未被充分探索且具有挑战性的问题。
AI.method: FP-FM通过学习基函数张成训练分布的速场空间，通过最小二乘投影适配新分布，并引入多种变体（如时间依赖系数）以在表达力与计算量之间进行权衡。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和图像数据集上，FP-FM相比基线方法在精确率和召回率上均有显著提升，尤其在未见分布上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: FP-FM实现了高效且无需额外推理训练的新分布样本生成，为流匹配模型从样本数据点适应提供了一种有效范式。

title: When Labels Have Structure: Improving Image Classification with Hierarchy-Aware Cross-Entropy
summary: Standard cross-entropy is the default classification loss across virtually all of machine learning, yet it treats all misclassifications equally, ignoring the semantic distances that a class hierarchy encodes. We propose Hierarchy-Aware Cross-Entropy (HACE), a drop-in replacement for standard cross-entropy that incorporates a known class hierarchy directly into the loss. HACE combines two components: prediction aggregation, which propagates the model's probability mass upward through the class hierarchy to ensure that parent nodes accumulate the confidence of their children; and ancestral label smoothing, which distributes the ground-truth signal along the path from the true class to the root. We evaluate HACE on CIFAR-100, FGVC Aircraft, and NABirds in two regimes: end-to-end training across six architectures spanning convolutional and attention-based designs, and linear probing on frozen DINOv2-Large features. In end-to-end training, HACE improves accuracy over standard cross-entropy in 15 out of 18 architecture--dataset pairs, with a mean gain of 4.66\%. In linear probing on frozen DINOv2-Large features, HACE outperforms all competing methods on all three datasets, with a mean improvement of 2.18\% over the next best baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出层级感知交叉熵(HACE)，通过预测聚合和祖先标签平滑两个组件将类别层次结构直接融入损失函数，替代标准交叉熵，在多个数据集和架构上显著提升分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 标准交叉熵将所有误分类同等对待，忽略了类别层次结构中编码的语义距离信息，无法利用类别间的层次关系来指导模型学习。
AI.method: HACE包含两个核心组件：(1) 预测聚合——将模型概率质量沿层级向上传播，使父节点累积子节点的置信度；(2) 祖先标签平滑——将真实标签信号沿从叶子到根节点的路径进行分布平滑。
AI.result: 在端到端训练中，HACE在18个架构-数据集组合中的15个上优于标准交叉熵，平均提升4.66%；在线性探测实验中，HACE在所有三个数据集上优于所有对比方法，平均比次优方法高2.18%。
AI.conclusion: HACE作为一种即插即用的损失函数，能有效利用类别层次结构信息，在多种架构和数据集上一致提升分类性能，且适用于不同训练范式。

title: Region Seeding via Pre-Activation Regularization: A Geometric View from Piecewise Affine Nerual Networks
summary: Deep networks with continuous piecewise affine activations induce polyhedral partitions of the input space, making the number of realized affine regions a natural measure of expressive capacity and a key determinant of how well the model can approximate nonlinear target functions. In practice, standard training realizes far fewer region refinements in data-visited neighborhoods than the architecture could in principle support, while existing region-count theory is primarily architectural and offers little guidance on how optimization shapes the realized partition near the data. Our theory provides a sufficient condition under which bringing neuron switching surfaces sufficiently close to data points ensures their intersection with local neighborhoods, which in turn implies a strict increase in the local affine-region count, yielding a principled training-time handle for seeding data-relevant partitions early in optimization. Guided by these results, we propose a plug-and-play region-seeding regularizer that encourages early partitioning while allowing task-driven refinement to dominate later in training. Experiments show that the regularizer increases the number of realized affine regions via exact enumeration and improves overall performance on toy datasets, while also improving early-stage accuracy and achieving comparable (or slightly improved) final accuracy on ImageNet-1k for classical models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度网络的分片仿射区域划分，提出了一种理论充分条件，证明将神经元切换面靠近数据点可增加局部仿射区域数量，并据此设计了一个即插即用的区域种子正则化器，在训练早期促进数据相关划分，实验表明该方法能提升区域计数和模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有关于网络表达能力的区域计数理论主要关注架构层面，未能解释训练过程中优化如何塑造数据附近的区域划分；实践中标准训练在数据访问邻域内实现的区域细化远少于架构理论上可支持的数目，缺乏 principled 的训练手段来引导早期数据相关区域的生成。
AI.method: 提出一个充分条件：将神经元切换面（decision boundaries）充分靠近数据点可确保其与局部邻域相交，从而严格增加局部仿射区域数量。基于该理论设计了一个即插即用的区域种子正则化器（region-seeding regularizer），在训练早期鼓励划分，后期允许任务驱动细化主导。
AI.result: 通过精确枚举验证了正则化器确实增加了实现的仿射区域数量；在玩具数据集上提升了整体性能；在ImageNet-1k上，经典模型在训练早期准确率提升，最终准确率持平或略有提升。
AI.conclusion: 该工作从理论上建立了优化与区域划分之间的桥梁，提供了一个 principled 的训练手段来主动控制数据附近的表达性，实验验证了方法的有效性，为理解和改进深度网络的表达能力提供了新视角。

title: Molecules Meet Language: Confound-Aware Representation Learning and Chemical Property Steering in Transformer-VAE Latent Spaces
summary: Molecular generative models often assume meaningful latent geometry, but apparent property predictability can reflect sequence-level shortcuts rather than chemical organization. We study this issue in an unsupervised autoregressive Transformer-VAE trained on SELFIES. After training, we freeze the model, fit linear probes to RDKit descriptors, and use the probe weights as candidate global steering directions. To separate chemical signal from SELFIES artifacts, we introduce a confound-aware evaluation based on residualization, confound-direction alignment analysis, and decoded-molecule traversal. This is necessary because SELFIES length, branch tokens, ring tokens, and token entropy are strongly encoded in the latent space. Under this confound-aware evaluation, we find robust monotonic steering for cLogP, FractionCSP3, HeavyAtomCount, TPSA, BertzCT, and HBA. Nonlinear probes further show that some properties admit stable global directions, while others are better described by local latent gradients. Overall, our results show that chemically meaningful steering can emerge in entangled molecular latent spaces, but only when validated through decoded molecules and controlled for representation-level confounds.

AI.tldr: 本文研究无监督Transformer-VAE分子生成模型的潜空间，发现SELFIES序列伪影（如长度、分支/环标记、熵）被强烈编码。通过残差化等混淆感知评估，验证了cLogP等6种性质存在稳健的化学方向，而其他性质更适合局部梯度描述。
AI.motivation: 分子生成模型常假设潜空间具有有意义的几何结构，但性质可预测性可能源于序列级捷径而非真实化学组织。需要区分化学信号与SELFIES伪影。
AI.method: 训练无监督自回归Transformer-VAE（SELFIES表示）；冻结模型后对RDKit描述符拟合线性探针作为全局方向；引入基于残差化、混淆方向对齐分析和解码分子遍历的混淆感知评估。
AI.result: SELFIES长度、分支/环标记、标记熵被强编码；cLogP等6种性质在混淆控制下仍表现稳健单调控制；部分性质适合全局方向，其他需局部潜变量梯度。
AI.conclusion: 化学有意义的控制可以在纠缠的分子潜空间中涌现，但必须通过解码分子验证并控制表征层混淆因素。

title: Perceive, Route and Modulate: Dynamic Pattern Recalibration for Time Series Forecasting
summary: Local temporal patterns in real-world time series continuously shift, rendering globally shared transformations suboptimal. Current deep forecasting models, despite their scale and complexity, rely on fixed weight matrices applied uniformly to all temporal tokens. This creates a static pattern response: models settle into a compromised average, unable to adapt to changing local dynamics. We introduce Dynamic Pattern Recalibration (DPR), a backbone-agnostic mechanism that resolves this via token-level recalibration. Through a lightweight "Perceive-Route-Modulate" pipeline, DPR computes a soft-routing distribution over a learned basis of adaptive response patterns, generating a time-aware modulation vector that recalibrates hidden states via a residual Hadamard product. As a backbone-agnostic adapter, DPR enhances forecasting across diverse architectures with minimal overhead, confirming it addresses a general bottleneck. As a minimalist standalone model, DPRNet achieves competitive performance across 12 benchmarks, validating dynamic recalibration against macroscopic parameter scaling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态模式重校准（DPR）机制，通过轻量级“感知-路由-调制”管道实现令牌级重校准，解决深度时序模型无法适应局部动态模式变化的问题。作为主干无关适配器可增强各类架构，作为独立模型DPRNet在12个基准上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有深度时序预测模型无论规模与复杂度如何，均使用固定的权重矩阵统一应用于所有时序令牌，导致静态模式响应——模型只能学习到折中的平均模式，无法适应现实时序数据中连续变化的局部动态模式。
AI.method: 提出DPR机制，包含“感知-路由-调制”三阶段管道：首先感知输入特征，然后在一个学习到的自适应响应模式基上计算软路由分布，最后生成时间感知的调制向量，通过残差Hadamard积重校准隐藏状态。
AI.result: 作为主干无关适配器，DPR以极小开销提升多种架构的预测性能。作为独立模型DPRNet，在12个基准数据集上达到竞争性表现。
AI.conclusion: 动态重校准能够有效替代宏观参数扩展，验证了解决局部动态模式适配这个通用瓶颈的重要性。

title: When Does $\ell_2$-Boosting Overfit Benignly? High-Dimensional Risk Asymptotics and the $\ell_1$ Implicit Bias
summary: Benign overfitting is well-characterized in $\ell_2$ geometries, but its behavior under the $\ell_1$ implicit bias of greedy ensembles remains challenging. The analytical barrier stems from the non-linear coupling of coordinate selection thresholds, which invalidates standard spectral resolvent tools. To isolate this algorithmic bias, we characterize the high-dimensional risk of continuous-time $\ell_2$-Boosting over $p$ features and $n$ samples. By coupling the Convex Gaussian Minimax Theorem with delicate asymptotic expansions of double-sided truncated Gaussian moments, we analytically resolve the non-smooth $\ell_1$ interpolant. Under an isotropic pure-noise model, we prove that benign overfitting fails at the linear rate: greedy selection localizes noise into sparse active sets, and the excess variance decays at a logarithmic rate $Θ(σ^2/\log(p/n))$ for noise variance $σ^2$. We remark that while this localization mechanism should persist in the presence of signals, the exact signal-noise decomposition remains an open problem. For spiked-isotropic designs with $k^*$ head eigenvalues and $r_2 = p - k^*$ tail dimensions, the risk converges to zero when $r_{2} \gg n$, but only at a logarithmic rate $Θ(σ^2/\log(r_2/n))$, which is slower than the linear decay observed in $\ell_2$ geometries. To avoid this slow convergence, we analyze the non-smooth subdifferential dynamics of the boosting flow. This yields a tuning-free early stopping rule that, under a bounded $\ell_1$-path condition, recovers the Lasso basic inequality and attains the minimax-optimal empirical prediction rate for $\ell_1$-bounded signals.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了 $\ell_2$-Boosting 在高维设置下的良性过拟合行为。在纯噪声各向同性模型中，贪婪选择将噪声局域化为稀疏活跃集，导致过拟合风险以对数速率 $Θ(σ^2/\log(p/n))$ 衰减，远慢于 $\ell_2$ 几何中的线性速率。在尖峰-各向异性设计下，风险以 $Θ(σ^2/\log(r_2/n))$ 收敛。通过分析非光滑次微分动力学，提出了一种免调节的早停规则，在 $\ell_1$ 路径有界条件下恢复 Lasso 基本不等式，达到 minimax 最优经验预测率。
AI.motivation: $\ell_2$ 几何中良性过拟合已被充分刻画，但 $\ell_1$ 隐式偏置下的贪婪集成行为由于坐标选择阈值的非线性耦合（使标准谱解析工具失效）而难以分析。本文旨在通过 $\ell_2$-Boosting 算法隔离这种算法偏置，解析 $\ell_1$ 非光滑插值器在高维风险下的行为。
AI.method: 将凸高斯极小极大定理与双截断高斯矩的渐近展开耦合，解析求解非光滑 $\ell_1$ 插值器；分析非光滑次微分动力学以推导早停规则。
AI.result: 1) 纯噪声各向同性模型下，良性过拟合以对数速率 $Θ(σ^2/\log(p/n))$ 失败（非线性）；2) 尖峰-各向异性设计下，风险在对数速率 $Θ(σ^2/\log(r_2/n))$ 下收敛，慢于 $\ell_2$ 几何的线性衰减；3) 早停规则在 $\ell_1$ 路径有界条件下达到 minimax 最优经验预测率。
AI.conclusion: $\ell_1$ 隐式偏置导致贪婪集成过拟合风险仅以对数速率衰减，显著慢于 $\ell_2$ 几何；但通过早停可恢复 Lasso 级的最优收敛率，表明算法偏置和正则化策略在高维学习中需谨慎匹配。

title: Pro-KLShampoo: Projected KL-Shampoo with Whitening Recovered by Orthogonalization
summary: Optimizers that exploit the matrix structure of gradients are central to modern LLM pre-training, with two distinct frontiers: explicit Kronecker-factored preconditioning -- most recently KL-Shampoo, which estimates the preconditioner via KL divergence minimization -- and orthogonalization of the gradient momentum, exemplified by Muon and analyzed as steepest descent under the spectral norm. The two routes are typically developed in isolation. We make a structural observation about KL-Shampoo's Kronecker preconditioners: their eigenvalue spectra exhibit a \emph{spike-and-flat} shape -- a few dominant eigenvalues followed by an approximately uniform tail -- across layers and training stages, holding exactly under a rank-$ρ$ signal-plus-noise gradient model. We exploit this structure by restricting one of KL-Shampoo's Kronecker factors to a parametric family aligned with the spike-and-flat shape: full spectral structure on a tracked $r$-dimensional subspace, single shared eigenvalue across the remaining $n-r$ directions. On these directions, we apply orthogonalization. An identity shows that this orthogonalization recovers the algebraic form of full KL-Shampoo's preconditioner. On four pre-training scales (GPT-2 124M / 350M, LLaMA 134M / 450M), Pro-KLShampoo consistently outperforms KL-Shampoo at every subspace rank we test in validation loss, peak per-GPU memory, and wallclock time to reach each loss level.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pro-KLShampoo优化器，通过利用KL-Shampoo预条件子的"尖峰-平坦"特征谱结构（少量主导特征值+均匀尾部），在保留全谱结构的低秩子空间上跟踪关键方向，其余维度采用正交化，在多个GPT-2/LLaMA模型上实现更低的验证损失、更少显存和更快训练速度。
AI.motivation: 现有的Kronecker因子预条件优化（如KL-Shampoo）与梯度动量正交化（如Muon）两种路线各自独立发展，缺乏统一视角。作者观察到KL-Shampoo的Kronecker预条件子具有"尖峰-平坦"特征谱结构，希望利用这一结构设计更高效的优化器。
AI.method: 将KL-Shampoo的一个Kronecker因子限制为参数化族：在追踪的r维子空间上保留全谱结构，其余n-r个方向上共享单一特征值（对应平坦尾部）。在这些剩余方向上应用正交化，理论证明这种正交化恢复完整KL-Shampoo预条件子的代数形式。
AI.result: 在GPT-2 124M/350M和LLaMA 134M/450M四个预训练尺度上，Pro-KLShampoo在所有测试的子空间秩下，在验证损失、峰值每GPU显存和达到各损失水平的墙钟时间上均一致优于KL-Shampoo。
AI.conclusion: 利用预条件子的特征谱结构进行参数化压缩（低秩追踪+均匀尾部共享+正交化）可以同时提升优化效果和计算效率，为Kronecker预条件优化与正交化动量方法提供了统一视角。

title: SMolLM: Small Language Models Learn Small Molecular Grammar
summary: Language models for molecular design have scaled to hundreds of millions of parameters, yet how they learn chemical grammar is poorly understood. We train SMolLM, a 53K-parameter weight-shared transformer, to generate novel SMILES with 95% validity on the ZINC-250K drug-like-molecule benchmark, outperforming a standard GPT with 10 times more parameters. Mechanistically, the same block resolves SMILES constraints across passes in a fixed order: brackets first, rings second, and valence last, as shown by error classification, linear probing, and sparse autoencoders. A systematic ablation across attention heads and passes further localizes the first bracket-matching step to a single attention head. Together, these results yield a compact, mechanistically interpretable molecular generator and a testbed for studying iterative computation in formal-language domains.

AI.tldr: SMolLM是一个仅53K参数的权重共享Transformer，在ZINC-250K基准上以95%有效性生成SMILES分子，性能优于十倍参数的GPT。通过错误分类、线性探针和稀疏自编码器揭示其按固定顺序（括号→环→化合价）解决SMILES约束，并将括号匹配定位到单个注意力头。
AI.motivation: 尽管大规模语言模型在分子设计上取得进展，但我们对它们如何学习化学语法（即SMILES的形式语言规则）的机制理解仍然匮乏。
AI.method: 1）提出SMolLM，一个53K参数的权重共享Transformer；2）在ZINC-250K数据集上训练生成SMILES；3）使用错误分类、线性探针和稀疏自编码器进行机制分析；4）通过注意力头消融实验定位关键组件。
AI.result: SMolLM以53K参数达到95%的有效性，超过十倍参数的GPT。模型按固定顺序（括号→环→化合价）解决SMILES约束，且第一个括号匹配步骤定位到单个注意力头。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作提供了一个紧凑、机制可解释的分子生成器，并为研究形式语言领域中迭代计算提供了测试平台。

title: LINC: Decoupling Local Consequence Scoring from Hidden Matching in Constructive Neural Routing
summary: Constructive neural routing solvers usually score the next action by matching a decoder context to candidate embeddings, hiding deterministic one-step consequences such as travel, waiting, slack, and capacity changes. We propose LINC (Local Inference via Normed Comparison), a decoder-side candidate decision architecture that computes these consequences explicitly. LINC uses them according to their decision role: centered relative consequences are compared by a shared linear local scorer, while feasible-set summaries modulate the decoder context. This preserves standard global matching and relieves the hidden state from rediscovering transition arithmetic. The Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem with Time Windows (CVRPTW) serves as the main constrained-routing stress test; the same interface extends to the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP) and Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP). In particular, for CVRPTW, LINC reduces PolyNet's Solomon/Homberger gaps from 13.83\%/38.15\% to 7.26\%/14.71\%; for TSP and CVRP, it also improves external-benchmark gaps.

AI.tldr: LINC是一种解码器端决策架构，通过显式计算确定性单步后果（如行程、等待、松弛和容量变化）来改进神经路由求解器，在CVRPTW、CVRP和TSP任务上显著降低了与最优解的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有构造性神经路由求解器通常通过匹配解码器上下文与候选嵌入来评分下一个动作，忽略了行程、等待、松弛和容量变化等确定性单步后果，导致隐藏状态需要"重新发现"过渡算术，效率低下。
AI.method: 提出LINC（Local Inference via Normed Comparison），一种解码器端候选决策架构。它显式计算单步后果，并根据决策角色使用：中心化的相对后果由共享线性局部评分器比较，可行集摘要则用于调制解码器上下文，同时保留全局匹配机制。
AI.result: 在CVRPTW上，LINC将PolyNet在Solomon/Homberger基准上的差距从13.83%/38.15%降低到7.26%/14.71%；在TSP和CVRP上也改进了外部基准差距。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模并利用单步决策的确定性后果，能够显著提升神经路由求解器的性能，且该方法具有较好的泛化性，可扩展至多种经典路由问题。

title: Eliciting associations between clinical variables from LLMs via comparison questions across populations
summary: The training data of large language models (LLMs) comprises a wide range of biomedical literature, reflecting data from many different patient populations. We investigate how it might be possible to recover information on correlation and causal links between patient characteristics, as a key building block for medical decision making. To avoid the pitfalls of direct elicitation, we propose an approach based on structured comparison questions, specifically patient comparison triplet questions. This is combined with a statistical model for the LLM representation that provides estimates of correlations without access to activations or model internals. Intuitively, we consider how similarity decisions of LLMs based on a first variable are affected by providing information on a second variable for one of the patients being assessed. We then induce prompt-level environment shifts to obtain correlation estimates for different subpopulations, which enables an invariant causal prediction (ICP) approach to obtain conservative candidate parent links. We demonstrate the method in two clinical domains, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) and multiple sclerosis (MS). Across prompted environments, the elicited correlations are smooth, stable, and clinically interpretable, yet vary in a statistically significant way that supports downstream invariance testing, such that ICP provides a small set of candidate invariant parent links. These results show that indirect elicitation via triplet comparisons can recover meaningful association structure from LLMs and offer a cautious route from implicit correlations to causal statements that are congruent with LLM answering patterns.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构化三元组对比问题从LLM中间接提取患者特征间相关性和因果结构的方法，无需访问模型内部激活，并在COPD和MS两个领域验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: LLM训练数据包含大量生物医学文献，可能蕴含宝贵的患者特征间关联信息。然而直接询问LLM因果或相关性存在不可靠问题，需要一种间接、稳健的提取方法，以避免直接诱发的偏差。
AI.method: 通过设计患者对比三元组问题（结合两个患者的某个变量信息，询问LLM关于另一个变量的相似性判断），并用统计模型量化相关性。进一步通过改变prompt环境（子群体偏移），获得不同子群体的相关性估计，再应用不变因果预测（ICP）方法识别保守的候选因果（父节点）关系。
AI.result: 在COPD和MS两个临床领域中，提取的相关性估计平滑、稳定且具有临床可解释性，不同提示环境间的相关性存在显著差异，支持了下游的不变性检验，ICP提供了少量的候选不变父节点链接。
AI.conclusion: 间接三元组对比法可以从LLM中恢复有意义的关联结构，并为从隐含相关到因果陈述提供了一条与LLM回答模式一致的谨慎路径。

title: Memory Efficient Full-gradient Attacks (MEFA) Framework for Adversarial Defense Evaluations
summary: This work studies the robust evaluation of iterative stochastic purification defenses under white-box adversarial attacks. Our key technical insight is that gradient checkpointing makes exact end-to-end gradient computation through long purification trajectories practical by trading additional recomputation for substantially lower memory usage. This enables full-gradient adaptive attacks against diffusion- and Langevin-based purification defenses, where prior evaluations often resort to approximate backpropagation due to memory constraints. These approximations can weaken the attack signal and risk overestimating robustness. In parallel, stochasticity in iterative purification is frequently under-controlled, even though different purification trajectories can substantially change reported robustness metrics. Building on this insight, we introduce a memory-efficient full-gradient evaluation framework for stochastic purification defenses. The framework combines checkpointed backpropagation with evaluation protocols that control stochastic variability, thereby reducing memory bottlenecks while preserving exact gradients. We evaluate diffusion-based purification and Langevin sampling with Energy-Based Models (EBMs), demonstrating that full-gradient attacks uncover vulnerabilities missed by approximate-gradient evaluations. Our framework yields stronger state-of-the-art $\ell_{\infty}$ and $\ell_{2}$ white-box attacks and further supports probing out-of-distribution robustness. Overall, our results show that exact-gradient evaluation is essential for reliable benchmarking of iterative stochastic defenses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度检查点的内存高效全梯度评估框架，用于对迭代随机纯化防御进行鲁棒评估。通过精确计算端到端梯度并控制随机性变异性，该框架在扩散和Langevin纯化防御上发现了近似梯度评估遗漏的漏洞，实现了更强的SOTA白盒攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有对迭代随机纯化防御的评估存在两个问题：(1) 由于内存限制，先前的工作往往使用近似反向传播计算梯度，这会弱化攻击信号，可能高估模型的鲁棒性；(2) 迭代纯化过程中的随机性经常未被充分控制，而不同的纯化轨迹会显著改变报告的鲁棒性指标。
AI.method: 将梯度检查点技术与评估协议相结合，通过用额外重计算换取显著更低的显存使用，使得在长纯化轨迹上进行精确的端到端梯度计算变得实际可行；同时引入控制随机性变异的评估协议。
AI.result: 在扩散纯化和基于Langevin采样的能量模型上，全梯度攻击发现了近似梯度评估遗漏的漏洞；在ℓ∞和ℓ2范数下实现了更强的SOTA白盒攻击；同时支持探查分布外鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 精确梯度评估对于迭代随机防御的可靠基准测试至关重要。全梯度攻击能够揭示近似梯度方法无法发现的脆弱性，是评估此类防御的必要手段。

title: Preliminary Insights in Chronos Frequency Data Understanding and Reconstruction
summary: This paper presents a preliminary analysis of the ability of Chronos foundation model to process and internally represent frequency domain information. Foundation models that process time-series data offer practitioners a unified architecture capable of learning generic temporal representations across diverse tasks and domains, reducing the need for task-specific feature engineering and enabling transfer across signal modalities. Despite their growing adoption, the extent to which such models encode fundamental signal properties remains insufficiently characterised. We address this gap by analysing Chronos under controlled conditions, starting from the simplest class of signals: discrete sinusoids generated at fixed frequencies. Using lightweight online minimum description length probes applied to the decoder architecture, we test for the presence and separability of frequency information in the model's internal representations. The results provide insight into how frequential content is captured across the frequency spectrum and highlight regimes in which representation quality may degrade or require particular care. These findings offer practical guidance for users of Chronos in signal processing and information fusion contexts, and contribute to ongoing efforts to improve the interpretability and evaluation of foundation models for temporal data.

AI.tldr: 本文初步分析了Chronos基础模型在处理和内部表示频域信息方面的能力，通过受控实验（离散正弦信号）和轻量级在线最小描述长度探针，揭示了模型如何在不同频率范围内捕获频率信息及其表征质量退化的区域。
AI.motivation: 尽管时间序列基础模型被广泛采用，但它们在编码基本信号属性方面的能力尚未被充分刻画。现有研究缺乏对这类模型如何处理频域信息的系统分析。
AI.method: 在受控条件下，使用最简单的信号类别（固定频率的离散正弦波）进行实验。采用轻量级在线最小描述长度探针，应用于解码器架构，测试模型内部表示中频率信息的存在性和可分离性。
AI.result: 揭示了频率信息在整个频谱范围内被捕获的方式，并指出了表征质量可能下降或需要特别注意的频率区域。
AI.conclusion: 为Chronos用户在信号处理和信息融合场景中提供了实用指导，同时为改进时间序列基础模型的可解释性和评估工作做出了贡献。

title: Flow Matching with Arbitrary Auxiliary Paths
summary: We introduce a new generative modeling framework, \textbf{Flow Matching with Arbitrary Auxiliary Paths (AuxPath-FM)}, which generalizes conditional flow matching by incorporating an auxiliary variable drawn from an arbitrary distribution into the probability path. Unlike prior methods that restrict auxiliary components to Gaussian noise, AuxPath-FM allows the variable $η$ to follow any distribution, producing trajectories of the form $X_t = a(t)X_1 + b(t)X_0 + c(t)η$. We theoretically demonstrate that this construction preserves the continuity equation and maintains a training objective consistent with the marginal formulation. This flexibility enables the design of diverse probability paths using various priors, including Gaussian, Uniform, Laplace, and discrete Rademacher distributions, each offering unique geometric properties for generative flows. Furthermore, our framework allows for specialized tasks such as label-guided generation by encoding structured semantic information into the auxiliary distribution. Overall, AuxPath-FM provides a principled and general foundation for probability path design, offering both theoretical generality and practical flexibility for diverse generative modeling tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AuxPath-FM，一种通用条件流匹配框架，允许辅助变量服从任意分布（而非仅限于高斯噪声），从而设计多样化的概率路径用于生成建模。
AI.motivation: 现有条件流匹配方法将辅助组件限制为高斯噪声，缺乏灵活性。作者希望将辅助变量推广到任意分布，以支持更多样化的概率路径设计和特定任务（如标签引导生成）。
AI.method: 在流匹配框架中引入任意分布的辅助变量η，定义轨迹形式为 X_t = a(t)X_1 + b(t)X_0 + c(t)η，并理论证明该构造保持连续性方程和边际训练目标。
AI.result: 框架支持多种先验分布（高斯、均匀、拉普拉斯、离散Rademacher），每种分布提供独特的几何特性；还可将结构化语义信息编码到辅助分布中实现标签引导生成。
AI.conclusion: AuxPath-FM为概率路径设计提供了通用理论基础，兼具理论普适性和实际灵活性，适用于多种生成建模任务。

title: Layer Collapse in Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion language models (DLMs) have recently emerged as competitive alternatives to autoregressive (AR) language models, yet differences in their activation dynamics remain poorly understood. We characterize these dynamics in LLaDA-8B and identify a striking layer-collapse property: a few early layers exhibit highly similar, collapsed activation patterns dominated by a single large super-outlier persisting over a long token range. Despite its apparent redundancy, this outlier is critical: pruning it causes outputs to degrade into repetitive random token loops. Paradoxically, layers in LLaDA contain more redundant representations overall, with redundancy most pronounced in earlier layers -- the reverse of AR models, where deeper layers grow redundant due to undertraining. Our analysis indicates that layer collapse in DLMs is not driven by undertraining but by overtraining: a dominant outlier becomes an indispensable information carrier while remaining representations collapse into redundant structure. These findings have strong practical implications, verified through controlled pre-training experiments. DLMs are surprisingly robust to compression: LLaDA under 3-bit GPTQ quantization drops only -1.8% on GSM8K, whereas Llama-3.1-8B drops -64.7%. Optimal sparsity allocation also reverses between families: at 50% average sparsity, allocating more to early layers in LLaDA yields +8.4% over the reverse strategy, while the same allocation costs Llama -8.4%. Our findings reveal that the DLM training objective fundamentally reshapes layer dynamics relative to AR models, with direct consequences for compression and deployment. Code: github.com/Conzel/super-outlier-dlm.

AI.tldr: 论文发现LLaDA-8B扩散语言模型存在"层塌陷"现象：早期几层由单个超大异常值主导，该异常值对模型输出至关重要；与自回归模型相反，DLM的冗余集中在浅层；DLM对量化压缩极其鲁棒（3-bit GPTQ下GSM8K仅降1.8%），且最优稀疏分配策略与AR模型完全相反。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型（DLM）已成为自回归（AR）语言模型的有力替代，但其激活动态特性与AR模型的差异尚不清楚。本文旨在系统刻画DLM的层激活特性，揭示其与AR模型的根本区别。
AI.method: 以LLaDA-8B为研究对象，分析其层激活模式（发现层塌陷和超大异常值）；通过剪枝实验验证异常值的关键作用；对比AR模型（Llama-3.1-8B）的冗余分布；进行量化压缩（3-bit GPTQ）和稀疏分配实验；通过受控预训练实验验证层塌陷成因（过训练而非欠训练）。
AI.result: (1) LLaDA早期层存在层塌陷——少数层激活模式高度相似，由单个超大异常值主导；(2) 剪除该异常值导致输出退化为重复随机token循环；(3) DLM冗余集中在浅层，与AR模型（冗余集中在深层）完全相反；(4) 层塌陷由过训练（而非欠训练）导致；(5) DLM对压缩极其鲁棒：3-bit量化下LLaDA仅降1.8%，Llama降64.7%；(6) 最优稀疏分配策略与AR模型相反：将更多稀疏性分配给浅层对LLaDA有利（+8.4%），对Llama不利（-8.4%）。
AI.conclusion: DLM的训练目标从根本上重塑了层动态特性，使其与AR模型截然不同。这些发现对模型压缩和部署具有直接的实际意义，表明DLM在压缩场景下具有显著优势。

title: A Unified Pair-GRPO Family: From Implicit to Explicit Preference Constraints for Stable and General RL Alignment
summary: Large language model (LLM) alignment via reinforcement learning from human preferences (RLHF) suffers from unstable policy updates, ambiguous gradient directions, poor interpretability, and high gradient variance in mainstream pairwise preference learning paradigms. To systematically address these limitations, we establish a unified theoretical framework for preference-based RL optimization centered on the Pair-GRPO family, comprising two tightly coupled variants: Soft-Pair-GRPO and Hard-Pair-GRPO. Soft-Pair-GRPO is a minimal modification of Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) that replaces group-normalized scalar rewards with binary pairwise preference rewards, retaining GRPO's clipped surrogate and KL-regularized structure. We prove a critical gradient equivalence theorem: under first-order Taylor expansion around the current policy, Soft-Pair-GRPO's gradient is a positive scalar multiple of standard GRPO's gradient, explaining its empirical stability despite discarding continuous reward magnitudes. Building on this foundation, we propose Hard-Pair-GRPO, an advanced variant introducing explicit local probability constraints and constrained KL-fitting optimization to further suppress gradient noise and global policy drift. We provide comprehensive theoretical guarantees for both variants--including monotonic policy improvement, deterministic gradient direction, gradient-variance reduction, and dynamic step-size convergence. Extensive experiments on standard LLM alignment benchmarks (HH-RLHF,UltraFeedback) and the MuJoCo continuous control task HalfCheetah-v4 demonstrate that our Pair-GRPO family consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in alignment quality, human preference win rate, training stability, and generalization to general reinforcement learning. Ablation studies validate the critical contributions of each core component.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pair-GRPO系列方法（Soft-Pair-GRPO和Hard-Pair-GRPO），通过统一理论框架解决RLHF中策略更新不稳定、梯度方向模糊等问题，在多个基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有RLHF中基于偏好的成对学习范式存在策略更新不稳定、梯度方向模糊、可解释性差、梯度方差高等根本性缺陷，亟需系统性解决方案。
AI.method: 建立Pair-GRPO统一理论框架，包含Soft-Pair-GRPO（用二值偏好奖励替代组归一化标量奖励，并证明其梯度等价性）和Hard-Pair-GRPO（引入显式局部概率约束和约束KL拟合优化）。
AI.result: 在HH-RLHF、UltraFeedback和HalfCheetah-v4上，Pair-GRPO在对齐质量、偏好胜率、训练稳定性和泛化性上均优于SOTA基线。
AI.conclusion: Pair-GRPO系列为偏好对齐提供了理论基础更扎实、实践效果更优的优化范式，软硬变体分别适合不同场景需求。

title: MinMax Recurrent Neural Cascades
summary: We show that the MinMax algebra provides a form of recurrence that is expressively powerful, efficiently implementable, and most importantly it is not affected by vanishing or exploding gradient. We call MinMax Recurrent Neural Cascades (RNCs) the models obtained by cascading several layers of neurons that employ such recurrence. We show that MinMax RNCs enjoy many favourable theoretical properties. First, their formal expressivity includes all regular languages, arguably the maximal expressivity for a finite-memory system. Second, they can be evaluated in parallel with a runtime that is logarithmic in the input length given enough processors; and they can also be evaluated sequentially. Third, their state and activations are bounded uniformly for all input lengths. Fourth, at almost all points, their loss gradient exists and it is bounded. Fifth, they do not exhibit a vanishing state gradient: the gradient of a state w.r.t. a past state can have constant value one regardless of the time distance between the two states.
