AI.tldr: 本文提出概念性溯因和对比解释（Concept-based Abductive and Contrastive Explanations），融合概念解释与形式化溯因/对比解释，通过概念擦除技术计算最小且因果相关的高层概念集，用于解释深度神经网络在单张图像和图像集合上的预测行为。
AI.motivation: 现有概念解释方法要么缺乏因果连接，要么局限于单一概念；而形式化溯因/对比解释虽能计算最小因果特征集，但仅考虑像素等低层特征。本文旨在弥合这两条研究路线，提出既具有因果性又具备高层语义的解释方法。
AI.method: 定义概念性溯因和对比解释，捕获最小高层概念集；基于概念擦除（concept erasure）建立因果关系；设计一系列枚举所有最小解释的算法；通过聚合解释，不仅理解单张图像预测，还能理解模型在指定行为下的集合级预测。
AI.result: 在多个模型、数据集和行为上验证，证明该方法能够有效计算有帮助且用户友好的解释。
AI.conclusion: 概念性溯因和对比解释成功将高层概念解释与因果最小解释相结合，兼具表达力与因果性，能够支持单图像和集合级别的模型行为理解。

title: Edge-specific signal propagation on mature chromophore-region 3D mechanism graphs for fluorescent protein quantum-yield prediction
comment: Includes appendix; source code, processed feature tables and evaluation scripts are available from the first author upon reasonable request
summary:
Fluorescent protein quantum yield (QY) is governed by the mature chromophore and its three-dimensional microenvironment rather than sequence identity alone. Protein language models and emission-band averages capture global trends, but do not model how local physical signals act on specific chromophore regions.
  We present a chromophore-centred mechanism graph algorithm for QY prediction. Each PDB structure is converted into a typed 3D residue graph, registered to a mature-CRO state, partitioned into phenolate, bridge and imidazolinone regions, and transformed by channel-signal-region propagation. The representation contains 121 enrichment features; after removing identity shortcuts, 52 non-identity features are used for band-specific ExtraTrees regression. Because each feature encodes a contact channel, seed signal and target CRO region, interpretation is intrinsic rather than post hoc. On a 531-protein benchmark, the method achieved the best random-CV performance among model-based baselines (R = 0.772 +/- 0.008, MAE = 0.131 +/- 0.002), exceeding Band mean (R = 0.632), ESM-C (R = 0.734) and SaProt (R = 0.731), and ranked first in bright screening (Bright P@5 = 0.704). Under homology control, the advantage was clearest in the remote bucket (<50% similarity; R = 0.697 versus 0.633, 0.575 and 0.408), with the strongest overall bright/dark Top-K screening. Stable selected features recovered band-specific mechanisms: aromatic packing and clamp asymmetry in GFP-like proteins, charge/clamp balance in Red proteins, and flexibility-risk/bulky-contact features in Far-red proteins.
  Source code, feature tables and evaluation scripts are available from the first author upon request. Contact: yuchenak05@gmail.com

AI.tldr: 提出了一种以发色团为中心的机制图算法(CRO-GNN)用于荧光蛋白量子产率预测，通过将PDB结构转化为3D残基图、划分为三个发色团区域(酚盐、桥接、咪唑啉酮)并进行通道-信号-区域传播，生成52个非身份特征用于波段特异性ExtraTrees回归。在531蛋白基准上达到最佳性能(R=0.772)，尤其在同源性<50%的远程桶中优势明显(R=0.697 vs 基线0.408-0.633)，并恢复了波段特异性机制。
AI.motivation: 现有蛋白质语言模型和发射带平均值只能捕捉全局趋势，无法建模局部物理信号如何作用于特定发色团区域来影响量子产率。
AI.method: 将PDB结构转换为带类型的3D残基图，注册到成熟CRO状态，划分为酚盐、桥接、咪唑啉酮三个区域，通过通道-信号-区域传播生成121个富集特征，去除身份捷径后保留52个非身份特征，使用波段特异性ExtraTrees回归进行预测。
AI.result: 在531蛋白基准上达到R=0.772±0.008, MAE=0.131±0.002，超越Band mean(R=0.632)、ESM-C(R=0.734)和SaProt(R=0.731)；在明亮筛选中Bright P@5=0.704；在同源性<50%的远程桶中R=0.697，显著优于基线(0.408-0.633)。
AI.conclusion: 该算法通过内在可解释的机制特征实现了优越的QY预测性能，特别是在低同源性区域表现突出，并成功恢复了不同波段蛋白质的已知物理机制(如GFP-like的芳香堆积与钳不对称、Red蛋白的电荷/钳平衡、Far-red蛋白的柔性风险与庞大接触特征)。

title: Inductive Venn-Abers and related regressors
summary: Venn-Abers predictors are probabilistic predictors that enjoy appealing properties of validity, but their major limitation is that they are applicable only to the case of binary classification, with a recent extension to bounded regression. We generalize them to the case of unbounded regression, which requires adding an element of conformal prediction. In our simulation and empirical studies we investigate the predictive efficiency of point regressors derived from Venn-Abers regressors and argue that they somewhat improve the predictive efficiency of standard regressors for larger training sets.

AI.tldr: 本文将Venn-Abers预测器从二分类和有界回归推广到无界回归，并引入共形预测元素。实验表明，基于Venn-Abers回归器的点回归器在较大训练集上能略微提升标准回归器的预测效率。
AI.motivation: Venn-Abers预测器在二分类场景表现优异，但在无界回归场景下存在适用性限制，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过引入共形预测元素，将Venn-Abers预测器从有界回归推广到无界回归场景。
AI.result: 模拟和实证研究表明，基于Venn-Abers回归器的点回归器在较大训练集上比标准回归器有略微更好的预测效率。
AI.conclusion: 成功将Venn-Abers预测器扩展至无界回归，提升了回归任务的预测效率。

title: UniPool: A Globally Shared Expert Pool for Mixture-of-Experts
summary: Modern Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures allocate expert capacity through a rigid per-layer rule: each transformer layer owns a separate expert set. This convention couples depth scaling with linear expert-parameter growth and assumes that every layer needs isolated expert capacity. However, recent analyses and our routing probe challenge this allocation rule: replacing a deeper layer's learned top-k router with uniform random routing drops downstream accuracy by only 1.0-1.6 points across multiple production MoE models. Motivated by this redundancy, we propose UniPool, an MoE architecture that treats expert capacity as a global architectural budget by replacing per-layer expert ownership with a single shared pool accessed by independent per-layer routers. To enable stable and balanced training under sharing, we introduce a pool-level auxiliary loss that balances expert utilization across the entire pool, and adopt NormRouter to provide sparse and scale-stable routing into the shared expert pool. Across five LLaMA-architecture model scales (182M, 469M, 650M, 830M, and 978M parameters) trained on 30B tokens from the Pile, UniPool consistently improves validation loss and perplexity over the matched vanilla MoE baselines. Across these scales, UniPool reduces validation loss by up to 0.0386 relative to vanilla MoE. Beyond raw loss improvement, our results identify pool size as an explicit depth-scaling hyperparameter: reduced-pool UniPool variants using only 41.6%-66.7% of the vanilla expert-parameter budget match or outperform layer-wise MoE at the tested scales. This shows that, under a shared-pool design, expert parameters need not grow linearly with depth; they can grow sublinearly while remaining more efficient and effective than vanilla MoE. Further analysis shows that UniPool's benefits compose with finer-grained expert decomposition.

AI.tldr: 提出UniPool架构，将MoE中每层专属专家替换为全局共享专家池，在多个规模（182M-978M参数）上提升验证损失/困惑度，并实现专家参数与深度解耦（子线性增长），使用仅41.6%-66.7%的专家参数即可匹配或超越传统MoE。
AI.motivation: 传统MoE每层独立配备专家集合导致专家参数随深度线性增长，但实验发现深层路由可被随机路由替代而性能损失极小（仅1.0-1.6个点），表明其存在冗余。因此希望设计一种更高效的专家分配机制，解耦深度与专家参数增长。
AI.method: 将每层独立专家集替换为全局共享专家池（Shared Pool），各层通过独立的路由器访问该池；引入池级辅助损失（Pool-level Auxiliary Loss）确保专家均衡利用；采用NormRouter实现稀疏且尺度稳定的路由。
AI.result: 在五个LLaMA架构规模（182M-978M）上训练30B tokens后，UniPool持续优于标准MoE基线；验证损失最高降低0.0386；使用仅41.6%-66.7%专家参数即可匹配或超越标准MoE。
AI.conclusion: 共享专家池设计解耦了深度与专家参数增长，专家参数可以子线性增长；池大小成为明确的深度缩放超参数；该架构与细粒度专家分解兼容。

title: Learning to Cut: Reinforcement Learning for Benders Decomposition
summary: Benders decomposition (BD) is a widely used solution approach for solving two-stage stochastic programs arising in real-world decision-making under uncertainty. However, it often suffers from slow convergence as the master problem grows with an increasing number of cuts. In this paper, we propose Reinforcement Learning for BD (RLBD), a framework that adaptively selects cuts using a neural network-based stochastic policy. The policy is trained using a policy gradient method via the REINFORCE algorithm. We evaluate the proposed approach on a two-stage stochastic electric vehicle charging station location problem and compare it with vanilla BD and LearnBD, a supervised learning approach that classifies cuts using a support vector machine. Numerical results demonstrate that RLBD achieves substantial improvements in computational efficiency and exhibits strong generalization to problems with similar structures but varying data inputs and decision variable dimensions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RLBD框架，利用强化学习（REINFORCE算法）自适应选择Benders分解中的割，以加速两阶段随机规划的求解，在电动汽车充电站选址问题上相比传统BD和LearnBD方法显著提升了计算效率。
AI.motivation: Benders分解在处理两阶段随机规划时，随着割的数量增加，主问题规模膨胀，导致收敛速度慢。
AI.method: 提出RLBD框架，使用基于神经网络的随机策略自适应选择割，策略通过策略梯度方法（REINFORCE算法）训练。
AI.result: 在电动汽车充电站选址问题上，RLBD相比原始BD和基于SVM的LearnBD方法，计算效率大幅提升，且对类似结构的问题具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: RLBD能有效加速Benders分解的收敛，且对数据输入和决策变量维度变化具有鲁棒性。

title: Dynamic Controlled Variables Based Dynamic Self-Optimizing Control
summary: Self-optimizing control is a strategy for selecting controlled variables, where the economic objective guides the selection and design of controlled variables, with the expectation that maintaining the controlled variables at constant values can achieve optimization effects, translating the process optimization problem into a process control problem. Currently, self-optimizing control is widely applied to steady-state optimization problems. However, the development of process systems exhibits a trend towards refinement, highlighting the importance of optimizing dynamic processes such as batch processes and grade transitions. This paper formally introduces the self-optimizing control problem for dynamic optimization, termed the dynamic self-optimizing control problem, extending the original definition of self-optimizing control. A novel concept, "dynamic controlled variables" (DCVs), is proposed, and an implicit control policy is presented based on this concept. The paper theoretically analyzes the advantages and generality of DCVs compared to explicit control strategies and elucidates the relationship between DCVs and traditional controllers. Moreover, this paper puts forth a data-driven approach to designing self-optimizing DCVs, which considers DCV design as a mapping identification problem and employs deep neural networks to parameterize the variables. Three case studies validate the efficacy and superiority of DCVs in approximating multi-valued and discontinuous functions, as well as their application to dynamic optimization problems with non-fixed horizons, which traditional self-optimizing control methods are unable to address.

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态自优化控制（DSOC）概念，引入“动态被控变量”（DCVs）及其基于隐式控制策略的框架，采用深度神经网络实现数据驱动设计，解决传统自优化控制无法处理的动态优化问题（如间歇过程、等级过渡），并通过三个案例验证了DCVs在多值/不连续函数逼近及非固定时域优化中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有自优化控制主要针对稳态优化问题，但流程工业精细化趋势要求优化动态过程（如批次过程、等级过渡），因此需要将自优化控制思想拓展到动态优化领域。
AI.method: 提出“动态被控变量”（DCVs）概念及隐式控制策略；将DCV设计转化为映射辨识问题，利用深度神经网络进行参数化建模。
AI.result: 三个案例验证了DCVs在逼近多值/不连续函数方面的优越性，并能应用于非固定时域动态优化问题，而传统自优化控制方法无法处理此类问题。
AI.conclusion: DCVs相对于显式控制策略具有理论优势与通用性，并阐明了DCVs与传统控制器的关系，为动态过程的自优化控制提供了新范式。
